hymns.title: A Dahte Hong Pai Un
A Hah’n Bang Hih
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Aw! ngai un, a lamdang bel tangthu
Mangthang mi lak a sim sa;
Vantung pan a hong tuak suk Zeisu
Haksa pi’n hong hon’ khia hi.

Sakkik:
Kua’n a si ding hon’khia a hiam?
Amah’n bang hih? Koi ah om tu’n?
Vantung ah hong thumsak hi.

Verse 2
Van a a sang mahmah vantung mi
Hong gum zo ding om lo a,
Singlamteh tung a thuak pa bek hi,
Pasian thum lak a khat Pa.

Verse 3
Hih lamdang tangthu in zui lai a,
Lungsim leh kam lawpsak hi;
Van ah hong thumsak Siampi Lianpa
A min Zeisu Khazih hi.

hymns.title: A Hing Tawntung Kha Siangtho Mang Sak Den Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A hing tawntung Kha Siangtho in piang sak hi,
Hih leitung a, nuntak na nei khempeuh,
Nuntak na sih ni tawlnga nei lo in pai,
Na min than’na zingsol la in kisa,
Hih leitung mite in siat na ngak in om,
Mite lungsim siat na bek tawh dim hi.

Verse 2
Aw, Topa Nang sung sian’tho na a dim hi,
Nang sungah nuntak na ciktui luang hi.
Na Kha Siangtho in manlang takin khauh sak,
Mawhna, sihna te tungah gual zo hi
Ko kha dim sak in la, hong siangtho sak in,
Ka gal uh ka zawh na ding hong huh in!

Verse 3
Lungnop na ding pan, hak sat na sungah mang,
Nat theihna, sih theihna khuamial sungah,
Nong itna khuavak hong taang sak tawntung in,
Lungkham gim na a thuak mi hong keem in,
Lungsim kha hang te Nang deih bang hi hen,
Tho a a dang tawh kibat kik na ding!

Verse 4
Aw, Nang sung bek ah ko hoihna ding kimuang,
Tanglai pek a Na mite hong omna,
Na hehpihna guah bang a a zu sak den,
Zing daii bangin nisial a thak a suak,
Kote lam et bang lungsim tha hong guan in,
Tha khauhna ngah in lam ka pai nangun! A men.

hymns.title: A Hoih Huan Sung Thu Ngetna
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu hong ngak na mun huan sung khat om,
Tua in a lamdang mun hoih khat hi;
A vangliat na khuavak pi a taang hi,
A hoih huan sung thu ngetna mun ah.

Sakkik:
Aw, a hoih huan sung, Huan sung thu ngetna a hi,
Aw, a hoih huan sung thu ngetna hi;
Hong Gum pa’n hong ngak a,
Kongkhak pi hong hon’ sak,
A hoih huan sung thu ngetna mun ah.

Verse 2
Zeisu hong ngakna mun huan sung khat om,
Vangik pua khawm in Amah ka zuan,
A kam sang pan hehnep na aw ka za,
A hoih huan sung thu ngetna mun ah.

Verse 3
Zeisu hong ngakna mun huan sung khat om,
Amah tawh kimu ding in hong sam,
Topa tawh kimu kiho khawm ding in,
A hoih huan sung thu ngetna mun ah.

hymns.title: A Kha Nuai Ah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A kha nuai ah lungmauang takin ka om a,
Khuamial pha a huihpi nak nun’ hang in,
Ka muang thei hi, hong kem ding hi, ka thei hi;
Hong tan zo hi, Ama ta ka hi hi.

Sakkik:
A kha nuai ah hong itna pan
Kuamah’n hong khen zo lo ding;
A kha nuai ah keima kha teeng ding,
Lungmaung tak om tawntung ding.

Verse 2
A kha nuai ah dah ciang belh ding in pha hi.
Ama kiang a tawldam nuam lung gulh ing.
Leitung in hong damsak zo lo ciang in ah;
Tua lai ah heh nep lungdam na ka ngah.

Verse 3
A kha nuai ah nop na bangzah tak manpha!
Nuntak haksat na bei mateng beel ning.
Hong liah, hong dal; siatna’n hong su thei lo ding;
Zeisu sung khawl leng lungmuang tawntung hi’ng.

hymns.title: A Kigelh Hiam Ka Min
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa huahna ngaih sun ke’ng,
Kham leh ngun lung gulh ke’ng,
Vantung gam ciam masa ning,
Tuu kuan sung lut nuam ing,
Vantung gam laipi sungah
Na’ ciamteh na sungah,
A kigelh hiam keima min,
Zeisu aw, hong gen in.

Sakkik:
Gam ciamteh na sungah
Nuntak na lai sungah,
Vantung ka tun’ theih na’ng in
A kigelh hiam ka min.

Verse 2
Gun gei a, sehnel bang in
Ka mawhna tam hangin,
Topa aw, Nong tat na si
Kei aa ding kicing hi;
Na thu ciamteh na laipi
Mual thei lo ding taang hi.
“Na mawh si bang san hang in
Paak sak ning vuk bang in.”

Verse 3
A siangtho khuapi sungah
Innpi te taang mahmah;
Vangliat na ngah a mite;
A puan silh uh a tee;
Tua a pha te sia sak ding;
Nang mah tum thei lo ding;
Vantung mite’ cia’na ah
Ka om ding hi keimah.

hymns.title: A Kilawm Kongpite Kihon Ciang
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zan khuamial na ah i vakthap nawn kei ding,
Kilawm kongpi te kihon’ ciang;
Pasian’ khuavak a hih na khua i pai ding,
Kilawm kongpite kihon’ ciang.

Sakkik:
A kilawm kongpi kihon’ ciang,
A kilawm kongpi kihon’ ciang,
Tua’h Topa mu ding,
Tua tawh i lung nuam ding,
A kilawm kongpi ki hon’ ciang.

Verse 2
Natna, satna dahna te om nawn lo ding,
Kilawm kongpite kihon’ ciang;
Taangte bang in i lawmte tawh kipawl ding,
Kilawm kongpite kihon’ ciang.

Verse 3
Gen khiat zawh loh lawpna kei aa hi ta ding,
Kilawm kongpite kihon’ ciang;
Amah en leng tua zah a siangtho kicing,
Kilawm kongpite kihon’ ciang.

Verse 4
Leitung vangik mi nawngkai sak nawn lo ding,
Kilawm kongpite kihon’ ciang,
Nuam tawntung na ah Khazih tawh i teeng ding.
Kilawm kongpite kihon’ ciang.

hymns.title: A Lamdang Tangthu La Sa Ning
hymns.title_en: I Will Sing the Wondrous Story
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A lamdang tangthu la sa ning,
Zeisu kei taang ding si hi.
Vantung min than’n nusia a,
Singlamteh sihna thuak hi.

Sakkik:
A lamdang tangthu la sa ning,
Zeisu si hi kei tang ding.
Limlang tui thuk gei kikhop ciang,
Mi siangtho te tawh sa ning.

Verse 2
A gam mang te Zeisu’n zong hi,
Lam a khial tuute zong hi.
A khut tawh keimah hong pom hi.
Lampi ah hong kha kik hi.

Verse 3
Ci na te Zeisu’n damsak a,
A kipuk te zong phong hi.
Mit taw in a launa tam a,
Ahih hang hong gum ding hi.

Verse 4
Khuamial kei tung ah hong tung ta,
Dahna lampi ka zui ta,
Kei hong ompih in Topa aw,
Hong kem in lam hong hilh ta.

Verse 5
Sihna gun gal kah mateng in
Topa in hong cing ding hi.
I itte tawh kimu ding in,
Gun gal ah hong kha ding hi.

hymns.title: A Lian Pen Kumpipa
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A hong kum suk Topa Na min phatna ding la
Ko hong pia in. Vanglian minthang Topa
Leitung khempeuh zo a
Hong pai hong uk in la Beisa ni tawh.

Verse 2
Biakna nuamna hong pia Kote’ thu hong nget na
Na hong ngai in. Lam khial nei mite in
Thu muh kik na ding in
Lam hilh ding hong pai in Kha Siangtho aw.

Verse 3
Thu hilh Kha Siangtho aw Hilh ding hong pai in la
Tu’n hong pai aw. Siam na a om khempeuh
Kha Siangtho om khempeuh
Ko tung ah hong pia’n la Hong uk ta aw.

Verse 4
Nam thum pawl khat Pasian Topa nangmah a lian
Na min thang hen. Vantung gam sung nangmah
Na vanglian mi ding in
Nangmah a tawntung in Ka it ding hi.

hymns.title: A Maan Takpi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong gum Topa kei tang in si zo hi.
Mawh tan’ na pan kei hong suakta sak hi.
Pasian Tapa a um khempeuh te in
Nung ta tawntung ding hi.

Sakkik:
A maan takpi a nang kiangah kong cih in
A maan takpi a nang kiangah kong cih in
Pasian Tapa a um te maan tak in
A hing tawntung ding hi.

Verse 2
Topa tung mawhna tam ke’n nga zo hi.
Ka mawhna lei ba bang hong loh sak hi.
Topa thu a um mi khempeuh te in
Hing tawntung ding uh hi.

Verse 3
Ka zawngkhal hangin ah thupha um ning
Ka mawh, ka khial zong hong thu piak muang ning
Pasian thu umte lungdam na ding in
Hing tawntung ngah ding hi.

Verse 4
A kilawm kei zong um khial ngei kei ning
A pai nuam pai un, hong ngai ding ci in
Na kiko un Topa thu umte
Hing tawntung ding uh hi.

hymns.title: A Mangte Zong In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A mangte hong zong in hong zol ngeu ngeu,
Mual sang tung a lam a khial mite;
“Keimah hong zuan un,” hong ci kik leuleu
Topa’n tu ni in hong sam eite.

Sakkik:
Mual sang tung a gamla ah pai ni,
A vak mite la kik in;
Mawh nei mi ta’ng dinga si Tuu no
I honpa’ tuubuk ah khum in.

Verse 2
A mangte zong in, Zeisu lam lak in,
Tha hat lo kha leh a na lungsim,
Hot khiatna lampi sungah makaih in,
Nuntak tawntung na lampi lak in.

Verse 3
Tua bang in pai ni thupha nasem mi,
Khazih zui den ni, a ni sial in;
A bah mi lawp sak in; puk mi phong ni,
A mang mi lampi Zeisu lak ni.

hymns.title: A Manpha Pen Suang
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A manpha pen suang ke’n mu ing.
Lungdam in la ka sa.
Zeisu kei aa ci’n la sa ning,
Khazih la in sa ning.

Sakkik:
A manpha pen suan ke’n mu ing,
Lungdam in la ka sa.
Zeisu kei aa ci’n la sa ning!
Khazih la in sa ning.

Verse 2
Zeisu siampi ka Kumpi hi,
Khuavak kamsang pa hi.
Tokhom mai ah kamsang lianpa,
Ka van Kumpipa hi.

Verse 3
Amah to pa te’Topa hi,
Kumpi te’Kumpi hi;
A mah in thu maanna Ni hi,
A kha nuai ci damna

Verse 4
Kilemna ding kei tang hong si,
Kei tang A si hong bua;
A lamdang kei hong gum Pa hi.
Amah mah in hong gum.

hymns.title: A Manpha Si
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Manpha si, tawntung mahpha si,
Tu’n kei aa ding manpha,
Tua si ha’ng bek ka kha tawl dam,
Dah na teng bei sak hi.

Sakkik:
Aw lamdang hi tua sisan luang,
Gumpa pang pan phul khia
Vantung dong ah la in sa ning,
“A manpha bel sisan.”

Verse 2
Mangngilh ngei nawn peuh mah kei ni,
Zuau lo Pasian in ci;
“Note mawhna khialhna tang in
Ka Ta sisan ka bua.

Verse 3
Mawhna ka bawl tampi ka thei;
Mai zo diam tua zah pi,
A hih hang manpha si’n sawp hi,
Mawhna teng pua khia hi.

Verse 4
A ci mawh lungsim leh pumpi,
Si ding a lum zong in,
Lung nuam takin kei ka si ding,
Tua manpha sisan ha’ng.

hymns.title: A Min Bangzah Ngaih Hiam
hymns.title_en: How Sweet the Name of Jesus Sounds
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu a min bang zah ngaih hiam,
A um ta ding in ah,
Gimna natna damsak a nuam,
Launa a hawlkhia ta.

Verse 2
A zan gawp lungsim damsak hi.
Dahna lungsim nuamsak.
Kha Siangtho kial vahna pia hi.
A gim mi tawl damsak.

Verse 3
A to suangpi it huai minpha,
Gal panna belhna hi.
A tam bel itna hehpihna,
A kikholna lian hi.

Verse 4
Zeisu ka lawmpa, tuu cingpa,
Ka siampi, ka kumpi,
Ka Topa hin’n lam a pha a,
Phat tawntung ngah pah hi.

hymns.title: A Nai A Gamla Lote Ah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A nai a gamla lote ah
An te min khin zo ta hi;
Sim le zo, mual lo zang lo ah
An vuite min zo ta hi.

Sakkik:
Topa aw, kote hong thum na,
Hong ngai in an nei Topa;
An la ding mi hong kuan sak in
An lak hun a kheng ma in.

Verse 2
Zingsang phalvak tuung a hi zong,
Sun kim ciang a hi zong in,
Hong kuan sak lai in nitak zong
Lo lai teng an khawm ding in.

Verse 3
Kuan meng un, Topa’ sawltak te,
An vuite kuai zo ta hi.
An kaikhawm khin ni hong tum teh
Lung dam in na ciah ding hi.

hymns.title: A Nuam Inn
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vantung gam lam ka zin na ding in,
Zeisu in hehpih in lam hong sial,
I gal khempeuh a vek in zozo,
Hih lam ah hong pai un u leh nau.

Sakkik:
Gam nuam ah om ding in, om ding in, om ding in,
Hih lam ah hong pai un u leh nau,
Gam nuam ah om ding in, om ding in, om ding in,
Hih lam ah hong pai un u leh nau.

Verse 2
Hehpihna lam tu in zong un la,
Tua zawh ciang khuamial na hong bei ding,
A umte in vantung gam tung ding,
Na up leh hih vantung gam lam ah.

Verse 3
Zeisu in hehpih in ah hong sam,
A um lo mite um sak ding in,
Hong hehpihna lianpi i mu ding,
Pasian gam nuam sungah i lut ding.

hymns.title: A Nung Ciangin I Zo Ding Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa Zeisu’n hong sam hi,
I mai ah koih khin zo hi,
Thaman la ding pai un ci, Vantung pan,
Itna kam khum tawh hong sam,
Mawhna khuamial sung om mi,
Dam tak in Topa’n hong sam, Hong nai hi.

Sakkik:
Nung ciang a kiang kimu ding,
Nung ciang a kiang kimu ding,
Nung ciang a Topa Zeisu tawh maang ding hi.
Nung ciang a kiang kimu ding,
Nung ciang a kiang kimu ding,
Nung ciang a Topa Zeisu tawh maang ding hi.

Verse 2
Lam hong hilh bang zui ding hi,
I tun’ na ding inn nuam ah,
Hong zui un, ci’n hong sam hi, Vantung pan,
Tua ciang kikhen nawn lo ding,
Lawp a i lam et na bang,
Upna bang in khial lo in, Hong nai hi.

Verse 3
Ze et bawlsiat i thuak zong,
I inn ding vantung om hi,
Zeisu’n hong it veve hi, Vantung pan,
Topa siamna a lian pi,
A kam ciam peel ngei lo hi.
A tawntung i phat ding hi, Hong nai hi.

hymns.title: A Nung Ciangin Kimu Kik Ding
hymns.title_en: We Shall Meet By and By
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
I ki muh na’ng gun gal khat ah,
Nung caingin, nung ciangin,
Khuamial hun om ngei loh na ah,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin,
Khual zin gim na bei khin a,
Min than’ na tawh gal zo in,
Ni bang in i taang ding hi,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin.

Verse 2
Min than’na gawsem i tum ding,
Nung caingin, nung ciangin,
Ei hong gupna la i sa ding,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin,
A kisia ngei lo vantung,
Lungdam gualnop den na mun
Gun gal thawn in la sa ding,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin.

Verse 3
Zeisu mu in kibang ta ding,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin,
Kisia thei lo lukhu ngah ding.
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin,
A thu bang kicing ding a,
Vantung mi nasem te in,
Ei’ na hong sep sak ding hi,
Nung ciangin, nung ciangin.

hymns.title: A Sangna Lam Ka Kah To Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A sangna lam ka kah to hi,
Ni sim a thak ka tung to hi;
Kah to kawm kong thum lai Topa,
“Hong suan to in a sang zaw ah.”

Sakkik:
Topa aw hong dom to in la,
Ka muh ngei nai loh van zang ah
Upna tawh hong ding to sak in,
A sang zaw ah hong suan to in.

Verse 2
Lung man’na, lau na tam na ah
Mi dang te a ut hang in ah,
Kei ka lungsim a ut kei hi;
Kei’ tup na a sang zaw na hi.

Verse 3
A sang zaw a mi siangte’ la
Upna tawh keimah in ka za
Dawi mangpa’n thal in hong kap hang
Ka sang zaw nuam hi leitung sang.

Verse 4
A sang pen dong ka kah nuam hi.
Vangliat na taang ka mu nuam hi.
Vantung ka muh dong, Topa aw,
A sang zaw ah hong pi to aw.

hymns.title: A Sawt Loin Inn Ah Ciah Ding
hymns.title_en: In a Little While We’re Going Home
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lampi ah hong lung nuam sak ding la khat sa ni
A sawt lo in ah inn ah ciah ding;
Zan khuamial bei ding, ni taang tawntung na sungah
A sawt lo in ah inn ah ciah ding.

Sakkik:
A sawt lo in ah, a sawt lo in ah,
Tuipi hual i kan tan ding;
Eite kimu ding huihpi nung a ven’ ciang in
A sawt lo in ah inn ah ciah ding.

Verse 2
Sep ding i muh peuh i khut in i sem ding hi
A sawt lo in ah inn ah ciah ding;
Pasian hehpihna in i tha hong khauhsak ding
A sawt lo in ah inn ah ciah ding.

Verse 3
A gim khe te’ aa ding lam i maai sak ding hi
A sawt lo in ah inn ah ciah ding;
Itna lungsim kizel kim in hoih na lawh hen!
A sawt lo in ah inn ah ciah ding.

Verse 4
Lung khamna peng in tawldam na gal khatah om
A sawt lo in ah inn ah ciah ding;
Tua khuapi nuam sungah khitui luan’na om lo
A sawt lo in ah inn ah ciah ding.

hymns.title: A Sawt Loin Lung Khamna Bei In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Sawt lo in lung khamna bei in, Inn i tung ding!
Sawt lo in huih meii-pi bei in, Inn i tung ding!
Tawmvei sung singlamteh pua in,
Zei-su tawh kham lukhu khu ding;
Sawt lo in lung khamna bei in, Inn i tung ding!

Sakkik:
Hunte manlang in bei in, I tawl nga den ding,
Lung khamna om nawn lo ding, inn i tun’ ciang.

Verse 2
Sawt lo in kah na zan bei in, Inn i tung ding!
Sawt lo in eite hong cing in, Inn i tung ding!
Sawt lo in mawhna te zo in,
Sawt lo in I om khawm den ding;
Sawt lo in lung khamna bei in, Inn i tung ding!

Verse 3
Sawt lo in nuntak na bei in, Inn i tung ding!
Sawt lo in kam khum pen gen in, Inn i tung ding!
Sawt lo in khau bang kihual in,
Khanan gam lam zui i pai ding;
Sawt lo in lung khamna bei in, Inn i tung ding!

hymns.title: A Sia Ding Hon Khia In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A sia ding hon khia in, A si ding don in,
Mawhna leh sihna pan in dok khia in;
Kah in lam khial mite, Phong in a puk te,
Zeisu’ hotna thei sak in a maute.

Sakkik:
A sia ding hon khia in, A si ding don in;
Zeisu in hehpih hi, A hon ding hi.

Verse 2
Amau don ta kei leh, Amah’n ngak lai veh,
Sang lai ding hi amau kisik peuh leh;
Va sam in citak in, Damtak va zol in,
Um peuh le uh mawh kiphel maan takin.

Verse 3
Dawi mangpa net cip sa Mihing lungsim pha,
Hehpihna thupha in phong kik thei a;
Itna tawh va su in, Phong leng dam takin,
Khuang khau tat sa peh bang ngaih ngei bang in.

Verse 4
A sia ding hon khia in, Phamawh sep loh in,
Sep zawh nang tha hong pia ding Topa in;
A kawcik lampi ah Zol teitei in la,
Hilh in ama tang Topa si khin ta.

hymns.title: A Taang Tawntung Na Mun
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tua lai gam om ni tum loh na, Van ah ni taang tawntung,
Tua lai nitak om ngei lo hi; Topa vaang in taang hi.

Sakkik:
Singlamteh e’n i puak leh, Kham lukhu khu ding,
Mi hoih te sung i ten’ leh, Khuavak sung i om den ding.

Verse 2
Tua lai mun om kilem na gam, Gim na om nawn loh na,
Tua lai huihpi zong nung hiauhiau, I tun’ na’ng tua mun ah.

Verse 3
Tua lai inn om, minthang in om, A ki gen van inn nuam;
I tun’ na ding vantung inn nuam, Ei hong dawn ding tua lai.

Verse 4
I pum lui na i nusiat leh, Manlang in hong kheng ding,
A taang van zinpa kiang zuan leng, I lung nuam tawntung ding.

hymns.title: A Tawntung Ang Sungah Om Ning
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Aw, ki pawl na nuam na kei aa hi zo,
Tawntung ang sungah kei khawl ta ing!
Aw, nopsak na lian, aw nop na siangtho,
Tawntung ang sungah kei khawl ta ing!

Sakkik:
Khawl ing, khawl ing, Lau na pan lung muang khin zo ing,
Khawl ing, khawl ing, Tawntung ang sungah kei khawl ta ing!

Verse 2
Hih khual zin na ah lung muang tak tak ing,
Tawntung ang sungah kei khawl ta ing!
A ni ni’n ka lam nuamsa semsem ing,
Tawntung ang sungah kei khawl ta ing!

Verse 3
Ke’n bang kihta ding, kei bang lau nawn ding,
Tawntung ang sungah kei khawl ta ing!
Honpa tawh om khawm nop na lian ngah ing,
Tawntung ang sungah kei khawl ta ing!

hymns.title: A Tawntung Ihmu Cip Ding I Hi Kei
hymns.title_en: We Shall Sleep, But Not Forever
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ihmu leng khangma cip lo in Min than’na khua hong vak ding,
Hin’ kik ni ciang kimu kik leng, I kikhen nawn kei ding hi.
A thuk bel gunpi sung pan in, Sehnel gam khampi pan in
Mual dawn, mual kuam gamlak pan in, Mi tampi hong tho ding hi.

Sakkik:
Ihmu leng khangma cip lo in Min than’na khua vak ding hi,
Hin’ kik ni ciang kimu kik in, I kikhen nawn kei ding hi.

Verse 2
Paak hoih bang a i deih mahmah I lung hih mawh phat mahmah,
I ang sung pan i lak khiat ciang, Lian mahmah hi, I dah na,
Ni a tum dek mateng in ah, Han kiang ngak a om i hi,
Eite paak i it man in ah, Lam et na bei bang ki sa.

Verse 3
Eite a tawntung han sungah Khangma cip ding i hi kei,
Hong sap ciang in, thupha a pia, Topa’n thupha ngah ta hen,
Sihna om ngei nawn loh na mun, A kip tawntung khuapi ah,
Om na inn nuam ngah ding in ah, Hong deih leh hong sam ding hi.

hymns.title: A Tawntung Topa Tawh
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A tawntung Topa tawh, Amen hong ci sak in;
Sihna pan nun’tak na kammal; Tua nun’tak tawntung na,
I pumpi hong kep sak, Vakthap in, tai khia in,
Zan thapai tuipuan buk lam in, Ni khat sang’ inn nai zaw’ng.

Sakkik:
Inn nai zaw’ng, Inn nai zaw’ng, Ni khat sang’ inn nai zaw’ng.

Verse 2
Vantung ka Pa’ inn ah, Ka kha inn tawh ki nai,
Khat vei vei ka upna mit in, Kham kong pi te mu in!
Ka kha a sihbup ciang, Ka utna mun tung ding;
Mi siangtho te’ luah ding a taang, Zerusalem khua thak.

Verse 3
Meiipi hong kai manin, Lam et na teng bei khin;
Naw i vakhu bang in tuipi, Huihpi lak ah ka leeng,
Sawt lo in meii theng in, Tuipi leh huih dai in;
Ka kha lungnuam in, nuam tak in, A om hun ni ciang in.

Verse 4
Zingsang nitak ka za, Sun leh zankim ciang zong
A ngaih mahmah van mite’ aw La sak na ke’n ka za
Tua thawh kikna kammal, Tua gual zawh na aw ging!
Khatvei, “A tawntung Topa tawh,” Amen, ci sak lai in.

hymns.title: A Thu Ka Gen Gen Nuam Hi
hymns.title_en: I Love to Tell the Story
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A thu ka gen gen nuam hi Muh nai loh vantung na,
Zeisu leh Ama vaangpi, Zeisu leh hong itna!
Tua thu ka gen gen nuam hi Thuman ahih man in;
Ka lungsim hong kim sak hi, Thu dang te bang lo in.

Sakkik:
Tua thu ka gen gen nuam hi. Gen gen lai ning vantung ah;
Hih thu tul thei ngei lo pi Zeisu leh hong itna.

Verse 2
A thu ka gen gen nuam hi Lamdang semsem ka sa;
Ki ngaihsun thei nawn lo pi, Tua sang lamdangzaw na,
Tua thu ka gen gen nuam hi, Hong noptuam sak na lian;
Tua hang mah’n kong gen sawm hi, Tu in lawm aw, nang kiang.

Verse 3
A thu ka gen gen nuam hi. Gen gen leng nuam semsem,
Ka gen gen sa hi napi, Gen gen leng ngaih semsem,
Tua thu ka gen gen nuam hi Hot khiat na thu a pha;
A za nai lo mi om hi, Pasian’ hong gen thupha.

Verse 4
A thu ka gen gen nuam hi A thei pente in zong
An duh tui duh bang duh hi, Mi dang te sangin zong.
Vantung vangliat na sungah La thak ka sa ding hi;
Tua ciang in hih thu lui mah Kei in ka sa ding hi.

hymns.title: A Ut Khempeuhte
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
“A zate khempeuh” in hih thu tangko un,
Leitung khempeuh ah hih thupha tungsak un,
Mi na muh khempeuh hih nuam huai thu ko un;
“A ut khempeuh hong pai thei.”

Sakkik:
“A ut khempeuhte, a ut kheempeuhte,”
Cih aa thu a mual a guam va thawn sak un;
Hong it I Pa in hong sam kik lam khialte,
“A ut khempeuh hong pai un.”

Verse 2
Hong paite in zekai na ding thu om lo,
Lut theih lai in lut un, kong hon’ sa’n om zo;
Zeisu lo thuman hin’ na lampi om lo,
“A ut khempeuh hong pai thei.”

Verse 3
“A ut khempeuhte” thuciam a maantak hi,
“A ut khempeuhte” thuciam a kip ding hi,
“A ut khempeuhte” nuntak tawntung na hi;
“A ut khempeuh hong pai thei.”

hymns.title: A Vanglian Pa Aw Kong Thum Na Hong Ngai In
hymns.lyrics:
A vanglian Pa aw, kong thum hong ngai in,
Na ma hong ngak ko thupha hong pia’n.
Amen.

hymns.title: A Vanglian Topa Phat Un
hymns.title_en: Praise to the Lord, the Almighty
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa phat un, na khempeuh a piangsak Kumpipa hi!
Aw, ka kha aw, Amah phat in damna gup-na hong pia!
Tua thu zaten’n a biak inn sung zuan dingin,
Amah va bia khawm ciat ve

Verse 2
Topa phat un, na khempeuh a vekpi Ama uk hi.
A kha nuai-ah tawldam, lungmuan’ nopsak na a hong pia
Na deih nai hiam, A hoih-na na muh ciangin,
Ama hong piak khempeuh thei ni.

Verse 3
Topa phat un, na sep na bawl na khempeuh hong huh hi.
A mantak-in hehpih-na leh nopna tawh hong khuh dia.
Lung ngai ngai in, Amah tha hatna thei in.
Amah tawh va kipawl thei ni.

hymns.title: A Zo Zo Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A lian a neu kua ci lo, Mawh, mawh lo ci lo;
Zeisu’n vekpi aa ding khing, Sawtpi pek in.

Sakkik:
A zo zo hi! Takpi hi, Vekpi’n zo khin hi;
Hih hi, mawh neite i sap Mawhna pulak ding.

Verse 2
Sang pen A tokhom tung pan, Kum in hong sih ciang,
Na khempeuh a vek in zo; A aw ngai dih un.

Verse 3
Lung gim van pua nasem te’n, Koi ah sem na hiam?
Khawl dih in Amah’n zo zo, Sawtpi pek in.

Verse 4
Na van gik pi teng kia in, Zeisu khe kiang khia’n
Amah bekbek kiang ding in, Na khempeuh cin’ khin.

Verse 5
Zeisu nasep na muang in, Na up theih mateng,
Han ciam na in kimang lo, Sihna hong tun zaw.

hymns.title: Aksi Taang A Om Diam?
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tu ni in ah tua gam nuam ke’n ka ngaihsun hi,
Ni tum ciang in ah ka tung ding hi;
Hehpihna tawh Honpha kiang ka din’ ciang in ah,
Ka lu tung aksi taang a om diam?

Sakkik:
Ka lu tung aksi taang, aksi taang a om diam?
Ni tak a ni a tum ciang in ah
Tawldam na inn sungah ka khan’ lawm ciang in ah
Ka lu tung aksi taang a om diam?

Verse 2
Topa hatna sungah nasem in thu ngen ding
Ka ngah mi bang kei hong hi sak in,
Min than’ ni’n aksi taang kei aa ding hi kha ding
Amah phatna tuihual bang om ciang.

Verse 3
Ama mai ka et ciang bang zah in lungdam ding,
A khe phung ah suangmanpha koih ding;
Kham khuapi sungah lungdam na hong khang sak ding,
Ka lu tung aksi taang a om diam?

hymns.title: Amah Ka It Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Leitung nopna te lunggulh nawn kei ing,
Si sang hang in launa pan suakta ta’ng,
Singlamteh phung ah ka lungsim nga ing,
Zeisu si in vuk bang in hong ngo sak zo hi.

Sakkik:
Ka it hi, ka it hi, Amah’n hong it masa,
Kalani khuam tung gupna hong lei sak hi.

Verse 2
Mawhna sungah khatvei ka mangtang hi,
Khatvei mawhna sila ka hi zo hi,
Pasian ka heh sak ding ka lau ngei hi,
Ahih hang Khazih si in nitna teng sil hi.

Verse 3
Kok bulh na thuak ngei hang tu’n suakta ing,
Khuamial sung om ngei hang tu’n khuavak mu’ng;
Si ngei zo hih hang tu’n Khazih sung hing,
Hong piak khiat kilem na leitung teng ka gen ding.

hymns.title: Amah’n Hong Kha
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Amah’n hong kha hih thu mahmah
Hehnepna dim thupha a hi;
Ka sepna, ka pai na teng ah
Pasian’ khut in kei hong kha hi.

Sakkik:
Amah’n hong kha, Amah’n hong kha,
Ama khut tawh Amah’n hong kha;
A’ nung maantak ka zui ding hi,
Ama khut in kei hong kha hi.

Verse 2
Khatvei leh Eden bang nuam na,
Khatvei leh khuamial na thukpi
Bang ka tuak hang muan’na lau na
Ama khut in kei hong kha hi.

Verse 3
Phun lo, puam lo, lungkim takin,
Topa, Na khut ka len nuam hi;
Bang bang tuak zong, bang lungkham na!
Ka Pasian in kei hong kha hi.

Verse 4
Na hehpihna tawh gal zo a,
Nasep ka khit ciang a vekpi,
Sih ding lau lo; Pasian in ah
Zawdan gun gal ah hong kha hi.

hymns.title: Amah’n Ka Mawhna Teng Lakhia Zo
hymns.title_en: He Has Taken My Sins Away
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lungsim leh aw in Topa phat ning,
Ama sung ka kipaak ding;
La in sa ning lamdang hong itna,
Ke’n sasa ning hih la.

Sakkik:
Amah’n ka mawhna teng lakhia zo,
A min siang phat un, A min siang phat un,
Amah’n ka mawhna teng lakhia zo,
Haleluiah Min phat un!

Verse 2
Nopna khawlna ngah ding Ama kiang,
Ka mawhna tawh ka pai ciang;
Ka nget hong za in, hong khah khia ta,
Ke’n sasa ning hih la.

Verse 3
Ka hu tawpna tawh Amah phat ning,
Sihna ka zawh man in ah;
Amah phat ning a tawntung in ah,
Ke’n sasa ning hih la.

hymns.title: Amaute In La Thak A Sa Uh Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vantung inn sungah i lawm te’n la sa hi.
Hong gum Topa a min a phat na uh hi.
Leitung ah lung khamna teng mangngilh khin a
Mi siangthote’n lungdam na la thak a sa.

Sakkik:
Zeisu min phat ni, Kalani mual tung si zo hi.
Zeisu min phat hi. Sihna zo a hing kik ta hi.

Verse 2
Hong hehpihna phat na’ng la thak om kim hi,
A um ta ding thupha bel a hi ding hi.
Topa si a a piang kik a min than’ na
Ka gen na sa nuam bel hi Pasian kiangah.

Verse 3
Tu ni si pha tawh a kisil lo te in,
Tua la thak kuamah in sa thei lo ding hi.
Mawh neite mawhna phel a hong hehpihna
Phatna lungdam in lim tak in la sa ni.

hymns.title: Amen Sagih
hymns.lyrics: A men, A men, A men, A men, A men, A men, Amen.

hymns.title: An Late Kawh Om
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Mawhna lo lai a a hoih teng buh lom,
A kaikhawm ding an late koi a om.
Nasep na ding in thumaan phiau kawi keng,
Kuamah khawl lo ding an lak khit mateng.

Sakkik:
An late kaw’h om, Kua hong kuan nuam;
An lak pawi sungah kua hong lungdam khawm nuam;
Kua’n hong khop pih ding buh lom hoih teng,
Mawhna lo sung a om buh lom teng.

Verse 2
Zawi neu zong zui in zong in pha takpi,
Lopa a sau hang buh om thei ding hi.
Lam lian zong zui in la nusiat nei ke’n,
Vantung innpi sung hong tum khin uh hen.

Verse 3
Lo teng khempeuh ah an min khin ta hi,
Leitung khempeuh in lak ding bek ngak hi;
Ahih hang a la ding tawm, lak ding tam,
La mengmeng kei leng lah a sia ding tam.

Verse 4
Tua ahih ciang hong pai un phiaukawi tawh,
An pha kaikhawm un, no mihing te aw;
An nei Topa hong pai mateng sem un,
Tua ciang an lak pawi ah lungdam khawm un.

hymns.title: At Hun Ciang Bang A Ci Diam?
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ki itna khaici zingsang vawh un,
Ni sun lai takin zong na suan un,
Ni tak lam in zong na hahkat un,
Zan ciang in zong khaici na vawh un,
At hun ciang bang a ci diam?
At hun ciang bang a ci diam?

Sakkik:
Sun a hi zong, zan a hi zong vawh un,
Tha khauh lai bang, tha nem lai zong vawh un,
Nun’ tak sung hi leh sih khit hi leh,
A khop hun khat vei tung ding hi.

Verse 2
Khaici kim khat lampi ah kia hi.
Khaici kim khat suang lak ah kia hi.
Khaci kim khat ling lak ah kia hi.
Khai ci kim khat lei hoih ah kia hi.
At hun ciang bang a ci diam?
At hun ciang bang a ci diam?

Verse 3
Gimna thuak in khaici pha vawh un,
Lungsim siat hang khaici na vawh un,
Mi mai siat thuak hangin hahkat un,
Mai zum na thuak hangin lungkia ke’n,
At hun ciang bang a ci diam?
At hun ciang bang a ci diam?

hymns.title: Aw Gam Nuampi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
An leh leengtui gam ka tung zo,
A phatna teng kei aa hi zo;
Lungdam huai ni taang tawntung hi,
Kei ma khuamial leng mang zo hi.

Sakkik:
Aw gam nuampi, a pha gampi,
Mual sang tung pan ka gal et a
Kei aa ding bawl kholh sa innpi
Tuipi gal ah ka gal muh ta;
Ka ten’ na ding vantung khuapi
A taang pha hi tuipi gal ah.

Verse 2
Hong Honpa kei tawh hong vak khawm,
Nuam tak in kei tawh hong om khawm;
A khut in damtak in hong kai,
Vantung gamgi ciang dong ka nai.

Verse 3
Gamgi gal pan in paak namtui
Huih nung hiauhiau tawh hong kizui,
A vul ngei lo paak te palh in,
Hin’ na lui luang a tawntung in.

hymns.title: Aw Itna Kician
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Aw itna lian, mihing ngaih sut zawh loh dong,
Na tokhom mai ah thu ngen kong khuk din’,
Mong nei lo itna tua mun ah a om ding,
Nong kipawl a tawntung khat suak ding in.

Verse 2
Aw hin’na lian, amau muan’ lian bel na hi,
Upna kip leh a duai ngi i ngei itna,
Lawpna tawh thuak zo a, hang tak in thuak na,
Si zong, na zong naupang bang om in muang.

Verse 3
Leitung dah na bei sak in, Lungdam na pia’n,
Leitung kisiat na bei, kilem na pia’n,
Tai khua val sak, tawntung hin na , itna.

hymns.title: Aw Mi Sang Tampi’n Zai Sa Ding (1st Tune)
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Aw mi sang tampi’n zai sa ding
Hong taang vanglian phat ni.
Hong taang vanglian phat ni.
Ka Pasian vanglian bel na leh
Hong hehpihna phat ni.
Hong hehpihna phat ni.
Hong hehpihna phat ni.

Verse 2
Aw ka lim bel keimah hong kha’n
Tang bang dam na hong piang
Tang bang damna hong piang
Hih leitung mi khempeuh tung ah
Na thupha dim ta hen.
Na thupha dim ta hen.
Na thupha dim ta hen.

Verse 3
Aw Zeisu aw Nangmah siang bel
Dam na’ng leh lungdam na
Dam na’ng leh lungdam na
Mawh neite’n zong hong theih zawh na’ng
Ka muan’ lian bel na hi.
Ka muan’ lian bel na hi.
Ka muan’ lian bel na hi.

Verse 4
Mawhna khempeuh hong phel zo hi.
Mi vai tham zong gum khia
Mi vai tham zong gum khia
A si pha bel hong luang sak hi.
Ei te hong itna hi.
Ei te hong itna hi.
Ei te hong itna hi.

hymns.title: Aw Mi Sang Tampi’n Zai Sa Ding (2nd Tune)
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Aw mi sang tampi’n zai sa ding
Hong taang vanglian phat ni.
Ka Pasian vanglian bel na leh
Hong hehpihna phat ni.

Verse 2
Aw ka lim bel keimah hong kha’n
Tang bang dam na hong piang
Hih leitung mi khempeuh tung ah
Na thupha dim ta hen.

Verse 3
Aw Zeisu aw Nangmah siang bel
Dam na’ng leh lungdam na
Mawh neite’n zong hong theih zawh na’ng
Ka muan’ lian bel na hi.

hymns.title: Aw Tua Minthan’ Ding
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ze et na leh nasep nate bei ciang,
A hoih tuipi gei ah muang tak om ding,
Ka it mahmah Topa kiang nai om ding.
Tanglai pek pan min than’ na kei aa ding.

Sakkik:
Aw kei aa ding tua min than’ na,
Tua min than’ na, tua min than’ na
Hong hehpihna, Amai ka en ding ta,
Tua min than’ na in keima aa ding hi.

Verse 2
A bei ngei lo hehpihna hong piak ciang,
Vantung khua ah om na khat ka nei ding,
Topa maitang tua mun ka mu den ding.
Tanglai pek pan min than’ na kei aa ding.

Verse 3
Sawtpi a muhnop lawmte na om ding,
Lungdam na kiimkot ah gun bang luang ding,
Gumpa mai ah nuih mai bek om ka thei.
Tanglai pek pan min than’ na kei aa ding.

hymns.title: Aw Zeisu Bang Zah’n Ka It
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ka zak nop min khat a om hi, Tua min la’n sak tham hi;
Tua min bil ah la bang ka za, Leitung a min ngaih bel.

Sakkik:
Bang zah’n Zeisu ka it, Bang zah’n Zeisu ka it,
Bang zah’n Zeisu ka it, Hong it masak hang hi!

Verse 2
Hong gumpa itna hong gen hi, Hong Tan khia ding si hi;
Ama si manpha hong hilh hi, Mawh nei mi mawh mai na.

Verse 3
Pa neih khempeuh kei hong hilh hi, Ni sim sapna khempeuh;
Khuamial sung lam ka pai khak ciang, Lampi in hong taang sak.

Verse 4
Hong itna lung tak hong gen hi, Khialhna khempeuh phawk sak;
Dah nate Amah’n hong puakpih, Puakpih nuam dang om kei.

hymns.title: Aw Zeisu’n Hong Ngak
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Aw, Zeisu, kong pua’h na ding, A kikhak cip kongpi,
Lungnem takin na ngak hi, Tua kong kihon’ mateng,
Ama min pua u leh nau, Tapidaw te zumhuai,
Zumna tung ah zumhuai hi, Tua tan vei i din’ sak!

Verse 2
Aw, Zeisu’n kong hong kiu hi; En un na muh sak loh,
Liamma leh a khuk ling kual, A mai ah khitui luang,
Itna, theihna a gawm khawm, Lungduai takin hong ngak,
Aw, mawhna tung a mawhna, Kongpi khakcip mawkna.

Verse 3
Aw, Zeisu, kiniam khiatna, Kam tawh Nong hopih a,
“Nang ta’ng si ing, Ka tate Ding’ Kong bawl zo,” na ci.
Topa aw, tu’n maizum sa’n, Kong ka hong hon’uh hi;
Ko it Gumpa aw, tum in, Hong nusia ngei nawn ke’n.

hymns.title: Awngun Awngun La Kiko Un
hymns.title_en: Lift Up, Lift Up Your Voices Now
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Awngun, awngun la kiko un,
Lei tung khempeuh lungdam khin uh;
Topa’n vanglian pi tawh zo zo,
Zawh na tawh maang ding hi, i To.

Verse 2
Han khuk suang tawh kikhak zo lo,
Galkap te in zong cing zo lo;
Vanglian pi tawh han phukham a,
Zawh na vanglian tawh hong tho ta.

Verse 3
Ama zawh sa a thuak sa teng
Ei hong pia a, hawm sawn thei leng;
Lawpna, nuamna, lungnop na ding;
Ama zawh bang ei zong zo ding.

Verse 4
Gal zopa aw, hong do pih in,
Sihna pan khuavak hong tun in;
Nang nung tawn leng lung hi mawh lo,
Nang sung si leng Pasian kiang tho.

hymns.title: Bang Dang Hi Lo Zeisu Si Hi
hymns.title_en: Nothing But the Blood of Jesus
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Bang in ka mawh sawp siang thei,
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si in.
Bang in hong dam sak kik thei,
Bang dang hi lo, Zei su’ si in.

Sakkik:
Manpha hi hong luang si,
Vuk bang hong ngo sak si;
Tui dang ka thei kei hi,
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si hi.

Verse 2
Ka sian’na ding hih ka muh
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si hi;
Ka mawhna kiphel na’ng thu
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si hi.

Verse 3
Mawh mai sak bang dang hi lo,
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si hi;
A pha ka bawl hang hi lo,
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si hi.

Verse 4
Kei lamet na, lungnop na,
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si hi;
Kei in dikna ka ngahna,
Bang dang hi lo, Zeisu’ si hi.

hymns.title: Bang Ding Ngak Na Hiam
hymns.title_en: Why Do You Wait, Dear Brother?
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
U leh naute’n bang ngak hiam?
Sawtpi bang ding khawl lai uh hiam?
A sian’tho sak om na mun pia ding,
Topa Zeisu’n hong ngak lai hi.

Sakkik:
Bang ding? Bang ding? Tu in hong pai lo hiam?
Bang ding? Bang ding? Tu in hong pai lo na hiam?

Verse 2
Khawl lai le cin bang ngah ding,
Bang lam en lai uh a hi hiam?
Zeisu lo ngal hong gum dang om kei,
Zeisu lam lo, lam dang om kei.

Verse 3
Lungsim Kha siangtho sawl na,
Nangmah in thei lo na hi hiam?
Bang ding hong gupna sang lo na hiam?
Mawhna vangik suah lo ding maw?

Verse 4
U leh naute’n bang ngak hiam?
An lak hun in hong kheng ding hi,
Gum pa’n thupha nang hong pia nuam hi.
Zia nei leeng sihna gal om hi.

hymns.title: Bangzah In Ka Lung Nop
hymns.title_en: How Pleased and Blest Was I
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Bangzah in ka lung nuam, Mi honpi’ aw ka za,
Tu ni in Topa va zong ni,
Lung nuam tak in om ni, Zion mual ah pai ni,
Ki ciam in Topa min phat ni.

Verse 2
Zion maul ah nopna, Hehpihna tawh kidim,
A muan’ huai kulhpi tawh ki uum,
Tua mun va beel ciat ni, Ama min phat ding leh
Lungdam na la ngai ding pai ni.

Verse 3
Tua ah Davuih Topa’n, A kumpi tokhom koih,
Hehpihna tawh thuman khen ding,
Mi siangtho te phat ding, Mawhnei te dah sak ding,
Ki niam khiat in lungdam tek un.

Verse 4
Lungnop na hong tung hen, Lungdam na’n hong zui hen,
Mi khempeuh in thupha ngah in,
Topa nopna sang hen A pha deihna khangin,
Gen zawh loh thupha hong tung hen.

hymns.title: Bawng Ankuang Sungah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lupna luai om lo a Bawng ankuang sungah
I Topa ngek Zeisu hong kisial ciuciau
Van pan aksi te in hong en suk kiukiau
I Topa ngek Zeisu lopa tung ihmu.

Verse 2
Bawngte ham papa a Naungek khanglo ta
I Topa ngek Zeisu lah Kap se lo hi
Topa ngek Zeisu aw, ke’n nang kong ngai hi
Ka luai kiang ah hong cing in zingsang mateng.

Verse 3
Ka kiang ah naitak in Hong ompih in la
Ka Topa Zeisu aw kei hong ngai in la,
Naupang note khempeuh hong kem ciat in la
Nang kiang om theih na’ng in a pha’n hong bawl in.

hymns.title: Betlehem Khua Neu Mite Aw
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Betlehem khua neu mite aw, No lah ih sip keei maw
Aksi te’n zong hong khenkheng veh, Khua phawk kei si uh teh
En un, no khua kong zing lak Taang hi, tawntung Khuavak!
Kum khua a ki ngak no khua ah Tu zan hong tung pet mah!

Verse 2
Bang hiam na hong cih leh, Mazih Sung pan suak hi Khazih
Vantung mite’n na cing Amah Mi ihmut kal in ah
No zingsol te’n na vek un Nau suahna tangko un.
Pasian Kumpi A min thang hen, Mi tung nopna tung hen.

Verse 3
Lamdang lungdam huai na lianpi Hong kidai piakkhian hi
Pasian in thupha hong piak zia Tua bang ngei ngei a hi
Bil in kiza lo hang in, Mawhna a dim hang in,
Lungnem in saang nuamte sungah It huai Khazih lut pah.

Verse 4
Betlehem Naungek siangtho aw, Ko kiangah hong kum aw,
Kote mawhna hawl khin in la, Hong suak in ko sungah.
Nang suah thangko van mite’n Lungdam na thu hong gen.
Hong pai in hong om in ko tawh Emmauel Topa aw.

hymns.title: Buh Lomte Khawm In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zingsang tuh ding hi, ki itna khaici tuh in.
Sun a tuh bang zan in zong tuh in a ci.
A at hun ngak in la, a khop hun zong ngak in.
Lungdam na tawh buh lomte i khawm ding hi.

Sakkik:
Buh lomte khawm in, buh lomte khawm in.
Lungdam na tawh buh lomte i khawm ding hi.
Buh lomte khawm in, buh lomte khawm in.
Lungdam na tawh buh lomte i khawm ding hi.

Verse 2
Nisa sungah tuh in, a liap sung zong tuh in.
Phalbi leh tuuk lai lung man’na om lopi.
Nasep na zawh ciangin kikhop hun hong tung ding.
Lungdam na tawh buh lomte i khawm ding hi.

Verse 3
Kap kawm in pai in la, Topa aa ding tuh in.
Kisiat na in a hong dah sak hang a ci.
Kahna khit ciang in ah Topa Hong sam ding a,
Lungdam na tawh buh lomte i khawm ding hi.

hymns.title: Ci Damin Nipi Khat Sung
Ciamna Kip Thupha
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ciamna kip thupha; Zeisu kei a! Pasian vanglian bang hong ciamsak na pha.
Hot khiatna luah pa, Pasian lei sa, Kha Siangtho a suak, si a sawpsa.

Sakkik:
Ka gengen ding hi, ka sasa ding Hong Honpa phatna sun ni loh in
Ka gengen ding hi, ka sasa ding Hong Honpa phatna sun ni loh in.

Verse 2
Thu man’ na cing a, cing hi nuam na, Ka mit kha’n ka mu hi lianpi nuam na.
Vantung mite in ka bil sungah Hehpihna itna hong gen ka za.

Verse 3
Thu man’ na cing hi, tawlnga khin hi. Hong Honpa sung lung nuam in ka om hi.
Vil kawm ngak kawm in ka ento hi. Ama hoihna, itna hong dim hi.

hymns.title: Dai Dide Zan Siangtho
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Dai dide! zan siangtho! Mial khikhe tawm sim loh
Gal a Naungek lupna kiim, Nu siangtho leh a ma kiim
Naungek limtak ihmu, Naungek limtak ihmu.

Verse 2
Dai dide! zan siangtho! Tha khat in, theih kolh loh,
Tuucing te kiim taang pempam Vantung pan phatna puak kham;
“Khazih hong suak zo hi, Khazih hong suak zo hi.

Verse 3
Dai dide! zan siangtho! Mi pil te’n van en to,
Lam hilh aksi taang zui in, Lut uh hi biakna lui in;
I Kumpi hong suak zo, I Kumpi hong suak zo.

Verse 4
Dai dide! zan siang pen! Aksi pi’n hong taan hen,
Vantung mite bang in ah Sa un Kumpi phatna la;
Hong Honpa hong suak hi, Hong Honpa hong suak hi.

hymns.title: Danzila Pawlte
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Thukham bang zui ding in ah, Guih theih kham theih zu
Phat un a taang Danzila, A mah’n phatna a mu.

Sakkik:
Khat guak om hang in ah Danzila bang in
Guih theihte tang na’ng in ah Lau lo in gen in.

Verse 2
Danzila bang hi lo a A lau a om mi
Zum a a lau mi in ah Kisiatna sung tung hi.

Verse 3
Huaiham, hehna, gitlohna Tampi om hang in
Danzila zuite in ah Do ciang in a mang ding.

Verse 4
Dawi mang gilo kihta ke’n En in, Danzila
Khai in lungdam na dial pei Belh ciang na zo ding ta.

hymns.title: Dawn Un, Zeisu Min Vanglianna (1st Tune)
hymns.title_en: All Hail the Power of Jesus’ Name
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Dawn un, Zeisu’ min vanglianna: Vantung mite bok un;
Kumpi lukhu hong la un la, Kumpi lian bel pia un.
Kumpi lukhu hong la un la, Kumpi lian bel pia un.

Verse 2
Pasian biak man thahna thuakte’n Amah Kumpi pia un.
Zise’ suan in phatna ngah hen; Kumpi lian bel pia un.
Zise’ suan in phatna ngah hen; Kumpi lian bel pia un.

Verse 3
Teel tuam Itazila te aw, Tawmkha na hih hang un,
Hong tan zo hi. hehpihna tawh: Kumpi lian bel pia un.
Hong tan zo hi, hehpihna tawh; Kumpi lian bel pia un.

Verse 4
Zentail mi khialte’n zong dan pan, Hong hot mangngilh kei un.
Minphatna a khe ah va nga’n Kumpi lian bel pia un.
Minphatna a khe ah va nga’n Kumpi lian bel pia un.

Verse 5
Hih leitung a mi namkim in, Zeisu lian bel sak un;
Liatna khempeuh Ama aa ci’n Kumpi lian bel pia un.
Liatna khempeuh Ama aa ci’n Kumpi lian bel pia un.

hymns.title: Dawn Un, Zeisu Min Vanglianna (2nd Tune)
hymns.title_en: All Hail the Power of Jesus’ Name
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Dawn un, Zeisu’ min vanglianna; Vantung mite bok un;
Vantung mite bok un; Kumpi lukhu hong la un la,
Kumpi …… lian Kumpi, Kumpi, Kumpi,
Kumpi lian bel pia un.

Verse 2
Pasian biak man thahna thuakte’n Amah Kumpi pia un.
Amah Kumpi pia un. Zise’ suan in phatna ngah hen;
Kumpi …… lian Kumpi, Kumpi, Kumpi,
Kumpi lian bel pia un.

Verse 3
Teel tuam Itazila te aw, Tawmkha na hih hang un,
Tawmkha na hih hang un, Hong tan zo hi, hehpihna tawh;
Kumpi …… lian Kumpi, Kumpi, Kumpi,
Kumpi lian bel pia un.

hymns.title: Ding Un, Ding Un, Zeisu Mi
hymns.title_en: Stand up, Stand Up For Jesus
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ding un, ding un, Zeisu’ mi, Singlamteh galkap te;
A kumpi dial saang khan un, Leih na thuak sak lo e!
Gal khat khit khat a ban in Amah’n hong zawh pih ding;
Gal khempeuh zawh khit ciang in Kha zih, Topa’n maang ding.

Verse 2
Ding un, dingun, Zeisu’ mi, Mang un, peengkul sawl na;
Galpi phual ah va kuan un Tuni, Topa’ ni pha,
Pasal kisa teng kuan un, Galte a tam hang in,
Tha leh tha kisi sak un, Hang seem un lau ciang in.

Verse 3
Ding un, dingun, Zeisu’ mi, Ama tha bek suang un;
Mihing tha’n hong lel sak ding, No mau tha muang kei un,
Pasian thu gal van bang in Silh in, vil in, thu ngen,
Gal leh sep ding om ciang in A baih sa’n om khial ke’n.

Verse 4
Ding un, ding un, Zeisu’ mi Gal bei hak nawn lo ding
Tu’n galkap na ding zing ciang, Gal zawh na la ging ding.
A zote khempeuh in ah Nun’tak lukhu ngah ding.
Vanglian Kumpipa kiang ah A tawntung maang khawm ding.

hymns.title: Do Niloh In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Aw lawmte aw, dial pei en un Vantung a a khai
Hong huh ding Mangpa hong kuan ding I zawh na a nai.

Sakkik:
Gal do in tu’n ka hong pai ding Zeisu dial hong lak
A thupha tawh om tawntung ning Dial na lak kik sak.

Verse 2
En un gal tampi hong pai a Dawi mang hong masa
Thahat te a kim si zo a Han’na bei dek ta.

Verse 3
A vanglian dial pei ki mu hi. Peengkul aw kiza
Hong uk Mangpa a min pha tawh Galte ka zo ta.

Verse 4
Gal kap na sawt vei haksa a Huhna hong nai hi.
Hong uk Mangpa hong pai laitak Lungdam khin un, ci.

hymns.title: Ei Inn Bek Mah Nuam I Sa
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Bang zah a nuam Kumpi inn sung i om zong,
Bang zah’n nop tuak ta leh ei inn mah nuam i sa
Van gam lei mong khat ah a nop na om hi,
Ci in leitung mi’n a zon’ hang mu zo tuan kei.

Sakkik:
Inn, inn, a nuam inn, Inn dang nuam om kei,
Aw! Ei inn bek mah nuam.

Verse 2
Gam lak, tu lak ah pai in, khuapi en in,
Ka nu in zong a tapa tu’n ngaihsun kawm in,
Ka buk no khat uh sung pan, khapi en in,
Hih hang gam lak sing leh na te’n hong don tuan lo.

Verse 3
Inn pan taikhia in mun dang nop na zon’ hang,
A nuam zaw mun om lo ka buk no bek mah nuam,
Nuam tak vasa’n lasa ka sap hong dawng hang,
Lungnop na hong pia in, tua sang nuam zaw om kei.

hymns.title: En In , Hing Ta In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Singlamteh tung aa Zeisu en in,
Nang aa ding leh kei aa ding hong si,
Ngai in itna’n A kiang hong sap lai,
En in, hing ta in!

Sakkik:
En in, hing ta in! En in, hing ta in!
Nang aa ding sing tung sihna en in;
En in, hing ta in!

Verse 2
Na mawh van gik kha hong gum ding hiam?
Nun’ tak tawntung na na nei ding maw?
Zeisu bek in hong hon zo thei hi,
En in, hing ta in!

Verse 3
Han pan a tho Zeisu en le ci’n,
Manlang in inn dei sung om lai in;
A mai nuam in hong lungdam sak ding,
En in, hing ta in!

Verse 4
Zeisu’n van nun’ nuam hong bawlsak hi,
Lungkham mawh nei mi sapna hong thei;
Na pai na peuhah hong kha ding hi;
En in, hing ta in!

hymns.title: En Un, Mopipa Hong Tung Zo
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
En un, Mopipa zankim laitak in hong tung zo hi,
A kiging khol meivak mit ngei lo te’n thupha ngah ding hi,
Topa hong pai kik ciang a a muh mihai nasem pa’n,
Meivak vaak lo, meitui thun lo a tawntung lusu hi.

Verse 2
Na kilim gin’ kholh kei leh na ihsip pai suak kha ding,
Sihna hun sungah lut in kham lukhu na taan kha ding,
Hoih tak in kiging khol in a hun ding ngak tawntung ding,
Siangtho, siangtho, saingtho Topa kote, Nong hun den ding.

Verse 3
Tua ni a lauhuai ni, theih kholh loh in hong tung ding hi,
Meivak vaak in na meivak tui a dim tak in thun in,
Zingsang nitak sum kim zan kim a hun ding kithei lo
Zipipa hong tung zo a dawn ding kuan khia un ci ding.

hymns.title: Gal Dona Awng Un
Gal Van A Tawi Tangval
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Gal van a tawi tangval te i hih ciang in
Kumpi pa thu piak aw i ngai ding hi.
“Kuan un,” cih na thu i zak ciang in ah
Galkap maangpa kiang pan gal i do ding hi.

Sakkik:
Kuan, ci kiko na aw na ngai ta un En un,
a zawng khal mite lung kia hi.
Gal van a tawi tangval i hih ciang in
Galkap maangpa in ei hong muang ding hi.
Gal van a tawi tangval i hih ciang in
Galkap maangpa in ei hong muang ding hi.

Verse 2
Gal van a tawi tangval te i hih ciang in
Galkap na sungah galkap van cing ni.
Gal kap na kiko aw i zak ciang in
“Hih lai ah kei ka om hi,” ci in gen ni.

Verse 3
Gal van a tawi tangval te i hih ciang in
Vanglian sung Kumpi lukhu ngah ding hi.
Galkap na pha takpi’n gal i do ciang
Nuamna thaman sang kei hong sang sak ding hi.

hymns.title: Galile Lung Ngaihna
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vakhu khawl na’ng Singhiang bawl hi, Nitak khuadam a lungnuam hi.
Tua Pasian thu mailam hi, ci, Lung ngaih na teng, Galile ah.

Sakkik:
Aw Galile a nuam gampi, Zeisu deih na tampi om hi.
Aw Galile a nuam gampi, La sa in la khatvei sa kik.

Verse 2
Paak pawl om hi, guam tui in nawt, A nuam vasa a ham lamdang,
Nitak zingsang i phatna la, Mai mu gin za Galile ah.

Verse 3
Ih lung ngaih ciang khua sik mul tho, Tui tung ah pai gunpi tung ah,
Kei ka ngaih ni, Khat vei ngah kik, A nung ka zui Galile ah.

hymns.title: Galkap La
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tho un, no hot khiatna tate, Lutang Khazih beel khempeuh;
Tho un, no minam vanglian te, Zion ah gal hong pai ma’n.

Sakkik:
A vaanglian la ging sak ta un, Tui pi nakpi ging bang in,
Ei hong tatna Khazih si hang, Gual zo pen te i hi hi,
Gual zo pen te i hi hi. Gual zo pen te i hi hi.
Ei hong tatna Khazih si hang, Gual zo pen te i hi hi.

Verse 2
Eima aa mi siang gal hangte, Hi thu bek ah kip uh hi.
I tung aa dial kipeei mu un, Zeisu si hang gual zote.

Verse 3
Si lo in, i lau kei ciat hi, Nuntak na Pasian sung om.
Ama hong kilat zingsang ciang, Min than’ na tui hong luang khia.

Verse 4
I vek A mai i ding baih ding, Minthang i To i mu ding.
Lungdam in Amah phat baih ding. Thaman ciat ding sang ciat ding.

hymns.title: Gam Minthang Hong Piang Ding Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vantung ah gam a minthang bel eite aa ding in om hi.
Kum sim in mi siangtho te kikhawm uh hi.
Gam minthang tawh ki nai theih na ding in ni in hong kheng hi.
Gam minthang piang ding hun hong tung dek tak hi.

Sakkik:
Gam minthang hong piang a hun tung dek ta hi.
Gam minthang hong piang a hun tung dek ta hi.
Kisa khol in ka kha aw sawt lo peengkul tum ding hi.
Kumpi pa minthang tawh hong pai ding hi.

Verse 2
Topa bawlsa vantung a gam minthang phual lungngaih na in,
Hong gum Topa hong pai ding hun i ngak hi.
I thang awkna hih leitung kol tan’ na sungah hong phel hi.
Gam minthang piang ding hun hong tung dek tak hi.

Verse 3
Sawtvei i ngak ciang in hih leitung ah lungkham na tam hi.
Meii kai man in mihing lungsim kisia hi.
Gam min than’ na thu gen in la, la pha sa in hansuah ni.
Gam minthang piang ding hun hong tung dek tak hi.

Verse 4
Topa bawlsa vantung gam hong tun’ ciang i Topa mu ding
Hong pai ma in vantung gam i mu ding hi.
Haleluiah A si tawh hong gum i Topa minthang hen,
Gam minthang piang ding hun hong tung dek tak hi.

hymns.title: Gamlapi Mual Tungah Singlamteh Tul Gemgam
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Gamlapi mual tungah singlamteh tul gemgam,
Gen theih mai zum na lim a hi
Tua khuampi ka it hi leitungbup pi tan ding,
A it huai pen Pa hong sihna hi.

Sakkik:
Tua singlamteh ke’n ngil ngei kei ning,
Zawhna minpha ka tut zawh mateng
Tua singlamteh kah lo lenlen ning,
Kham lukhu ka khek na ni mateng.

Verse 2
Mi in tua singlamteh a thusim loh hang in,
Ke’n ka phawk tawntung na thu in
Pasian Tuuno in vantung nopna nusia hi.
Kalani mual tua pua ding in.

Verse 3
Ka mawhna hong mai sak, hong siangtho sak ding in
Sisan luang in Zeisu si hi
Pasian Tapa sisan siangtho a hong baan’ na
Tua singlamteh ka velvel nuam hi.

Verse 4
Tua singlamteh khuampi ke’n nusia ngei kei ning,
Taina, zumna ka thuakpih hang in;
Tua hi leh khatvei ciang hong sam ding A inn ah,
Amah tawh a min thang khawm ding in.

hymns.title: Ganhing Khempeuh In Gum Zo Kei
hymns.title_en: Not All the Blood of Breasts
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zudah mite biakna Ganhing pawlpawl a hi.
Mawhna hong phel i lungdam na Neu kha beek piangsak kei.

Verse 2
Tuuno Khazih in ah Tua biakna sang pha zaw.
A si a manpha a hi a Mawhna phel thei ta hi.

Verse 3
Keimah’n ka um zo hi. Ka lu, ka khut, ka ngah
Mawhna khempeuh ka kisik hi. Ka hong thum hi Topa.

Verse 4
Singlamteh na tungah Nangmah’n na thuak gim na
Kei in ka lungngaih ciang in ah Na hong it ka thei ta.

Verse 5
Biakna vantung Tuuno A umte nopsak na
Ke’n um a ka biak kanuam zo Ka phat ding a itna.

hymns.title: Gumpa I Cih Hi Bang Hi, Haleluiah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
“Gimna thuakpa” mawh neite, Gum khia dingin, A pumpi,
Pia Pasian Tapa min hi. Haleluiah! Hi bang gumpa!

Verse 2
Bawlsiat, maizum a thuak hi, Kei hangin, paihkhat a thuak;
A si tawh kei hong lei hi. Haleluiah! hi bang gumpa!

Verse 3
Mawhna dim in i ci mawh, Mawh bang lo Pasian Tuuno;
Hong gum khia zo takpi maw Haleluiah hi bang gumpa!

Verse 4
Singlamteh in khaina thuak, “Ka zo zo hi,” ci’n kiko;
Vanpan phatna aw ging hi Haleluiah hi bang gumpa!

Verse 5
Minthang Kumpi hong pai ciang, A tatsate hong la ding;
A thak hih la i sa ding. Haleluiah! hi bang gumpa.

hymns.title: Gup Khiat
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Gup Khiat na thu thang sak nuam sing! Tuuno si tawh gup khiat ka hih;
A it bei lo tawh gup khiat hi’ng, A tawntung Ama ta ka hi.
Gup khiat, gup khiat, Gup khiat, gup khiat, Tuuno si tawh gup khiat ka hi,
Gup khiat, gup khiat, Gup khiat, gup khiat, A tawntung Ama ta ka hi.

Verse 2
Gup Khiat hi a, Zeisu nuamsa, Ka lawp na gen zo kam om kei;
Ama ompihna khuavak pha, Kei sung hong tung den ding ka thei.
Gup khiat, gup khiat, Gup khiat, gup khiat, Tuuno si tawh gup khiat ka hi,
Gup khiat, gup khiat, Gup khiat, gup khiat, A tawntung Ama ta ka hi.

Verse 3
Thupha gumpa ka ngaihsun a, Ngaih sunsun ing sun ni loh in;
Om mawk thei lo in la ka sa, Hong itna sa ing, lapi in.
Gup khiat, gup khiat, Gup khiat, gup khiat, Tuuno si tawh gup khiat ka hi,
Gup khiat, gup khiat, Gup khiat, gup khiat, A tawntung Ama ta ka hi.

hymns.title: Gup Khiat Ka Hih Nung Sang
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ke’n nei khin tang, ka sak nop la, Gup khiat ka hih nung sang,
Ka Kumpi, Honpa phatna la, Gup khiat ka hih nung sang.

Sakkik:
Gup khiat ka hih nung sang, Gup khiat ka hih nung sang,
Ama min tawh vanglian ning; Gup khiat ka hih nung sang,
Ka Honpa’ min in ka vanglian ding.

Verse 2
Ke’n nei hong lungkimsak Khazih, Gup khiat ka hih nung sang,
Ama deih bek ka bawl ding hi, Gup khiat ka hih nung sang.

Verse 3
Ke’n nei kitel teci pan’ na, Gup khiat ka hih nung sang,
Bei sak; launa leh up lah na, Gup khiat ka hih nung sang.

Verse 4
Ke’n nei kei ading inn muan’ pi, Gup khiat ka hih nung sang,
Tua’h a tawntung ka om ding hi, Gup khiat ka hih nung sang.

hymns.title: Gupna Ngah Na’ng Bang Ka Hih Diam?
hymns.title_en: What Shall I Do To Be Saved?
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Gupna ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?
Dahna sung ka kha van gik pua bang,
Tuipi ki lok bang in, Huihpi hong nung bang in,
Dahna kei tung ah hong kihual a,
Gupna ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?
Aw, gup ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?

Verse 2
Khangno lung sim a bei ciang in,
Gupna ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?
Ka it ka lawm te in, Leitung a nusiat ciang,
Han phual ah dah in ka kapkap hi.
Gup na ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?
Aw, gup ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?

Verse 3
Ci nat in hong bawl siat ciang in,
Gupna ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?
Leitung tawl khat bek hi, Meei bang in theng thei hi,
A hun bei ngei lo muh theih na’ng in,
Gup na ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?
Aw, gup ngah na’ng bang ka hih diam?

Verse 4
Hong hehpih in la, hong en in,
Nopsakna keimah hong khiat suk in,
Topa kiang lo mun dang, Kua kiang ka zuan ding hiam,
Lungsim kitam Topa’n dam sak thei
Hi bang hih ning! Hi bang hih ning!
Gupna ngah na’ng Zeisu beel ning.

hymns.title: Hahkat Pawlpite Aw
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hahkat pawlpi gamla nai a Kikhawm ding in a hong pai un
Tawp na a nuam a om nate I gen ding hi, Pasian thupha.

Sakkik:
Hahkat pawlpi te aw Topa kiang kikhawm un.
Lungsim kituak pha tawh A min phatna gen un
Topa leh a gampi Aa ding in hahkat in
Pawlpi a hahkat te huh na ding thu ngen ni.

Verse 2
Khazih Topa phat ding in ah La sa ding in hong kikhawm un
Mi neute in hih mun pan ah Hing tawntung muh na ding in ah.

Verse 3
Topa Pasian nasem ding in Kiciam na pha a thak koih ni.
Vantung inn nuam tun’ mateng in Upna behlap in nasem ni.

hymns.title: Haleluiah Khin Zo
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Gup khiat na ngah ding Pasian in thu hong ciam zo,
Ama Tapa Zeisu min a um khempeuh te.

Sakkik:
Haleluiah khin zo, Tapa min ka um zo,
Ama si san in kei hong gum khia khin zo ta,
Haleluiah khin zo, Tapa min ka um zo,
Ama si san in kei hong gum khia khin zo ta.

Verse 2
Tua lampi gam dai in a lauhuai hang in ah,
Topa Zeisu in kei hong paipih zo ding hi.

Verse 3
Ka it ka ngaih tampi vantung gam sung tung zo,
Lung muang tak tua gam ah hih lapi sa uh hi.

Verse 4
Naupang note Ama kiang ah ding uh ka mu,
Gup khiat na la sa uh, Amah na nui hiuhhiau.

Verse 5
Kikhopna sung kumpite kamsangte kamu,
Kham kongzing lampite zui in la sa uh hi.

Verse 5
Nang leh kei aa ding in tua lai ah la om hi.
A tawntung in tua lai i phat tawntung ding hi.

hymns.title: Hat In, Zion Sem Meng In Na Nasep Ding
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hat in, Zion, sem meng in na nasep ding,
Mi teng tung ah Khuavak Pasian hilh in.
Mihing khat zong khuamial sung a mang thang ding
Phal het lo hi mihing piang sak Pa in,

Sakkik:
Lungdam na thupha. Nop na thupha,
Zeisu, hong tat na Thupha, va gen meng in.

Verse 2
En ven, mawhna khuamial thong inn mial sung ah
Mi tul tampi kihen in om uh hi.
Khat beek va pai lo amau ko ding in ah
A suahtak na’ng uh Topa si napi.

Verse 3
Mi nam kim, pau nam kim te kiang va gen in,
Amau hin’ na in Itna Pasian hi.
Kiniam sak in A bawl sate hon ding in,
Van nun’ nuam piak na ding hong si suk hi.

Verse 4
Na tate sawl in tua thupha gen ding in,
Na sum tawh huh in manlang theih nading.
Na lungsim teng tawh nakpi’n thu nget sak in.
Na zat khempeuh Zeisu’n hong din kik ding.

hymns.title: Hehpih Na’n Hong Gum
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong tung ding leitung hin’ bei ni Tu’n ka theih bang la sa lo ding
Ka tawh kik ciang ka nuam ding hi. Topa Kumpipa tawh om ning.

Sakkik:
Ka mu ding hi, Topa’ maitang Gupna thu itna tawh hong gen.
Ka mu ding hi, Topa’ maitang Gupna thu itna tawh hong gen.

Verse 2
Leitung ka inn puk ding ni om Cik ciang ding hiam gen thei lo hi.
Hih hang ka thei kei aa ding om Vantung ka om na’ng ka thei zo.

Verse 3
Ni a taang hong liap sak ciang in Ni tum khawvaang taang lim nuai ah
Ka Topa’n kei pha hong ci in Hong lut sak ding hiam khawl na ah.

hymns.title: Hehpihna A Ngente
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lungdam na thupha ngai in Gamla a nai gen in.
Sihna thuak Topa Zeisu Hong gupna thu gen in.
Om tawntung hi Ama thu A thuciam kip ding hi.
Topa Zeisu a umte A min thang sak ding hi.

Sakkik:
Topa Pasian kiang ah Hehpihna ngente in
Gupna thupha maantak a Ngah thei ding uh hi.
Topa Pasian kiang ah Hehpihna ngente in
Gupna thupha maantak a Ngah thei ding uh hi.

Verse 2
Sawt vei khuamial a omte Mawhna lam a zuite
Topa Zeisu’n tan napi En in thupha bel hi.
Lungsim na neih zah in ah A thuciam na um in
Topa kiang ah thu ngente Kisia ngei lo ding hi.

Verse 3
Leitung ah van gik pua te Gimna tawlna thuak mi,
Na van gik a pua ding in Topa in hong ngak hi.
Thupha lamdang hong pia a Mi khempeuh hawm sak hi,
Topa Zeisu thu umte A min thang sak ding hi.

hymns.title: Hehpihna Tawh Note Hong Hon Zo
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Pasian hong heh pih na’n, A geel hot khiat kicing;
Lang do mite hon khia ding in, A thupha sung hong teel.

Sakkik:
Up na tawh gupna i ngah, Up man, Up man,
Nang dikna hilo upna tawh,
Nang dikna hilo upna tawh,
Sep hi lo, Sep hi lo, Sep hi lo, hi leh mi kisial ding,
Pasian hong piak khong hi. Sep hi lo, hi leh mi kisial ding,
Pasian hong piak khong hi. Pasian hong piak khong hi
Pasian hong piak khong hi. Pasian hong piak khong hi.
Hong piak khong hi.

Verse 2
Hih Pasian thupha lian, Tapa ah kilang sak;
Zumhuai singlamteh ah thuak in, Pasian thu kithang sak.

Verse 3
A um takpi mite, Pasian in hong thei sak,
Khazih hang in hotkhiat na cing, “Tate” cih na ngah sak.

hymns.title: Hiah Om Ing, Hong Sawl In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa hong sap na aw ngai in Tu ni’n kua pai nasem ding?
An vuite kuai zo, lak ding ngak; Kua’na site haih khia ding?
Topa in nakpi in hongsam, Thaman tampi pia ding in,
Kua’n lungdam na tawh hong dawng in
“Hiah om ing, kei hong sawl in!”
“Hiah om ing, kei hong sawl in!”

Verse 2
Tua tuipi na kan zawh kei leh, Lawki te gam na tung ding
Tua gam sung nai zaw’n na mu ding, Na huh thei ding na kong biang,
Tul tampi na piak zawh kei leh, A neu pen in na hih thei,
Meigong nu bang in na pia thei,
Nangma aa ding a manpha!
Nangma aa ding a manpha!

Verse 3
Van mi bang na gen thei kei zong, Pawlu bang na siam kei zong,
Zeisu hong itna na gen thei, Kei tang ding si na ci thei,
Lamdang a thu khenna ding tawh, Tha neem khan’ lawh zawh kei leh,
Naupang te na makaih thei ding,
Topa hong khut zaak na sung!
Topa hong khut zaak na sung.

Verse 4
“Ka sep theih bangmah om kei, “ci’n, Kuama kiang gen ngei kei in,
Mi dangte a sih lai takin, Topa in nang hong sam hi,
Lungdam in na sep ding hong pia, Lungdam in A na sem in,
Hong sap ciang manlang in dawng in,
“Hiah om ing, Kei hong sawl in!”
“Hiah om ing, Kei hong sawl in!”

hymns.title: Hih Ka Pa’ Leitung Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hih ka Pa’ leitung hi; Ke’n ka ngaih ciang in ah,
Na khempeuh in, ka bil sungah La ngaih sa bang ka za.
Hih ka Pa’ leitung hi; Ka ngaihsut ciang nuam hi
Sing kung, suangtum, vanpi, tuipi Ama bawl lamdang pha.

Verse 2
Hih ka Pa’ leitung hi; A min phat ding kipaak,
Vasa ham ngaih zingsang khuavak, A kilawm unok paak.
Hih ka Pa’ leitung hi; A hoih khempeuh sungah
Amah om a hong pau pih na Ka pai na teng ka za.

Verse 3
Hih ka Pa’ leitung hi; Ke’n mangngilh ngei kei ning
A sia lamsang a hat hang in Uk lai Pasian mah in.
Hih ka Pa’ leitung hi; Gal kizo nai lo hi.
Zeisu lungkim nai lo ding hi, Lei leh van kikhat ma’n.

hymns.title: Hing Ei Ve
Hon Ding Zong Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Mual tung khua dam lak ah Migi tuu cing in
A tuu mang a zong hi Ciah pih ding in.

Sakkik:
Hon ding zong hi, Hong ding zong hi,
A mang te Zeisu’n Hon ding zong hi.
Hon ding zong hi, Hong ding zong hi,
A mang te Zeisu’n hon ding zong hi.

Verse 2
Citak in a zong hi Sum man’suah nu in,
Leivui lak khuamial lak Lungkia lo in.

Verse 3
It tawntung a pa in Nuamna tangko hi;
“A mang thang sa ka ta Hong tung zo hi.”

hymns.title: Hong Gum Thei Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lungmang mi aw, nang kihta kei in
Nangma Topa Pasian na muang ta in
Thu ngen in, na singlamteh gik hang in
Amah’n hong huh ding hi.

Sakkik:
Amah in nang a hong gum thei lai hi.
Ama khut in gal liah na hi ding hi.
Amah in nang hong gum thei lai ding hi.
Tua hi a lau kei in.

Verse 2
Lungmang mi aw, gal tam hang in ah
Gal nan’na leh thu upna lian sak ta’n.
Topa vangliat na tawh na do ding a
Gal zo na hi ding hi.

Verse 3
Lungmang mi aw, lam haksat ciang in,
Topa’n kihtak na a paih khiat sak ding
Huh na na deih leh Amah’n nei lai ding
Amah min pha sak ta in.

hymns.title: Hong Gum Topa Hong Liah In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Na siangtho na mun ah Topa Kei hong liah ta in.
Tawl damna na kiang ka ngah lai Na maitang hong lak in.

Sakkik:
Hong liah ta in. Hong gum Topa hong liah in;
Lau loh na na kiang Keimah hong om sak in.

Verse 2
Nun’tak na huihpi a nun’ lai Kei hong liah ta in.
Tuipi tung ah vakhu bang in Nang kiang hong lut sak in.

Verse 3
Dahna tawh ka lung kitam lai Lungdam na hong pia’n.
Khitui tawh nuamna ka zon’ lai Keimah hong liah ta in.

hymns.title: Hong Gum Topa Lut Sak In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zinpa kong kiang ah om hi, Lut sak in.
Tam veipi hong pai zo hi; Lut sak in.
A pai ma’n lut na’ng pia in
Siangtho Topa lut sak in
Pa Pasian a Tapa in Lut sak in.

Verse 2
Lungsim kongkhak tu’n hon’ in Lut sak in.
Ngak leh Amah pai khia ding Lut sak in.
Lut sak in nangma lawmpa
Nangma lungsim kem ding a
A tawp dong hong gum ding pa, Lut sak in.

Verse 3
A kam khum na ngai in la, Lut sak in.
Tu’n piangsak in nang teel pa Lut sak in.
Kongkhak kiang ding hi,
Amah Khang sak idng na lung dam na
Ama min na phat ding a Lut sak in.

Verse 4
Tu in vantung khua zinpa Lut sak in.
Nang vakna pawi kham ding a Lut sak in.
A hong phel ding na mawhna
Lawmte tawh ki khen ciang ah
Hong kha ding vantung inn ah Lut sak in.

hymns.title: Hong Gum Topa Ngai In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong gum Topa, ngai in, Nang kiang kong nai hi;
Ka leiba loh ding in, Nangmah na si hi.
Na minpha tawh mawh phelna Nang kong up ciang ka ngah hi.
Topa hong beel ding in Na kiang kong nai hi.

Verse 2
Hong gum Topa, ngai in, Hehpihna kong ngen,
Thupha tawh hong gum in Lau na bei sak in.
Na thu ciamna ka um hi. Na thupha bel ka muang hi.
Hong gum Topa Pasian, Na kiang thu kong ngen.

Verse 3
Topa aw hong it in, Keimah hong la in.
Keimah bek leitung ah Hong pai sak kei in.
Keima lam hong taang sak in. Na minthang ka kimkot ah.
Nang aa ding taang sak in, Ka belh suangpi aw.

Verse 4
Topa aw, hong liah in, Na kiang hong koih in
Na nasep zawh mateng Lampi hong hilh in.
Tua ciangin lungdam na la, Ka sa ding hi, vantung ah
Topa tawh tua mun ah Om nuam tawntung ing.

hymns.title: Hong Gupna
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa Zeisu hong hehpihna Lungdam in la sa un,
Leitung khempeuh a zelh na’ng in Lungdam na ding kum hi.

Sakkik:
Hong gupna, hong gupna, Thupha bel hong tung hi.
Hong gum ta, hong gum ta, Topa Zeisu Kumpi.

Verse 2
Mit taw te aw Zeisu en un, A dah te lungdam un,
Zeisu in hong suahtak zo hi Thong sung omte’n sa un.

Verse 3
Hong it man in Zeisu si a Phat huai lamdang bel hi.
Topa min thang leitung mawhna Mi teng hong itna hi.

hymns.title: Hong Hehpihna Thupha
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong hehpihna thupha Lungsim khauh zo thei hi.
Leitung a it man a A Tapa hong pia hi.

Sakkik:
Kuamah peuhmah in thu um leh
Hin tawntung na pha ngah ding hi.
Hin tawntung na pha ngah ding hi.

Verse 2
Gamlak ah gul kikhai A nop tuam mah bang in
Topa Zeisu kikhai Nun’tak tawntung na’ng hi.

Verse 3
Mawhnei te sih kik ding, Thu khenna i thei hi.
Na thu bang zui lo leng Kisia takpi ding hi.

Verse 4
Leitung mawh sak ding a Zeisu hong pai lo hi.
A min than’ mah bang ah Leitung hong gum ding hi.

Verse 5
A um lote hehpih Um na’ng lungsim guan’ hi
Thupha bel hong tun’ ve’n Hong um phasak ta hen.

hymns.title: Hong Hing Kik Sak In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong phat ung, Topa; Kote Nong it man in,
Si a tu’n van a om Zeisu Nong piak man in.

Sakkik:
Haleluiah! Nang ma min thang Haleluijah! A men;
Haleluiah! Nang ma min thang, Hong hing kik sak in.

Verse 2
Hong phat ung, Kha Siangtho, khuavak, Nong piak man’
Ko Honpa Nong lak a, khuamial Nong bei sak man’.

Verse 3
Thah na thuak Tuuno, min thang hen, phat ciat un,
Mawhna pua a, nit na hong sawp siang Pa phat un.

Verse 4
Hong hing kik sak in, Na itna hong guan’ in,
Ko khate van pan mei tawh hong kuang kik sak in.

hymns.title: Hong Hon Topa Zeisu Tal-Ah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong hon Topa Zeisu tal ah, Mi git na nuam pha tuang;
A lu tung vangliat na khu a, A muk pan itna luang,
A muk pan it na luang.

Verse 2
Leitung mi tehpih ding om lo, Amah a pha bel hi;
Vantung mi lak ah zong om lo, Amah ki lawm bel hi,
Amah ki lawm bel hi.

Verse 3
Gim na sung ka kia hong mu a, Hon ding hong delh pah hi;
Kei aa ding singlamteh pua a, Kei dah na kisuan hi,
Kei dah na kisuan hi.

Verse 4
Ama hangin kei ka nung ta, Nuamna zong A hong pia;
Hong gual zo sak sih na tung ah, Han sung pan hong hon khia,
Han sung pan hong hon khia.

Verse 5
Ama omna vantung khua ah, Kei hong tun’ pih ding hi;
Pasian phatna hong lak ding a, Ka nuamna kim ding hi,
Ka nuamna kim ding hi.

Verse 6
Pasian citna leh hong itna, Hi bang ka theih nung sang,
Lungsim tul nei leng zong, Topa, Kong pia khin ding hi Nang,
Kong pia khin ding hi Nang.

hymns.title: Hong Honpa Hong Pai In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kong sapna ngai in, tu’n hong hehpih in,
Hong Honpa hong pai in;
Ka lung gim zo, Nang kong ngai ta tu in,
Hong Honpa hong pai in.

Sakkik
Ka va gam mang mual tung khuapam lak ah,
Inn pan gam lapi ka pial khin;
Tu’n hong la in, hong ciah pih’n Na inn ah,
Hong Honpa hong pai in.

Verse 2
Zan khuamial sung ka belh ding ka nei lo,
Hong Honpa hong pai in;
Khat vei Nong et hin’ na khuavak hi zo,
Hong Honpa hong pai in.

Verse 3
Lam gam dai a, ka khe zong gim zo ta,
Hong Honpa hong pai in;
Ka dak leh Na it mai mu zenzen a,
Hong Honpa hong pai in.

Verse 4
Na nial ngei kei lung tamkham te’ thumna,
Hong Honpa hong pai in;
Na ngai in lung niam khiat a kong thumna,
Hong Honpa hong pai in.

hymns.title: Hong Honpa In Hong Kun
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong honpa in hong kun; Na tha hat na neu hi,
Tha nem te’n thu hong ngen un,
Cing tak na ngah ding, hong ci.

Sakkik:
Zeisu’n loh khin ta, Ama tung ka ba;
Si bang san sa ka mawhna
Vuk bang hong sawp ngo ta.

Verse 2
Topa tu’n ka thei zo; Nangma vanglian bek in
Phak leh lol zong dam sak zo,
Suang lungnem sak tui bang in.

Verse 3
Hehpih ka ngah na ding Phatna khat zong nei keng;
Ka puan vuk bang paak nading
Tuuno si sung hong sawp leng.

Verse 4
Sihna lupna tung pan Ka kha a kah to ding;
“Zeisu in keimah hong tan,”
Ci in lungdam kiko ding.

Verse 5
Topa tokhom mai ah Kicing in ka din’ ciang,
Min phatna puak ning Amah,
Nga suk ning Zeisu’ khe kiang.

hymns.title: Hong Honpa Kiangah Hong Pai Meng In
Hong Honpa Na Sih Dong
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong Honpa, Na sih dong Kei Nong it zo;
Nang aa ding na khat zong Ka hong it lo.
Itna tawh hong kun ning; Ka ciamna tangtun’ ning
Nang kiang tu’n hong tun’ ning Na khat teitei.

Verse 2
Hehpih tokhom mai ah Hehpih kong ngen;
Upna neih sun in ah Zeisu kong en.
Thuak ding, gen ding, sak ding Na khat peuh Nang aa ding
Kei hong hih zo sak in, Na khat teitei.

Verse 3
Lungsim maan hong pia in, Nang ma aa’ bang;
A ni kipeel lo in Ka hih theih na’ng;
Itna tawh na sep na, Khat peuh tung mi git na,
Lam khial khat ngah zawh na Na khat teitei.

Verse 4
Keimah leh ka neih sa, Nong piaksa hi’ng;
Hih lai ka nuntakna Nangma aa ding.
Na mai kong muh ciang in, Tat khiatsa ka kha in,
Hi hen, Nang aa ding in Na khat teitei.

hymns.title: Hong It Zaw Ning
hymns.title_en: More Love to Thee, O Christ

hymns.title: Hong It Zeisu Topa Aw
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong it Zeisu Topa aw, Tui hual hong nai lai tak in,
Huih pi nung daih nai loh tawh, Na ang sung hong om sak in.
Nuntak huihpi kam mateng, Hong Honpa aw hong liah in;
Keima kha Nong lak mateng, Khawl mun nuam ah hong kha in.

Verse 2
Belh ding dang khat beek nei keng, Ci mawh in Nang kong beel hi.
Hong nusia peuhmah ngei ke’n Nong huh Nong neem lai ding hi.
Kong muang hi, Topa Nang mah; Huh na Nang kiang ka ngah hi.
Topa aw, Na kha nuai ah Keima lu nong liah ding hi.

Verse 3
Kei’ deihna teng kicin’ na Khazih Topa, Nang Na hi;
Puk te phong, mittaw te kha, Na dam sak lungsim pumpi.
Nang Na dik, Nang Na siang tho; Kei kihhuai, mawhna ka dim;
Ka pumtang sian’ na nei lo; Nang thutak, hehpihna dim.

Verse 4
Ka mawh siin khin zo ding in Hehpihna Nang kiang kicing.
Dam na gun tui hong luan in, Ka lung sung siang den na ding
Nang nuntak na Nak na hi; Nangmah hong dawndawn sak in,
A tawntung nuntak tui li Ka lung sung hong phul sak in.

hymns.title: Hong Khah Ngei Lo Ding Itna Aw
hymns.title_en: O Love That Wilt Not Let Me Go
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong khah ngei lo ding Itna aw,
Ka lung gimna teng kong nga ta.
A pha zaw, cing zaw thei nading
Nong piak sa keima nuntakna
Nang kong ap kik ta ding.

Verse 2
Hong tonpih tawntung Khuavak aw,
Keima mei mit dek kong ap ta.
Nang sungah taang pha zaw nading
Nong kawm sak keima khuavak na
Nang kong ap kik ta ding.

Verse 3
Keimah hong zong khia Nuamna aw,
Keima lungsim Nang kong hon ta.
Dah na sung pan nuam muh na ding
Kip ding hi Nangma thuciam na
Dah na bei theih na ding.

Verse 4
Ka lu hong phong Singlamteh aw,
Nang kong taisan ngam nawn lo ta.
Nuntak bei in leivui suak ding
Lei pan paak bang Nong tawi to ta
Ka hin’ tawntung nading.

hymns.title: Hong Khihna In A Pha Hi
hymns.title_en: Blest be the Tie That Binds
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ei lung hong khih na ding
Zeisu itna pha hi.
Lung kituakna in vantung khua
Kituakna bang om hi.

Verse 2
Ei Pa tokhom mai-ah
Nakpi thu i ngen hi.
Ei lawpna, upna, deihna teng
A ki bang-in om hi.

Verse 3
Eite’n dah-na thuak khawm
Van puakna kipua hi,
Khatveivei i lawmte aa-ding
Khitui a luang thei hi..

Verse 4
Eite kikhen ciang in
Lungsim dah-na piang hi.
Hih hang i lungsim tawh om khawm
Nung ciang kimu ding hi.

hymns.title: Hong Kiu, Hong Kiu, Kua Om Hiam?
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong kiu, hong kiu, kua om hiam?
Hong ngak, hong ngak, nang hong ngak!
Khual zin pa in midik pa hi,
Amah bang na mu ngei maw!
Ka lungsim in lamdang sa hi,
Kongkhak hon’ lo ding na hiam?

Verse 2
Hong kiu, hong kiu, hiah om lai,
Hong ngak, hong ngak, na um hiam!
Kongkhak hon’ ding haksa mahmah,
Singkung lopa’n tuam cip a,
Khuamial khuaugui in kan cip hi,
Kiimkot teng ah len kip hi.

Verse 3
Hong kiu, hong kiu, bang om hiam?
Hong ngak, hong ngak, nang hong ngak!
A kilhcip khut in hong kiu lai,
A Kumpi lukhu nuai pan,
A lungnem leh a mi git mai,
Hong Gum Topa’n hong ngak lai.

hymns.title: Hong Liah In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kitam a om a kip suangpi Hong liah in,
Gim na leh tawl na a tampi Hong liah in,
Topa itna ka lungsim ah
Mihing khen thei loh na mun ah
A kip tawntung suangpi pha aw, Hong liah in.

Verse 2
Mawhna kuam sung tun’ loh na’ng in Hong liah in,
Topa ka lung sung ah suangpi Hong liah in,
Hih leitung min than’ liat lai in
Ka mawh na’ng in hong zollai in
A kip tawntung suangpi pha aw, Hong liah in.

Verse 3
Dah na khua a mial laitak in Hong liah in,
Min than’ ni zingsang mateng in Hong liah in
Zawdan gun gei a nai ciang in
Na ang sungah hong tum sak in
A kip tawntung suangpi pha aw, Hong liah in.

hymns.title: Hong Masuan In Vaakna Aw
hymns.lyrics:
Key G (1st Tune)
Key Ab (2nd Tune)

Verse 1
Kiimkot khua mial na a taang Zeisu aw Hong masuan in.
Ka inn pan in gamlapi ah ka om. Lam hong hilh in.
Keima khe hong kep sak in. Gamlapi
Muh ding ngen lo, kal khat bek pha zo ta.

Verse 2
Tua bangin thu ngetna in dang lai in om ngei lo hi.
Ka teelsa lam ka zuih hangin tu ni Nong kha ding hi.
Kisak theih na ding in ka deih. Keimah’n
Ka kiphasak Ka mawhna ngaihsun ke’n.

Verse 3
Sawtpi Nangmah’n thupha nong piak man in Hong pia lai in.
Gam kuam, mual kal, tuipi kheng Topa in Lam hong hilh ta,
Khuavak ciang in sau veipi ka it mi
Lungdam in ah keimah’n ka mu ding hi.

hymns.title: Hong Mu Sak In Nangma Thumaan
hymns.title_en: Open My Eyes That I May See
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong mu sak in Nangma thumaan
Keima aa ding Na koih sa te;
Ka khut sungah hong pia in Nang mah’n
Hong khah khia thei kol sut na te.
Nangma deih na muh theih na ding,
Kong ngak hi, Topa Pasian aw;
Hong mu sak in, hong vaak sak in, Kha Siangtho aw.

Verse 2
Hong za sak in, Nangma thumaan
Tel tak a Na gin’ sak thu te;
Tua hi leh thu tampi ka zak hang,
Leeng mang ding hi a maan lote.
Nang ma deih na tel theih na ding,
Kong ngak hi, Topa Pasian aw;
Hong za sak in hong vaak sak in, Kha Siangtho aw.

Verse 3
Hong gen sak in Nangma thumaan
Mun khempeuh ah, lungdam tak in;
Ka lungsim hong puah sak, hon’ sak ta’n
Nangma mite ka it na’ng in.
Nang ma deih na hih theih na ding,
Kong ngak hi, Topa Pasian aw;
Ka lungsim sung hong vaak sak in, Kha Siangtho aw.

hymns.title: Hong Nai Sak In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nang aa hi’ng, Topa, Na aw za zo ing,
Kei hong itna hong gen hi;
Ahih hang upna tawh hong kah to in
Kong ki nai zaw lai nuam hi.

Sakkik:
Hong nai sak in, thupha Topa aw
Na sih na singlamteh tawh;
Hong kai in Na kiang ah thupha Topa aw,
Naitak in Na pang si tawh.

Verse 2
Hong siantho sak in hehpihna vaang tawh,
Na’ na semding hong zang in;
Lungkia ngei lo in lam et na kip tawh
Nang’ deih bang hong deih sak in.

Verse 3
Na tokhom mai ah tawl khat sung bek mah,
Thu ngen in kong khuk din’ zong,
Lawmta bang in lungsim kum khawm in ah
Ka lung hong nuam mahmah khong.

Verse 4
Gun gal kah bang sihna galkai mateng
Itna thuk phawk khin zo lo;
Nangmah tawh nuam tak kong khawl khawm mateng
Nuamna sang kiban nai lo.

hymns.title: Hong Pai Ciang In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong pai ciang in, hong pai ciang in,
Suang manpha khawm ding in,
Ama itte, Ama aa te, A suang manpha te.

Sakkik:
Zingsang aksi sol bang in A taang ciat ding uh hi;
A kumpi lukhu tung ah Te diamdiam ding hi.

Verse 2
Hong khawm ding hi, hong khawm ding hi,
A gam sung om ding mi,
A siangtho te, a taang pha te, A suang manpha te.

Verse 3
Naupang note, naupang note,
Hong Tanpa a it te,
Ama aa hi, Ama it hi, A suang manpha hi.

hymns.title: Hong Pai In Imanuaila
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong pai hong pai, Immanuaila, Hon’ in sal suak Itazila
Hi lai lungzuang, nilkhiat thuak mi, Pasian Tapa kilat mateng
Itazila te aw nuam un, No kiang immanuaila hong pai.

Verse 2
Hong pai hong pai, Zise suan aw, Satan khut sung pan hong hon in
Hong hon in hell khua sung pan in, Sihna han pan zawh na hong pia’n
Itazila te aw nuam un, No kiang immanuaila hong pai.

Verse 3
Hong pai Davuih Tapa hong pai, Ka vantung kong hong za hon’ in,
Muang tak vantung tun’ na’ng bawl in, Siatna lampi bingsak ta in,
Itazila te aw nuam un, No kiang immanuaila hong pai.

Verse 4
Hong tung Topa lung damna ni, I lungsim a hong lawp sak ding,
Zan khua mialna hong bei sak in, Meiite khengin khuavak hong pia!
Itazila te aw nuam un, No kiang immanuaila hong pai.

hymns.title: Hong Pai In, Mawh Neite
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu’n hong huausim lai in, Pai’n mawh neite!
Nang aa ding thu nget lai in, Pai’n mawh neite!
Tu’n Amah nang aa ding hi, Pai’n mawh neite!
Tu’n Amah na thei ding hi, Pai’n mawh neite!

Verse 2
Nang zong na van a gik hiam? Pai’n mawh neite!
Zeisu’n na van hong puaksak, Pai’n mawh neite!
Zeisu’n nang hong nial kei ding, Pai’n mawh neite!
Zeisu in nang hong saang ding, Pai’n mawh neite!

Verse 3
Aw, za in A hong thum-na, Pai’n mawh neite!
Pai in thupha saang dingin, Pai’n mawh neite!
Zeisu’n hong huausim lai in, Pai’n mawh neite!
Nang aa ding thu nget lai in, Pai’n mawh neite!

hymns.title: Hong Pai In, Thupha Nam Kim Nak
hymns.title_en: Come, Thou Fount of Every Blessing
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong pai in thupha nam kim Nak
Ka lungsim hong puahsak in;
Kang ngei lo Nong hehpihna Nak
Nakpi’n hong phat thei sak in.
Vantung mite phatna la ngaih
Kei zong hongg sa thei nuam ing;
Nong itna tung kip ka lungngaih
Tua itna mual ka phat ding.

Verse 2
Nong huhna tawh hih ciang kong tung
Huhna mual suang hiah phut ing;
Nong deih sak na hang in tu nung
Lung muangin inn hong tung ning.
Lam khial a Pasian ka nusia
Ahih hang Zeisu’n hong zong;
A si manpha tawh hong tan khia
Gimna lauhuai pan hong hon.

Verse 3
A ni simin hong hehpihna
A tampi hong ba sak den;
Na hehpih na’n hong khih in la
Na kiang pan hong pial sak ke’n.
Topa kong vak san dek zeel hi
Ka it Pasian hong keem in;
Hiah! ka lungsim Nang sung seel ni
Nang ading na ciamteh in.

hymns.title: Hong Pai San Ke’n
Hong Pai Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A zaknop huai penpen thu, thupha khat a om hi,
A lamdang thu ciamna thu kuama theih ngei loh thu!
Dah ta le hang nuam ta leng tua thu um ta kei leng
“Hong pai un,” ci in hong sam A singlamteh zuan ni.

Sakkik:
Hong pai un ka kiang, Hong pai un ka kiang,
Lungkham vangik pua te, Ka kiang hong pai un,
Ka kiang hong pai un, Ka kiang hong pai un,
Lungkham vangik pua te, Ka kiang hong pai un.

Verse 2
Bang hangin hong it lawmpa kiang pan na tai khia hiam?
Ama kiang beel mengmeng in, A tawntung in kip in,
Huh ding nei lo in ka om, mawhna sungah ka om,
Amah ka taisan hang in tu in ka zuan kik hi.

Verse 3
Ama hong sap mah bangin, A kiang nai semsem ning,
A aw neu kha za peuh leng ka ki nai semsem ding,
Tuipi gal khat mual pang khat inn tawh ka gamlat hang,
Na khut len in hong zui ning, “Hong pai in” na cih bang.

hymns.title: Hong Pai Un Thu Um Teng
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong pai un, thu um teng. Lungdam in ki pak un;
Hong pai un va en ni Betleh khua ah
Vantung Kumpipa Bawngkuang sung hong suak, ci.

Sakkik:
Va bia ni, hong pai ta un, Va bia ni hong pai ta un,
Hong pai un, va bia ni, Khazih Topa.

Verse 2
Sa un, kipahna la Vantung mi honte aw,
Vantung a sang bel na Khempeuh thawn un
Van sang bel na ah Pasian min thang hen.

Verse 3
Hi hi, hong hon ding Pa Tu ni’n kong dawn uh hi
Zeisu Topa Na min thang tawn ta hen
Pa Pasian deih Thu Mi bang in hong piang ta.

hymns.title: Hong Paipih Na Peuhah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A migi tuucing pa en un, Tui khuk kiang a din’ lai in,
Tui leh an a duh te pai un, Gam hoihna vantung khua ah.

Sakkik:
Hong paipihna peuh zui un, Hong paipihna peuh zui un,
Haleluiah, Haleluiah, Hong paipihna peuh zui un.

Verse 2
Nuntak na lam a zui te bek, Pasian in lungdam pih ding
Topa Zeisu sih na bang in, Nuntak thak hong pia ding hi.

Verse 3
Tuu khumna buk sungah om te; Ama tuu tak tak te hi,
Amah in Pasian a up bang, Ei zong Topa i um ding.

hymns.title: Hong Paipih Na Peuhah Zui Ning
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa hong sapna ka za hi.
Topa hong sap na ka za hi,
Topa hong sap na kaza hi,
“Singlamteh pua in hong zui in,” ci.
Hong paipih na peuh ah zui ning,
Hong paipih na peuh ah zui ning,
Hong paipih na peuh ah zui ning,
Lam tawntung ah Amah zuizui ning.

Verse 2
Lung gim na huan ah zong zui ning,
Lung gim na huan ah zong zui ning,
Lung gim na huan ah zong zui ning,
Lam tawntung ah Amah zuizui ning.
Hong paipih na peuh ah zui ning,
Hong paipih na peuh ah zui ning,
Hong paipih na peuh ah zui ning,
Lam tawntung ah Amah zuizui ning.

Verse 3
Thu khen na mun ah zong zui ning,
Thu khen na mun ah zong zui ning,
Thu khen na mun ah zong zui ning,
Lam tawntung ah Amah zuizui ning.
Hong paipih na peuh ah zui ning,
Hong paipih na peuh ah zui ning,
Hong paipih na peuh ah zui ning,
Lam tawntung ah Amah zuizui ning.

Verse 4
Min pha leh hehpih hong pia ding,
Min pha leh hehpih hong pia ding,
Min pha leh hehpih hong pia ding,
Lam tawntung ah hong tonpihpih ding.
Hong paipih na peuh ah zui ning,
Hong paipih na peuh ah zui ning,
Hong paipih na peuh ah zui ning,
Lam tawntung ah Amah zuizui ning.

hymns.title: Hong Siang Sak Si
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
En un, mawhna khempeuh a pua khia Pa,
Sihna Kalvary mual tung ah,
Singlamteh tung gim na sih na thuak in,
Kei aa ding in a sisan hong luang.

Sakkik:
Hong Gumpa Topa naak sungah,
Si san leh tui hong luang khia hi
Ka lung sungah om tawn tung hi,
Mawhna kisawp siang zo.

Verse 2
Mawh sawp siang nang tui, a hong luang zo hi,
Hong Gum Topa sihna mun pan,
A tawntung in tua tui ah kisil ni,
Hong Gum Topa kiang zuan in pai ni.

Verse 3
Tua si sung a a kisil khempeuh te,
A mawhna teng vuk bang ngo ding,
“Na mawhna khempeuh uh hong mai sak ding,
Ka kiang hong pai un,” Topa’n hong ci.

Verse 4
Mawhna sungah ka pai kik nawn kei ding,
Zeisu’n kei hong suakta sak ding,
A Kha Siangtho in kei hong pi ding a,
A gam sungah hong lutpih ding hi.

hymns.title: Hong Siang Sak Tuikhuk
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
En in, thuk in a zai tuikhuk,
A luang tawntung tuikhuk;
Vang nih pan in hong luang khia a,
Vuk bang hong ngo sak ding,
Vuk bang hong ngo sak ding.

Sakkik:
Hong pai hih tuikhuk Hong luang hi tu ni’n;
Hong pai khempeuh man ngen lo in,
Na mawh hong sawp sak ding.

Verse 2
Kalani khuam tungah, Lungkham,
Natna Thuak in hong si;
Lamdang si san gun tui hong luang,
Vuk bang hong ngo sak ding,
Vuk bang hong ngo sak ding.

Verse 3
Mi khempeuh dam na ding hong luang,
Tua thupha tuikhuk pan!
Upna tawh A si sung bual leng,
Vuk bang hong ngo sak ding,
Vuk bang hong ngo sak ding.

Verse 4
Lungdam na thupha na zaak ciang
Hong pai in, ci’n hong sam
Upna tawh A si sung bual leng,
Vuk bang hong nog sak ding,
Vuk bang hong nog sak ding.

hymns.title: Hong Thum Nget Ngut Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hin’ gim a mang mi aw, Hong kihei in,
Tuucing hoih pa’n hong sam, ngai in, Tu ni’
Hong hon ding hong zong, sawp siang ding hong ngak,
Amah sang meng in, zeikai nawn kei in.

Sakkik:
Hong sam hiau hiau hi, Hong thum lailai hi,
Tuucing hoih pa’n nang Hong sam za in;
Hong thum nget ngut hi, Hong sam lailai hi.
