Itna tawh hong sam, “Hong pai in,” ci.

Verse 2
Hong ngak lai hi ve’n bang hang Mang thang ding?
Tuu buk pan gamla na vak khit hang in.
A nun’tak na si tawh hong tan veve,
Hong thuak pih na lian gen zawh loh Lamdang.

Verse 3
A thupha ngaihsun in, A thu ngai in,
Mawh nei lo pa’n sing tung mawhna Pua khia;
Mawh mai na kician nun’tak tawntung na,
A si san buak’na tawh nangmah hong pia.

Verse 4
Thuman lampi zui in, tangtak pai in,
Zeisu sung lut in, nuntakna kongpi
Zeisu in lungnem takin hong sam hi,
Pai in lut un, a manthang nawn lo ding.

hymns.title: Honpa, Tuu Cing Bang Hong Pi In
hymns.title_en: Saviour, Like a Shepherd Lead Us
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Honpa, tuu cing bang hong pi in,
Nong huai na ko ki sam pha;
An tam gam nuam ah hong vak in,
Hong bawl kholhsak in omna.
Thupha Zeisu Thupha Zeisu
Nong lei zo, ko te Nang aa.
Thupha Zeisu thupha Zeisu,
Nong lei zo ko te Nang aa.

Verse 2
Hong pawi in, Nang neih sa kote,
Ko pai na lampi cing in;
Hong kem, hong hu in, Na tuu te,
Lam khialh caing hong zong kik in.
Thupha Zeisu Thupha Zeisu
Ko thu nget na hong za in.
Thupha Zeisu thupha Zeisu,
Ko thu nget na hong za in.

Verse 3
Mi zawng, mi mawh ka hi uh hang,
Nong ciam zo hong sang dingin;
Mawhna phe! na’ng sian’ na’ng dal na’ng,
Hehpihna Na nei cing in,
Thupha Zeisu Thupha Zeisu
Nang lam hong kihei sak in.
Thupha Zeisu thupha Zeisu,
Nang lam hong kihei sak in.

Verse 4
Ka neu lai un Nangma pahtak,
Na awi bang hong ta sak in;
Hong hon Topa pha aw, dim tak
Nangma itna hong guan in.
Thupha Zeisu, Thupha Zeisu
Nong it zo, hong it lai in.
Thupha Zeisu, thupha Zeisu,
Nong it zo, hong it lai in.

hymns.title: Hot Khiatna Lapi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Honpa itna thu ka za hi,
Itna lamdang hi mah hi ding hi,
Hih hang, itna hehpihna tawh,
Van pan kei aa ding hong kum suk maw? (Suk maw)
Van pan kei aa ding hong kum suk maw?

Sakkik:
Hi hi, hi, kei aa ding in, Hi hi, kei aa ding,
Topa’n hong it man, hong tuaksuk hi, van pan,
Singtung si, nang leh kei hong gum ding!

Verse 2
A thuakna si luan’na ka za,
Singlamteh tung thuak lah a sih na;
Hih hang cih theih hiam? Hih bang in;
Kei aa ding hong thuak sak hi, ci in (Ci in)
Kei aa ding hong thuak sak hi, ci in.

Verse 3
Zeisu tate in a ngah ding,
Vantung ah inn nuam om cih za ing;
Hih hang kei aa ding bawlsa diam;
Kei aa ding tua lai mun a om hiam? (om hiam?)
Kei aa ding tua lai mun a om hiam?

Verse 4
“Nang lo, ke’n kua zuan ding?” ci a,
Kong dotna thu hong dawng in, Topa;
Na Kha Siangtho tawh hih hong ci’n;
“Honpa leh vantung om, nang aa ding (aa ding)
“Honpa leh vantung om nang aa ding.”

hymns.title: Huan Sungah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kei guak huan sung ah ka vak a,
Paak tung a daitui a kaai lai in,
Ka bil sung ah, ke’n A ma aw ka za,
Hong hopih Pasian Ta in.

Sakkik:
Amah’n hong tonpih, A mah’n hong tonpih,
Kei Ama aa ci in hong gen,
I neih bang in i lungdam ding tua lai,
Kua mah’n ciam kha ngei lo hi.

Verse 2
Ama’ thu gen khum kisa in,
Vasa te’n dai tak in ngai lia lua;
A ngaih mahmah la keimah hong pia ta,
Ka lung sung hong ging ziazua.

Verse 3
Amah tawh tua huan ah giak ning,
Zan khuamial in hong kiimkot hang in,
Ahih hang Amah’n mawhna aw sung pan,
Hong sawl hi, pai ta in, cin’n.

hymns.title: Huhpa Hong Pai Khin Ta
Huih Lakah La Kisa
hymns.title_en: There’s A Song In the Air
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Huih lakah la kisa, aksi pi hong kilang,
Nu mi gi’n thu ngen a, naungek khat a kap bang,
Bang hang aksi hong kilang, bang hang la kisa,
Betlen khua sung ah hong suah hang hi, Kumpi pa.

Verse 2
Lungdam na gamlum pha, Naungek lamdang suah hang,
Naungek siangtho Tapa, leitung khempeuh te maang,
Aksi pi hong taang suk hi, Vantung mi’n la sa,
Betlen khua sung ah hong suah hang hi, Kumpi pa.

Verse 3
Khang tawntung lam et na, Tua aksi’n tangko hi;
Van pan gamla kiza, leitung teng kizeel hi;
Bang hang hiam hih innkuan sung ah om lungdam na,
Zeisu hong suak zo hi, Innkuan sung Kumpi pa.

Verse 4
I khuavak hong tung ta, Eite i lundam hi;
Vantung mite’ sak la, Eite’n i sa sawn hi,
Sa un vantung mite’n hong puak lungdam na thu,
Ei hong honpa Kumpi pa hi, Zeisu.

hymns.title: Huihpi Nakpi’n A Nun Simin
hymns.title_en: From Every Stormy Wind That Blows
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Huihpi nakpi’n a nun’ sim in,
Dah na tui bang a khan’ sim in
Zuat ding tawldam huai, lung muan’ huai
Mun om, heh pih na to khom nuai.

Verse 2
Eite i lu tungah Zeisu’n
Lungdam sathau hong nilh na mun,
Mun dang teng sang nuam pen mun om,
Sisan baang hehpihna tokhom.

Verse 3
Khat leh khat lungsim kigawmna
Lawm leh gual tawh kikholh theihna
Kikhen hang pum khat bang hong suah
Hehpihna tokhom kiim kituah.

Verse 4
Pumpi’ utna leh mawhnate’n
Hong nawngkai sak zo nawn lo den;
Vantung in hong dawn tuah suk ta,
Vaang taang in tua tokhom tuam ta.

hymns.title: Huihpi Nun’ Ciang A Kidalna
hymns.title_en: A Shelter in the Time of Storm
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
I bukna Suangpi Topa hi, Huihpi nun’ ciang a kidalna;
A sia nam kim aa ding bit hi, Huihpi nun’ ciang a kidalna.

Sakkik:
Gim na gam sung ah Zeisu Suangpi a hi,
Belh ding Suangpi, Belh ding Suangpi,
Gim na gam sung ah Zeisu Suangpi a hi,
Huihpi nun’ ciang a kidalna.

Verse 2
Sun in ni liim, zan in kulhpi, Huihpi nun’ ciang a kidalna;
Gal te bangmah patau lo hi, Huihpi nun’ ciang a kidalna.

Verse 3
Huihpi’n i kiimkot nuai hang in, Huihpi nun’ ciang a kidalna,
Nusia lo ding cik mah hun in, Huihpi nun’ ciang a kidalna.

Verse 4
Pasian Suangpi, belh ding it huai, Huihpi nun’ cianga kidalna,
Tawntung hong nai, hong keem, hong huai, Huihpi nun’ ciang a kidalna.

hymns.title: I Lung Nuam Hi, Zeisu Muang Leng
hymns.title_en: Tis so Sweet to trust in Jesus
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
I lung nuam hi, Zeisu muang leng
Ama hong gen bang um leng,
Ama hong thuciam na muang leng,
Topa hong cih na thei leng.

Sakkik:
Zeisu Zeisu, ke’n ka muang hi.
A muan’ huai na thei zo ing.
Zeisu Zeisu, manpha Zeisu;
Amah muang semsem nuam ing.

Verse 2
I lung nuam hi, Zeisu muang leng
Hong sap na A si muang leng,
Hong dam hong siang sak thei A’ si
Suang ah upna tawh bual leng.

Verse 3
I lung nuam hi, Zeisu muang leng
Mawh na pumpi, nusia leng,
Nuntak, lung nop, tawl dam nuam na
Zeisu khut tung pan sang leng.

Verse 4
Zeisu kong muan’ theih ka nuam hi.
A manpha Lawmpa Na hi;
Hong Honpa aw, a tawp dong in,
Nong om pih ding ka thei hi.

hymns.title: I Mawhna Hangin Zeisu Kap Maw?
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Mihing mawhna hang in, I To Zeisu kap maw?
Mi khempeuh kap in om kei un, Ka khitui taak ciang in.

Verse 2
Zeisu khitui luang in, Vantung mi’n hong en a,
Haksat na thuak in khitui luang, Nang taang ding Topa’n thuak.

Verse 3
A kah bang kap un la, Mawh mai na’ng khitui hi,
Vantung ah mawhna om nawn lo, Khitui luan’na om lo.

Verse 4
Tuuno Zeisu a hi, A tawntung in phat un,
Hong thuciam bang in nung ta in, Van leh lei Topa hi.

hymns.title: I Mawhna Leh I Dahna Teng
hymns.title_en: What a Friend We Have in Jesus
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
I mawhna leh i dah na teng
A pua ding Zeisu i Lawm
Pasian kiang ah i sap na teng
Thuum theih na’ng thupha a om
Lung nopna tampi i taan a,
Thuak loh ding pi i thuak hi;
Na khempeuh te Pasian kiang ah
Thuum in i koh loh hang hi.

Verse 2
Ze-et, bawl siat a hi zong in,
Lung kham na khat peuh om maw
Cik mah ciang lungkia ngei lo in
Topa kiang ah ko in aw.
Dah teng thuakpih nuam Zeisu bang
Lawm maandang mu zo ding maw.
Zeisu’n thei khin i sap bang bang
A ma kiang ah ko in aw.

Verse 3
Lung khamna van gik bang lel in
Zawngkhal in na tha nem maw
Manpha Honpa i belh hi in
Ama kiang thu ngen in aw.
Mi’n hong sim mawh, hong huat ciang in
Zei su kiang i pai ding hi.
A’ ang sung hong pom hong dal in
Lung nop na hong pia ding hi.

hymns.title: I Ngak Laitak Hong Tuak Diam?
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa Zeisu nuam na hong pia ding in
Sun kim zan kim hong pai leh,
Lungsim dik in, mei vak a baih sa in,
I ngak laitak hong tuak diam?

Sakkik:
U te nau te, i kiging ciat zo hiam?
I kha inn nuam lut na ding,
Nangmah le kei kiging sa’n hong mu diam?
Ngak in, Topa hong pai ding ngak in.

Verse 2
Zingsang khat peuh phalvak tung pan laitak
Khat khat in hong sam pak leh,
Hong kep sak talen i piak kik laitak,
“Pha hi,” nang hong ci na diam?

Verse 3
Hong vaikhak na bang in i hih zo leh,
I siam na zah siit kei leng,
I lungsim kisuan’ na a om kei leh,
Nopna pha i ngah ding hi.

Verse 4
A ngak zote in thupha ngah ding hi;
Vantung khua ah maang khawm ding.
Sun kim zan kim A hong pai kha ding hi,
I ngak laitak hong tuak diam?

hymns.title: I Pasian Mai Nawt Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Min than’na tawh Topa hong pai ka mit in mu khin zo
Amah in hehna leenggah kikoih na lo tuancil khin zo
Kihtak huai, a zap tel khuaphelep A namsau khah khin zo
I Pasian’n mai nawt hi.

Sakkik:
Min thang, min thang, Haleluijah!
Min thang, min thang, Haleluiah!
Min thang, min thang, Haleluiah!
I Pasian’n mai nawt hi.

Verse 2
Giahphual za khat kiim a mei taang ah Amah mu khin ing
Nitak dai nom lak ah biakna tau lam uh, Ama aa ding
Ama thukhen na maante, mei taang kiau kiau ah sim thei ing
I Pasian’n mai nawt hi.

Verse 3
Nung kik ding a, sam ngei lo ding peengkul A mah’n mut hi.
A thukhen na tokhom mai ah mihing te’ lungsim sit hi.
Ka kha aw, Amah dawng meng in! nuam in, ka khe! nuam huai hi.
I Pasian’n mai nawt hi.

Verse 4
Tuipi gal khat, unok paak hoih lakah Khazih suak khin hi.
Nang leh kei hong kikhel sak A’ ang sung minthan’na tawi hi.
Mite siangsak ding hong sih bang in, mi’ suahtak na’ng si ni.
Pasian’ mai nawt lai in.

hymns.title: I Pasian Muan Huai Kulhpi Hi
hymns.title_en: A Mighty Fortress Is Our God
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
I Pasian muan’ huai kulhpi hi,
A sia ngei lo kidal na;
Mawhna tui bang a let mite,
Puan bang sawp siang Huhpa hi;
Tanglai pu leh pa gal,
Ei tung gal bang hong zong;
A siamna vaang a lian,
Git loh muh dah na dim;
Leitung leh a gam teh lo.

Verse 2
Eite’n ei tha bek i suang hiam?
Ei tha bek in zo lo ding;
Ei lam a pang mi maan om lo,
Pasian teel khiat mi pa in,
Kua pen a hi ding hiam?
Zeisu Khazih a hi.
A min Topa Pasian Tanglai, tulai kibang,
Gal a zo tawntung ding hi.

Verse 3
Dawi tawh kidim hih leitung in,
Ei te hong bawlsia ding in,
Pasian deih kei. i lam kei ding,
Amah’n hong zawhpih ding hi.
Khuamial na kumpi pa
Aa ding i liing kei hi.
Amah i do zo ding,
En un, sia dek ta hi;
Kam mal khat tawh puk ding hi.

Verse 4
Leitung vangliat nate tung ah,
Lungdam na’ piak kul lo hi,
Kha Siangtho hehpihna ei aa,
Ei lam Amah hong pang khawm,
Leitung nuntak na leh
Nate sia khin ding a;
Pumpi a that ding hi;
Pasian thumaan kip in,
A gam kip tawntung ding hi.

hymns.title: I Topa Hong Itna Lamdang Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
I Topa hong itna lamdang hi.
Mawhna khialh na i neih hang tampi,
Lian zaw tham lai hong hehpihna si,
Kalani mual tung ah hong bua hi.

Sakkik:
Hong hehpihna,
I mawhna hong mai sak siang sak hi.
Pasian itna, I Mawhna teng sang in lian zaw hi.

Verse 2
Mawhna lung kiat na’n tui khang bang in
Ka kha hong sut nuam hong to laitak
Gen zawh loh, lian zaw hehpihna in
Ka belh ding Singlamtehpi hong lak.

Verse 3
Ki seel zo nawn kei i mawhna nin;
Bang a om diam hong sawp zo lai ding.
En un, hia a luang sisan gun pi’n,
Vuk sang hong ngo zaw sak pah thei ding.

Verse 4
Lamdang kicing hehpihna lian zaw
A um khempeuh A hong pia khong hi.
A mai a mu nuamte khempeuh aw,
Sang pak ve un hong hehpihna hi.

hymns.title: Inn Pha Bel Ah I Pai Ding Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Mi siangtho te pai na ding lampi in
Pasian mai ah a om ding hi.
Vantung khua mual ah i pai ngit nget a
Zingsol i tung ah hong taang hi.

Sakkik:
Inn pha bel ah i pai ding a
Lungdam na tawh i kimu ding hi.
Khua mun nuam bel eite’n i phak ciang
Dah na om nawn lo hi.

Verse 2
Lam nuam tawm mi siangtho honpi te in
Zion khua ah a pai kik ciang
Meivak sung ah namgim tui thun khol un.
Vantung khua ah i pai ding hi.

Verse 3
Lam nuam tawn ding a i ngaihsut tek leh
Khat leh khat i ki itna in
Pasian tawh eite i om khawm ding a
Nuam in i om tawntung ding hi.

Verse 4
Zawdan gun gei a a votna, gei-ah
I din’ hang in a gal khat ah
Topa Pasian tawh i ngap khawm ding a
A min i phat tawntung ding hi.

hymns.title: Innkuan Ki It Leng
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
I kiim kot teng kilawm na, Innkuan ki it leng;
Aw ging khempeuh lungdam na, Innkuan ki it leng.
Lungnop na lo ki cin’na, Ki hei na teng mai tai na;
Hun khempeuh nuam mahmah a, Innkuan ki it leng.

Sakkik:
Innkuan sung ki it leng,
Hun khempeuh nuam mahmah a,
Innkuan ki it leng.

Verse 2
Bukno khat sung zong nuamna, Innkuan ki it leng;
Huatna, en’ na om loh na, Innkuan ki it leng.
I pai na teng ah nuamna, Leitung khempeuh lungdam na;
Lungdam na dim nuntak na, Innkuan ki it leng.

Verse 3
Pasian zong hong lungdam pih, Innkuan ki it leng;
Leitung teng ki itna dim, Innkuan ki it leng.
Lui ging bek zong la ngaihpi, Vandum bek zong mai taii na,
Pasian van pan hong nuihpih, Innkuan ki it leng.

hymns.title: Itna Kumpi, Ka Tuucing Pa (The King of Love My Shepherd Is
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Itna Kumpi, ka tuucingpa,
Ama hoihna sia ngei lo,
A mi suak leng sapna om lo,
Tawntung Ama mi hi ta.

Verse 2
Nuntakna tui a luanna ah,
Tat khiatsa ka kha tonpih,
Lo no na ah hong paipih hi,
Vantung an tawh hong vaak hi.

Verse 3
Khuamial sihna kuam sung lau lo,
Kei kiang Topa Na om hi,
Ka lung nuam sak, Na ciangkhut in,
Lam hong hilh singlamteh in.

Verse 4
Ni sim tawntung kizon suak in,
Na hoihna kipelh ngei lo,
Tuucing siampa, Nang kong phat hi,
Tawntung Nangma innpi sung A men.

hymns.title: Itna Siangtho, Itna Kicing
Itna’n Kei Hong Phong Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Mawh na thuk ah tum suk in, Suahtak na ding gamla
Ka sung mawh na nin dim in Tum cip ding ka hi ta.
A hih hang in Topa in, Ka kiko na hong za,
Tui sung pan hong dom to in, Tu’n ka suakta.

Sakkik:
Kei hong phong hi! kei hong phong hi!
Itna in a ci mawh Kei hong phong hi.
Kei hong phong hi.
Kei hong phong hi! Kei hong phong hi!
Itna in a ci mawh Kei hong phong hi.

Verse 2
Amah bek ke’n ka muang ta, Amah beel tawntung ning
A mai nuam ah ka khawl ta, Amah phat tawntung ning.
Hi zah ta a hong itna, Ka siam tawp in phat ning.
Itna tawh Ama deih na, Seem tawntung ning.

Verse 3
Kha nuntak na tan’ dek te, Zeisu’n hong hon thei hi.
Tuipi hual sung tum dek te, A hong dom to ding hi.
Ama uk hi, tuihual te, Ama thu mang uh hi.
Hong hon nuam hi, na ut leh, Tu ni, tu ni.

hymns.title: Jerusalem Kham Khuapi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Jerusalem khua, nang in Bawngnawi khuai zu om na
Nangmah ka lung ngaih laitak Ke’n lamdang ka sa ta.
Keima aa ding lungdam na Leh nop na a tampi.
Ke’n ka theih loh min than’ na Tua san tak ah om hi.

Verse 2
Zion khua innpi sung ah Bawl siat a thuak te leh
Puan pak silh vantung mite Bang in ah la sa veh.
Topa in amau kiang ah A om tawntung ding hi.
Thupha a ngah te om na Ni a taang tawntung hi.

Verse 3
Davuih tokhom a om leh Gim na bei khit ciang ah
Gal zo leh an lam mite’ La sak na aw ki za.
Hih mite in Topa aw Gal do na ah zo ci.
Tawp ngei lo tawntung in ah Puan paak silh ding uh hi.

Verse 4
Gam lamdang a pha bel in Pasian thu zui om na.
Gam lamdang a pha bel in A muang mite’ deih na
Zeisu na hehpihna in Tua khua hong paipih in.
Pasian le Kha Siangtho tawh Min phatna ngah ta hen.

hymns.title: Ka Hi Bang Hong La In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa Zeisu ka thu ngai in
Na hong phel kei leh ka si ding.
Kiphelna thu hong pia suk in.
Ka hi bang hong la in.

Sakkik:
Ka hi bang hong la in,
Ka hi bang hong la in.
Nangma sih keima phatna hi.
Ka hi bang hong la in.

Verse 2
Phelna mu lo mawhna tampi
Ka nei man in Topa a si.
Nong hehpih leh Nong phel thei hi.
Ka hi bang hong la in.

Verse 3
Bangmah a pha ka bawl zo lo
Ka thuciam na ka sia sak zo
Na min tawh hong phel sak in aw
Ka hi bang hong la in.

Verse 4
Na khe mai ah kong kun Topa,
Nong muh bangin kei ka hi hi.
Na sep kipan kiman khin zo,
Ka hi bang hong la in.

hymns.title: Ka Hi Bangin
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ka hi bang in pau lap nei lo,
Kei aa ding Na si luang sim loh,
Nangmah in Nong sap na thu tawh,
Pasian’ Tuuno, kong zuan, kong zuan.

Verse 2
Ka hi bang in misia, mittaw,
Khuamuh na, hauh na, dam na tawh
Ka sap na teng ngah ding in aw,
Pasian’ Tuuno, kong zuan, kong zuan.

Verse 3
Ka hi bang in mawh na baang in,
Kisil tawm ding in khawl lo in,
Na si’n hong siang sak thei man in,
Pasian’ Tuuno, kong zuan, kong zuan.

Verse 4
Ka hi bang in Nong sang mah ding,
Nong phel, Nong sawp, Nong huh mah ding,
Na thuciam ka um zo man in,
Pasian’ Tuuno, kong zuan, kong zuan.

hymns.title: Ka Kha Aading A Hoih Hi
hymns.title_en: It Is Well With My Soul
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Gunpi taang lo bang nuam na’ng nong hilh na in
Dah na tui bang in hong let hi.
Topa hong hilh na pha hi ka kha aa ding
Hoih bel hi, Kha aa ding, hoih bel hi.

Sakkik:
Hoih bel hi, kha aa ding,
Hoih bel hi, hoih bel hi, kha aa ding.

Verse 2
Dadwi in hong khem a bawlsiat na hong tun’ hang,
Ka up ding a thuciam om hi.
Topa Zeisu in ka tha nem hong en hi.
Hoih bel hi, kha aa ding, hoih bel hi.

Verse 3
Hong it a a nuam ngaihsut ciang in ah,
Ka mawh ka khialhna sung pan in
Ka suahtak na ding singlamteh tung si hi.
Ka lungsim in ka phat hi Topa.

Verse 4
Topa Zeisu tu nung ciang hong pai ding hi.
Ka lung khamna teng bei ding hi.
Topa hih leitung ah hong pai ding in ah
Ka Kha Siangtho aa ding a pha hi.

hymns.title: Ka Kha Aw, Topa Phat Ni
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Minthang Kumpi phat un, Amah bek Pasian;
Phat un, ei hong lak zo hi, na lamdang lian;
Khualzin mi tonpih den ding, hong ciam phat un,
Meikhuam leh sun na meiipi hang in phat un.

Sakkik:
Phat un, a taang van mi’n, Kham gawsem tum in,
A mi khempeuh in phat A mai en sa in,
A gam lianpi sung ah, Kum tawn kha tawn in;
A bawlsa te’n phat ding, Ka kha aw phat in.
A bawlsa te’n phat ding, Ka kha aw phat in.

Verse 2
Mi khempeuh tat khiatna hong pia khong phat un;
A siang sak thei tuikhuk hong piak man phat un;
Mi gi hong it, hong kepna hang in phat un,
I thunget nate hong dawn’ manin phat un.

Verse 3
Hong it man hong ze-et na hang in phat un.
Eite hong kip sak in, hong lak hi, van mun;
Gal zo muan’na, mit lo lawpna hang phat un,
It teng kituah khawm na’ng mun hang in phat un.

hymns.title: Ka Kha Ni
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong gum Topa ni taang bang hi.
Ama kiang khuamial ngei lo hi.
Topa aw, Na mai kong muh na’ng
Meiilum kai te na theng sak in.

Verse 2
Topa, ka lungkham ciang in ah.
Mit gui in a kham luat lai ah.
Topa aw, Nangma ang sung ah
Ka tawl ka hong damsak nuam ta.

Verse 3
Topa aw, Nang na om lai ah.
Sih ding ka kih ta keimah in.
Keimah tawh a om khawm ding in
Nisim in Topa hong pai in.

Verse 4
Tu lai-a Na thu hong sel-a
Thupha bel hong nial te in ah
Nung ciang in a khialh loh na’ng in.
Lam a khialte na hehpih in.

Verse 5
Nitak a athum a taute
Cidam lo a a zawngkhal te
Na thupha kong na hon’ in la
A lung na dam sak in, Topa.

hymns.title: Ka Kumpi Na Hi Ta, Tu’n Nang
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ka Kumpi Na hi ta tu’n Nang;
Vangliant na teng tang in.
Ling Na khu ka mang ngilh loh na’ng
Kalvari’ a hong pai pih’n.

Sakkik:
Getsemani mang ngilh loh na’n,
Na thuakna ka mang ngilh loh na’ng,
Nong itna ka mang ngilh loh na’ng
Kalvari’n hong pai pih’n.

Verse 2
Na kisial na han hong lak in,
Nangmah hong kikah na
Vantung mite’n puan paak silh in
Nangmah a hong cin na.

Verse 3
Mazih bangin khuamui sung ah
Nangmah hong dawnsak in,
Hong paipih in Kalvari ah
Na han hawm hong lak in.

Verse 4
Nangma aa ding ke’n pua nuam ing
Singlamteh ni sim in;
Dah na na hai hong dawnpih ning,
Kei aa ding Nang thuak khin.

hymns.title: Ka Lung Sungah La Ngaih Hong Kisa
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ka lung sung ah la ngaih hong kisa,
Zeisu hong hopihna hi.
Lau ke’n nang kong ompih tawntung na,
Lungnuam takin om in ci.

Sakkik:
Zeisu, Zeisu, Zeisu Min teng pan ngaih pen,
Lung gulh teng ki cin’na,
La hong sasa nuam sak den

Verse 2
Ka nuntak na mawhna’n su gawp zo;
Lung lem loh nat na damsak
Zeisun’ a sia teng hong lep sak zo;
A ngaih la khang lo kik sak.

Verse 3
Hong hehpihna pha tawh ki vak in,
A kha nuai ka beel ta a,
A maitai ka muh tawntung man in
Kiko nuam na la ka sa.

Verse 4
A sawt lo in hong pai kik ding hi
Van ah hong la to ding in
Theih loh gam ah kaleng to ding hi
Amah tawh mang khawm ding in.

hymns.title: Ka Lung Sungah La Ngaih Ka Za
hymns.title_en: In My Heart There Rings a Melody
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu hong puak la khat ka ngah hi,
Tua la van pan hong puak hi;
Tua sang a ngaih zaw la om ngei lo hi,
Tua in ki itna la hi.

Sakkik:
Ka lung sung la ngaih khat ka za hi,
A kilem mahmah vantung pan hong kisa hi;
Ka lung sung la ngaih khat ka za hi,
Tua la in ki itna la hi.

Verse 2
Kalani aa si Khazih it ing,
Ka mawh na hong sawp sak hi;
Ka lung sung ah la ngaih khat hong koih hi.
Ka thei, tua la teeng den ding.

Verse 3
A tul ngeilo minthan’na la hi,
Vantung mite tawh sa ding;
Tua la in a kilem mahmah la hi,
Vantung zum pan in hong ging.

hymns.title: Ka Muan’na Zeisu A Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Keimah ka muan’na a bulpi
Zeisu si leh siangtho na hi.
A dang thu teng ka um ngam kei
Zeisu a min bek ka um thei.

Sakkik:
Keima din’na Zeisu Suangpi
Om na dang teng sehnel bang hi.
Om na dang teng sehnel bang hi.

Verse 2
Khuamial in a mai liah ciang in
A hong hehpihna ka muang ding
Huihpi nakpi a nun’ciang ah
Mun laih na sung ah sik kip khia.

Verse 3
A thuciam na te Ama si
Tuipi kan lai ka muang ding hi.
Ka kiimkot teng a siat ciang ah
Ka muan’na in Zeisu Topa.

Verse 4
Pengkul aw tawh A pai ciang in,
Ama mai ah ka ding nuam hi.
A hong siangtho sak khit ciang in
Mawh nei lo in ka om ding hi.

hymns.title: Ka Nun’ Sung Ka Tat Khialna
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ka nun’ sung ka tat khialhna tam zo a,
Ka lungsim mawh na tam zaw sem ta;
Ka kah na in khua mu lo pi,
Kong hon’ sa ka va kiu ding hi.

Sakkik:
Ka mawh na ka gi nat loh na;
Tampi ka phawk sem sem ta;
Ahih hang Zeisu’n hong sap ciang in sung ah,
Ka tum ding kongpi hon’ sa.

Verse 2
Amah itna lak ah kei a neu pen,
Thu ngetna ah zong a zawngkhal pen;
Hong sap bang ke’n ka zuan mawk hi,
Amah in hong nial lo ding hi.

Verse 3
Ka khialh te hehpihna in siin ding hi,
Ka mawh na Amah’n sil khia ding hi;
Meidawi a kip lo keima khe,
A taang kongpi lam zuan gi ge.

Verse 4
Ka nun’ sung ka tat khialhna tam zo a
Mawh na hang ka lungsim sung min ta
Ka kah na in khua mu lo pi,
Hong Honpa’n hong tum sak ding hi.

hymns.title: Ka Om Nang Khua A Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ni a taang khat na gam lam ah
Nop sak na’ng gam lam ah
Ak si zong a taan’ na gam ah
Ka om na’ng khua a hi.

Sakkik:
Tua khuapi nuam, khut tawh bawl lo,
Tuagam ei ma aa ding
Tawntung vantung mi’n la a sa
Ei ma om na ding hi.

Verse 2
Gim na thuak na gun gal khat ah
Lung gim tam na lam ah
Kikhel a i nop sak na’ng
Ka om na’ng in bawl ta.

Verse 3
Sihna tuipi gal khat lam ah
Khuamial na gam sung ah
Lungdam nuam na i ngah na ding
A taang in ka mu hi.

Verse 4
Mawhna leh hehna leitung ah
Hong liah a mang sak hi.
Tawntung tua khuapi nuam sung ah
Zeisu tawh om khawm ning.

hymns.title: Ka Thei Hi, Kei Hong Tanpa Hing Hi
hymns.title_en: I Know That My Redeemer Liveth
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ka thei hi, kei hong Tanpa hing hi,
Leitung ah hong pai kik ding hi;
Ka thei hi, nuntak na thak hong pia,
Hehpihna Vaang A khut sung om.

Sakkik:
Ka thei, ka thei To Zeisu hing hi,
Leitung ah hong pai kik ding hi,
Ka thei ka thei, nuntak na hong pia,
Hehpihna Vaang A khut sung om.

Verse 2
Ka thei hi, hong thuciam pel ngei kei,
A gensa thu bei ngei lo ding;
A gilo sihna pan ka suakta,
Amah mu ding nung ciang in ah.

Verse 3
Ka thei hi, ka om na’ng mun bawl khawl,
A om na peuh kei zong om ning;
A lamdang Amah’n kei hong kem hi,
Kei aa ding in hong pai kik ding.

hymns.title: Kah Hang Hong Gum Zo Lo
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kah hang hong gum zo lo!
Khitui in ka mai sawn zong,
Ka lau na dai sak tuam lo,
Mawhna kum sawp siang thei lo;
Kah hang hong gum zo lo!

Sakkik:
Zei su kap kei tang ding si,
Sing khuam tung ah khai na thuak,
Kei hong hon ding in hong ngak,
Amah bek hong hon thei.

Verse 2
Sep hang hong gum zo lo!
A hoih pen ka sem thei zong,
A siang pen ka ngaihsun zong,
Ka kha thak suak sak thei kei;
Sep hang hong gum zo lo!

Verse 3
Ngak hang hong gum zo lo!
Huh theih loh mawhna nei zong,
Ka bil sung hehpih’n hong sam;
Ngak lai leng ka si ding hi;
Ngak hang hong gum zo lo!

Verse 4
Khazih upna’n hong gum!
Hong um sak in Na Tapa,
A bawlsa nate um in;
A khut in kei hong pom ding;
Khazih upna’n hong gum!

hymns.title: Kalani
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kalaniah Zeisu a si.
Hong gum Topa tua ki that hi.
Tua khuam tung ah a si bua hi.
Mawh phel na’ng in a hong lei hi.

Sakkik:
Aw Kalani, aw Kalani.
Topa Zeisu sihna thuak hi.
Aw kalani, aw Kalani.
Hong gum Topa kei aa ding si.

Verse 2
Suangpi kitam, khua hong mial hi.
Hong gum Topa lusu, si hi.
A kiliah na puan kikeek a.
Hon’sak lam sung nuam tawntung ta.

Verse 3
Topa Zeisu aw, bang ci hiam,
Topa nang in hin’na hong pia.
Singlamteh pua haksa thuak hi.
Launa sungah Kalani ah.

hymns.title: Kalvari Ah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kiphat sak na’n kum sawt ka bei sak,
Kei aa ding kithat Topa don lo,
Kei aa ding hong sih lam ka phawk kei,
Kalvari ah.

Sakkik:
Man piak loh hehpihna a lian leh
Mawh mai sak na kei tung ah khang a,
Ka kha vangik tu in suak ta hi.
Kalvari ah.

Verse 2
Pasian thu in ka mawh lam phawk sak,
Bang ka hi ka phawk ciang ka liing a,
A mawh ka kha thum in, ka kihei
Kalvari lam.

Verse 3
Tu’n Zeisu a vekpi’n ka pia khin,
Tu’n Amah ka Kumpi pa hi ta;
Tun’a sia sa kha in la a sa
Kalvari mah.

Verse 4
Aw, gup khiatna thu a geel itna!
Aw, mi tung dong hong puak suk thupha,
Aw, a khauh kizop na lei hong dawh
Kalvari ah.

hymns.title: Kam A Gen Zawh Hilo
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu in keimah hong itna,
Keimah hong tatna ding in ah
Singlamteh gilo hong thuakna,
Kam a gen zawh hilo.

Sakkik:
Hong itna kam gen zawh hilo,
Hong itna kam gen zawh hilo,
Zeisu in keimah hong itna,
Kam a gen zawh hilo.

Verse 2
Ka nun’tak tawntung na’ng in ah,
Nakpi dahna A hong thuakna,
Ling kiphan lukhu hong khukna,
Kam a gen zawh hilo.

Verse 3
Pasian kiang hong thumsak Topa,
Ama sung ka ngah lungnop na,
Ama si hang hong piang thupha,
Kam a gen zawh hilo.

Verse 4
Hong nai ciang ka ngah lungdam na,
Launa kihel lo tawldam na,
Ama hang lam et na a pha,
Kam a gen zawh hilo.

hymns.title: Keen Sang Tawn Vantung Kah Lo Ding
hymns.title_en: We May Not Climb the Heavenly Steeps
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Keen sang tawn, vantung kah lo ding,
Khazih Topa la ding,
A thuk pen zong zon’ hang mu lo,
A ma sung lau om lo. Amen.

Verse 2
Itna siangtho, itna kicing,
Tu mah’n hong huh thei hi;
Itna, upna hong lah bang in
Galile tui gei ah. A men.

Verse 3
Mong nei lo dam na puan silh in,
A dah lupna kiang ah,
Amah i lawn’ khak ding hong om,
Hong dam sak kik la hi. A men.

Verse 4
Kote khempeuh To leh Siapa,
Kote’n bang min puak hang,
Nong sapna za’n Nang aa hi nuam,
Nang aa ding hong sit in.

Verse 5
Ama min suang in thungen leng,
Naupang bang in thum leng,
Sihna in ei a hong phak ciang,
Ama min i suang ding.

hymns.title: Kei Aading Tam Khang Suangpi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kei aa ding tam Khang Suangpi, Nangma sung kong beel ding hi.
Na pang vang pan hong ki zui Thakhat luang khia, “si leh tui”
Mawh kiphel thuap na hi hen; Hong sut hen la hong sawp hen.

Verse 2
Ka khut in kasep na tawh Thukham, deih na cin’ zo lo;
Hahkat den zo mah leng zong, Tawp lo khitui luang hang zong,
Mawhna kiphel zo sam lo; Nangmah bek in Nong hon zo.

Verse 3
Khut sung bangmah keng lopi Na singlamteh kong beel hi;
Puan nei lo Nangmah’n Nong guan, Cimawh hehpihna kong zuan,
Kihhuai tui nak kong delh hi; Nong sil ke’h ka si ding hi.

Verse 4
Ka nuntak lai hi ta leh, Ka sih laitak hi ta leh,
Theih loh gam ka kah ciang zong; Thu khenna mai kong tun’ dong,
Kei taang kitam Suangpi aw, Nangma sung hong beel sak aw.

hymns.title: Kei Dahna, Khuamial, Koltan’ Na Pan
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kei dahna, khuamial, koltan’ na pan, Zeisu, kong pai!
Zeisu, kong pai! Nang nuam na khuavak suahtak na lam,
Zeisu, Nang kiang kong pai! Ka natna pan Nang damna sung ah,
Ka zawn’ na pan Nang hauhna sung ah,
Ka mawh na sung pan Nangma sung ah,
Zeisu, Nang kiang kong pai!

Verse 2
Zumhuai lelhna, supna pan in ah, Zeisu, kong pai!
Zeisu, kong pai! Vanglian Na singlamteh meetna ah,
Zeisu, Nang kiang kong pai! Leitung dahna pan Nang kholna sung,
Huihpi sung pan Nangma daihna sung,
Lung gimna pan nuam la sak na sung,
Zeisu, Nang kiang kong pai!

Verse 3
Pha thei lo kisak theihna pan in, Zeisu, kong pai!
Zeisu, kong pai! Nangma deihna bangbang mang ding in,
Zeisu, Nang kiang kong pai! Ka pumpi nusia’n Na itna sung,
Lung kiatna pan vantung nuamna sung,
Sang semsem leeng to ning a tawntung
Zeisu, Nang kiang kong pai!

hymns.title: Kei Hong Honpa A Si Luangin
hymns.title_en: Alas! and Did My Savior Bleed?
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kei hong Honpa A si luang in Ka Kumpi hong si maw.
Tangtel bang bek keimah aa ding. A lu tang hong zang maw.

Verse 2
Keima git loh nate hang in Singlamteh tung tau maw.
Lamdang hehpihna leh itna, Bang tawh teh thei ding maw.

Verse 3
Kei zong singlamteh ka muh ciang Zum in ka kisel diam;
Lungdam na tawh lung nehno in Ka khi ka luangsak diam.

Verse 4
A hih bang khitui takna in Itna loh khin zo kei.
Topa, ka pumpi kong pia hi; Hih kan ka hih thei kei.

hymns.title: Kei Ka Singlamteh Zeisu’n Pua Khin
hymns.title_en: Jesus, I My Cross Have Taken
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu’n puak sak ka Singlamteh, Van gik khia’n Amah ka zui,
Cihmawh na, gentheih na ka thuak, Tu pan Nang aa ka hi ta,
Lam et na teng khempeuh siat hang, Zon’ teng, lam et teng mu khin,
Hauh na khempeuh kiciang khin pah, Pasian leh van kei aa hi ta!

Verse 2
Leitung mudah, nawlkhin thuak in, Gumpa na ngawn a deih lo,
Mihing lungsim in hong kheem hang, Na hi kei maan lo mi bang,
Kei tung’ Nong nuihmai ciang in ah, Itna, pilna thahat Pa,
Lawmte, galten hong pelh uh hang, Ko Nong lak hi, vaang taang Na mai.

Verse 3
Simmawh bawlsiat ka thuak ciang in, Nang ang hong tun’ tua te hi,
Nuntak haksa’n hong net cip hang, Van pan tawldam nuam Nong puak,
Na itna kei, kei kiang om ciang in, Dah na om hang na sa lo,
Nang kihel loh na mun peuh ah, Lungno hehnep na om lo hi.

Verse 4
Hehpihna tawh minthan’ na ah, Upna lum tawi thu ngen ding,
Tawntung vantung nuntakna sung, Pasian khut in hong kha ding,
Leitung nasep na hun bei in, Vantung khual zin na bei ciang,
Lam et na hong kikhel ding a, Up na’n mu thu ngen in phat ding.

hymns.title: Kei Nangawn Hong It Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vantung a i Pa in A hong itna,
Hong piak Lai Siangtho sung ah hong gen ta;
Lai Siangtho sung ah thu a ngaih pha pen,
Zeisu in kei hong itna mah hi pen.

Sakkik:
Zeisu’n hong it man ka nuam pha hi,
Kei hong it hi, kei hong it hi;
Zeisu’n hong it man ka nuam pha hi;
Kei na ngawn hong it hi.

Verse 2
Amah mang ngilh in ka taisan hang in,
Hong it lailai hi, ka mangthang hang in;
Zeisu in hong it ke’n ka phawk kik a,
Ama ang sung ka deih kik vingveng ta.

Verse 3
A phatna teng tawh A mai ka muh teh,
La khat bek sa thei ding hong kici leh;
Bang la ka sa zaw diam hih lo a dang,
“Zeisu in kei hong it pian dang lua sa’ng.”

Verse 4
Zeisu’n hong it a, kei zong ka it hi;
Ka kha hehpih in tan ding hong kum hi;
Hong it man in singlamteh tung si a,
Tua ahih ciang hong it takpi hi ta.

hymns.title: Kei Nong Phawk Denna Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nong hehpihna liang hang kong phat uh hi, Topa,
Tua in kote tu dong hong kem hi.
Na hoih na leh itna lian ka zahtak uh a,
Nangma sungah lungsim pia in, kong kun uh hi.

Sakkik:
Nang Nong vaikhak sa mah bagn in, Topa tuni’n
Na an kuang kong umpih uh hi tu’n;
Ko te tung a Nang Nong gen sa thu phawk in;
Kei nong phawk den na un hih un.”

Verse 2
Na hin’ na moh, a them vui kia te na ngawn zong,
A ne ding ka kilawm loh hang un,
Nangma hehpihna tawh kote Nong piak khong,
Nangma hoih na suang in, tua an ko ne ung, tu’n.

Verse 3
Lungsim hong bun in, ka tha uh hong hat pah hen,
Hi bang a ka bawl na te uh tawh,
Topa, Nong pai dong, Na sih na hong lak hen,
Nang tawh maan’ khawm hun dong ko hong Thakhuah sak hen aw.

hymns.title: Kei Tawh Om Khawm In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kei tawh om khawm in, ni a tum zo a
Khuamial semsem in kei kiang ah om ta.
Hong gum ding a dang om lo laitak in
Hong gum Topa aw kei kiang ah om in.

Verse 2
Leitung nuntak na mengmeng’n bei thei.
Leitung ah nuam na om tawntung thei kei.
Leitung ah siat na ngen tang ka mu ta,
Kei tawh om khawm in sia thei kei Topa.

Verse 3
Kei tawh om khawm, Kei ma tha a pha kei,
Nangmah bek in ze et-na na zo thei.
Nangmah bang in kua’n hong paipih thei maw?
Lungdam loh laitak kei tawh om khawm aw.

Verse 4
Thupha na hong piak leh kei ka lau lo.
Dah na khitui’n zong hong sia sak zo lo.
Sihna leh han in hong zo thei lopi.
Kei tawh na om khawm leh ka zo thei hi.

Verse 5
Keima ka mit si ka sih lai tak in
Na singlamteh ka mai ah hong lak in.
Vantung khuavak leitung khuamial bei a
Sih laitak kei tawh om khawm in Topa.

hymns.title: Keima Aading Vantung A Hi Ding Hi
hymns.title_en: That Will Be Heaven for Me
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A bawl innpi ah hong pai pih ding in
Topa hong pai ding hun kithei lo hi.
A hih hang Topa om a khuamial taang sak hi.
A min than’na kei aa ding hi.
A min than’na kei aa ding hi.
A min than na kei aa ding hi.
A hih hang Topa om a khuamial taang sak hi.
A min than’na kei aa ding hi.

Verse 2
Ka theih nai loh vantung mite’n la sa
Kham gawsem tawh Pasian min phat uh hi.
I Kumpi Topa Zeisu a phatna uh la
Tua la kisa kei aa ding hi.
Tua la kisa kei aa ding hi.
Tua la kisa kei aa- ding hi.
I Kumpi Topa Zeisu a phatna uh la
Tua la kasa kei aa ding hi.

Verse 3
Innpi hoih a lim ka thei nai kei hi.
Bang min ka ciahpih ding ka thei kei hi.
Hih hang hong gum Topa Zeisu hong ngai ding hi.
Vantung in keima aa ding hi.
Vantung in keima aa ding hi.
Vantung in keima aa ding hi.
Hih hang hong gum Topa Zeisu hong ngai ding hi.
Vantung in keima aa ding hi.

hymns.title: Keima Topa Zeisu Lamdang Honpa Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Keima Topa Zeisu lamdang Honpa hi,
Kei aa ding lamdang Honpa hi;
Suangpi kitam sungah ka kha hong liah sak,
Nuamna gunpi bang hong musak.

Sakkik:
Suangpi kitam sung keima kha hong liah sak,
Tua suangpi’n gam gawtak liap sak
A itna sungah ka nun’tak na phum ta,
Ama khutin kei hong hum ta,
Ama khutin kei hong hum ta.

Verse 2
Keima Topa Zeisu lamdang Honpa hi,
Amah’n pua khia keima vanpi;
Amah’n hong len a kei ka liing kei ding hi,
Ka ni bang in tha hong pia hi.

Verse 3
Kisim zo lo thupha hong pia kimat in.
Ama hoih na tawh kidim in,
Lungdam in la ka sa Pasian minthang hen,
Hih bang Tanpa ka nei hi ke’n.

Verse 4
Ama dikna puan paak silh a ka thawh ciang,
Amah dawn in ka leen’ toh ciang.
Ama hong itna le hong hotna kicing
Van ah awn tampi tawh sa ning.

hymns.title: Keimah Hong Gumpa
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong gum Topa hong it lamdang.
Lungdam sin dam la ka sa.
Kiciamna hong pel sak nuam hi.
Singlamteh tung si zo ta.

Sakkik:
Topa phat na sak ding la pha
(Topa phatna sak ding la pha Topa phatna sak ding la pha)
A si pha tawh hong sawp hi
(A si pha tawh hong sawp hi A si pha tawh hong sawp hi)
Singlamteh tung sihna thuak a
(Singlamteh tung sihna thuak a Singlamteh tung sihna thuak a)
Ka mawh hong pel sak zo hi
(Ka mawh hong pel sak zo hi. pel sak zo hi)

Verse 2
Vantung inn nuampi luahna ding.
A lamding thpha gen hi.
Hong hehpih hong it luat man in.
Ka mawh hong phel sak zo hi.

Verse 3
Hong gum Topa A minthang hi
Nisim la sa in phat ning.
Sih ciang mawh tanna meikuang sung.
Hong tung sak nuam lo ding hi.

Verse4
Hong gum Topa hong itna pha.
La pha kasak ding ngai hi.
Sihna hin’ tawntungna lamah.
Amah tawh ka om ding hi.

hymns.title: Keimah Hong Zong Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong gum Topa Betlen khua hong suak a
Bawng nek na an kuang sung kisial zo ta.
Aw a lamdang nuam a min pha mahmah
Keimah a hong zong hi.

Sakkik:
Keimah a hong zong hi zong hi
Keimah a hong zong hi.
Maw lamdang nuam na a min pha mahmah
Keimah a hong zong hi.

Verse 2
Topa Zeisu in singlamteh tung ah
Kei mawhna tang ding in hong si zo ta.
Maw a lamdang keima lung a dam ta.
Keitang ding hong si hi.

Verse 3
Topa Zeisu nidang bang mah in ah
Huan sung pan lam khial tuu te a zong ta.
Sau veipi damtak in a hong sam hi.
Keimah a hong sam hi.

Verse 4
Zeisu vantung pan hong pai kik ding hi.
Kum tampi kheng zo, hi thu ka um hi.
Vantung hong kum suk lai ka mu ding hi.
Kei aa ding hong kum hi.

hymns.title: Keimah Zong
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong gum Topa thupha piak na’ng
Guah zu ding thu ki za hi.
Lei keute a nel kik na ding
Kei zong guah hong kha sak in.

Sakkik:
Keimah zong, keimah zong,
Kei zong guah nong kha sak in.

Verse 2
Pa Pasian aw, hong taisan ke’n,
Keimah ka lung tom hang in.
Taisan ding ka kilawm zong in
Keimah hong lung ngai lai in.

Verse 3
Hong gum Topa hong taisan ke’n,
Nangma kiang kong beel nuam hi.
Na thupha ka ngah nuam lua hi.
Na deih bang hong piang ta hen.

Verse 4
Kha Siangtho aw, hong taisan ke’n
Mittaw khua na mu sak in,
Zeisu thupha bel hong lak in
Keima tung ah hong taang in.

hymns.title: Kha Siangtho A Migi Kha
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kha Siangtho a mi gi Kha,
Nong hilh ding ka deih pen uh
Pentekoh ni aa Nong piak, Vantung ki itna.

Verse 2
Ki itna in lung duai sak,
Ki itna in niam khiat sak
Ki itna in si ngam sak, Vantung ki itna.

Verse 3
Gen kholhna thu te khempeuh,
Khuavak bang in mangthang ding,
Ki itna thu bek kip ding, Vantung ki itna.

hymns.title: Kha Siangtho Hong Luang Suk
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kha Siangtho hong luang suk Topa nuntak na puak,
Amah zuante’n Kha suahtak ngah, Zawdan ah a lu nga.

Verse 2
Lungsim tak tawh i zui, Topa totna lam teng;
Makai Pa tat bang i ta nuam, Minthang Pasian Tuuno.

Verse 3
Nang tung, Nang tung bek mah, Muang in, um in, lam en,
Aw, mawhna Na sil siang zo hi, Mi mah aa ding Na si.

Verse 4
Nong kipiakna ka muang, Na singlamteh ka deih,
Aw, mawh in ko si lai ding maw? Tho in Nang sung hing nung Amen.

hymns.title: Kha Siangtho Khuavakna Hi
Khaici Manpha Vawh Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Khaici manpha vawh un, zingsang phalvak kipat tung in,
Khaici manpha vawh un, sun khuaphat lai tak;
Khaici manpha vawh un, khangno lungsim zep na ding in,
Khaici manpha vawh un, dawm in lungduai tak.

Sakkik:
Khaici manpha vawh un,
Khai ci manpha vawh un.
Gamla nai ah vawh un lung duai itna khut tawh.
Nuntak khomun bal nen, lungdam na tangthu gen ta un,
Khaici manpha vawh un, i it gam sung ah.

Verse 2
Khaici manpha vawh un, ni a kai lai tak in ah zong,
Khaici manpha vawh un, khua mui na sung ah;
Khaici manpha vawh un, phun lo, um lah lo in om un,
A vekpi’n Pasian ap in Amah muan un.

Verse 3
Khaici manpha vawh un, lawpna leh hanciam na tak tawh,
Khaici manpha vawh un, kham khaici manpha;
Khaici manpha vawh un; khut te tha zaw sak ngei lo in,
Pasian in ni leh guah puak ding thu ngen un.

hymns.title: Kham Ahih Keh Ngun
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kham ahih keh ngun a kihel kei hong gup na’n
Leitung hauh na te’n ka kha hong gum zo kei;
Zeisu singlamteh si bek ke’n ka beel ding hi,
Ka Topa hong sih na’n tu’n kei hong gum hi.

Sakkik:
Hong gum zo Hih bang ngun hi kei,
Hong lei zo, kham tawh hi lo
A si tawh kei hong gum zo hi,
Hong itna kigen nai kei.

Verse 2
Kham ahih keh ngun a kihel kei hong gup na’n
Ka lungsung mawhna te pung in hong khang sak;
Zeisu singlamteh si bek ke’n ka beel ding hi,
Ka Topa hong sih na bek in hong gum thei.

Verse 3
Kham ahih keh ngun a kihel kei hong gup na’n
A siangtho thuciam na ka nai ding hong kham;
Zeisu singlamteh si bek ke’n ka beel ding hi,
Ka Topa hong sih na’n ka lau na bei sak.

Verse 4
Kha ahih keh ngun a kihel kei hong gup na’n
Vantung gam sung tun’ nang hong lei sak zo kei;
Zeisu singlamteh si bek ke’n ka beel ding hi,
Ka Topa hong sih na’n gup khiatna hong pia.

hymns.title: Kham Gam Nuamah Ka Teeng Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Gamlapi a gal do na thu ka bil in ka za hi,
Tua ciang leitung mawhna’n van nuai zeel ding ka thei hi,
Muan’ lah na lau na leitung na te’n kei hong zol uh hang!
Hong ngah khia lo ding hi, Kham gam nuam pan.

Sakkik:
Mual tungah meii kai loh na, a nopna ah ka teeng hi,
Tui nak pha pan a hong luang, tui kang ngei lo dawn in,
Hi hi, bei hun nei lo a hong piang mana tawh ka kivak hi,
Kei in kham gam nuam ah ka teeng hi.

Verse 2
Gamlapi a om leitung ah lung man’ na huih nung a,
Leitung mite in sawt veipi gal a do uh hi,
Kei ka hih leh Pasian inn muan’ huai sung ah ka om a,
Gal do na’n hong ban kei, Kham gam nuam ah.

Verse 3
Huihpi nakpi nun’ hang in phamawh kasa kei ding hi,
Pasian khut nuai kiliah in, lungmuang in ka om hi,
Hih lai ah ni taang tawntung a, hong sia sak ding om lo,
Tawntung ka lungmuang hi, Kham gam nuam ah.

Verse 4
Pasian nasep na mu in, ka lung ka ngiah ciang in ah,
A aw ka za a, lampi hong puah sak ka mu hi,
Kha Siangtho ka ngah khin a, gupna thu ka tel khin hi,
Lungdam in om den ning, Kham gam nuam ah.

hymns.title: Kham Khuapi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Sihna kuam gal khat ah khua lianpi khat om hi,
Min than’ na te kigen khin zo lo,
Tua mun ah ni tum lo, singteh te vul ngei lo.
Tua, Pasian kham khuapi hoih sung ah.

Sakkik:
Tua mun ah ni tum lo, Singteh te vul ngei lo,
Tua mun ah thumaan mi’ maitang Topa’n en ding
Tua, Pasian kham khuapi hoih sung ah.

Verse 2
Tua mun’n i it Kumpi, hong tanpa Topa om,
Thumaan mite’n lungdam’n en uh hi.
Tua mun ah thumaan mite aksi bang taang ding,
Tua, Pasian kham khuapi hoih sung ah.

Verse 3
Singlamteh phung i tun’ pih khitsa kha khempeuh,
Tuu buk sung i tun’ sa tuu khempeuh;
Lukhu zep na ding suangmanpha bang kikem hi.
Tua, Pasian kham khuapi hoih sung ah.

hymns.title: Khatvei Davuih Khuapiah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nidang lai in Davuih khua ah
Bawng buk neu khat a om hi.
Tua bawng buk sung, bawngkuang sung ah
Nu khat in ta a sial hi.
Tua nu min Mazih hi a
A ta min Zeisu Khazih.

Verse 2
Zeisu pen Pasian leh Topa
Van pan hong kumsuk a hi.
Bawng buk sung ah hong giak suk a
Bawngkuang sung ah hong lum hi.
Mi zawngte tawh leitung ah
Amah hong kikhawl suk hi.

Verse 3
A neu lai lamdang mahmah a,
A nu zahtak in mang hi.
A nu in phatak in kem a
A nu a it mahmah hi.
Tapidaw naupang te zong,
Tua bang mah ding i hi hi.

Verse 4
A mah’n hong it, hong tat manin,
Nung ciang a meel mu ding hi.
Vantung ah Pasian taklam ah,
Tokhom tung ah tu ding hi.
A tate’n puanpaak silh in
A kiimah a uum ding hi.

hymns.title: Khazih Galkapte’n Ah
Khazih Hong Pai Kik Ciang
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zingsang, zingsol a tum ma diak a hi zong in,
Khua hong vaak in, ni a suah ciang a hi zong in
Minthan’ na tawh dim in, Zeisu hong pai mu ding,
Amah a um te a khop ciang.

Sakkik:
Aw, Topa cik ciang hi ding hiam
Ko kiang Nong pai kik ding
Hong pai kik ding, Halelulah,
Haleluiah Amen, Haleluiah Amen

Verse 2
Sun hun hi ta leh, zan kim laitak hi ta leh,
Zan khuamial sung ih sip laitak hi ta leh,
Pasian khuavak tawh minthang Zeisu hong pai ding,
Amah a um te a khop ciang.

Verse 3
Vantung mi in, Hosana ci’n a ot na aw,
Mun khempeuh ah ki za ding hi, vantung tun ciang,
Vantung mi siangtho te in a cing ding uh hi,
Amah a um te a khop ciang.

Verse 4
Si lo in, lungdam in vantungah I pai ding
Dahna, gentheih na, natna te om nawn lo ding,
Pasian tawh meii tung tuang in vantung i pai ding,
Bangzah in a nuam diam, i lung.

hymns.title: Khazih Leh Pawlpi Aa Ding
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Khazih leh Pawlpi aa ding la sa ni,
Thupha eite Kumpi pa A min pahtawi ni;
Khangno tha hat lai utna tawh na sem ni,
Vantung thumaan aa ding teci pang ni.

Sakkik:
Khazih it huai hong Gumpa,
Ei hong tan ding a si,
Si tawh lei sa Pawl pi aa ding,
Topa hong hang sak in.

Verse 2
Khazih leh Pawlpi aa ding thungen ni,
Nisim singlamteh pua in a dial khai zui ni;
Kha Singtho vangliat na hong sawl na zui in,
Nuntak sung hung hoih laitak in na sem ni.

Verse 3
Khazih leh Pawlpi aa ding utna tawh,
Neihsa, siamna leh hun, Topa min tawh ap ni;
Cik mah hun bei ngei lo, lungsim thuk itna,
I neih sa pha bel Topa kiang ah pia ni.

hymns.title: Khazih Sungah Kikhen Lo Hi
hymns.title_en: In Christ There is No East or West
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Khazih sung ah, kikhen lo hi
Nisuah, nitum, sak, khang;
Leitung khempeuh kua mi kua mi
Lawm khat pawl khat hi hang.

Verse 2
Khazih sung ah lungsim maan te’n
Pawl ngah kawikawi ding hi;
Ama sa sepna, mi teng hen
Khawm, kham khauzang bang hi

Verse 3
Khut kilen ni up ki khat teng,
U leh nau bang hi hang;
Bang nam hi leng, Pa’ na sem teng
Beh khat phung khat hi hang.

Verse 4
Khazih sung ah i ki mat hi
Sak mi, khang mi, pam mi;
Khazih lungsim bang a nei mi,
Khempeuh pum khat suak hi.

hymns.title: Khazih Tho Zo
Khia Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Mawhna neite aw, Zeisu’n hong sam,
A kiangah pai un.
Hong pai un mawhna kisik khempeuh
Zeisu kiang khia un.

Sakkik:
Khia un, mawh neite khia un,
Topa zeisu kiang pai un.
Khia un, mawh neite khia un,
Topa kiang khia un.

Verse 2
A umte pai un nop na zong un,
Topa kiang pai un.
Na lungsim gimna vangik na peuh
Zeisu kiang khia un.

Verse 3
Na upna in hong nuam sak ding hi.
Zeisu kiang pai un.
Na kha aa ding gimna a tampi,
Zeisu kiang khia un.

Verse 4
Hong pai un no om na’ng om lai hi.
Zeisu kiang pai un.
Na van neih khempueh a gik phapi
Zeisu kiang khai un.

hymns.title: Khialhna In Ka Si Hi
hymns.title_en: Once I Was Dead In Sin
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Si ngei in mawhna ah Lawpna ding om lo hi.
Topa kei tang si a Ka nungta kik zo hi.

Sakkik:
Hi zo ding hiam, Topa Zeisu Kei hong it mahn’n si hi.

Verse 2
Bat zawh loh ding sang hi Lamdang hi, hong itna
Hong gum Topa bek in Tua bang itna nei hi.

Verse 3
Thupha theilo ka kha Zeisu in nial ding hiam?
Ki itna bek phasa Biakna sang deih zaw hi.

Verse 4
Zeisu hang keimah in Hin’na ka ngah kik hi.
Mawhna sung sihna pan Kei hong la khia zo hi.

hymns.title: Khuavak Dawn Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zion lungdam ni zingsang dawn tek ta un!
Khuamial zawh loh gam hang in lungdam hang!
Dahna kahna aw te haih khia khin ta un;
Zion in zawh na tawh hong uk ding hi.

Verse 2
Zion lungdam ni zingsang dawn tek ta un!
Itazila kamsang te’n gen zo hi!
Tul, then, tampi kolbulh sa tu’n suakta ciah,
Zudah, Zentail, a kibang khuavak ngah.

Verse 3
En un sehnel gam zong paak na gam po tah!
Lui hawmte zong, tui a dim in luang hi.
Mual sangte dawn pan, lungdam aw thawn ki za
Lungsim kituak kigawm na la sa khawm.

Verse 4
En un gam khempeuh pan, tui, tuikulh dong in,
A kahto Zahova Topa phat un;
Gal vanteng puk khin in gam lum na bei hi
Gupkhiat na aw vantung thawn in ging hi.

hymns.title: Kikhawm Ding Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vantung inn nuam ah kikhawm ding in ah
Ni nuam zingsang gun gei cik khuk ah
Kikhawm ding hong ngakte tawh kimu leng
Lungdam nuam sa in la i sa ding.

Sakkik:
Kikhawm ding innpi ah
A nuam gunpi leh cik tui gei ah
Hong ngak i lawmte tawh
Nuam in Topa min i phat ding hi.

Verse 2
Hong tel Topa hong hehpihna pha a
I lawmte ei hong ngak in om ta.
Dah na tawh kipelh in i om ding hi.
Kimuh ciang lungdam in la sa ding.

Verse 3
Hong gum Topa Zeisu tokhom tung ah
Lawmte aw a mai kikhawm in ah
Hong itna hong hehpihna a pha a
A min than’ na phat in la sa ni.

hymns.title: Kilemna Kumpi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Eite aa ding Khazih Topa
Hong suak tuni tak in;
Leitung mi leh vantung mi in,
A thu ngai ding uh hi.
Leitung mi leh vantung mi in,
A thu ngai ding uh hi.

Verse 2
A min ding, Kilem na Kumpi
A tawntung kiphat ding,
A mah in a lamdang a lian,
A vanglian Topa hi.
A mah in a lamdang a lian,
A vanglian Topa hi.

Verse 3
A mong nei lo ukna kicing,
A khang semsem ding hi.
Van a tokhom tung thu maanna,
A nuai ah ki lemna.
Van a tokhom tung thu maanna,
A nuai ah ki lemna.

hymns.title: Kiten’ Na La
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Pasian in kiten’ na pawi bawl khin zo hi,
A siangtho inn kuan a suak ding in,
A kicing inn kuan khat a suah na ding in
A siangtho nuntak na a nei ding.

Sakkik:
Lungdam tak in nuampih ciat ve un,
I lawmte kiten’ na pawi sung ah,
Hih lungdam na thu vantung dong thang sak un,
Leitung nuntak na a bei ciang in.

Verse 2
Zeisu in Tapidaw te a it man in,
A nuntak na a hong piak bang in,
Hih zi nei pa in zong tua bang in hih hen,
A siangtho thu hilhna zui ta hen.

Verse 3
Topa Nang khut sung ah hih te om ta hen,
Amau sung ah khan toh na om hen,
Kithu tuah na lungsim om tawntung ta hen,
Thahat na teng Nang aa ding zang hen.

hymns.title: Ko Teng Thum Ni Suahna Pan In
hymns.title_en: We Three Kings of Orient Are
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ko teng thum ni suahna pan in,
Mual leh guam gamlapi kan in,
Letsong pua in kong pai uh hi;
Hih aksi pi zui in.

Sakkik:
Aw, lamdang mahmah zan aksi,
Kimpi’ vaang a taang aksi,
Hong masuan in, lam hong hilh in,
Khuavak tak phual hong tun in.

Verse 2
Kumpi khat suak zo ngel hi a,
A kumpi lukhu ding in ah,
Ei tung hong maang den ta hen ci’n;
Kong puak hi, Kham manpha.

Verse 3
Ke’n zong paak namtui kong keng hi;
Pasian tawh ki nai na lim hi;
Thunget na leh phatna biak na,
Van a Pasian puak ni.

Verse 4
Kei aa pawh paak namtui kha hi,
Lungkham na leh thuakna lim hi;
Dah in, kap in, sisan luang in,
Han vot sung lum ding hi.

hymns.title: Kong Pai Ding Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Dah na lungkham na a tun’ ciang
Topa hong sapna ngai in.
Khazih Topa thupha um ing
Tu ni’n a kiang ah pai ning.

Sakkik:
Kei hong pai ning, kong pai ding hi.
Topa thupha sang ding in.
Kei hong pai ding, kong pai ding hi,
Topa kiang maan’ ngah ding in.

Verse 2
A Siangtho ki niam sak Topa
Na kiang kei mah kong pai hi.
Hong kem in hong cing in Topa
Na khut nuai hong om sak in.

Verse 3
Ka Kha nop sak na’ng Topa aw
Nangma kiang kong beel ding hi.
Vantung ah mi siangtho te tawh
Ka maang khawm tawntung nuam hi.

Verse 4
Ka kaing ah hong om in Topa
Lungkham na huih dai sak in
Lungdam na piang sak in, dahna
Khuamial ni taang bang sak in.

hymns.title: Kong Phat Uh Hi, Topa!
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kong phat uh hi, Topa, tuzan,
Na thupha khuavak hong pia in;
Hong kem in, aw, kei hong kem in,
Na vanglian Kumpi kha nuai-ah.

Verse 2
Zeisu min in hong maisak in,
Tuni dong ka mawhna sate;
Hih leitung ah Nang leh kei bek,
Nuam takin hong ihmu sak in.

Verse 3
Nuntak na lam kei hong hilh in,
Tua hi kei leh kei ka si ding,
Sihna ding thu kei hong hilh in,
Thu khen ni ciang thawh kikna thu.

Verse 4
Ka kha Nang kiang hong la in la,
Nuam tak kei hong ihmu sak in;
Tua in kei hong thahat sak in,
Ka thawh kik ciang Toapa phat ning.

hymns.title: Kong Up Kong Muanna Lian
hymns.title_en: My Faith Looks Up to Thee
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kong up kong muan’na lian Hong hon Topa Pasian,
Hong tan Tuuno. Kong thumna hong ngai in;
Ka mawh na teng paai in, Tu ni a kipan in Hong tang khin aw.

Verse 2
Keima lungsim zawngkhal, Hong guan’ in tha leh ngal;
Tha nuam sak in. Kei aa ding Nong si ta;
Kei zong Nang kong itna Mit ngei lo ka sung ah Lum den sak in.

Verse 3
Lung man’ khuamial lak ah, Dah na tampi lak ah,
Lam hong hilh aw. Khuamial na vaak sak in,
Dah na khitui siak in, Pial lo, hong nai sak in Nang ma kiang tawh.

Verse 4
Leitung nun’ tom bei a, Sihna gun ka tungah
Hong tuum ciang in, Launa, lung himawh na
Hong paih khiat sak in la, Na tatsa kei ma kha Hong pua to in.

hymns.title: Kongkhak Za Hon In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu’n kong kiu nang hong sam,
“Lunggim mi’n hong zuan un,” ci,
Hong gum thei Amah bek hi,
Na kong za hon’ in.

Sakkik:
Na kong za hon’ in, Na kong za hon’ in,
Hong gum thei Amah bek hi,
Na kong za hon’ in.

Verse 2
Zeisu’n kong kiu hong gum ding,
Nang aa ding A pum pi pia;
Hing kik in han pan tho khia,
Na kong za hon’ in.

Verse 3
Zeisu’n kong hong kiukiu lai,
Na lungsim Amah pia in,
Lungdam na hong pia ding hi,
Na kong za hon’ in.

Verse 4
Zeisu’n kiu hunte beibei,
Gup khiatna a nai lai in,
Gumpa’n hong paisan ma in,
Na kong za hon’in.

hymns.title: Kongpi Kihong Sa In Om A
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kongpi kihong sa in om a,
A sung pan in a vaang pi
Singlamteh pan hong taang khia a,
To-pa’ itna hong lak hi.

Sakkik:
Hi takpi zo diam tua kongpi
Kei aa ding a hon’ sa’n om maw,
Keimah takpi, Keimah hong ki hon’ maw.

Verse 2
Hot khiat na zong mite khempeuh,
Tua kongpi hon’ sa’n om hi;
A hau, a zawng, a lian, a neu,
A kua, ci lo lut thei hi.

Verse 3
Hehpihna kong ki hon’ lai in
Nang zong, lau ke’n, deih in la,
Itna’ piak lukhu ngah na’ng in
Singlamteh na sang ding ta.

Verse 4
Leitungah hong piak singlamteh
Sih gun gal ah i khia ding;
Hin’ na lukhu hong piak tak teh,
Amah i it zaw sem ding.

hymns.title: Kote Hong Thumna Hong Ngai In, Topa
hymns.lyrics:
Kote hong thumna Hong ngai in, Topa,
Ko lam hong nga in la, Hong pia’n lung nop na.
Amen.

hymns.title: Kum Dang Khat Hong Tung
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa’ kum dang khat hong tung, Kumpha hong hi sak in.
Nang tawh a nuam khawm thei ding, Nang tawh hun zang khawm ding;
Khantoh zawk na’ng kum dang khat, Na min phat na’ng kum dang.
Nangma Nong ompih tawmtung, Tel zawk theihna kum dang.

Verse 2
Topa’ kum hoih khat hong tung, Lungnop hehpihna kum,
A lungdam huai kum dang khat, Na maipah muh theih kum.
Kipiak theih na’ng kum dang khat, Nang belh theih na’ng kum dang.
Nangmah kong muan’ theih na’ng uh, Lungnop hiithiat na kum.

Verse 3
Topa’ na sep theih na’ng kum, Nang Nong itna hang in,
Nangma na sep siam zawk na’ng, Hoih zaw ki cin’ theih na’ng.
Topa kum dang khat hong tung, Kumpha hong hi sak in.
Vantung leitung koi mah peuh, Nangmah tawh kum pai khawm.

hymns.title: Kum Lui Bei Nang A Thak Dak Sat
hymns.title_en: Ring Out the Old, Ring In the New
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kum lui bei na’ng a thak dak sat,
Mun khempeuh ah tua dak sat un.
Kum lui bei ding teng bei vet hen.
A hoih lo teng pai khiat pih hen.

Verse 2
Dam dam in dak sat diai diai un,
Kum lui bei lam ki thei sak un.
Gam tat na hoih zaw neih theih na’ng,
Nuntak siangtho zaw neih theih na’ng.

Verse 3
Kum lui kum sia, a kih huai kum,
Dih hop huaiham, kih huai kum hi.
Gal kisim sim na teng bei hen,
Mai lam kilem na hong tung hen.

Verse 4
Galhang mipha mi suakta te,
Lungsim hoihte, mi hehpihte,
Gam sung khuamial khempeuh bei hen,
Khazih deih bang hong piang ta hen.

hymns.title: Kum Tawn Kha Tawn Nong Kep Manin Topa
hymns.title_en: God of Our Life, Through All the Circling Years
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kum tawn kha tawn Nong kep manin Topa kong muang uh hi.
A bei sa hun lau na, dah na khempeuh Nang Nong huh hi.
Zing sang khuavak, Ni tak hong suak sial in
Topa hehpihna bek kong ngak uh hi.

Verse 2
A bei sa hun teng zong Na khut sung om, hong ompih in.
Upna tawh thuciam na gam sung tun’ na’ng Lam hong hilh in.
Khuamial na ah khuavak hong taang sak in.
Upna lungsim khuavak hong nei sak in.

Verse 3
Mai lam hun ding zong a thei khol Topa kong zui uh hi.
Muan’ huai mah le ung zong hong ompih in, Hong beel beel nung.
Nun’ tak lai teng Nang nun’ tak na Khomun.
Ko hun bei ciang inn nuam ah hong kha in.

hymns.title: Kumpi Lukhu Khusak Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Leitung mihingte aw en un
Dahna thuak Zeisu ahi.
A gal khempeuh te zo gawp zo.
Mi khempeuh in bia uh hi.

Sakkik:
Kumpi lukhu, kumpi lukhu,
Topa Zeisu khusak un.
Kumpi lukhu, kumpi lukhu,
Topa Zeisu khusak un.

Verse 2
Vantung a mihing khempeuh in
Topa Zeisu min phat hi.
Thukhen tokhom tung tusak a
Vantung miten’n phatsak hi.

Verse 3
Mi gilo ten’n ling tawh kigan
Lukhu Zeisu khusak hi.
Mi siangtho leh vantung mite’n
Tu’n Zeisu a min phat hi.

Verse 4
A min phat in kiko un
Gal zo pawi khaamna ngai un.
Topa Zeisu in maan ngah hi.
Lung dam huai bel hi, en un.

hymns.title: Kumpipa Bia Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vantung zahtak huai Kumpipa bia un,
A vanglian leh hong itna la sa un:
A hong liah hong keem hong uk tawntung maangpi
A vanglian hi, ci in phat huai Topa hi.

Verse 2
Hong it hong hehpihna van pan taang a
A vang liatna thu la in sa un la
A heh ciangin kekkia tawh kibang ding hi
A thu kenna in haksa mahmah ding hi.

Verse 3
Na lamdang tawh a dim leitung in ah
Vangliang tawntung tawh Pasian a hong piang
Pel ngei lo na hanciam na tawh a kip hi
Puan bangin a kiimkot tuipi hih sak hi

Verse 4
Naupang bang in thanem leivui tate
Nang sungah muan’na bukna kong mu diam
Nong hehpihna kicing a tawpdong in ah
Hong bawl pa, hong dal pa, hong gum pa i Lawm.

hymns.title: Kumpipa Hong Makai In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kumpipa, hong makai in,
Kuan ding ni hong tung zo;
Tu a kipan gal sung ah
Nang’ buk ko’ inn hi zo.
Ki gin’ sung nong hehpihna’n
Kote hong hat sak zo.
Hing tawntung Kumpipa aw,
Gal do la ko sa zo.

Verse 2
Kumpipa’n hong masuan in
Mawhna gal bei mateng;
Gal kilem na nuam om a,
Siantho thu kim mateng.
Thau, tei leh nam, khuang gin tawh,
Pasian gam piang hi kei;
Ki it ki hehpihna tawh
Pasian gam hong tung thei.

Verse 3
Kumpipa’n hong kuanpih in,
Lau lo kong zui uh hi;
Na mai kimuh na peuh ah
Lungdam na khuavak hi.
Na singlamteh ko tung ah
Lam pai na’ng hong taang in,
Gal zawh lukhu’n hong ngak hi;
Pasian aw hong pi in.

hymns.title: Kumpipa Mai I Ding Ding
hymns.title_en: We Shall Stand Before the King
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kumpi pa mai i ding ding, Vantung mi tawh la sa ding,
Nung ciang in, nung ciang in; A taang gun gei lam zui ding,
Topa’ min phat tawntung ding, Nung ciang in, nung ciang in.

Sakkik:
Kumpi pa mai i ding ding, Vantung mi tawh la sa ding,
Kumpi pa A’ min phat ding Haleluiah!
Halelui ah! Kumpi pa’ mai i ding ding.

Verse 2
Vantung khua siklong tum ding; Kumpi pa mai i ding ding;
Nung ciang in, nung ciang in; Dahna te paisan ding a,
Sa tawntung ding min phatna, Nung ciang in, nung ciang in.

Verse 3
Ka kha in manpha puak ding, Kumpi pa mai i ding ding,
Nung ciang in, nung ciang in; Zawhna A’ khe mai nga ding
Amah bang meel kicing ding, Nung ciang in, nung ciang in.

hymns.title: Kumpipa Ta Ka Hi Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Keima Pa in inn leh lo a hau hi.
Leitung sum khempeuh a khut sung ah om hi.
Suang hoih, a san, a kang, kham, ngun, a vekpi
Kisim zolo in Amah a hau hi.

Sakkik:
Keimah in Kumpi pa a tapa ka hi.
Hong gum Zeisu tawh Kumpi pa ta ka hi hi.

Verse 2
Keimah ka Pa ta hong gam Topa in
Mizawng te bang in leitung ah a vak hi.
Tu in vantung ah tawmtung in ah mang hi.
Nung ciang ei vantung ah inn hong pia ding hi.

Verse 3
Masa ah leitung zin mi ka hi.
A mawh nei mi a lawm te tawh khen mi hi.
Tu in inn luah minthan’ na ngah na ding in.
Vantung khua sung ah keima min ki at hi.

Verse 4
Puanbuk a hih hang in phamawh lo hi.
Keima aa ding kumpi inn a lam ta hi.
Inn pan gamla hang in la sa thei ding hi.
Keimah in Kumpi pa a tapa ka hi.

hymns.title: Kumpipa Tawh Ka Ton Khawm
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Dah na kha nen’ niam sung ka kawi vak zo hi,
Tu in lung nuam tak in ka tawl a dam hi.
Zing tung pan ni tak dong in la ka sa hi.
Kumpi pa tawh ka ton khawm na thu hang hi.

Sakkik:
Kumpi tawh ton khawm, Haleluiah,
Kumpi tawh ton khawm A min phat
Ka kha vakthap nawn lo inn lam a zuan,
Kumpi tawh ton khawm kikum khawm.

Verse 2
Kum tampi mawhna hen cip in ka om hi,
Leitung ah hong hon zo om lo ka thei hi.
Tu in vasa bang in ka suak ta zo hi.
Lungdam in Kumpi pa tawh ka ton khawm.

Verse 3
Leitung kibuai na sung a ci mawh kha aw,
En to in, Zeisu na sung ah lut sak in
Lungdam huai gupkhiatna a hong puak ding hi.
Ni taang sung Zuan in Kumpi tawh ton khawm in.

hymns.title: La Thak
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu mai ah mi tampi kikhawm uh a,
A min phatna la sa in gawsem tum uh hi.

Sakkik:
Ei hong it a, i mawhna hong phel sak Topa,
A ma min thang tawntung ta hen! Amen Amen.

Verse 2
Mawhna nei ngei te tua mihon mai tang ah
Puan paak silh in, sa uh hi, A min phatna la.

Verse 3
A sim mawh te siampi, kumpi suak sak hi.
A si pha tawh lei in, la thak pha, sa sak hi.

Verse 4
Hong tat khiat na om kha zenzen lo hi leh
Mawh nei mite bang zah in i ci mawh ding hiam.

hymns.title: Lai Siangtho Beel In Ka Nau Aw
hymns.title_en: Cling to the Bible My Boy
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Han khuk lam a khual zin a na paipai lai in,
Kong deih sak khat om; na sep ding tawh ki sai in,
Tua thu kong gen lai in lim tak na ngai un:
“Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau aw.”

Sakkik:
Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau aw,
Lai Siang tho beel in ka nau aw,
Hin’ hun leh sih hun in, na dang teng sang in,
LaiSiantho beel in ka nau aw.

Verse 2
Kamsiat na dahna, kah na , thuak kha ta le cin,
Satan tawh kum tampi kido do ta le cin,
Limtak thu zui in, lau ke’n, mai nawt tawntung in,
“Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau aw.”

Verse 3
Na sim sial in thu thak khat thei khia den ni teh,
Sing tung a Zeisu’n hong sih lawh na thu hi veh,
Topa leh vantung leh nang ma tung thu maan ve,
“Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau aw.”

Verse 4
Tua Laibu khuavak leh upna sikkawipi hi,
Zan khuamial a, lam hong lak khuavak aksi hi
Hong sawlna bang mang le ci’n, na maan den ding hi,
“Lai Siangtho beel in ka nau aw.”

hymns.title: Lai Siangtho Pasian Thu Bu
Lam Khial Tuu Ka Hi A
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lam khial tuu ka hi a
Tuu khum na ka deih kei,
Hong cing pa aw ka deih lo hi a
A thu ka ngai nuam kei.
Gilo ta hi’ng, ka Pa
Inn ah om nuam lo in
Ka Pa’ aw ka ngai nuam kei a,
Gamla pai nuam kha ing.

Verse 2
Tuu cing pa’n tuu zon’ nang
Pa in ta hong zong hi.
Mual tung guam sung ah va pai hi
Gamla vak kawikawi hi.
Ka si dek ta hong mu
Gilkial in ka om hi.
Ki itna tawh amah’n hong pua
Lam khial pa hong gum hi.

Verse 3
Tuu cing pa’n Zei’su hi.
Amah’n ka kha it hi.
Ama si tawh a hong sawp zo.
A hong cing sak zo hi.
Amah’n lam khial mi zong
Tuu mangthang a mu hi.
Amah in tuu khum na hong pi
Tu in hong kem thei hi.

Verse 4
Lam khial tuu hi zo ta’ng
Kuama thu ke’n ngai ke’ng
Tu in tuu cing aw ngai nuam ta’ng
Tuu khumna om nuam ning
Ta gilo ka hi a
Ka vak kawi lo nuam hi
A hih hang in tu’n ka Pa’ inn
Sungah ka om nuam hi.

hymns.title: Lam Tawntung A Hong Paipih Hi
hymns.title_en: All the Way My Saviour Leads Me
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lam tawntung A hong paipih hi,
A dang bang kangen nawn diam;
Khan tawntung lam hong hilh zo hi,
Hong itna ka muang khial diam,
Amah muang leng leitung ah zong
Vantung nop na pha ka nei;
Kei tung ah bangbang hong tung zong
Zeisu’n a pha bawl ka thei.
Kei tung ah bangbang hong tung zong
Zeisu’n a pha bawl ka thei.

Verse 2
Lam tawntung A hong paipih hi,
Lam haksa hang lung nuam sak;
Ze et na zawh na’ng hong hehpih,
Hin’na An lum in hong vak;
Ka kha tui duh dangtak in vul,
Ka khe tawl puk dek lai tak;
Ka mai ah Suangpi pan hong phul,
En un lung damna tui nak!
Ka mai ah Suangpi pan hong phul,
En un lung damna tui nak.

Verse 3
Lam tawntung A hong paipih hi,
Kicing lam dang hong it na!
Tawl damna tak, hong khaam zo hi
Vantung ka Pa’ inn sungah;
Sih nawn loh na puan bang silh in
A taang gam ka kai ding hi;
Tua ciang sa ning a tawntung in,
Zeisu’n hong kha mualsuak hi.
Tua ciang sa ning a tawntung in:
Zeisu’n hong kha mualsuak hi.

hymns.title: Lamdang Nuntakna Thu
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kei hong sak kik leu leu dih in,
Lamdang Nuntak na thu;
A hoih na hong lak lai lai in,
Lamdang Nuntak na thu.
Nuntak na thupha hi.
Gam tat na’ng hong hilh hi.

Sakkik:
Thu hoih mahmah, thupha mahmah
Nuntak na thu mahmah mah.
Thu hoih mahmah, thupha mahmah
Nuntak na thu mahmah mah.

Verse 2
Zeisu’n mi khempeuh hong lui hi,
Lamdang Nuntak na thu;
Hong sam hi, ngai un, mawh nei mi,
Lamdang Nuntak na thu.
Hong pia khong hih thu gol,
Vantung khua lam hong zol.

Verse 3
Lungdam na thu na gen sawn in,
Lamdang Nuntak na thu;
Mawh phel, lungnop na, mi ko in,
Lamdang Nuntak na thu.
Zeisu bek hong hon thei,
Tawntung siangtho sak thei.

hymns.title: Lampi Khial Lo Dingin Hong Hilh In
hymns.title_en: Lead Me, Saviour, Lest I Stray
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lampi khial lo ding in ah
Lampi hong hilh in Topa
Nang kiang ah ka om lai ah
Gal hong bawl sia thei lo ta.

Sakkik:
Lam hong hilh in.
Topa lampi hong hilh in.
Hun gun gei ah lampi ah
Hong gum Topa hong hilh in.

Verse 2
Tuipi in kilok lai in
Ka kha gal liah na ding in
Kei kiang ah na om lai in
Na hehpihna ka muang ding.

Verse 3
Nuntak na huih nung ta a
Khitui ki nul, Na khua ah
Keimah ka tun’ mateng in
Hong gum Topa lam hilh in.

hymns.title: Lawmpa Khat Ka Mu Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kei in lawmpa khat ka mu hi.
Ka theih ma in hong it ta.
Ki itna khau tawh hong kai hi,
Tua khau tawh hong paipih ta.
Kei ma lungsim a hong khih hi.
A kua mah’n a phel zawh loh
Topa in kei mah hong uk hi.
A tawntung ding hi khin zo.

Verse 2
Kei in lawmpa khat ka mu hi.
Hong gup na ding hong si ta.
Nun’ tak na tui hong pia zo hi,
Topa mah in hong pia ta.
Kei ma neihsa bangmah om kei
Topa bek a hi ding hi.
Lungsim tha tang, hin’ na sumte
Topa a hi tawntung hi.

Verse 3
Kei in lawmpa khat ka mu hi.
Vanglian khempeuh hong pia hi.
I pai lai tak vantung lampi
Innpi ah hong kha ding hi.
Vanglian tawntung gamla pan ah
Hong huh dingin hong tan in
Tu’n ngak in, um in, do in la
Nung ciang nopna na ngah ding.

Verse 4
Kei in lawmpa khat ka mu hi.
Hong it, hehpihna, nem hi.
Lam hong hilh hong ngaihsun sak hi
Hong liah na’ng in vanglian hi.
Hih zah hong it Topa kiangah
Khen sak thei vanglian om kei.
Hih’na, sihna, leitung gimna
Hong khen zo ding na om kei.

hymns.title: Leitung Aading Khazih La I Sa
hymns.title_en: Christ for the World! We Sing
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Leitung aa ding khazih, Khazih aa ding i sa,
Late lawp tak’n A zawng, dah a kapte
Cih nang thei lo lung mang,
Mawhna hang lungkham te, Khazih’n dam sak.

Verse 2
Leitung aa ding Khazih, Khazih aa ding i sa,
Late ngen kawm; Lam zui leh lam pial te,
Itna in dom to in, Loh zawh loh tawh hong tan,
Khuamial sung pan.

Verse 3
Leitung aa ding Khazih, Khazih aa ding i sa,
Nate ki tuak’n A kibang sem khawm in,
Neh in i ngen ngam a, Singlamteh i pua tek,
Khazih min ding.

Verse 4
Leitung aa ding Khazih, Khazih aa ding i sa,
Lungdam tak in, A suak thak i khate,
Mawhna te nusia in, Lam en i lungsim bun,
Khazih ei aa.

hymns.title: Leitung Aading Lai Siangtho Bu Kihong
hymns.title_en: An Open Bible for the World
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Leitung aa ding LaiSiangtho Bu,
Hih pen zuih kim, cih kim hi hen!
Huihkhi laan’ ciang, tua dial ki peei,
Manpha thupha kizeel thang hen!

Sakkik:
Pasian kammal khuavak hong puak,
Leitung, tui tung mun khempeuh ah
Khuamial sung a vakthap mite,
Pasian vantung hong tun’ Thu Bu.

Verse 2
A tun’ na peuh kham khua vaak hi,
Ki liah zo lo ni taang bang hi,
Meel bang liah te tui mang ding hi,
Mawh na sepna a phel ding hi.

Verse 3
Pa’ mai tang ah mi teng puak a,
Mawh mai sak itna tawh taang hi,
Adan khang pan a mangthang sa,
Hehpihna thu van pan thang hi.

Verse 4
Lung gim te a tawldam sak hi
Khitui luangte a hehnem hi
Tha kiam lungvaite tha a guan’ hi
Nuntak tawntung na silh sak hi.

hymns.title: Leitung Khuavak Na
hymns.title_en: The Light of the World Is Jesus
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hih leitung mawhna khuamial bangin zing hi.
Leitung khuavak na Zeisu hi.
Sun a ni taang bang in ah a vaang taang hi.
Leitung khuavak na Zeisu hi.

Sakkik:
No aa ding in khuavak a taang hi,
“Khua mial sung pan hong pai in,” ci hi.
Mittawte in tu’n khua mu zo hi.
Leitung khuavak na Zeisu hi.

Verse 2
A kiang a om te in khuamial mu lo hi.
Leitung khuavak na Zeisu hi.
Lam hilhpa a zuite in lam tang tawn hi.
Leitung khuavak na Zeisu hi.

Verse 3
Khuamial sung a om mawhna a mittaw te
Leitung khuavak na Zeisu hi.
Thu hong piak bang na mu ding hi hong sap leh
Leitung khuavak na Zeisu hi.

Verse 4
Vantung khua ah ni taang deihna om lo hi.
A taang ding Topa Zeisu hi.
Vantung kham gam sungah a siangtho khuapi
A vaang taang na ding Zeisu hi.

hymns.title: Leitung Lungdam, Topa Hong Pai
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Leitung lungdam To-pa hong pai,
Kumpi za ngah ding hi.
Lungsim khempeuh bawl phat sak hi.
Van leh lei la sak ngai
Van leh lei la sak ngai
Van leh van leh lei la sak ngai.

Verse 2
Leitung nuam na’ng Zeisu maang hi.
Mihing te’n la sa hen.
Lo lai, tuipi, suangpi, mualpi’n
Kidem in ham uh hen,
Kidem in ham uh hen,
Kidem ki dem in ham uh hen.

Verse 3
Nung ciang mawhna a khan’ loh na’ng
Ling in bawlsia lo ding.
A pha lo na a pha bel in
Bawl pha ding hong pai ding,
Bawl pha ding hong pai ding,
Bawl pha bawl pha ding hong pai ding.

Verse 4
Hong hehpihna thupha bel in,
Leitung hong uk ding hi.
A minthang siangtho hong itna
Mi khempeuh thei sak hi,
Mi khempeuh thei sak hi,
Mi khem, mi khempeuh thei sak hi.

hymns.title: Leitung Mihing Khempeuh
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Leitung ah om mihingte aw
Pasian phatna la sa un la
A vangliat na thu gen un la
A mai pai in sa un nopna.

Verse 2
Amah bek Pasian takpi hi
Mi khempeuh bawl Topa hi a
Ka tuute hong suak un hohng ci
Kong keem, kong cing nuam ci in ah.

Verse 3
Hong itna in bei thei ngei kei
Hong hehpih na om tawntung hi
A thu ciamna sia sak ngei kei
A min i phat tawntung ding hi.

Verse 4
Pasian bang hangg migi bel hiam
A hong itna maan tak tak hi
A thumaan a cilin om ta
A tawntung in a kip ding hi.

hymns.title: Leitung Tengah Gen Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Leitung teng Zeisu thu gen un,
Gun gal khat pan gal khat ah,
Mawh neite Zeisu thu gen un,
A khuavak pha taang sak un.

Sakkik:
Thangsak un, lei tung teng ah,
Lungdam Thu gun gal khat ah,
Leitung teng Zeisu thu gen un,
A tawntung A min phat un.

Verse 2
Lungdam Thu’n gamla pi zeel hen,
Khuamial na mun gam khempeuh,
Lungdam na khuavak thei sak un,
Thangsak un khuamial gam ah.

Verse 3
Tuipi tung leh mual tung teng ah,
Lungdam na Thu thang sak un
Mun khempeuh Zeisu Thu gen un,
Hong sapna Thu thangsak un.

Verse 4
Mi khempeuh aa ding thu ngen in,
Lungdam na tawh huh ciat un,
I gam aa ding zong thu ngen in,
Zeisu ei gam aa ding in.

hymns.title: Leitung Tengah Pai Un
hymns.title_en: Go Ye Into All the World
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Gamla pi a mawhna khuamial gam sung ah,
Mi tul leh then gam mang in om uh hi;
Kua pai ding a Gup khiatna thu va gen ding,
Khazih en in, gim na ding ngaihsun ke’n.

Sakkik:
Vangliat na kei tung hong pai zo!
Vangliat na kei tung hong pia zo!
Vak kawikawi un la, Lungdam Thu va gen, un,
Note tawh ka om khawm tawntung ding.

Verse 2
Khuadak le ci’n kong honsa in hong ngak hi,
Khazih galkap te aw pai in lut un;
Tha neih zah teng gawm in kikhen thang lo in,
Thupha hilh in mawhna kol va sut un.

Verse 3
Bang hang note si zenzen ding hong ci in,
Pasian hong sap na thu va ko sawn un;
Hot khiatna leh hin’ na na ngah na ding in,
Zeisu si in hong tan zo va ci un.

Verse 4
Pa Pasian aw, hong tung sak mengmeng ta in,
Mi nam cin in Na min phat na ding hun;
Hot khiatna la lungdam na tawh kiko in,
Haleluijah, Topa Kumpi phat un.

hymns.title: Leitung, Vantung, Khuamial, Khuavak
hymns.title_en: God That Madest Earth and Heaven
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Leitung, vantung, khuamial, khuavak, Piang sak Pasian,
Sun na sep hun leh zan tawlngak Hong pia Pasian,
Na vantung mi hong cing sak in,
Ihmut nuam tawh hong hehpih in,
Ngaihsut lam et siangtho hong guan in, Tuzan khuavak.

Verse 2
Nun’ tak lam mai nawt na ding zing khuavak ciang a,
Ko hong mang keeikaai zo na ding Nang ma deih na,
Siat na’ vang pan in hong dal in,
Lam kaw cik ah hong paipih in,
Sun ni loh hong mu khial sak kei in Nang ma maipha.

hymns.title: Leitungah Ka Tawl Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Khialhna a nei gimna thuak mi ka hi,
Vantung lam ka et leh ka tung nuam hi;
Hih hang tua sungah khial nei om thei kei,
Hih hang, “Hong pai in” cih aw khat ka thei.

Verse 2
Nisim ka pai lai vantung khua lampi,
A tawntung mawhna khialhna’n hong khem hi;
Hih hang “Pulak in, na kisikkik leh,
Mawh kiphel ngah ding” cih thu ka thei hi.

Verse 3
Kihhuai mi ka hih ciangin bang ci-in,
Tua khua siangtho sungah ka lut ding hiam?
Pasian tokhom mai-ah ding thei ding hiam?
Hih hang, “Hong nai in” khut tawh hong sam hi.

Verse 4
Zeisu Topa a aw, ke’n ka za hi,
Ama khut in kei hong naisak thei hi;
Ama si in ka mawhna ka khialhna,
Hong phel thei vantungah hong lutsakta.

Verse 5
Topa aw ka hong thuumna hong ngai in,
Na hehpihna kei ading kicing;
Na linglukhu in kei kumpi lukhu,
Ka nuntakna ding Nang nunna Nong pia.

Verse 6
Neihsa bangmah nei keng, Nang kong puak ding,
Ka lungsim pumpi’n Nang kong kipia khin;
Ka lungsim teng bang ci’n kong pia thei diam,
Mawh phelna ding thu’n ka lung hong nuamsak.

hymns.title: Lim Ngaihsut Dide Khat
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lim ngaihsut dide khat,
Lungsim hong phawng pahpah,
Inn lam naih zaw’ng tu ni’n, tu ni’n,
A beisa nite sang.

Sakkik:
Inn tawh nai zaw’ng, Inn tawh nai zaw’ng,
Inn tawh nai zaw’ng tu ni’n, tu ni’n,
A beisa nite sang.

Verse 2
Omna tampi om na,
Ka Pa inn lam naih zaw’ng,
Kumpi’ tokhom naih zaw’ng, tu ni’n,
Suang paak tuipi naih zaw’ng.

Verse 3
Van gikte kingak na,
Nuntak gamgi naih zaw’ng,
Sing khuam ngak ding nai zaw’ng, tuni’n
Lukhu ngah ding naih zaw’ng.

Verse 4
Lam ke’n ka sik khialh ciang,
Ka kiang ah hong nai in,
Inn tawh ka ki nai zaw tu ni’n
Ka ngaihsut sang in ah.

hymns.title: Lung Sung Khuavakna
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tu ni in kei ma lungsim sung ah
Khuavak a hong taang hi;
Leitung ni sang a vaang taang zaw
Ka khuavak Zeisu hi.

Sakkik:
Aw ka lung sung, lung khuavakna,
Lung sung nop na nuamna hun pha hi;
Zeisu mai nuam ka muh ciang in,
Ka lungsim sung hong taang hi.

Verse 2
Tu ni in kei ma lungsim sung ah
Kumpi phatna la sa;
Kei sak theih loh la ngaih te zong
Zeisu’n ngai leh A za.

Verse 3
Tu ni in kei ma lungsim sung ah
Topa hong tum man in;
Lung nop na leh gamtat na pha
Hong po, hong palh pan in.

Verse 4
Tu ni in kei ma lungsim sung ah
Nuamna, lawpna, dim hi;
Hong piaksa leh hong piak lai ding
Thupha, nuamna, hang hi.

hymns.title: Lungdam Huai Hi, Nang Kong Teel Ni
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lungdam huai hi, Nang kong teel ni,
Keimah hong hon ka Pasian aw.
Keima lungdam na a lianpi
Mi tung gen lo om thei ding maw.

Sakkik:
Ka nuam hi, ka nuam hi,
Zeisu’n ka mawh hong phel zo hi.
Thu ngetna zia A hong hilh hi,
Ni sim in hong lungdam sak hi.
Ka nuam hi ka nuam hi,
Zeisu’n ka mawh hong phel zo hi.

Verse 2
Nasep pi bel ki khin zo hi;
Kei Topa aa ka hi zo ta.
Hong kaih na na ke’n ka zui hi,
Ama thu gen leng nuam ka sa.

Verse 3
Ka lungsim aw, lungka nawn ke’n
Hih thupha ah kip tak khawl ta’n.
Topa kiang pan lung leng nawn ke’n
A pha khempeuh nei hi, Amah’n.

Verse 4
Lungsim takpi tawh ka ciam aa
Nisim in ka ciam phapha ding;
Lungdam huai bel hih kiciam na
Ka sih ciang in thupha pia ning.

hymns.title: Lungdam Huai Leitung Mel Pha
hymns.title_en: For the Beauty of the Earth
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lungdam huai leitung meel pha,
Lungdam huai vantung et lawm.
Suah tung a kipan itna,
Kote kiim ah hong om khawm.
Hih teng hang, Khazih Topa,
Kong sak uh lungdam na la.

Verse 2
Sun le zan, a nai sim a,
Ka muh uh lamdang na te:
Mual le kuam, sing kung, paak pha,
Ni, kha, a taang aksi te.
Hih teng hang, Khazih Topa,
Kong sak uh lungdam na la.

Verse 3
Sang gam, suahpih, nu leh pa,
Ki it diamdiam a nuam na,
Lei leh van a lawm a pha.
Mi git na, ngaihsut na pha.
Hih teng hang, Khazih Topa,
Kong sak uh lungdam na la.

Verse 4
Nangma Pawlpi na tawntung
Mun khempeuh, gam khempeuh, pan
Siangtho biakna itna lung
Khut siangtho tawh hong puak man,
Hih teng hang, Khazih Topa,
Kong sak uh lungdam na la.

hymns.title: Lungdam In Kong Bia Uh Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Min than’na leh itna Topa,
Lungdam in kong bia uh hi;
Lungsim paak bang palh Na mai-ah,
Na vaang taang sung hong malh hi.
Mawhna dah na meii theng sak in,
Hawl khia in lung muan’ lah na,
Sun ni taang ko sung hong dim in,
Tul lo nuam na hong guan’ Pa.

Verse 2
Lei leh van in na vaang lang sak,
Hong pahtawi na bawlsa te’n,
Aksi leh van mite’n hong sak,
Tat sat lo in hong phat den,
Lo leh tulak mual leh kuam te’n
Lo dum na kham leh tuipi,
Cik tui phul leh vasa ham te’n,
Nang sung nuam din’ hong zawn’ hi.

Verse 3
Mawh maisak Pa, Thupha pia Pa,
Cing tawntung thupua Na hi;
Tuinak bang nun’ na sung nuam na,
Tawl ngakna nuam pen Na hi.
Itna nei peuh Nang aa hi khin,
Kote’ Pa leh Honpa aw,
Ko ki it tek na’ng hong hilh in,
Na nuam na sung dom to aw.

hymns.title: Lungdam Thu Taang Sak In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Taang sak in, taang sak mengmeng in,
Tuipi kilok tantan in;
Hot khiatna thu zeel sak meng in,
Migi Gum khia Pa’ min in.

Sakkik:
Taang sak in, taang sak mengmeng in,
Tui pi gal, tui khulh te dong;
Tangthu lamdang va zasak in,
Itna, hehpihna khawnkhong.

Verse 2
Taang sak in, Khate’ sih na ah
Tua zan khuamial na mun ah;
Hat meng in, hunte beibei veh!
A nai, a nai in, bei ta.

Verse 3
Taang sak in, Topa’ hong sawl hi,
A thu saingtho lim ngaih dih!
“Pai khia in, ka thu va gen in,
Hong om pih den ning,” a cih.

hymns.title: Lungdamna Siklong
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lungdamna thu ging sak in
Gam khat pan gam khat dong ah
Suahtakna thu zel khin sak in
Kei leh nang aa ding bawl ta.
Lei tung hong it man in
A Tapa a hong pia hi.
A thu um mite khempeuh in
Nuntak tawntung ngah ding hi.

Sakkik:
Lungdam thu ging sak in
Gam khat pan gam khat dong ah
Lungdam thu man nei lo.
Nangmah leh kei aa ding hi.

Verse 2
Lungdamna thu’n hong sam hi:
“Mi khempeuh hong pai ta hen.”
A hong sapna na nial kei in
Pasian hehpihna lian hi.
“Ke’n hin’na ka hi hi.
Lungsim khial a nei mi in
A mawhnate a san hang in
Tuu mul bangin a ngo ding.”

Verse 3
Lungdamna thu ngai lo mi
Bang gim na a thuak ding hiam,
Tua lungdamna thu a khum in
Kikepna hong hilh lai a;
Hi’n na gup khiat na’ng in
Khawl loin ah tai in la
Na nung lam kihei kik kei in
Hi kei leh na si ding ta.

hymns.title: Lungsim Khut Leh Kam Tawh
hymns.title_en: Now Thank We All Our God
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lungsim khut le kam tawh Pasian tung i lungdam hi.
A bawl lam dangte tawh Leitung khempeuh lungdam hi.
Nute’ ang pan kipan Tuni ciang dong takin.
Kigen thei lo itna’n Hong kem thupha takin.

Verse 2
A cing, migi Pasian I khan tawntung hong nai hen.
Lungdam lungnopna siang Hong ompih sak tawntung hen.
A hehpihna sungah Lungman’ ciang lam lak hen.
Lei pan vantung dongah A sia hong pel sak hen.

Verse 3
Pa Pasian leh Tapa, Amau tawh maang Kha Siangtho.
Tu’n phatna lungdamna Van sang belah i puak to.
Leitung vantung tawntung Amah bek biakna pia’n.
Tuma, tulai, tunung Amah khat bek Pasian.

hymns.title: Lungsim Siangthote Nuam Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nuam un, lung siangtho te,
La san’n lungdam na pia’n;
Na galkap te’n dial pei sang kha’n
Na Kumpi pa Khazih.

Sakkik:
Nuam un, nuam in,
La sa’n lungdam na pia’n.

Verse 2
Vantung mite’n la sa,
Leitung mi siang teng tawh,
Lungdam na thu zeel sak un la,
Lungkim na manpha zaw.

Verse 3
Na siamna sang sak in,
Khauh takin mai nawt in,
Khuamial sung ah gal te’n nasem,
Kham khua hong vak mateng.

hymns.title: Mai Nawt Un!
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
I Topa Pasian muang in,
Mai nawt un! Mai nawt un!
Hong ciam na kam mal muang in,
Mai nawt un! (Mai nawt un!)
A minthang na nial ngei ke’n,
Hi kei leh na mai zum ding,
A min than’ na ki zelh dong,
Mai nawt un! (nawt un!)

Verse 2
A mah’n lo lai hong sam zo,
Mai nawt un! Mai nawt un!
Zan hong tung ding tu’n um in.
Mai nawt un! (Mai nawt un!)
Up na, itna, biakna sung,
Ama hatna tha suang in
Kho tak i ding tawntung ding;
Mai nawt un! (nawt un!)

Verse 3
Kham khaici hong pia zo hi.
Mai nawt un! Mai nawt un!
Vawh in na at kik ding hi.
Mai nawt un! (Mai nawt un!)
Na Topa lam na sial in,
Ngak na ding leh khawlna ding,
Na thumna za’n hong sang ding,
Mai nawt un! (nawt un!)

Verse 4
A beina hong nai zo hi,
Mai nawt un! Mai nawt un!
Launa tawh Topa phat un,
Mai nawt un! (Mai nawt un!)
Khazih na pum a ten’ na
Vantung khomun lampi ah,
Minthan’ ni ciang dong hong kha,
Mai nawt un! (nawt un!)

hymns.title: Mawh Neite Aw Hong Pai Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu in vantung om na pi
Leitung ah hong pai suk hi.
Mihing te taang ding hong om a,
Ci na te ci damsak hi.
Lai Siangtho sung ah ki thei ta.
A hoih a lian pha bel hi.

Verse 2
Khua khempeuh ah a kawi vak a,
Mi khempeuh a hehpih hi.
Mihing zawngkhal khempeuhte leh
Mittaw, khelbai, misi te
A thu in hong dam kiksak a
Lamdang kisa mahmah hi.

Verse 3
Zeisu in leitung om lai in
Thupha vive a gen hi
Kei mah zong Zeisu ka um hi.
Ka lungdam na piang ding hi.
Ka up loh na Pa Pasian in
Pha tak in hong bawl pha in.

Verse 4
Pasian in thupha hong piak na
Zeisu’n mi kiang ah gen hi
Mihing kim khat in a um a
Kim khat in a um lo hi.
A um lote in lung khamna
Zeisu cih bang piang ding hi.

Verse 5
Kei sih taang ding Topa Zeisu
Singlamteh tung ah si hi.
A ma lawmte in a vui a
Ni thum ciang a tho kik hi.
Tu’n vantung khua ah a om a,
Mi khempeuh a hehpih hi.

hymns.title: Mawh Neite Zeisu’n Ngai Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Mawh neite Zeisu’n ngai hi.
Hih thupha na thang sak un;
Vantung lam khial a puk mi,
Lung hei nei mi va hilh un.

Sakkik:
Sa sa un, sa kik kik un;
Mawh nei te Zeisu’n ngai hi;
Hih thu tel tak tangko un.
Mawh nei te Zeisu’n ngai hi.

Verse 2
Hong pai in, hong dam sak ding,
Na muang in, A thu tak hi;
A sia bel pen zong saang ding;
Mawh nei te Zeisu’n ngai hi.

Verse 3
Tu’n sinsung kisuang nawn lo,
Thukham mai ah ka siang ta;
A mah’n hong siangsak khin zo,
Thukham’ kalh na cin’ khin ta.

Verse 4
Mawh nei te Zeisu’n ngai hi,
Kei nangawn a mawh pi mah;
Vantung ah hong lut pih hi,
Mawhna teng siang ta in ah.

hymns.title: Mawh Phelna, Nopna, Vangliatna
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa tung lungdam ngah nuam te
Kisak theina paii in
Um in Ama thu a phate
Hong piak ding ngaihsun in.

Sakkik:
