Mawh phelna nuam vanglian pi
Lungdam sak ning a min phatna
Sian’tho na pha vantung om hi.
Kei tang si hi, Zeisu Khazih Topa.

Verse 2
A thule hong itna pha a
A si tawh hong sawp hi.
I mawhna khempeuh hong sawp a
Nop na pha kingah hi.

Verse 3
Mawhna vanglian su gawp na ding
Siamna pha hong pia hi.
Lungsim sung a sian’tho na ding
Kha pha hong bawlsak hi.

Verse 4
A dang lungsim zawh na ding in
Kha Siangtho hong pia hi.
A pha bel Khazih Topa in
I lung sung ah om hi.

hymns.title: Mawhna Zol Zui Kei In
Meiilumte A Then Ciangin
hymns.title_en: When the Mists Have Rolled Away
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A siangtho mahmah mual tungah
Meiilum a then’ ciang in ah
Ni sa a vaang taan’ na vak pha
Cik leh lul neu te tung tu’n
Sakhituihup a vaang in ah
Itna pha lai kisim ta
Eite kimu ding in a hun
Meiilum a then’ ciang in ah.

Sakkik:
Eite i kimu ding hi
Leitung ah kimuh bang in
Tua thupha leh lungdam na ni
Zingsang a phalvak ciang ah
Eite kimu ding in a hun
Meiilum a then’ ciang in ah.

Verse 2
Mihing te khuamial sung ah khial
Leitung mi ahih mangngilh;
Phatna ding a hahkat na a
Ki itna thupha pai khia.
Nopsak na’ng Topa’n hong phel ding
Eite khempeuh hong liah ding
I ngak ding in zingsang hun hi.
Meiilumte a theng ding hi.

Verse 3
Meiilumte ei khempeuh tung ah
A len’ toh laitak in ah,
I it khempeuh i lawmte tawh
Eite i kimu ding maw.
Khuamial cip na gun gal khat ah
Khuavak ni taang hong tung ta
A lamdang khuavak i muh na
Meiilum a then’ ciang in ah.

hymns.title: Meivaak A Kimin Vaak In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
I Topa hong hehpihna in
Suum pempam in hong taang hi,
Tua khuavak eite hong pia hi,
Tui tung teng ah taang sak in.

Sakkik:
Meivak teng a vek pi’n vaak in,
Tuihual teng ki muh na ding,
A ci mawh tui kia om kha ding,
Gum khia in la kai khia in.

Verse 2
Mawhna in khua hong mial sak hi,
Tuihual pi hong kilok hi,
Hoihtak in khuadak pha in la,
Tui dung teng phatak en in

Verse 3
Na meivak phatak vaak in la,
Tuihual in mi taai kha ding,
Nop tak in suahtak theih nang un,
Tawlngak na mun tun’ theih nang.

hymns.title: Mi Nam Kimte Pa Leh Topa
hymns.title_en: Dear Lord and Father of Mankind
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Mi nam kimte Pa leh Topa
Ka hai tuntun uh tawh;
Lungsim ngei hong guan’ pha in la,
Hong guan’ in siangtho gam tat na,
Zah tak na a thuk zaw.

Verse 2
Syria tui gei a mite in
Nang ma sapna thupha
A zak uh ciang mang pha bangin,
Ko zong kam khat beek nial lo in,
Hong zui pah nung Nang mah.

Verse 3
Kote’ thuak na bei hun mateng
Daitui hong taak lai in;
La khia’n lung sung nop loh na teng,
Nang ma lung nop na a pha teng
Ko tung kilang sak in.

Verse 4
Kote’ lung sung deih na a sa
Hong mut khing sak ta in;
Pumpi’ deihna te nial zo a,
Huihpi, meikuang, zinliing sung ah,
Nang’ aw hong za sak in.

hymns.title: Mial Lak Tuipi Hual Tung Pan Kiko
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Mial lak tuipi hual tung pan ki ko aw in;
Khuavak hong puak un ci.
Khuamial sung ah a ci mawh mi tampi in;
Khua vak hong puak un ci.

Sakkik:
Tang sak ni, nuam na thupha khuavak
Tang sak ni mun khempeuh ah;
Tang sak ni nuam na thupha khuavak
Tang sak ni tawl nga lo in.

Verse 2
Ma ke daw ni gam pan a sap na aw in;
Khuavak hong puak un ci.
Singlamteh mai ah i biak na koih suk in
I khua vak va puak ni.

Verse 3
Zeisu hong hehpihna mi’n ngah kim na ding,
Khuavak hong puak un ci.
Khazih lungsim bang ki muh kawikawi na ding,
Tang sak ni tang sak ni.

hymns.title: Mihingte In Lo Lai Ah
hymns.title_en: We Plow the Fields, and Scatter
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Mihing te in lo lai in Khaici pha i tuh hi;
Ahih hang in Pasian in Tui buak in khang sak hi.
Phalbi lai vuk hong pia in, Ni taang, khua lum, huih khi,
Guah neel tawh kithuah sak in An vui tak suak sak hi.

Sakkik:
Eite kiim leh paam a Na a hoih te vekpi
Van a Topa’n hong piak hi a Nuam huai kim hi.

Verse 2
Amah bek a bawl Pa hi Gam la nai , na nam kim;
Van sang dawn a taang aksi, I kiim paak palh nam kim;
Huih pi, tui pi’n zong mang hi, Va te zong an pia kim;
Ei Ama ta Ama mi Hong vak sem ve, ni sim.

Verse 3
Hi mah a Pa aw, nuam ung, A hoih teng Nong piak sa;
Lo pawi hun leh an lak hun, Nun’ tak na leh dam na.
Nong it Nong hehpih hang in Kote lungdam na lim,
Kong puak uh tawh hong sang in Na deih pen ko lungsim.

hymns.title: Min Than Na Nang Aa Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Min than’ na Nang aa A tho kik Topa,
Bei ngei lo zawh na tawh, Sih na Na zo zo.
Vantung mi siangtho te’n Suangpi lem khia a,
A ki tuunm na puan zong, Hoih takin khep uh.

Sakkik:
A hing kik Topa, Min than’ na Nang aa
Bei ngei lo zawh na tawh, Sih na Na zo zo.

Verse 2
Zeisu tawh kimu Han sung pan tho zo,
Itna tawh hong dawn in, Lau na teng bei zo.
A pawlpi te lungdam Nuam na la sa uh,
Topa tu in hing kik, Sih na’n zozo lo.

Verse 3
Um khial nawn kei in Minthang Kumpi pa,
Amah lo ngal om kei, Hong huh zo ding dang,
Gal zote bek hi lo Sih na zo zo lai.
Zawdan gun kantan in, Vantung inn tung tu’n.

hymns.title: Mite Tung Gen Ding Thu Khat I Nei Hi
hymns.title_en: We’ve a Story to Tell to the Nations
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Mite tung gen ding thu khat i nei hi,
Amau lungsim Aman hei ding,
Thuman leh hehpihna tangth,
Kilem na, khuavak na thu,
Kilem na, khuavak na thu.

Sakkik:
Zan khuamial, zing khuavak suak ding a,
Zing khuavak sun ni taang suak ding,
Khazih gam leitung’h hong pai ding hi.
Itna leh khuavak na gam.

Verse 2
Mite tung sak ding la khat i nei hi,
Topa lam lungsim nga sak ding,
Siat na a zo ding la khat hi.
Tei le namsau su sia ding,
Tei le namsau susia ding.

Verse 3
Mite tung thu puak ding khat i nei hi,
Vantung ah a maang Topa in,
Eite gum ding A Ta hong sawl,
Pasian’ itna ei hong lak,
Pasian’ itna ei hong lak.

Verse 4
Mite lah ding Honpa khat i nei hi,
Dahna lampi a tawn khin pa,
Leitung mihing lian khempeuh te,
Pasian’ thuman ah pai na’ng,
Pasian’ thuman ah pai na’ng.

hymns.title: Mopi Hong Pai Ciang
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
I meivak te baih sa’n om diam?
Mopi hong pai ciang,
I mei vak te taang sa’n om diam?
Mopi hong pai ciang.
Tua zan ah, (Tua zan ah)
tua zan dai ah (tua zan dai ah)
I meivak taang pha’n om diam?
Mopi hong pai ciang.

Sakkik:
A baih sa’n om, a baih sa’n om,
A baih sa’n om, Mopi hong pai ciang.

Verse 2
Vaitut na aw i za ding hiam?
Mopi hong pai ciang,
Nuam na ot na aw i za diam?
Mopi hong pai ciang.
Tua zan ah, (Tua zan ah)
tua zan dai ah (tua zan dai ah)
I meivak taang pha’n om diam?
Mopi hong pai ciang.

Verse 3
Hong khen kha ding ahih ciang in
Mopi hong pai ciang,
Na kithawi na zekai kei in
Mopi hong pai ciang.
Tua zan ah, (Tua zan ah)
tua zan dai ah (tua zan dai ah)
I meivak taang pha’n om diam?
Mopi hong pai ciang.

hymns.title: Mual Khat A Om Hi
hymns.title_en: There Is A Green Hill Far Away
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Keima aa ding sih na a thuak
Khuapi pua lam om a
Zeisu singlamteh na om hi.
Gamla mualpi tung ah.

Sakkik:
A mah’n pha takpi hong it hi.
Amah i it kik hi.
A hong gum thei a si um in
Ama na i sem ding.

Verse 2
Amah in gim na a thuak na
I thei zo kei ding hi.
Ahih hang ko mau tang ding in
Amah in a thuak hi.

Verse 3
Eite kiphel na ngah ding in
Amah in a si hi.
A si pha tawh sawp siang man in
Vantung i tung ding hi

Verse 4
Khialh na man piak na ding in ah
Mi dang siangtho kei hi.
Amah bek in vantung khua ah
A hong lutsak thei hi.

hymns.title: Muang Un La Ngai Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Thupha khuavak sungah Zeisu tawh pai lai ah
Eite pai na lam hong taang sak hi.
A deih bang zuih ciang in Amah tawh pai khawm in
A thu ngai a muang a om ding hi.

Sakkik:
Muang un, ngai un, Lampi dang om lo hi.
Zeisu kiang nuam ngah ding in
Muang in a thu ngai un.

Verse 2
Van a gikte pua a Gim na tawl na thuak na
Topa hong hehpihna kicing hi.
Eite lau na ding a Dawimangpa hong khem na
Zeisu thu ngai in muang leng bei hi.

Verse 3
Ni liim ahih hang in, Meii kai ahih hang in,
Zeisu in thakhat a hawl khia hi.
Lau na leh kihtak na Tau na leh kha na te
Zeisu i muan’ lai in om thei kei.

Verse 4
Ki itna pha tawh mah Topa Zeisu mai ah
Kikhawm ciangin lam pai khawm ding hi.
Thu hong piak na ngai a Hong sawl na pai ding a
Cikmah hun lau lo in nuam ding hi.

hymns.title: Muh Khopna Ah Hin Na Om Hi
hymns.title_en: There is A Life for a Look
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Singlamteh tung kikhai mi na muh ciang in
Thakhat thu’n hin na ngah ta un, ci.
Tua ahih ciang mawh nei te’n en un zong un,
Singlamteh a ki that pa en ni.

Sakkik:
En un, hing ta un.
A kikhai mipa en in hin’ na ngah ta un.
Thakhat in hin’na pha ngah ta un.

Verse 2
Mawhna phel ding hi kei leh Amah in ah
Bang ding Singlamteh thuak nuam ding hiam.
Mawhna pan sih na tawh hong tan nuam ding hiam
A pang pan si bang ding a luang diam.

Verse 3
Kisik na bek in mawhna kiphel zo lo.
A si bek in a hong phel zo hi.
A si a hong bua Topa Zeisu kiang ah
Na khialh na khempeuh hong puak un ci.

Verse 4
Hong sapna lung hian’na ding om lo ding hi.
Kicing zo hi. ci in hong sam hi.
Lei a bei caing khatvei hong pai lai ding a
Thu ka hong khen ding hi, a ci hi.

hymns.title: Na Biak Inn Siang Ah
Na Dahna Phum In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hih leitung a dah na Kheempeuh paai khia in,
Ni tak hun ciang in ah, Dam dam lung ngai in,
Thukpi in phum in la, Pha takpi’n seel in,
Zeisu kiang ah gen in, Thupha hong pia ding.

Verse 2
Zeisu kiang ah gen in, Na dah na thei hi.
Zeisu kiang gen le cin, Huh na hong pia ding,
Na lampi hong taan’ ciang, Pai in kai khawm in,
Thu ngen in na dah na, Na van zang ding hi.

Verse 3
Dah na lungkham na tawh, Khua a mial hang in,
Nang sang a a gim zaw, Mi dang te huh in,
Na dah na paai khia in, Thupha ngah na ding,
Mi dang te aa ding zong, Zeisu kiang gen in.

hymns.title: Na Deihna Bang Hi Ta Hen
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ka Topa aw, Nang ma kiang ah
Lampi haksa pai khawm lai ah
Hong ci sak thei in:
Na deih na Bang hi ta hen”

Sakkik:
Nang ma deih na (deih na)
Bang hi ta hen (ta hen)
Hong ci sak thei in:
“Na deih na Bang hi ta hen.”

Verse 2
Dah na ka thuak, lawmte si ta,
Hih hang Na thu ngaihsun lai ah
Hih bang gen ding hi’ng:
“Na deih na Bang hi ta hen”

Verse 3
Na Kha Siangtho in keima kha
Hong kip sak ding hong pai sak in.
Hih thu gen lai hi’ng:
“Na deih na Bang hi ta hen”

hymns.title: Na Hi Zo Diam Topa’n Hong Ci
hymns.title_en: Are Ye Able? Said the Master
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
“Na hi zo diam,” Topa’n hong ci,
Amah tawh kikhai khawm ding
Sih dong Na deih bang gamta ding,
Lungsim ah khentat zo ung.

Sakkik:
“Hi zo mah nung,” Topa Nang aa hi ung.
Hong bawl pha in, Nang tawh kibang in
Lam Nong hilhna vaang taang ka muh uh ciang,
Na meel bang in, hong it in, na thuman nung.

Verse 2
“Na hi zo diam” tua thu phawk ding
Guta pa khuadak na mun,
Mawhna khempeuh kimai sak zo,
Pazadih mun nuam tung zo.

Verse 3
“Na hi zo diam,” haksat hun ciang,
Na kiimkot khua a mial ciang,
Amah na kipiak theih na ding,
Na lungsim zo masa in.

Verse 4
“Na hi zo diam,” Topa’n hong sam,
Nangmah hong sam lailai hi-
Galile gam aa sap bang in,
Lungsim hang takin dawng in.

hymns.title: Na Khempeuh A Uk Topa’n Kumpi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Na khempeuh Topa, Kumpi suak,
Namin than’ na Ni, ak si’n taang,
Leitung bup pi hin’ na lai zang,
Itna lungsim nei te kiang nai!

Verse 2
Nuntak na Ni, ei te aa ding,
I lampi ah hong taang suk hi;
Lam et na ak si na vot sak;
Zan sawt vil a om mi nuam sak.

Verse 3
Zan khuamial in Na nuih mai liah,
Sun ni taang Nong hehpihna hi,
SaKhi tuihup hehpihna lim;
Mawhna meii bang a theng sak ta,

Verse 4
Suahtak na thuman hong pia in,
Nang aa ding lungsim tawhkuan’ in,
A nungta Na biak inn suah dong,
Siangtho khuavak, vantung khuavak.
Amen.

hymns.title: Na Khempeuh Khatvei In Zo Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Thukham sung pan suakta nuam mahmah ing,
Zeisu in a si tawh a hong sawp hi.
Thukham sung pan ka suakta na ding,
Hong itna tawh hong gum zo hi.

Sakkik:
Cing ding hi mawh nei te’n um ta un,
Cing ding hi, u te nau te’n um un
Singlamteh beel leng mawhna kia ding,
Zeisu’n cing ding khat vei gum hi.

Verse 2
Thukham na pan i suakta zo khin a,
Zeisu’n gupna kicing hong pia zo ta.
Kam siam in hong sam: “Hong pai un,” ci.
Khatvei hong gum leh kicing hi.

Verse 3
Pasian’ Tapa cih na i ngah zo ta.
A puk te itna tawh hong phong zo ding
Hong sap ciang sih na pan hing kik ding
Zeisun’ cing ding khatvei gum hi.

hymns.title: Na Khempeuh Zeisu Kiangah Ka Pia Ding Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong gum Topa keimah in ah
Na khempeuh paai in zui ning.
Ka Topa aw, Nang mah in ah
Lam hong hilh Pa Na hi ding.

Sakkik:
Na khempeuh paai a
Na khempeuh paai a
Na kheempeuh Topa khut sung ah
Kei mah’n hong pia ning.

Verse 2
Hong gum Topa keimah in ah
Nang ma kiang ka hong nai hi.
Kisik a thupha kong nget na
Ngai in hong gum in, kong ci.

Verse 3
Hong gum Topa keimah in ah
Leitung nop na ka nusia.
Kha Siantho leh Topa Pasian
Hong om in Ka lung sung ah.

Verse 4
Hong gum Topa keima in ah
Nong gupna la pha sa ning.
Vantung gun gei kong tun’ mateng
Nang hang in ka lungdam ding.

hymns.title: Na Khuavak Leh Na Thuman
Na Kong Biang Pua Lam Ka Ding Hi
hymns.title_en: Behold Me Standing at the Door
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Na kong biang ah ding in ka om,
Kong sapna za in hong en in,
” Kong lut ding hiam.” damtak kong ci,
Mawh neite Nong tum sak ding hiam?

Sakkik:
Na kong biang ah ding in ka om,
Hong en in, dam tak in kong sam,
“Kong lut ding hiam? Kong lut ding hiam?”
Mawh neite aw hong gen kik un.

Verse 2
Nang taa’ng ling lukhu ka khu hi.
Lungduai in sawtpi kong ngak hi.
Kong lut ding hiam? Kong lut ding hiam?
Mawh neite aw hong dawng ve un.

Verse 3
A hong mawk sap ka hi kei hi.
Gimna ka thuakna ngaihsun in,
Na mawh phel ding Ka pum Ka pia,
Kong lut ding hiam? Kong lut ding hiam?

Verse 4
Nangmah kong it kong ngaih man in,
Na nuam na’ng vantung pan kong puak,
Kong lut ding hiam? Kong lut ding hiam?
Mawh nei, gimna thuakte’n gen un.

hymns.title: Na Mawh Phel Nading Om Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong gum Topa min um in a kiang pai in
Lungsim hong bawl thak sak ding hi.
A pha a hong bawl nop lai in pial kei in
Nang aa ding mawh phelna om hi.

Sakkik:
Na mawh phelna ding om hi (om hi)
Na mawh phelna ding om hi (om hi)
Hong gum ding in Zeisu si zo hi.
Na mawh bei na’ng thu hong pia hi.

Verse 2
Sih na phual tung na mawh na lampi zuih na
Bang zui nuam semsem na hi hiam?
Itna kam khum tawh hong sap na nial ding hiam?
Mawh phelna thu nang hong pia hi.

Verse 3
Hong tung ding gal pel in singlamteh nai in
Singlamteh in nang hong phel ding.
Na up ciang in thakhat in Kha Siangtho in,
Ki sik in, thupha hong pia ding.

hymns.title: Na Omna Munah Taangsak In
hymns.title_en: Brighten the Corner Where You Are
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nasep na lian bel sem ding in lawm aw ze kai ke’n,
Khuavak na taangsak ding in khawl ke’n.
Na hih ding ngeina om bang in thupha om sak in,
Na om na mun ah taangsak in.

Sakkik:
Na om na mun ah taangsak in,
Na om na mun ah taangsak in,
A kisia ding a om mi khat peuhmah gup na ding,
Na om na mun ah taangsak in.

Verse 2
Lungkia a, dah na thuak na a kipsak kik theih leh,
Nang aa ding a pha bek ngaihsun ke’n,
Khat bek hang a na lungsim om noptuam na sak leh,
Na om na mun ah taangsak hi.

Verse 3
Na om na mun ah na khuavak na taangsak theih leh,
Om na mun a ding zong taangsak in,
Na khut ah a lim khomun hawm a na vak theih leh,
Na om na mun taangsak hi.

hymns.title: Na Sem Niloh Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
La lai ah nasep ding a om lai ah
Buh at hun zo, nasem ding te tawm pha
Tuni thuman nasem te a kiang ah
Topa sawl na bang in ta’ un.

Sakkik:
Na seem un, na seem un,
Nop na pha na ngaih sun un.
Topa in tha hat na a hong pia ding hi,
Ni tum mateng in nasem un.

Verse 2
An khol na buhtang tawh na dim sak un
Lungdam na tawh la pha takpi sa un.
Ni tum a khua a hong mial mateng in
Pha takpi nasem ni loh un.

Verse 3
Nasep na haksa in a sawt hang in,
Nasem te in nop na lian a ngah ding.
Topa in a teelsa mita ding in
Nop na pha bel hong pia ding hi.

Verse 4
Vantung khuapi sung ah nop pha mahmah,
Haksa nasem khempeuh in ngah ding hi.
Topa, itna thu in hong tun’ ciang ah,
Amau nasep a tawp ding hi.

hymns.title: Na Sem Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Na sem un, na sem un, Pasian sawl tak hi hang,
I Topa tot sa lampi mah a zui hi hang,
Ama thu nuam in ei hong thahat sak ding hi,
Na sep ding i muh peuh thahat na tawh sem ni.

Sakkik:
Na sem un, na sem un,
Na sem un, na sem un,
Lam en un, Thu ngen un,
Topa hong pai mateng sem un.

Verse 2
Na sem un, na sem un, Gil kial te an vak un,
Nun’tak na tui nak ah mi gim te pai pih un,
Singlamteh leh lungdam na thu tawh ki paak ni,
Tangko un, “Man ngen lo, a khawnkhong hong hon hi.”

Verse 3
Na sem un, na sem un, Om hi mi kim sep ding,
Theihkhialh na khuamial gam hi ei te sukmang ding;
I Topa Pasian’ min I pahtawi ding a hi,
Tangko un, “Mang ngen lo, a khawnkhong hong hon hi.”

Verse 4
Na sem un, na sem un, Topa’ tha tawh seem ding,
Kumpi puan leh lukhu nuam na eite’n sang ding;
Tatkhiat sa mi dikte tawh eite’n i vekpi’n,
Sa khawm ding, “Man ngei lo, a khawnkhong hong hon hi.”

hymns.title: Na Thumaanna Lian Hi, Ka Pa Pasian Aw
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Na thumaan na lian hi, ka Pa Pasian aw,
Kihei kikheel na liim Na nei kei hi.
Nang ma hehpihna kikheel in bei ngei lo,
Tanglai bang mah Na hi tawntung ding hi.

Sakkik:
Na thumaan na lian hi, Na thumaan na lian hi.
Zingsang sim in hehpihna thak ka mu;
Ka sapna teng Na khut in hong guan’ tawntung;
Na thumaan na lian hi, Topa kei’ tung.

Verse 2
Ni, kha leh aksi te, ngei na bang ciat in,
Khuakhal leh tuk hun te, phalbi nipi;
Ngei na bang zui a hun hun a piang te in
Na thumaan, hehpih, itna hong lak hi.

Verse 3
Mawhna mai sak na leh a kip lungnop na,
Nong ompih lungdam na, lam Nong hilh na,
A ni sim Nong kep na, mailam lung muan’ na,
A pha tampi te zong, Nang ma thupha.

hymns.title: Na Thupha Ngaihsun In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nun’tak na tuipi tung ah huih nun’ ciang in
Si ding cih ngaihsun in na lung kiat ciang in
Thupha khat nungah thupha na ngaihsun in la,
Topa in tampi hong pia na thei ding ta.

Sakkik:
Thupha khat nungah khat ngaihsun in,
A tampi hong pia hi thei ta in.
Thupha khat nung ah khat ngaihsun in
Pasian in a tampi hong pia thei ta in.

Verse 2
Lungman’ na vangik bang in na thuak ngei hiam.
Singlamteh hong pua sak in a gik thei hiam.
Thupha khat nungah thupha na ngaihsun leh
Nisim in a tawntung la na sa ding hi.

Verse 3
Mi dang te a sum a pai na et ciang in
Zesu kiang ah na ngah ding sum ngaihsun in,
Vantung khuasung ah na omna inn hi zong
Kuamah in lei zo kei sum a om ding hi.

Verse 4
Tua a hih ciang in gal kido laitak in,
Pasian in na khempeuh uk hi, Lau kei in
Vantung mihingte in nang kiang ah om hi,
Lampi tawp dong in nang a hong huh ding hi.

hymns.title: Nang Aading Ka Nungta Ding Hi
hymns.title_en: My Life, My Love, I Give to Thee
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ka nun’ tak na leh ka itna
Nangma kiang ah kei mah’n ka pia
Nangma thu ka ngai ding,
Topa Hong gum Topa Zeisu.

Sakkik:
Nang aa ding ka nungta ding hi.
Nangmah in kei tang ding na si.
Keimah ka lung a dam ding hi.
Hong gum Topa Zeisu.

Verse 2
Nang hong sang ding ke’n ka um hi.
Ka nun’ tak na’ng Na si zo hi.
Tu nung ciang in ka lawp ding hi.
Hong gum Topa Zeisu.

Verse 3
Ka kha hong gum ding in Topa
Na si Kalani mual tungah
Ka pum vekpi nang ka hong pia,
Hong gum Topa Zeisu.

hymns.title: Nang Aading Thu Ka Ngen Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong gum Topa in kei aa ding thu ngen hi.
Topa it huai hih leitung ah zui tawn hi.
Tu in Topa in nuamtak kei hong cing lai hi.
Amah in nang gum pa piang ta hen, ka ci.

Sakkik:
Nang aa ding thu ka ngen,
Nang aa ding thu ka ngen.
Nang aa ding thu ka ngen.
Nang aa ding thu ka ngen.

Verse 2
Nuam tawntung ding i lawp na man takpi hi,
Hehpihna hong pia Topa Pasian om hi.
Topa mai muh ding hong sap hong sawt lo ding hi.
Nangmah hong hilh hen keimah tawh pai khawm ni.

Verse 3
Gunpi bang nopsak na kei aa ding om zo.
Hih nopsak na leitung mite’n thei lo hi.
Hong gum Topa in hong uk hong pia zo bek hi.
Nang zong hong pia hiam kei mah’n ka thei nuam hi.

Verse 4
Topa Zeisu in hong zong hong muh ciang in
It huai Topa in nang hong phel thu gen in,
Topa min mi lak ah a than’ na’ng thu gen in,
Nang taang nget kingah zo nang zong ngah ding hi.

hymns.title: Nang Deih Bang Topa
Nang Kiangah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hin’ na tawntung Topa Pasian
Lawmte sang ka it zaw hi.
Vantung lam ka zon’ lai tak ah
Topa kiang ka tawn nuam hi.
Nang kiangah, Nang kiangah
Nangkiang ah, Nangkiangah
Vantung lam ka zon’ laitak ah
Nang kiangah ka tawn nuam hi.

Verse 2
Leitung ah hauhna le nuamna
Min thang thu ka ngen kei hi.
Nangma kiang ka om lai tak ah
Lungdam in ka sem ding hi.
Nang kiangah, Nang kiangah
Nang kiangah, Nang kiangah
Nangma kiang ka om laitak ah
Lungdam in ka sem ding hi.

Verse 3
Mualkuam khuamial na sung hi hang
Tuipi gal ah hong kha in.
Hin’ tawntung na kong pi sung ah
Nangmah tawh hong lut sak in.
Nang kiangah, Nang kiangah
Nang kiangah, Nang kiangah
Hin’ tawntung na kong pi sung ah
Topa kiang ka lut ding hi.

hymns.title: Nang Kong Bel Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lungsim gal do na leh dah na sung pan in,
Kei sang a sang zaw suangpi ka delh nuam hi;
Mawh lua, gim lua zo, Nang aa hong hi ta ning,
A kip Suangpi aw, Nangmah kong bel ta hi.

Sakkik:
Nang kong bel hi, Nang kong bel hi,
Nangmah kong bel hi, a kip thupha Suangpi.

Verse 2
Sun in gam dai a, dah in lung leng laitak,
Ze et na in a vaang tawh hong tuam ciang in,
Nuntak huihpi nung, tuipi kihual laitak,
Thupha Suangpi aw, hong liah in bit tak in.

Verse 3
Gal do laitak in gal in hong neh ciang in
Tai in kong ko zel hi, ka belh Suangpi aw;
Tuihual bang ze et gim na hong tun’ ciang in,
Na sung kong bu hi, keima kha’ Suangpi aw.

hymns.title: Nang Kong Cing Ding
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Thuciam na pha hong pia zo hi.
Lungkham na na thuak zawh caing,
Leitung pan vantung lampi ah
Ka mit in nang kong cing ding.

Sakkik:
Nang kong cing ding,
Nang kong cing ding,
Ka mit in nang kong cing ding;
Leitung pan vantung lampi ah,
Ka mit in nang kong cing ding.

Verse 2
Ze et nate na zawh khit ciang,
Na muan’ na’n hong ngak zawh ciang,
Hih kiciam na khutbuh na nei;
Ka mit in nang kong cing ding.

Verse 3
Na lam et na te kisia in,
Lawpna kumte a bei ciang,
Hih kiciam na na let lai in,
Ka mit in nang kong cing ding.

Verse 4
Nun’ tak na ding hun hong bei in,
Sihna ding hun hong tun’ ciang,
Topa hong sapna na za ding,
Ka mit in nang kong cing ding.

hymns.title: Nang Kong Deih Tawntung Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nang kong deih tawntung hi, Mi gi ka To;
Lungnop na hong pia thei A dang om lo.

Sakkik:
Kong deih hi, Nang kong deih hi,
Nang kong deih tawntung hi;
Thupha hong pia’n, Topa aw,
Nang kong zuan hi.

Verse 2
Nang kong deih tawntung hi, Nai tak kei kiang;
Ze et na’n hong zo lo, Nang Nong nai ciang.

Verse 3
Nang kong deih tawntung hi, Nuam leng, dah leng,
Nuntak na’n man nei kei, Nang hong taan leng.

Verse 4
Nang kong deih tawntung hi, Hong thu hilh in;
Nong khap sa a phate Hong ngah sak in.

Verse 5
Nang kong deih tawntung hi, Siang pen Pa aw;
Nang aa tak hong hi ning, Tapa pha aw.

hymns.title: Nang Leh Keimah Hong Sam Hi
hymns.title_en: Softly and Tenderly Jesus Is Calling
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Mai taii in dam tak Zeisu in hong sam hi.
Nang leh keimah hong sam hi.
Topa Zeisu’n lungduai tak in hong ngak hi.
Nang leh keimah hong ngak hi.

Sakkik:
Inn ah ciah un, Gimna thuak te hong ciah un.
Lungdam tak in Topa Zeisu in hong sam.
“Mawh nei te hong pai un,” ci.

Verse 2
Bang khawl i hiam Topa Zeisu’n hong thum hi.
Nang leh kei kiang hong thum hi.
Hong hehpihna bang thu’n don lo i hi hiam?
Nang leh kei thupha hong pia.

Verse 3
A hun in a manlang in hong kheng thei hi.
Nang leh kei hong kheng ding hi.
Khuamial na leh sihna natna hong nai hi.
Nang leh kei hong nai ding hi.

Verse 4
Nong itna leh a lamdang thuciam napi,
Nang leh kei aa ding koih hi.
Gamtat khialhna Topa’n hong phel sak ding hi.
Nang leh kei aa phel ding hi.

hymns.title: Nang Tawh Ka Pai Ding Hi
hymns.title_en: O Master Let Me Walk With Thee
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nasep na lam, lung nem na tawh
Nang tawh ka pai ding, Topa aw.
Gimna, tawlna ka thuak ding in
Nangmah in kei hong huh lai in.

Verse 2
Nangma thu um lo mite in
Thu hilh na ding in hong huh in.
Lam khial mite vantung lampi
Hilh kik na ding thu hong hilh in.

Verse 3
Hehpihna thu hong hilh in la
Nang tawh lampi pai ding in ah
Lamdang ah pai lo na ding in
Hong gum Topa aw, hong huh in.

Verse 4
Nangma lawpna, muan’ na, itna
Nun’tak laitak ke’n ka deih mah.
Nangma lungdam na zong deih hi.
Nangmah tawh kei ka pai ding hi.

hymns.title: Nang Tawh Nai Zaw Nuam Ing
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing, Ka Pasian aw;
Singlamteh thuak ta leng, Hong dom to aw.
Thuak hang ka sasa ding; Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing,
Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing, Ka Pasian aw

Verse 2
Zakoh bang ka vak a, Ni tum ta hang,
Khuamial a, suangtum bek Ka lukham hang,
Ka mang hong nai nuam ing, Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing,
Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing, Ka Pasian aw

Verse 3
Na mai ah hong lak in Vantung lampi;
Nong ngah sak khempeuh te Hehpihna hi;
Vantung mi hong sam ding, Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing,
Nang tawh nai zaw nuam ing, Ka Pasian aw

Verse 4
Nangma min phatna tawh Ka khanglo ding;
Ka dahna teng Pasian Phat na’n nei ning;
Tua bangin dahna hang Nang tawh kinai zaw na’ng,
Nang tawh kinai zaw na’ng, Ka Pasian aw.

hymns.title: Nangmah Tat Khiatna Ding
hymns.title_en: I Gave My Life For Thee
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nangmah tat khiat na ding
Nun’na na ngah na ding,
Kei nun’ tak na kong pia,
Ka si pha Kong bua khia.
Ke’n Ka nun’ tak na Kong pia zo,
Nang Kei bang nong pia zo?
Ke’n Ka nun’ tak na Kong pia zo,
Nang Kei bang nong pia zo?

Verse 2
Khang tawntung a nuam na,
Na ngah theih na’ng in ah,
Gentheih na kum sawt pi
Nang aa ding Kong thuak hi.
Nang aa ding kum sawt pi Kong gim,
Kei hang bang tan na gim?
Nang aa ding kum sawt pi Kong gim,
Kei hang bang tan na gim?

Verse 3
A taang Ka Pa’ inn nuam,
Ka tokhom vanglian tuam,
Nu sia’n leitung Kong thuak,
Lungzuan’ dahna Kong thuak.
Nang hang hih zah ta Ke’n nusia,
Kei hang bang nang nusia?
Nang hang hih zah ta Ke’n nusia,
Kei hang bang nang nusia?

Verse 4
Dawi gam sung pan nang mah
Kong hot khiat na’ng in ah,
Ka thuak gim na pite
Gen khin zo kei niteh.
Nang aa ding gen zawh loh Ka thuak,
Kei aa ding bang na thuak?
Nang aa ding gen zawh loh Ka thuak,
Kei aa ding bang na thuak?

hymns.title: Nangmah Tawh Pasian Om Khawm Ta Hen
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen,
A hong pi, a hong len ding in,
A tuu tawh hong kembit ding in,
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen.

Sakkik:
I kimuh kik mateng,
Zeisu kiang kimuh mateng,
I kimuh kik mateng,
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen.

Verse 2
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen,
A kha nuai hong liah hong dal in,
Nisim “Manna” hong vaak ding in,
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen.

Verse 3
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen,
Launa’n hong lung am sak ciang in,
Ang sung hong pom bikbek ding in,
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen.

Verse 4
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen,
Itna nuai ah hong cing ding in,
Sihna tuihual satpaai dingin,
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen.

hymns.title: Ngai In Ka Kha Aw
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ngai in, ka kha aw, vantung mi la sakna
Leitung lungdam tuipi tung zong thang hi.
La pha sakna a aw zak nop huai bel hi.
Hing kikheel mawh kiphelna thu gen hi.

Sakkik:
Thu ciamna cing kham vantung mihing te in
A aw zak nop huai in la sa uh hi.
Nitak kapa zingsang ciang lungdam sak hi.
Sawtvei khuamial itna khuavaak sak in.

Verse 2
La aw zak ciang mailam nawt in i pai hi.
Lungkham a gimte aw hong pai un ci.
Khuamial sungah Topa Zeisu kiko hi.
Vantung inn lam hilhna thupha aw hi.

Verse 3
Gamlapiah nitak siklong ging bangin
Leitung, tuitungah Zeisu aw ging hi.
Tul then tham lo a van lel mi tampi in
Tuu cing Topa aw Na kiang kong pai hi.

Verse 4
Tu laitak i lungkahm a sawt hangin-ah
Khuamial kheng leeng nuam na’ng khuavaak ding hi.
A gimte zuihna lam a bei ciangin-ah
Kha Siangtho maang ding kham gam tung ding hi.

hymns.title: Ngai Un Tul Sawm Gawsem Leh Aw Ging
hymns.title_en: Hark! Ten Thousand Harps and Voices
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ngai un! tul sawm gawsem le aw,
Van pan phatna aw ging;
Zeisu’n uk, vantung a lungdam hi,
Zeisu’n uk, itna Pasian:
Itna gal ah tokhom tung tu;
Zeisu bek in leitung uk.
Haleluiah! Haleluiah! Haleluiah! A men.

Verse 2
Min thang Kumpi tawntung uk hi,
Sia ngei lo Kumpi lukhu;
Tua itna sutat zo om lo,
Nang aa ding a na bawl sa;
Na hehpihna ki gal mun,
Pai ding Na mai kiang tun’ dong,
Haleluiah! Haleluiah! Haleluiah! A men.

Verse 3
Gumpa hong zekai lua kei in,
Na min than’ ni tung sak in,
A lamdang thu sit na hun ciang,
Leitung vantung a bei ding hi;
Tua ciang kham gawsem tum in,
Thang hen, thang hen, ka Kumpi!
Haleluiah! Haleluiah! Haleluiah! A men.

hymns.title: Ni Khat
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ni khat, Ama min phatna van dim na pi’n,
Leitung ah mawh na zan bang mial man in,
Nungak sung suak in Zeisu hong pai suk in,
Mi lak hong teeng hi, lam pha lak ding in.

Sakkik:
Nungta in hong it, si in hong hon hi;
Kivui in ka mawh na a pua khia hi;
Tho kik in hong dik sak, khawnkhong tawntung hi;
Lungdam huai bel hi, hong pai kik ding ni.

Verse 2
Ni khat, Kalani mual kah to sak uh a,
Sing tung kilh cip uh khia lum ding in ah;
Mawh na teng pua in, simmawh bawlsiat, huat na,
Nakpi thuak sak uh hi, Kei hong tan Pa.

Verse 3
Ni khat, huan sung ah A mah ki nu sia a,
Ni khat, thuakna tawh peng in tawlnga a,
Vantung mite in A han hong cing suk a,
Lam et na beite muan’ kei hong hon Pa.

Verse 4
Ni khat Amah han in siin zo nawn lo a,
Han kongvang khakna suangpi tuk khia a,
Sihna zo gawp in sihna pan tho kik a,
Tu’n vantung kah zo, tawntung kei’ Topa.

Verse 5
Ni khat Amah pengkul in hong masuan ding,
Ama vanglian vantung pan hong taang ding,
Ka it ka ngaihte Amah’n hong tonpih ding,
Angtan huai hi, tua Zeisu kei aa ding.

hymns.title: Ni Khat Ni Ciang Lungdam Ni
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A zak nop huai la ngaih ka za,
Tua la kasa thei nai kei hi,
A zak nop huai la aw ngaih pi,
Khat vei ni ciang ka sa thei ding.

Sakkik:
Ni khat ni ciang, lungdam na ni,
Tua la ngaih pi ka sa thei ding,
Tua la noptak in ka sak ciang
Zeisu kiang vantung ka tun’ ciang.

Verse 2
Ni khat ni ciang ka tawl dam ding,
Leitung bei ding vantung om ding,
Lam haksa teng ka khin khin ding,
Ka Topa maitang ka mu ding.

Verse 3
Ni khat ni ciang lungnop om ding,
Vantung kongkhak pi kihong ding,
Ni khat ni peuhpeuh ciang lut ning,
A tawntung in ka tawl dam ding.

hymns.title: Ni Simin, Nai Simin
hymns.title_en: Saviour, More Than Life to Me
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa bek hong phel thei hi
Kei mah in ah Na kiang ka beel hi
Na sipha tawh hong sawp in
Na kiang ah hong om sak tawntung in.

Sakkik:
Ni simin, (sim in) nai sim in (sim in),
Sipha than’ na thei sak in.
Hehpih a, Nong itna tawh
Khau bang in ah kei mah hong hen in.

Verse 2
A kisia thei leitung ah
Dam takin kei mah lam hong hilh ta
Topa bek i up ciang in
Cik mah hun in lam khial nawn lo ding.

Verse 3
Sih ding hun hong tun’ mateng
Vantung innpi nuam sung tun’ mateng
Nang kong up na’ng khang sak in
Topa tawh kikhen nawn lo ding in.

hymns.title: Ni Taang Khuavak Lut Sak In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
I gal te’n ah hong zo ding ci’n na lau hiam
Pua lam khuamial sang in sung ah mial zaw hiam?
Khuavak na kongvang te khempeuh hong in la
Ni taang khuavak lut sak in.

Sakkik:
Ni taang khuavak lut sak in
Ni taang khuavak lut sak in
Khuavak na kongvang te khempeuh hong in la
Ni taang khuavak lut sak in.

Verse 2
Na nasep lai tak na upna a kiam hiam
Nang mah na thu ngetna in hong ngai lo hiam
Khuavak na kongvang te khempeuh hong in la
Ni taang khuavak lut sak in.

Verse 3
Nuam na tawh lampi na pai to nuam ding hiam
Ni sun lai khuamial na thei lo na deih hiam
Khuavak na kongvang te khempeuh hong in la
Ni taang khuavak lut sak in.

hymns.title: Ni Tampi Kheng Zo Ta Hi
hymns.title_en: While the Days are Going By
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A lung mang te hong hehpih in,
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi.
Gimna lungkham na thuak na in,
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi.
Khual zin na leh kikal a
Nuamna lungdam na te tawh
Thu a pha ka bawl uh maw
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi.

Sakkik:
Ni tampi kheng zo hi.
Ni tampi kheng zo hi.
Thupha gam tat theih na ding
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi.

Verse 2
Mawk na in a hun bei sak ke’n,
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi.
Na mai zingsang khuavak bang hen.
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi.
Leitung ah dahna sung ah
Lung khamna kahna om a
Na U nau te phong in la
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi.

Verse 3
Itna tawh a kikhih khempeuh
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi.
Ei te in i nusia ta hi.
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi.
Khaici pha kituh khempeuh
A vak pha a lim nuai ah
Hong po a, i lung dam na
Ni tampi kheng zo ta hi.

hymns.title: Ni Tumna Gal Ah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ni tum na gal ah, Aw a nuam zingsang,
Topa hong om ciang, vantung hi zo;
Khual zin na bei in, min than’ na mu ding;
Ni tum na gal ah, lei bei ni caing

Verse 2
Ni tum na gal ah, Meii kai ngei loh na,
Huihpi om nawn lo, lau na bei ta;
Aw lungdam na ni Aw bei ngei lo ni,
Ni tum na gal ah, tawntung nop na.

Verse 3
Ni tum na gal ah, Khut tawh hong kha ding,
I biak i Topa, Pasian kiang ah;
Ama minthan’ na, Hong dawn na kam khum,
Kei aa ding hi ta, Tua gun gal ah.

Verse 4
Ni tum na gal ah, Lungdam kikhawlh na,
A tungsa i it, i lawmte tawh;
Tua a nuam gam sung, kikhen nawn lo ding,
Ni tum na gal ah, a tawntung in.

hymns.title: Nih Vei Na Suak Kik In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Upa khat zan lai Zeisu kaing ah pai a
Gupna ngah na ding khuavak lampi dong hi.
Topa in a tel tak in a hilh kik a;
“Nih vei na suak in,” ci. (in ci)

Sakkik:
Nih vei na suak kik in (kik in).
Nih vei na suak kik in (kik in).
A maan tak in kong ci hi, kong hilh kik hi.
Nih vei na suak kik in (kik in).

Verse 2
Topa Zeisu thu hilh kik na a pha hi.
Leitung mihing te ngaihsut ding kilawm hi.
A thu piak na a mawk na hi lo ding hi.
“Nih vei suak kik in,” ci. (in ci)

Verse 3
A teel mite tawh lungdam in la sa ta.
Mipha te’n a minthang lungdam in nuam a
Hin’ tawntung lungdam na nuamna ngah nop leh
“Nih vei suak kik in,” ci. ( in ci)

hymns.title: Nipi Topa
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nipi Topa Na inn sung ah,
Kiciam in Nang tung kong ki pia,
Kote hong biak na hong sang in,
Gamdai takin Nang kong phat uh.

Verse 2
Nong piak Nipi ni ka it uh,
Tua sang ni thupi zaw om lo,
Nasep nusia in hong bia ung,
Nang mah phat nop na lungsim tawh.

Verse 3
Lungkham, sinkham om nawn lo in,
Mawh na gim na om nawn lo in,
Thumna, tauna om nawn lo in,
Na min phat ding thadah lo in.

Verse 4
I lam et ni hong tung zo ta,
Khuavak pi in ei hong taan’ zo,
Leitung haksa nusia ta ni,
Tawldam na’ng ihmu phot dih ni.

hymns.title: Noel Masa Vantung Mi Sak
hymns.title_en: The First Noel, the Angels Did Say
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Noel masa vantung mite sak,
Tuucing zawng pawlkhat tuu cin’ laitak hi
Gampalak ah tuu vil om lai laitak,
Phalbi khua dam lai, zan khuamial laitak.

Sakkik:
Noel, Noel, Noel, Noel,
I tazi la Kumpi pa suak.

Verse 2
A khuadak ciang ni suah na lam ah,
Gamla pi pan aksi taang khat ki lak
Leitung teng ah nakpi in tang hi;
A sun, a zan ci lo in taang tawntung hi.

Verse 3
Tua aksi taang zui kawm in ah,
Gamla pi pan mipil thumte in ah
Kumpi zong ding in hong pai uh hi;
Aksi pai na khempeuh hong zui uh hi.

Verse 4
Mipil thumte zong buk sung lut a,
Zahtakna tawh a khukdin’ uh hi;
Kham, paknamtui, paknamtui kha,
Ama kiang ah pia in a bia uh hi.

hymns.title: Nuam Zaw Kumte’n Hong Paisan
hymns.title_en: Sweeter As the Years Go By
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu itna’n kei hong sam,
Mawhna sung a mang kei;
Lamdang hehpih na’n hong lei,
A tuu buk ka tung kik;
Thuk in a zai hehpihna,
Tuipi lian sang thuk zaw,
Vantung sang in zong sang zaw,
Om tawntung ning tua lai.

Sakkik:
Nuam zaw kumte’n hong paisan,
Nuam zaw kumte’n hong paisan,
Hau zaw, cing zaw, thuk zaw,
Zeisu itna nuam zaw,
Nuam zaw kumte’n hong paisan.

Verse 2
Amah’n tanglai Zudah mi
Nuntak lampi zui in;
Mi tampi kikhawm uh hi,
Hong gupna thu ngai ding;
Lung gimte lung nop na pia,
Mittaw te khua mu sak;
Ama dikna lungsim in,
Kei na ngawn hong it hi.

Verse 3
A lamdang hong itna in,
Mawh nei te lam hong hilh,
Thum na, tau na thuak lo in,
Singlamteh tung tau na’n,
Min than’ na tawh kei hong gum,
Lungdam in ah awng un,
Leitung pan vantung dong ah,
Hong gum Topa phatna.

hymns.title: Nuihna Leh Kahna Gal Khatah
hymns.title_en: Beyond the Smiling and the Weeping
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nuih na leh kah na kheng gal khat ah
Man lang in ah ka tung ding hi.
Ihmut na leh thawhna kheng gal ah
Tuh na leh at na kheng gal khat ah
Man lang in ah ka tung ding hi.

Sakkik:
Nong itna pha inn pi pha
Ah om ding in hong kha in Topa aw.

Verse 2
Palh na leh vul na kheng gal khat ah
Man lang in ah ka tung ding hi.
Khuavak leh khuamial kheng gal khat ah
Lawp na leh lau na kheng gal khat ah
Man lang in ah ka tung ding hi.

Verse 3
Khua dam leh khua lum kheng gal khat ah
Man lang in ah ka tung ding hi.
Suang mual te leh gun te gal khat ah
Tawntung leh tawntung lo gal khat ah
Man lang in ah ka tung ding hi.

hymns.title: Nung Ciangin A Nopna
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Sun sang a pha zaw gam nuam om a,
I upna in ki gal muh thei hi,
Ei a ding, tua gam pha vantung ah,
I Pa’n om na hong bawl kholh sak hi.

Sakkik:
Nung ciang in a nop na
Tua gam pha ah i kimu ding hi,
Nung ciang in a nop na
Tua gam pha ah i kimu ding hi.

Verse 2
Ei te in tua gun gal gam pha ah,
Thupha ngah mite la ngaih sa in,
Dah ngei nawn lo ding i lung sung ah,
Khuisa ngei nawn lo ding tawl dam khin.

Verse 3
Hong piak sa vanglian hong itna pi,
Hong siang sak thupha, pahtawi na la,
Tawl nga lo phatna i sa ding hi,
Hong it vantung Pa Pasian mai ah.

hymns.title: Nuntak Kikna Thupha
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nungta kik Na thupha
Mi siang te kiang tung ta.
Mi dang te kiang min than’ na tawh
Na gen ciang ngai nuam sak.

Sakkik:
Nungta kik Na thupha
Na mai khuk din’ ciang in
Topa aw hong kum suk in la,
Thupha bel hong pia in.

Verse 2
Nungta kik Na thupha
Na min pha thang sak ni
Mihing khempeuh lungsim sung ah
Na itna guang sak in.

Verse 3
Nungta kik Na thupha
Thu hilh a pha pia a
A siangtho na thupha zak ciang
Upna na piang sak ta’n.

Verse 4
Nungta kik Na thupha
Kha Siangtho hong guang in
Na min than’ na kilang sak in
Ko aa ding in a pha.

hymns.title: Nuntak Lam Tam Kituahna Ah
hymns.title_en: Where Cross the Crowded Ways of Life
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nuntak lam tam kituahna ah
Nam khat beh khat ki el na ah
Huai ham kitot na aw tung ah ,
Mihing Tapa kong za uh hi.

Verse 2
Gentheih na sapna tam na ah,
Lau na khuamial dim na inn ah
Huai ham duh gawh buk na lam ah,
Nangma khitui luang ko mu thei.

Verse 3
Nangma aa ding tui suah na hai
Nangma hehpihna gim nam lai;
A hih hang Nangma mi git mai
Mi honpi te’n mu nuam lai keei.

Verse 4
Mual tung pan hong kum in, Topa,
Dam sak pak ven mi lung gim na;
Lungsim tawldam na om loh na
Khua sung kong zing hong siik kik aw.

hymns.title: Nuntakna Khomun
hymns.title_en: Break Thou the Bread of Life

hymns.title: Omna Om Lai Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Omna om lai Tuuno innpi sung ah
A vanglian pi tawh nang hong sam ta hi.
Tum in, tu in, tum in, omna om lai.

Verse 2
Ni tang bei dek zo, ni in liap ta hi.
Hong liap ta hi, manlang in ah pai in.
Omna om lai, tum in, tu in tum in.

Verse 3
Mopi na pawi sung zin a khop lai in
Hong sap mi na hih leh tum in tum in.
Omna om lai, tum in, tu in tum in.

Verse 4
Dim khin dek hi, lungdam na inn sung ah
Manlang a na lut leh ngah lai ding hi.
Omna om lai, tum in, tu in tum in.

Verse 5
Omna om lai, kong kihon’ laitak hi.
Pai in tum le cin na lap lai ding hi.
Omna om lai, tum in, tu in tum in.

Verse 6
Tum in tum in tua pawi nang aa ding hi
Ki it tawntung na hai ki dawn ding hi
Tum in, tu in tum in, omna om lai.

hymns.title: Pa Tung Min Than’na Om Hen
hymns.lyrics:
1st Tune Key A
2nd Tune Key F

Pa tung min than’na om hen
Tapa tung leh Kha Siangtho tungah zong
Piancil lai leh tuhun bangin
A tawntung in hih leitung om den ding hi
Amen Amen

hymns.title: Pai In La Zeisu Kiang Gen In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu kiang pai in, na mawhna gen in
Na nuntak na ding Ama thu um in.
Na lungsim vangik hong zang sak ding hi.
Topa en in na mawh hong phel ding hi.

Sakkik:
Zeisu kiang pai in, na mawhnate gen in
Ama lam nga in, na mawh hong phel ding hi,
Zeisu kiang pai in, Ama lam zuan in
Na mawh gen in, Topa’n hong phel thei ding hi.

Verse 2
Zeisu kiang pai in, na mawhna lian hi,
Na mawhna mual cia in a liat hang in
Mawhna phel ding hi, nuam na ngah na’ng in
Topa Zeisu a si luang ciam teh in.

Verse 3
Zeisu kiang pai in, na lau na gen in.
Na lau loh na ding a ang hong pom ding
Upna khang sak in, na khi tui nul hi.
A tawntung nuam in na lungdam ding hi.

hymns.title: Pai In Sem In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tapidaw ihmu nawn ke’n:
Mi ngah nang sep theih lai sem,
Khut zep in ding mawk ding maw?
Topa in thu hong pia leh.

Sakkik:
Pai in sem! ding kipan in;
Pai in, zong A mangte gum;
Khuamial na sung mawh nei mi,
Tua pawi ah hong paipih in!

Verse 2
Topa min na it ding hiam?
Hong ciam na na um zo diam?
Sapna teng A kiang ngen in,
Hong sapna na nial ding maw?

Verse 3
Na san’ sa bang in um in,
Hong hilh bang in nungta in.
Ama aa bek hi den in,
Sepna tawh upna lak in.

Verse 4
Singlamteh i puak ding om,
Kham lukhu na khuk nop leh;
Thathak tawh ma i sawt ding,
A hun tom, a nite tawm.

hymns.title: Pasian Hehpihna Zai Mahmah Hi
hymns.title_en: There’s a Wideness in God’s Mercy
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Pasian hehpihna zai lua hi,
Tuipi lian bang in zai hi,
A thu khen na ah thu maan hi,
Suah tak na sang zai zaw hi.

Verse 2
Mi mawh te dawn in vai tut hi,
Hehpihna thu Honpa kiang,
Tam sem hi, mipha te aa ding;
A si sung dam na om hi.

Verse 3
Bang hang hiam cih leh, teh zawh loh,
Pasian hong itna hang hi;
Nuntak tawntung na lung tang in,
A mi git na lamdang hi.

Verse 4
Ei itna, a neem ngi ngei leh,
Ama thu bang zui ding a,
Topa’ citna ciam na sung ah,
I nuntak na taang ding hi.

hymns.title: Pasian In Hong Sam Lai
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Pasian sap lai ka za kei diam
Leitung nop na ka kheng lah diam
Nuntak hun a beibei lai in,
Ka kha ka koih diam, ih sip in?

Sakkik:
Hong sam lai! aw, za in!
Hong sam lai! aw, za in!
Pa in hong am lai, aw za un,
Pa in hong sam lai,
Hong sam lai! aw, za un,
Hong sam lai! aw, za un,
Pa in hong sam lai! Aw, za un sam lai!

Verse 2
Pasian sap lai ka tho kei diam,
A itna aw ka nial thei diam,
Hong sapna ka awlmawh kei diam,
Hong sam lailai kam uai kai diam.

Verse 3
Pasian sap lai, hong kiukiu in,
Ka lung ka khak diam a kip in?
Hong ngak lai hong sang ding hi zo,
Ka dah sak ngam diam Kha Siangtho?

hymns.title: Pasian In Leitung Hong It Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A mawh khin sa leitung mite
Pasian in hong it hi.
A pha bel a vanglian pite
Man nei lo hong pia hi.

Sakkik:
A lamdang bel dip kuat huai
Zeisu hong itna hi.
Ei mah hong gupna ding amah’n
Kalvari mual si hi.

Verse 2
I up leh i Topa ding hi,
A hing kik Pa sian Ta
Sihna tawh ei hong gum zo hi.
A si’n hong sawp zo ta.

Verse 3
Itna in hong kicing sak a,
Mi siangtho te’n gen hi.
Zeisu thupha bel um le teh
Nuam na na ngah ding ci.

Verse 4
A ut te aw nuam in pai un.
Vantung ah nop na pi
Na upna bang un leitung ah
No na ngah ding uh hi.

hymns.title: Pasian Khut Sung Muan Huai Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lam hong lak gumpa ka kiang hong nai ciang,
Bangbang hong kiimvel hang lau om nawn lo,
Huihpi, guahpi te hong daisak ding a,
A khutkuak sung muan’ huai hi.

Sakkik:
A khutkuak sung muan’ huai hi,
A khutkuak sung muan’ huai hi,
Bangbang hong kiimvel hang lau om nawn lo,
A khutkuak sung muan’ huai hi.

Verse 2
Itna tawh a ang sung kei hong pom ciang,
Kilem na thu Kha Siangtho hong hilh a,
Pasian khut in kei hong kip let zawh ciang,
A khutkuak sung muan’ huai hi.

Verse 3
Ka kha kem kei hong nusia nawn lo ding,
Hong itna khau tatsat zo om nawn lo,
Ka thei hi, Amah in hong kem den ding,
A khutkuak sung muan’ huai hi.

hymns.title: Pasian Kiang Om Ding In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Leitung ah lau na tampi a om hang,
Bang mah kihtak ka nei kei,
Kilang lo Pasian tawh ka om ciang in.
Koi mah peuh pai ding ka lau lo.

Sakkik:
Tua bang in u leh nau,
Pasian lam ah na lung kip hen,
Cik mah hun lungkia lo in,
Pasian kiang i tun’ ciang in
Lung nop na bang zah tak in a om diam.

Verse 2
Haksat na nam kim a hong tun’ hang in
Bang mah kihtak ka nei kei,
Pasian ka kiang ah a hong om peuh leh,
Koi mah peuh pai ding ka lau lo.

Verse 3
Sihna guam thuk sung dong ka tung zong in,
Bang mah kihtak ka nei kei,
Gam nuam ah om ding Topa gam sung ah
Koi mah peuh pai ding ka lau lo.

Verse 4
Mi nam kim in kei hong do hang in ah,
Bang mah kihtak ka nei kei,
Pasian vangliat na a om ka sung ah;
Koi mah peuh pai ding ka lau lo.

hymns.title: Pasian Nang Thusiam Pen
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Aw Pasian Nang thu siam pen,
Deih na teng ki cin’ na,
Nuntak na thu lai gil pen,
Amau sung lut sak in,
Sih ciang om khawm thei ding in,
A thu ciam kip sak in.
Na vangliat na ngaih sun in
Na thupha mu sak in.

Verse 2
Leitung a na om lai in,
Kana khua na pai lai,
Kiten’ na pawi va sim in,
Tui leengah na suak sak,
Tu a mopi na pawi zong,
Thupha hong pia in la,
Amau deih na bang piang hen,
Na min ki pahtawi hen.

Verse 3
Nangmah hong muan’ theih na’ng un,
Pasian aw hong huh in,
Hak sat na thuak na te ah
Nang mah’n hong om pih in,
Amau nuntak na bei in,
Leitung nusia ta leh,
A tawntung hong ompih in,
Na inn ah hong pi in.

hymns.title: Pasian Nasemte Aw, Na Topa’n Gen Khia Zo
hymns.title_en: Ye Servants of God, Your Master Proclaim
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Pa na semte aw, gamlapi zeel un,
Topa’n thang sak hi, Lamdang Ama min
Na khempeuh a zo min Zei su a hi hi.
A ma gam in zai a na khempeuh uk hi.

Verse 2
Tha hat Pasian in gum ding van pan uk,
Amah’n hong zuan hi, A kiang i om hi.
Mi hon tampi’n zong zawh-na la sa uh hi.
Ei hong gum Kumpipa Zeisu hi, ci hi.

Verse 3
Kumpi tokhom tung To gumpa Pasian,
Vekpi in phat hi, A Tapa phat hi.
Vantung mite’n zong Zeisu a phat uh hi.
Tuuno mai bok in, Amah a bia uh hi.

Verse 4
Ei zong phat tek ni, A vang liatna thu,
A min than’ na thu, A pilna, hatna,
Phatna leh thupha tawh i phat tek ding hi.
Van pan vantung mi’n tawntung itna phat hi.

hymns.title: Pasian Nun Na Hong Pia’n
hymns.title_en: Breathe on Me, Breath of God
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Pasian nun’na hong pia’n,
Hin-na thak hong dim in,
Nang deih bang hong deihsak thei in,
Nang bawl bang bawl ding in.

Verse 2
Pasian nun’na hong pia’n,
Lungsim siang ka neih dong,
Nang tawh sin khat lung khat suah dong,
Bawl khawm, thuak khawm ding in.

Verse 3
Pasian nun’na hong pia’n,
Nang mi ka hih khit dong,
Leitung na khat a hi kei sung,
Na thu mei kuang hen.

Verse 4
Pasian nun’na hong pia’n,
Si ngei nawn lo ding in,
Nang tawh hong nung ta khawm sak in,
Hin’ tawntung na gam ah, Amen.

hymns.title: Pasian Phatna
hymns.title_en: Praise God, from whom All Blessings Flow
hymns.lyrics:
Thupha khempeuh hong pia Pasian
Phat un, leitung mi khempeuh aw
Phat un, vantung mi honpi’n zong;
Pa, Ta le Kha Siangtho.

hymns.title: Pasian Tapa’n Gal Do Hi
hymns.title_en: The Son of God Goes Forth to War
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kumpi pa lukhu ngah na ding,
Pasian Tapa’n do ding.
A dial khai na kilak ding hi.
A nung kua in zui hiam?
Dah na a thuak hang thum lo in
Gim na a zo thei mi,
Leitung singlamteh pua te in
A nung a zui uh hi.

Verse 2
Bawl siat thuak pen nung zui khat in
Han gal khat mu thei hi.
Topa vantung khua ah mu a
“Hong gum in” ci’n ngen hi.
Topa sih laitak a gal te
A mawhna a phel bang
A that te’ aa ding thu ngen ta
Ama nung kua’n zui hiam?

Verse 3
A teel sa sawm le nih tung ah
Kha Siangtho hong tum hi.
A mau upna a liat man in
Pasian in a gum hi.
Bawl siat na tampi thuak ta leh
Sahang kih ta lo hi.
Sih na thuak ding lu a su hi
Amau nung kua’n zui hiam?

Verse 4
Mi siangtho te tampi, tangval
Nungak leh nu leh pa
Puan paak silh in Zeisu mai ah
Lungdam na la hong sa.
Launa, nasep na, gim na in
Vantung lam kahto hi.
Topa amau nung zuih na ding
Komau Nong huh ding hi.

hymns.title: Pasian Vangliatna Ka Phatnuam Hi
hymns.title_en: Oh Could I Speak the Matchless Worth!
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong gum Topa tung ah a taang
A lian tawntung mahmah a vaang
Phat ding kah to thei leng,
Vantung leng to in gawsem tawh
A lamdang la ka sa ding ta
Gabela dem nuam ing
Gabela dem nuam ing

Verse 2
Mawhna pan hong tat khiat na’ngin
Zeisu’n A si hong bua zo hi
Pasian lungdam na’ng in
A ma vaanglian a siangthona
A demzo om kei, A siamna
La pha sa tawntung ni.
La pha sa tawntung ni.

Verse 3
A sang vantung tokhom tungah
Tu in a om hong uk Topa
Zeisu a hong itna
A ngaih mah mah la awte tawh
A vang lian phatna la sakna
Keimah ka hilh ding hi.
Keimah ka hilh ding hi.

Verse 4
Lungdam huai Ama maitangpi
Hong mu in ci’n a hong sap ni
A hong tung lai ding hi
Hong it manin zawhna ngah a
Hong gum Zeisu ka u kiangah
Ka om tawntung ding hi.
Ka om tawntung ding hi.

hymns.title: Pasian’ Hong Hehpihna Thupha
hymns.title_en: I Know Whom I Have Believed
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Pasian hong hehpih na thupha
Kei kiang hong tun’ theih na,
Ka kilawm loh pi hong deih na,
Bang hang hiam thei zo ke’ng.

Sakkik:
A hih hang ka up Pa ka thei hi,
Amah muan’ huai hi ke’n ka thei zo hi,
Ama tung ka piaksa te zong
Kem zo ding hi tua ni dong.

Verse 2
Hong honkhia zo thei hih upna
Kei tung a hong piak na,
A thu um leng lung nop theih na,
Bang ci bang hiam thei ke’ng.

Verse 3
Kha Siangtho in mi lungsim hei,
Mawhna hong phawk sak thei,
Zeisu hong mu sak, um sak thei,
Bang ci bang hiam thei ke’ng.

Verse 4
Topa mai ke’n ka muh ma in
A pha a sia tuah ding
Gentheihna ding nopsak na ding,
Bang ka sunsiah thei ke’ng.

hymns.title: Pasian’ Itna Ngaihsun In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
I lung ngaih tawntung ding in ah
Topa Pasian it na
Mawhna a lian i neih napi
“Tate aw,” hong ci hi.

Sakkik:
En un Topa Pasian in
“Tate aw,” hong cih na
Pasian tate i tang ding hi.
En un Topa Pasian in
Ei hong it thupha phat na.

Verse 2
Topa tawh ki nai theih na ding
Zei-su a si luang sak,
“Ka ta it te aw,” ci’n hong sam
A ang sung i khawl ding.

Verse 3
Nung ciang i min bang ci than’ ding
Tu’n kithei nai lo hi.
Topa Zeisu hong kum kik ciang
Amah i sun ding hi.

Verse 4
Tua thu a lawpte khempeuh in
I Topa bang ding hi.
Sihna a zo minthang Topa
Mai mu ding in a pha.

hymns.title: Pasian’ Kha Siangtho Hong Kum Suk In La
hymns.title_en: Spirit of God, Descend Upon My Heart
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Pasian’ Kha Siangtho, hong kum suk in la
Ka lungsim siang semsem ding hong heii in;
Ka zawn’ khal na hong hehpih suk in la,
Nang kong it ding bang in hong it sak in.

Verse 2
Kong it ding Nong deih, ka To Pasian in,
Pil na, thatang, kha, lungsim khempeuh tawh;
Nang ma singlamteh hong beel thei sak in,
Nang mai hong zong in hong mu zo sak aw.

Verse 3
Nong nai tawntung na kei hong pawk sak in;
Lungsim sung lem loh na lung muan’ lah na,
Nial nop na lungsim te hong zo sak in;
Hong ngak zo sak in thu nget ngah loh na.

Verse 4
Van mite bang Nang kong it theih na’ng in
Ka pumpi’n itna siang hong zen sak in,
Na Kha Siangtho sung kei hong phum ta in,
Nang itna ka sung mei bang lum sak in.

hymns.title: Pawlpi A Bul Zeisu Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Pawlpite a bul in ah
I Topa Zeisu hi.
A si leh a thu in ah
Pawlpi hong bawl zo hi.
A si siangtho piang ding in
Vantung pan hong kum hi.
Hong bua a si’n hong lei a
Hin’ na ding a hong si.

Verse 2
Mi lak pan hong teel khia a
Pum khat hong bang sak hi.
Pasian thu tawh hong suak suk
Amah khat bek om hi.
Zeisu a min siangtho in
Tua min bek a phat hi.
Muan na lam et na khat bek
Phat na’ng a hah kat hi.

Verse 3
Pawlpi sung kilem loh na
Thusia a om ciang in
Lawki te’n hong ko ding a
Hong sim mawh hang in ah
Mi siangtho hong cing lai in
“Sawtpi lo ding” a ci.
Zan in hong kheng khuavak ciang
Nopna hong tung ding hi.

Verse 4
Hong bawksia thei galkap te
Pawlpi te’n a do leh
Bei ngei lo nopsak na pi
A ngah ding uh hi ve.
A pha bel mahmah nate
A muh uh ciang in ah
Lungdam na a lianpi te
A ngah ding uh in pha.

hymns.title: Pha Bel Zeisu Aw
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Pha bel Zeisu aw,
Na khempeuh na uk hi.
Pasian leh mihing ta na hi.
Nangmah ka muang hi,
nangmah ka phat hi.
Ka kisak theih na ding na hi.

Verse 2
Pawn pha mahmah hi,
Tulak zong a pha thei.
Tuk lai amau te hing lai hi.
Dahna thuak mite la sa sak Zeisu
Na khempeuh sang a pha zaw hi.

Verse 3
Ni taang a pha mahmah
Kha taang a pha zaw hi.
Aksi te zong et ding hoih hi.
Van a na khempeuh sang in Zeisu in
A pha zaw in a taang thei hi.

hymns.title: Pha Takpi Do In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A pha takpi in na do in
Zeisu’n lung khauh na hong pia ding
Nun’tak na pha takpi lem a
A hi ding nang ma lungdam na.

Verse 2
Pasian upna tawh kidem in,
Dak to, Ama maitang en in.
Nun’tak na lampi a om hi.
Zeisu’n lampi leh nuam na hi.

Verse 3
Lung man’na paai in la um in,
Zeisu in hong hehpih ding hi.
Nuam in maung in la, Zeisu in
Nangma nun’tak na hi, thei in.

Verse 4
Tha zawng kei in na nuam in la
Zeisu kiang mi pha na hi a
A thu na up leh Zeisu in
Nangma deih na a thei ding hi.

hymns.title: Phat Un Phat Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Phat un, phat un, ei te hong hon thupha Zeisu,
Sa un, sa un hong itna thangsak un;
Dawn un, dawn un vantung mi a lian bel te aw,
A min siangtho phatawi in liansak un.
Tuu cing bang in Zeisu’n naupang te cing in
Ama ang ah tawi hi sun ni loh in.
Phat un, phat un, A liat na pha dem zo om lo;
Phat un, phat un, nuam na la tawh phat un.

Verse 2
Phat un, phat un, ei te hong tan thupha Zeisu,
Gim na sih na ei mawhna hang thuak hi;
Dawn un, dawn un, Singlamteh thuak Topa Zeisu,
Suahtak na ding lamet na Suangpi hi.
Ei te’ dah na hong puaksak Zeisu hi a,
Bei thei lo hi, lamdang hat hong Itna.
Phat un, phat un, A liat na pha dem zo om lo;
Phat un, phat un, nuam na la tawh phat un.

Verse 3
Phat un, phat un, ei te hong tan thupha Zeisu,
Amah phat na’n vantung innpi thawn hi;
Maang tawntung ta ei te hong hon Topa Zeisu,
Kamsang, Siampi, Kumpi za ngah ta hi.
Khazih hong kum ciang leitung zo gawp ding a,
Ukna vangliatna khempeuh Ama aa.
Phat un, phat un, A liat na pha dem zo om lo;
Phat un, phat un, nuam na la tawh phat un.

hymns.title: Sawm Kua Leh Kua
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tuu khum na inn sung ah gal muang tak in,
Tuu sawm kua leh kua te om hi,
Gamlak mual tung ah khat Mang thang a tua tuu;
Tuu buk tawh ki gam la mah mah hi.
Gam sim tham gam daih na tulak mual lak ah,
Tuucing migi pa kep loh in om hi.
Tuucing migi pa kep lo in om hi.

Verse 2
Topa tuu sawm kua leh kua te om lai;
Tua teng pha zo sa lo na maw?
Tuucing migi pa lungkim dek nai lo hi.
Gam la pi ka man’ suah hang in ah,
Lam hak sat na mual lak, ken lak hi ta leh,
Ka man’ suah sa ka tuu va zong ding ci;
Ka man’ suah sa ka tuu va zong ding ci.

Verse 3
Tua thupha kua mah in thei kim nai kei,
A hak sat na ki thei lo hi.
A muh kik mateng a zon’ kawikawi na in;
Khuazin’ khuamial a zawt zawt na thu,
Gam lak gam lapi ah, a ham aw za a,
A cimawh a si ding a om mu hi,
A cimawh a si ding a om mu hi.

Verse 4
Mual tung khuadam huihpi guahpi lak ah
Ken lak kawl lak ahih hang in,
Vantung kongpi pan in hong kiko khia a,
A mang sa ka tuu mu kik ing ci,
Vantung mi te in zong; tokhom kiim vel ah
Nuam un, Topa’n tuu man mu zo ci hi.
Nuam un, Topa’n tuu man mu zo ci hi.

Verse 5
Topa a si lam tawntung ah kia in,
Tua si in mual tung lam hong lak,
A gam mang tua tuuno aa ding hong luang hi;
Tuucing pa in hong ciah pih kik ding
Ka Topa aw, na khut te liam gawp zo a,
Amau te tuzan ling in sun gawp zo.
Amau te tuzan ling in sun gawp zo.

hymns.title: Sem Un Khua Hong Mial Ding Hi
hymns.title_en: Work, for the Night is Coming
hymns.lyrics:
Key : F

Verse 1
Sem un, khua hong mial ding hi;
Zingsang tungin sem un,
Zing dai nom lai in sem un,
Khua tung lai sem un;
Vai ham saan’ ciang zong sem un,
Ni sa sung zong sem un;
Mihing nasep ki zawh hun,
Zan hong tung ding hi.

Verse 2
Sem un, khua hong mial ding hi.
Sun ni taan’ lai sem un,
Khuavak lai teng hah kat un,
Om ding hi, khawl hun;
A hun bei khong sak kei un,
Na manpha khat sem un;
Mihing nasep nawn loh hun,
Zan hong tung ding hi.

Verse 3
Sem un, khua hong mial ding hi;
Ni kai ciang zong sem un,
Ni zang kimuh lai sem un,
Ni’n hong kheng ding tu’n;
Hong taang kik nawn loh ding hun,
Ni tum siang dong sem un,
Khuamial kuan in zong sem un,
Tawp hong hun ding hi.

hymns.title: Sep Ding Ka Tavuan
hymns.title_en: A Charge to Keep I Have
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Sep ding ka neih ta vuan,
Pasian min than’ sak ding,
Gum khia thei si ngei lo Kha khat,
Vantung ah ka bulh ding.

Verse 2
Tu hun ka kipia ding,
Hong sap na ka sang ding,
Ka hih theih khempeuh ka zang ding,
Ka Topa deih bang in.

Verse 3
Nang hong iplah sak in,
Na muh na sung hing sak’n,
Aw, Na nasem pa, ki ging sa’n,
Sazian lak ding om sak’n.

hymns.title: Si A Khut Guak Masuan Ding Maw
hymns.title_en: Must I Go and Empty Handed
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Si a khut guak masuan ding maw,
Topa mu ding hi bang in;
A’ na ni khat beek zong sem lo,
Puak ding bang mah keng lo in.

Sakkik:
Si ding a, khut guak masuan in
Hong Honpa’ mai mu ding maw;
Amah dawn na ding mi khat zong
Tonpih lo guak pai ding maw.

Verse 2
Sih ding kihta ka hi kei hi
Topa in hong hon zo tah;
Ahih hang in guak pai ding pen
Ngaihsut ciang sin lung kha lah.

Verse 3
Mawhna sung aa mawk bei kum teng
Khat vei sam kik thei leng maw,
A vekpi in Topa pia in
A’ deih bang mang nuam sing maw.

Verse 4
Hahkat un, ding un, misiang te,
Sun lai na citak in sem;
Sihna zan in hong phak ma in
Mi ngah na’ng sep theih lai sem.

hymns.title: Si Sungah Vangliatna Om
hymns.title_en: There is Power in The Blood
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Na mawh van gik pan na suakta ding hiam?
Si sung, si sung vangliatna om hi.
Siat na tung ah nang na gual zo ding hiam?
Si sung vanglian lamdang om hi.

Sakkik:
Si sung vanglian, vanglian lamdang om
Tuuno sisan sung ah
Si sung vanglian, vanglian lamdang om
A manpha Tuuno si sung ah.

Verse 2
Na kiphatsak pan na suakta ding hiam?
Si sung, si sung vangliatna om hi.
Siangtho ngah ding Kalani tui zaun in
Si sung vanglian lamdang om hi.

Verse 3
Vuk sang in na paak zaw mah mah ding hiam?
Si sung, si sung vangliatna om hi.
Nuntak na tui sung mawh na nin siang ta
Si sung vanglian lamdang om hi.

Verse 4
Na Kumpi Zeisu’ na nasem ding hiam?
Si sung, si sung vangliatna om hi.
Nisim Amah phatna na sa ding hiam?
Si sung vanglian lamdang om hi.

hymns.title: Siangtho, Siangtho, Siangtho
hymns.lyrics:
Siangtho, siangtho, siangtho,
i Topa; Siangtho, siangtho
siangtho vantung i zin Pa.
Amen.

hymns.title: Siangtho, Siangtho, Siangtho!
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Siangtho, siangtho, siangtho! A lian pen To Pasian!
Zingsang tungin phatna la kong sak to ding uh hi.
Siangtho, siangtho, siangtho! Hehpih thei a vaanglian
Thum kigawmna siangtho thupha Pasian!

Verse 2
Siangtho, siangtho, siangtho! Na mi siang khempeuh in,
Kham lukhute suah khia in Nangmah hong bia uh hi.
Vantung mihingte in, Nangma maiah kunin
Tawn tung Pasian Nang mah hong bia uh hi.

Verse 3
Siangtho, siangtho, siangtho! Khuamial hong liah hang in,
Mawhna mit in, Na vaanglian hong mu thei lo hangin
Nangmah bek Na siangtho, Kuamah’n hong ban zo lo
Na vaangliatna It na le sian’ tho na.

Verse 4
Siangtho, siangtho, siangtho! A lian pen To Pasian!
Leitung tuitung, Vantungah Na min Kiphat ding hi.
Siangtho, siangtho, siangtho! Hehpih thei a vaanglian!
Thum kigawmna siantho thupha Pasian!

hymns.title: Siantho Nang Hun Zang In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Sian’ tho na’ng hun zang in, Thu ngen zel zel in.
A ma sung ah om in, A Thu’n kivaak in.
Pasian’ Tate pawl in, A nang te huh in;
Na khat na hih ciang in Dong khial ngei kei in.

Verse 2
Sian’ tho na’ng hun zang in, Mi a kin zong in.
Zeisu bek tawh om in, Hun tampi zang in.
A mah na sut na’ng in Et teh tawntung in;
A ma lim lang sak in Nang’ tat na pan in.

Verse 3
Sian’ tho na’ng hun zang in, Hong pi na zui in.
A mai ah tai kei in, Bang a ci zong in.
Na nuam na dah zong in Topa mah zui in;
Zeisu en tawntung in Ama thu muang in.

Verse 4
Sian’ tho na’ng hun zang in, Lung hi dide in
Ngaihsut a nam kim in, Amah uk sak in.
Kha siangtho tua bang in Kikai sak le cin,
Vantung nasem ding in Siam ding sawt lo in.

hymns.title: Sihna Gun Gal Khatah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu si in hong sawp siang hi.
I khawm ding sih na gun gal ah
Natna hong tun’ kik ding nai lo
Nuam na thu kikum in om ni.
Sihna gungal khat ah.

Sakkik:
Sihna gun gal khat ah,
Sihna gun gal khat ah,
Sihna gun gal khat ah
I tung ding hong nai ta
I tung ding hong nai ta,
I tung ding hong nai ta,
I tung ding hong nai ta
Sihna gun gal khat ah.

Verse 2
Dahna hong tun’ ding ka lau lo
Up na’n ka mu vantung ka en.
Ka za hi vantung mi’n la sa.
Khitui khempeuh Topa’n nul khin
Sihna gun gal khat ah.

Verse 3
A it te tawh ki khop nuam na
Bang aw ka za ding hiam tua ah
Ka lungsim hong vut hong tho sak
Na dang deih na tua mun mang sak
Sihna gun gal khat ah.

Verse 4
Topa hong hilh bang ka zuih na
Lungdam ka ngah a kicin’ na
Khawl ngei lo in ka phat ding hi.
Khitui khempeuh hong nul sak hi.
Sihna gun gal khat ah.

hymns.title: Singlamteh Ah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa’ min leh Ama thu ah
Ka mai zum ngei kei ding;
Ama Thu le A singlamteh
Ka pahtawi ngit nget ding.

Sakkik:
Singlamteh! Singlamteh’ khuavak ka muh cil na
Ka lung sung a van gik teng bei khin na;
A thu ka up ciang khua ka mu thei ta.
Tu in ka lung a dam tawntung ta.

Verse 2
Zeisu ka Pasian min ka thei,
Tua min bek hi kei muan;
Hong mai zum sak ngei lo ding kei,
Lam et na A hong guan.

Verse 3
Ama thuciam kip tawntung a,
A khut sung ka piak teng
Amah’n phatak na kem ding ta,
A hun a tun’ ma teng.

Verse 4
Tua ciang A Pa Pasian’ mai ah
Ka min hong sam ding a
Jerusalem khua thak sung ah
Om na hong pia ding ta.

hymns.title: Singlamteh Dial Peina
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kumpi pa galkap te’n a et ding in ah
Dial pei khat a kilak hi.
Gupna ngah mi te’n la a sak khawm laitak
Hih dial na sang sak ding hi.

Sakkik:
Pai ta un ,mai nawt un,
Zeisu aa ding khempeuh pai un,
Hahkat na sem un, la sa un
Zeisu Kumpi pa’n koih un.

Verse 2
Galkap te in tui bang tam a om hang in
Dial pei na na lak sak un.
Dial pei na nuai ah Topa galkap bang in
Lau lo in na do ta un.

Verse 3
Leitung tuitung, mite om na khempeuh ah
Lungdam na thu za sak un.
Topa in Ama thu a umte lak na’ng
Dial pei na tangthu hilh un.

Verse 4
A ki nai na khua a vaak laitak in ah
Kumpi pa a galte in
A tai uh ama singlamteh na in ah
Leitung ah a maang ding hi.

hymns.title: Singlamteh Galkap Ka Hi Hiam
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Singlamteh galkap ka hi hiam
Topa’ nungzui hi hiam?
Ama nasep na ding in ah,
Ka maizum thei ding hiam?

Sakkik:
Kei tang ding a si mipa
A min pha tawh ka do ding
Singlamteh kapua hang in ah
Zawh na lukhu ngah ding.

Verse 2
Mi dang te’n nop na ngah ding in
Sih dong in a do hi.
Paak tawh ki bawl lupna tung ah
Van a kipua ding hiam.

Verse 3
Gal do ding gal te a om hiam
Tul luan’ na thuak ding hiam
Leitung git loh na in Pasian
Kiang hong paipih ding hiam.

Verse 4
Mang ding in ah ka kido na’ng
Hong hang sak in Topa
Nangma thupha’n hong huh ta in
Gimna ka thuak ciang in.

hymns.title: Singlamteh Ka Kipakna Hi
hymns.title_en: In the Cross of Christ of I Glory
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Singlamteh ka kipak na hi,
A hun tawh kisia lo hi;
Siangtho tangthu khempeuh te’ vaang,
Zeisu’ singlamteh kiim taang.

Verse 2
Nuntak dah na’n hong phak cinag in,
Lawm pa’n in hong khem lau ciang in,
Singlam teh’n hong khem ngei lo hi,
Lungnop nuam na hong pia hi.

Verse 3
Lungdam na ni hong taan’ ciang in
Itna khuavak taan’ ciang in,
Singlamteh vaang taang in ka ni
Hong taang phasak tuan lai hi.

Verse 4
Lungdam na thupha na zak ciang,
Hong pai in, ci’n hong sam,
Upna tawh A si sung bual leng,
Vuk bang hong ngo sak ding.

hymns.title: Singlamteh Kiang Kong Pai Hi
hymns.title_en: I Am Coming to the Cross
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Singlamteh kiang kong pai hi,
Tha leh sum lo mittaw pi,
Na dang bangmah man lo pi;
Hotna cing ka zong ding hi.

Sakkik:
Topa, Nangmah kong muang zo,
Singlamteh tung si Tuuno;
Na singlamteh kong beel zo,
Hong hon aw, tu’n hong hon aw.

Verse 2
Nang kong lung gulh na sawt hi;
Ka gitloh sawt lua zo hi,
Zeisu in damtak hong ci;
“Na mawhna Kong sawp ding hi.”

Verse 3
Ka vekpi’n kong kipia ta;
Ka lawm, ka hun, ka neih sa,
Ka vekpi’n ka pum ka kha,
Nang aa ka hi khin nuam ta.

Verse 4
Na thuciam te ka muang hi;
Na si pha tu’n ka phawk hi,
Ka lungsim ka niamkhiat hi,
Nangmah tawh ka si khawm hi.

hymns.title: Singlamteh Kiangah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Singlamteh kiang ah om na
Kalani mual tung ah
Nuam na hong pia ciktui in
Mi teng aa ding luang ta.

Sakkik
:
Singlamteh, singlamteh,
Ka kisak theih na hi
Vantung khua ka tun’ ciang in
A nuam ka ngah na’ng hi.

Verse 2
Singlamteh kiang ka ding a
Hehpih na’n hong mu a.
A taang zingsol aksi in
Ka kiimkot a taang ta.

Verse 3
Zeisu singlamteh kiang ah
Ngak a kong om ciang ah
Singlamteh a liim nuai ah
Hong gum hong om sak in.

Verse 4
Singlamteh kiang ah ka om
A thu um tawntung ning
Gun gal khat a kham khua in
Ka tun’ mateng ngak ning.

hymns.title: Singlamteh Tung Kikilh
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kei taang ding a si nuam mi pa khat hiah om hi,
Ka kha ginalo nung ta sak ding,
Singlamteh tawn lampi khat Amah’n zui nuam hi,
Ka mawhna teng hong puak sak ding in.

Sakkik:
Singlamteh tung kilh hi Singlamteh tung kilh hi,
Aw, bangzah in Amah’n gim na thuak!
Khua ul sisan suak in,
Zeisu’n singlamteh pua!
Ka mawhna teng singkhuam tung pua khin!

Verse 2
Amah dik in hong it a, kei aa ding nuam hi.
Ka lungsim hong sawp siang sak ding hi,
Hih hang mawh sak na om lo ka suak ta ka thei,
Kei mawhna taang ding sing tung kilh hi.

Verse 3
Ama tung ah kipia ning, kikhen nawn kei ning,
A nisim lungdam A nung zui ning,
Ka lung sung la sa in ka kam tawh zong phat ning,
Ka mawhna teng pua khia khin zo hi.

hymns.title: Singlamteh’n Inn Lam Hong Hilh
hymns.title_en: The Way of the Cross Leads Home
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Singlamteh lam tawn in ka ciah kul ding hi,
Tua lo lam dang om lopi;
Tua khuavak kongpi tung thei ngei kei ning,
Singlamteh lam ka khialh khak leh.

Sakkik:
Singlamteh’n inn lam hong hilh,
Singlamteh’n inn lam hong hilh,
Mai lam ka pai ciang in nuam semsem ding,
Singlamteh in inn lam hong hilh.

Verse 2
Singlamteh phung ka van teng tolh khia khin hi,
Topa mai ka muh ciang in;
Lung taii tak tua lam tawn ding kong kipan,
Ka lung sung phatna tawh kidim.

Verse 3
Si ki theh na lam tawh ka ciah suak ding hi,
Topa tot sa lampi mah;
A dawn dong in kei ka kahtoh theih leh,
Pasian inn sung ka kha teeng ding.

hymns.title: Sung Lawh Tang Bang Pha Lai Lungah Om Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tung Pasian tawldam tang bang a pha bel in
Lai lung sung khuam bang kip na ding in suan in
Zeisu ma mawh a lum bang bel te siangtho
Sung lawh tang bang pha lai lung ah om zo hi.
Sung lawh tang bang pha lai lung ah om zo hi.

Verse 2
Nang tawh om khawm zo lai lung muang mawh nawn ke’n
Kei in na tung Pasian ka hi nang kong sam
Pian’ dang bel tawh tui bang a dim ka bang zal
Na zai tha leh na lai lung kip sak ding hi’ng.
Na zai tha leh na lai lung kip sak ding hi’ng.

Verse 3
Dam tui kul thuk sung a nang na kum ding pawh
Tang khuang bang kong kho ham bang vai kong bawl lo
Phamna tawh zing dai bang na kipelh na’ng in
Dam tui bang na sian’ na ding kei ka om hi.
Dam tui bang na sian’ na ding kei ka om hi.

Verse 4
Tatsa sial bang et nang kam-mei sung tung ding
Hehnepna tui bang kicing kong lang sak ding
Kam-mei thul guah bang thuak loh na’ng hong kem ning
Vai vut a suak sa kham bang kong piang sak ding.
Vai vut a suak sa kham bang kong piang sak ding.

Verse 5
Kum khua sawt a tum bang vuai dong ka mite,
Tui bang kiam lo mu bang ngah kum khua om ding
Na pa ang leh sum leh sam a kang zong in
Ka ang lai-ah kiptak in von bang sia ning.
Ka ang lai-ah kiptak in von bang sia ning.

hymns.title: Tanglai A A Lian Bel Topa
hymns.title_en: O God, Our Help In Ages Past
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tanglai a a lian bel Topa
Nung ciang a lawp na hi
Tui kilok ciang na om na sung
Hehpih in hong liah hi.

Verse 2
Topa Pasian tokhom nuai ah
Mi siangtho te’n nuam sa.
Na khut tawh na liah na, kep na
Bit bel ding hi Topa.

Verse 3
Lei leh vanpi a kip kei zong
Lei pumpi Nang tang hi.
Topa a kip Pasian na hi.
Na om pel lo ding hi.

Verse 4
Kum tul kum then Topa mai ah
Nitak om ngei lo hi.
Khuamial na in a leeng mang a
Zingsang khuavak bang hi.

Verse 5
Tuikhu bang hin’ na bei thei hi
Manlang in top thei hi.
Zan, nitak, zingsang ciang mang hi
I mang tawh kibang hi.

Verse 6
Tanglai a a lian bel Topa
Nung ciang a lawpna hi.
Gimna thuak ciang hong kem pha in
Na inn ah hong koih in.

hymns.title: Tanglai Pate’ Upna
hymns.title_en: Faith of Our Fathers! Living Still
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tanglai pate’ upna hing lai,
Mei sung, humpi kua sung khiat thuak;
Tua zah upna lian i zak ciang,
Aw bang zah in i lung dam hiam?
Pate’ upna , upna siangtho!
Ei zong sih dong I thuak ngam ding.

Verse 2
Tanglai pate’n kol bulh thuak in,
Thong sung khuamial mun ah ki koih,
Hih bang lungsim siang tak tawh om,
Tua bang mi’ tapa i sun ding!
Pate’ upna , upna siangtho!
Ei zong sih dong I thuak ngam ding.

Verse 3
Upna i cih pate’ up bang ,
Tual leh gal kido na sung ah;
Bang hang in tel tak theih na tawh,
Gitna itna kam mal tawh lak,
Pate’ upna , upna siangtho!
Ei zong sih dong I thuak ngam ding.

hymns.title: Tangthu Hong Gen In
hymns.title_en: Tell Me the Old, Old Story
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tang lai thu hong gen ta in.
A kimu ngei lo na.
Zeisu leh a vanglian ci’n
Amah in hong itna
Tangthu tel tak hong gen in
Naupang te hilh bang in.
Hong hilh in ka gim zo hi,
Ka khial gawp khin ta hi.

Sakkik:
Tua tangthu hong gen ta in.
Tua tangthu hong gen ta in.
Tua tangthu hong gen ta in.
Zensu leh hong itna.

Verse 2
Tua tangthu dam tak gen in.
Ka theih baih na ding in
Amah in hong tat khiat na
Mawh kiphel na ding in.
Tua tangthu hong gen kik in
Ka mangngilh theih loh na’ng
Daitui bang zingsang om hang
Sun ciang in mang thei hi.

Verse 3
Tua tangthu damdam gen in.
Nuamna aw tawh gen in.
Mawhna pan hong phel na ding
Zeisu hong gum phawk ning.
Tua tanthu gen laitak in
Gim na khat hong tun’ leh
Hehnep na hong pia ding ci’n
Tu’n tangthu gen ta in.

Verse 4
Lawkite nopsak na in
Vantung gim na om hi.
Kei tang ding lung hihmawh leh
Tua tangthu hong gen in.
Hong zolna zui dek ciang in
Hih leitung nopsak na
Zeisu’n hong len kip ding hi,
Tangthu om bang gen in.

hymns.title: Tapa Taimang
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong ciah’n! Hong ciah’n!
Na lungsim gim zo hi,
Lampi zong mial zo hi,
Lau huai in gam dai ta,
Aw a taimang ta, hong ciah’n,
Aw, hong ciah’n.

Sakkik:
Hong ciah’n. Aw hong ciah in.

Verse 2
Hong ciah’n! Hong ciah’n!
Hong ngak in, kong vil uh,
Kongpi ah ka ding ah,
liim in hong khengkheng ta,
Aw a taimang ta, hong ciah’n,
Aw, hong ciah’n.

Verse 3
Hong ciah’n! Hong ciah’n!
mawh sak na dahna pan,
Mawhna, mai zum na pan
khempa’ nuih mai na pan,
Aw a taimang ta, hong ciah’n,
Aw, hong ciah’n.

Verse 4
Hong ciah n! Hong ciah’n
Nek ding an tampi om,
Vaitut na nuam zong om,
lawmte tawh kipawl na,
Aw, a taimang ta hong ciah’n!
Aw hong ciah’n!

hymns.title: Tapidaw Khangnote Thupha Piakna
hymns.lyrics:
Pa aw, ka ki khen uh ciang;
Ko lungsim Nang deih bang hi ta hen

Thu Nget Na
Eite khat leh khat I kikhen ciangin
Topa Pasian in, I omna ciat-ah
Hong keem tawntung ta hen. Amen.

hymns.title: Tapidaw Limtak Pai
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tapidaw limtak pai, lau na hong nai,
Lau na, lin’ na sung a khual na zin lai;
A pua ah thang, a sung ah ze et na
Tum kik sak ding, hong zol mawhna sungah
Tapidaw limtak pai, Tapidaw limtak pai,
Tapidaw limtak pai, Lau na hong nai.

Verse 2
Tapidaw nuam in pai, huihpi lak dong,
Ging ngeingai in, mial in a lauhuai hang;
Huihpi leh meeipi hong theng kik pah ding,
Tua ciang na Honpa tawh tawlnga den ding.
Tapidaw nuam in pai, Tapidaw nuam in pai,
Tapidaw nuam in pai, Huihpi lak dong.

Verse 3
Tapidaw ngen in pai, na puk zel hang,
Honpa na koh khialh leh na puk zel ding,
Thu nget na gal van te nang na silh leh
Ze-et na haksa kantan zo ni teh,
Tapidaw ngen in pai, Tapidaw ngen in pai,
Tapidaw ngen in pai, Na puk zel hang.

hymns.title: Tapidaw Mangpha
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
It aw, nuam tak ihmu in tawlnga in;
I Topa dip tung lukham in nei in,
Nang kong it hang,
Topa’n hong it zaw sem
Mangpha! Mangpha! Mangpha!

Verse 2
Naungek bang nuam tak ihmu hit hiat in;
Dahna, kahna te’n nang hong phawng lo ding;
Nang aa a nuam hit hiat ihmut na hi
Mangpha! Mangpha! Mangpha!

Verse 3
Hih leitung ah ni liim a bei mateng;
Topa’n A tuu buk sung hong khop mateng;
Ni vaang taang khuamial a hong bei mateng
Mangpha! Mangpha! Mangpha!

Verse 4
Pasian tokhom mai kimuh kik mateng,
A sia thei lo puan a hong piak mateng,
Tu’n i theih bang in i kitheih mateng
Mangpha ! Mangpha! Mangpha!

Verse 5
Min than’ na thawh kik zing khuavak mateng;
Khazih sung a site thawh kik mateng,
Ginalo bek tawh hong pai kik lo ding,
Mangpha! Mangpha! Mangpha!

hymns.title: Tapidawte Nuam Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tapidaw te nuam un Lungdam in kipak un
Kong thu gen teng na ngai un
Ngai un, tu ni’n Zeisu hong suak hi.
Bawng te sakol te’n bia hi;
Tu in bawngkuang sung ah om hi;
Khazih hong suak hi; Kha zih hong suak hi.

Verse 2
Tapidaw te nuam un Lungdam in kipak un
Ngai un bei ngei lo nuam na
Nuam na nuam na ding Zeisu suak hi;
Vantung kongpi hong zo hi;
Mihing nuamsa tawntung ding hi
A hong suah man in A hong suah man in.

Verse 3
Tapidaw te nuam un Lungdam in kipak un
Sih ding tu in lau nawn lo
Lau lo, hong hon ding Zeisu suak zo
Eite sap loh hong nei lo
Ama innpi sung kua ut lo
Hong hon ding suak zo Hong hon ding suak zo.

hymns.title: Tawldamna Leh Lungdam Ni
hymns.title_en: O Day of Rest and Gladness
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tawldam na leh lungdam ni,
Khuavak na, nuam na ni,
Lung kham na dahna dam sak,
A vaak a hoih pen ni,
Tanglai a kipan tuni
A lian a neu kituak
“Siangtho siangtho siangtho” ci’n
Thum gawm Pasian phat ni.

Verse 2
No khempeuh a pian cil in
Khuavak suak hi, tu ni’n,
Eite hong hon khia Zeisu
Hong hin’ kik ni, tuni;
Gal zo i Topa’n tuni
Hong puak ni, Kha Siangtho;
Tua hi a hih Nipi ni
Thupha nam thum ngah ni.

Verse 3
Tuni in mi namkim tung
Vantung khomun hong tung;
Mi siangtho kikhop na ah
Lungdam na thu kihilh,
A gim a tawl te kisil
Tawldam na lui sung ah;
Lungdam na thupha a vaang
Mi siangte mai ah taang.

Verse 4
Vantung gam mi siangte bang
Hehpih na a dang dang
Tawldam ni Nipi ni pan
A thuapthuap i ngah hi;
Tuni’n phatna kiza hi
Pawlpi mite kam pan;
Phat un thum gawm a siangtho
Pa, Ta leh Kha Siangtho.

hymns.title: Thawh Kik Ni
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ih Topa hong tawh kik ni!
Mun khempeuh ah gen un
A lungdam huai Paisan na,
Topa hong Paisan na,
Sihna pan tawntung nop na,
Leitung pan vantung dong,
Khazih in hong suak ta sak,
Gual zawh na la sa un.

Verse 2
Lungsim khempeuh sian’tho ni,
Thuman i muh theih ni
Tawtung Topa mel phat ni
Thawh kik khua hong vaak hi
Topa kamsung zak kik ni,
Ama aw nem zak na,
Mite aw phatna la sa,
Gual zo Topa phat un.

Verse 3
Vantung khempeuh zong nuam ni,
Leitung in zong phat hen;
Leitung khempeuh gual zawh ni,
Na khempeuh a kim ni
Muh theih muh mawh khempeuh in,
Lungdam na la sa un,
A bei ngei lo lungdam na
Ih Topa hong thawh ni.

hymns.title: Tho In, Tho In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tho in, tho in, Topa’n hong sam in om hi,
Ei ding in, um in, um in Ama thu te.
Pai in, pai in, gen in Jubili kum pawi pi
La in Khazih Topa hong itna thu a pha.

Sakkik:
Sa in, sa in a la,
Hong taang ta hi lam hilh zingsol i tung ah
Pai pai un i mai lam ah
Lam hong hilh, hong hilh hong gum
Topa pi A min, A min thang ki za tawntung hen la
“Hawsiana, Hawsiana,” kiko tawntung ni.
A galkap mite’n ngai un,
Zeisu Topa bek thei ni,
“Haleluiah,” kiko ni pai na teng ah.

Verse 2
Ko in, ko in, sihna pau hong taang a thei lo,
Mite hong tung tuipi hong galkah hi.
Zeel khin gawp hen, leitung khempeuh na pai in la,
Hih om na teng ah kial a zawng mi te om na.

Verse 3
Pasian in nung ta a tawi bang a Na hong gup
Na ding mi mang mual tung khuamial sung ah
Topa gupna na khut kha in tua mi kiangah
Mi mawh hong paipih in Topa Na inn sung ah.

Verse 4
En in, en in, tuciam ni hong nai zo ta hi,
Hong gum Topa a lian bel Kumpi pa
Na khempeuh a zo khin a niam lak khin ding hi.
A lian bel, “Haleluiah,” ci’n kiko ding hi.

hymns.title: Thu Ciamna Pha Muang Ning
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa thu ciam na pha muang tak in om ning
A tawntung in hong gum Topa vang um ning
A min thang hi ci in ah ka ki ko hi.
A thuciam na pha ka muang ding hi.

Sakkik:
Muang in, om ning,
Hong gum Topa Pasian thuciam na pha muang ning,
Muang in, om ning,
Hong gum Topa Pasian thuciam muang ning.

Verse 2
A sia thei lo Topa thu ciam na ka muang
Up khialh man a lau na huih hong hong nun’ hang
Nuntak na’ng a a thupha bel tawh zawh na’ng
A thu ciam na pha ka muang ding hi.

Verse 3
Tu in a thu ciam na muang in ka om hi.
A si pha tawh hong sawp leh ka siang ding hi.
Mawh na sung pan suahtak ding thu ka ngah hi.
A thu ciam na pha ka muang ding hi.

Verse 4
Topa Zeisu na thu ciam na ka muang hi.
A thupha tawh khau bang in hong hen ding hi.
Kha Siangtho tawh dawi mangpa ka zo ding hi.
A thu ciam na pha ka muang ding hi.

hymns.title: Thu Hilh Kiza Lai Topa
hymns.title_en: O God, Thy Summons Still Is Heard
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Galilee tui gei a na thu
Hilhna kiza lai hi.
Mi tampi in Topa hong zuan,
“Hong zui un” na cih ciang.

Verse 2
Mihing lungsim tu ni’n saang in,
Nang sap na a don te.
Amau upna bang bang sang in,
Ki suanna bei sak in.

Verse 3
Tu ni’n dam na tui hong luan’ in,
Gupkhiat na lim lah na’n,
Lungsim mawhna teng suak ta sak,
Na thu tawh sawp siang in.

Verse 4
Mi khempeuh Na mipha suak hen,
Leitung bei hun dongin,
Nang tawh kizop na kip ta hen,
Na min kong phat uh hi. Amen.

hymns.title: Thu Ngetna Hun Pha
hymns.title_en: Tis the Blessed Hour of Prayer
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Thu ngetna hun pha hi a, lungsim i niam khiat ciang,
I lawm le Honpa Zeisu kiang i kikhop ciang
Ama hut na ngah ding muan’ na tawh zuan leng Amah
Tua lai ah va kihel leng, Damna zatui hi pah.

Sakkik:
Thu nget na hun nuam, Hun nuam thu ngetna
Tua lai ah va kihel leng, Dam na zatui hi pah.

Verse 2
Thu ngetna hun pha hi a, ze et na a thuak te,
Honpa kiang ah a dah na uh hong puak uh teh,
Amah’n hong khasiat in, hong paih sak i hak sat na,
Tua lai ah va kihel leng, Damna zatui hi pah.

Verse 3
Thu ngetna hun pha hi a, Honpa a hong pai ciang,
A mite ngai ding in ah Amah hong om ciang,
I hak sat na teng khempeuh i va puak ciang Amah,
Tua lai ah va kihel leng, Damna zatui hi pah.

Verse 4
Thu ngetna hun pha sung ah, A thu pha i nget te,
Pel lo in ngah ding cih kip tak in i up leh
Nopna kidim sung ah bei pah ding i hak sat na,
Tua laiah va ki hel leeng, Damna zatui hi pah.

hymns.title: Thu Ngetna In Lungsim Sung A
hymns.title_en: Prayer is the Soul’s Sincre Desire
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Thunget na in lungsim sung a
Lung gulh tak na a hi;
Mei bang hong lum sak awm sung a
Deihna lian pen a hi.

Verse 2
Khuisatna, khitui luan’ na zong
Thunget na mah a hi;
Pasian lam et toh na bek zong
Thunget na mah a hi.

Verse 3
Mawh nei mi khat lungsim tak tawh
Kisik in phun bek leh,
Vantung mi te’n nuam la ki ko
“En vaw, thu ngen ta veh.”

Verse 4
Thu zui ta ding thunget na in
Hin’ na hu bang a hi;
Thunget na tawh sih kong pan in
Vantung khua ah lut hi.

Verse 5
Nangmah, hin’ na, thuman lampi
Pa kiang tun’ na ding in;
Nangma totsa thunget lampi
Kote zong hong hilh in.

hymns.title: Thum Loin Ngak In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lung gim mi aw, inn nuam om hi
Lung kham na, gim na te gal ah;
Ki khel ngei nawn loh na innpi;
Kua tung nuam lo ding tua lai ah.

Sakkik:
Ngak in, thuak in thum lo in ngak in,
Ngak in, thuak in thum lo in ngak in,
Ngak in, ngak in, Thum lo in ah ngak in.

Verse 2
Leitung ah na thuak ding a hi
Van gik lel a na kun hang in,
En in, na tun’ na ding innpi!
Ngak in lung neem in ah ngak in.

Verse 3
Na lampi ah ling a om leh,
A’ lu tung a khu Pa phawk in;
Lung gim na, dah na na tuah leh,
Nang sang siang zaw Pa’n zong thuak khin.

Verse 4
Sem in, na thuak na , na thum na
Hong zak loh khat beek om lo hi,
Na ngah na ding hi tawldam na;
Lung neem tak in na ngak ding hi.

hymns.title: Thumaan Lamhilh Kha Siangtho
Thumaan Ngam, Hang Ngam In
hymns.title_en: Date to Be Brave, Dare to Be True
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lau lo, hang in, thu maan ngam in,
Thu maan han ciam nang tawh Topa om hi;
Hang tak do in, Na tha khauh sak in,
Khazih’n lam hong lak maan lo bek kik ta’n.

Sakkik:
Do in, galkap siam, do in hang tak;
Khazih’n hong makaih, hong gum ding hi.

Verse 2
Lau lo, hang in, thu maan ngam in,
Pasian na Pa hi, na tung hong cing hi,
Na thuak na the in Na lungsim thei,
Hong hon ding sam in Don lo cih om kei.

Verse 3
Lau lo, hang in, thu maan ngam in,
Na zawh na ding Pasian in tha hong guan’,
Mi dang te huh in Gi tawntung in,
Hong lang pan’ pha pen Na lawm suak sak in.
