hymns.title: Thunget Hun Nuam
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Thunget hun nuam, thunget hun nuam:
Lung kham na pan hong sam khia a,
Ka deih ka sap na a tuamtuam
Ka gen theih hun ka Pa mai ah.
Dahna hong tun’ ciang thu ngen leng
Ka lungsim hong nuam tuam sak a,
Mawhna’n hong zol ciang thu ngen leng
Dawi mang pa thang pan ka suak ta.

Verse 2
Thunget hun nuam, thunget hun nuam:
Va leen’ pih in kei ma thumna,
Keima kha thupha a pia nuam
Thuman a dik Pasian kiang ah,
Keima mai ah um in muang in
Hong pai in, hong cih khit nung sang
Thunget hun nuam hong tun’ sim in
Lung kham na teng A mah suan tang.

Verse 3
Thunget hun nuam, thunget hun nuam:
Kei lungsim hong hehnem lai in
Pasian hong ciam Khanan gam nuam
Luah ding ka leen’ toh ma teng in
Hih ka pumpi puan bang suah a,
Sang ding in tul ngei lo nop tuam,
Ka leen’ toh ciang kha ning mangpha
Thunget hun nuam thunget hun nuam.

hymns.title: Thupha Guah Bang Hong Zu Ding Hi
hymns.title_en: There Shall Be Showers of Blessing
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
“Thupha guah bang hong zu ding hi”
Itna tawh hong ciam bang in;
Tha malh na hun hong tung ding hi,
Hong puak suk ding Topa in.

Sakkik:
Thupha guah zu bang,
Thupha guah i kisam hi;
Hehpih na mal hong kia teei hang,
Hong zu suk hen a tampi.

Verse 2
“Thupha guah bang hong zu ding hi”
Tha hat kik na a manpha;
Hong ging zuazua ding hi, tam pi,
Mual tung, guamsung, mun teng ah,

Verse 3
“Thupha guah bang hong zu ding hi”
Hong buak suk in Topa aw;
Tha thak tu in Nong guan’ ding hi,
Nong ciam sa hong tung sak aw.

Verse 4
“Thupha guah bang hong zu ding hi”
Tu ni’n hong zu ta leh maw;
Zeisu kiang ah thu i ngen hi,
Pulak in Pa kiang i mawh.

hymns.title: Thupha Khuavak Mual Sang Tungah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Thupha khuavak mual sang tung ah
Pasian mite ding un,
Zan khuamial hong liah ma in ah
Mai nawt in ah kuan un,
Mual kuam sung a galte sim ding
Tha neih teng siit kei ni.
I thei hi, leitung zawh na ding
Upna i nei ding hi.

Sakkik:
Upna in zawh na hi,
Upna in zawh na hi;
Upna in zawh na ding hi,
Leitung zawh gawp na ding.

Verse 2
Ama hong itna dial nuai ah
A Thu tem bang zang in,
A zo sa mi siangte’ khap mah
A zui lai ei te in.
Upna tawh huihpi nung ban ah
Galte nawk gawp uh a,
Sihna a zawh na uh upna
Mah, hi lai ei muan’ na.

Verse 3
I ziat, i vei, i kiim kot ah
Galte in hong pang hi.
Noptat maan’ na nusia in ah
Pai un, do ding kuan ni.
Hot khiat na lukhu khu in ah
Thumaan i teeng ding hi.
Lei liing ding hi i khe nuai ah,
I aw’n mual thawn ding hi.

hymns.title: Thupha Theite Hong Pai Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Thupha thei te hong pai un.
Buhphual pai in la sa un.
Sal sung ah kisia thei lo
Buhtang te ki khawm khin zo.
Kicing in deih na khempeuh
Pasian in hong pia leuleu,
Topa biakinn sung tum un,
Buhphual pai na la sa un.

Verse 2
Topa Pasian lo cing pi
Leitung pumpi khempeuh hi.
Lopa te buh lo lai ah
Kihel in min zo ta hi.
Lei leh van bei mateng in
Buh pha a pian’ na ding in
Kote a ding a uk Pa
Topa aw hong hehpih in.

Verse 3
Kote hong la to ding a
Hong pai ning, na cih thupha
Ko in ka thei ciat uh hi.
Gamlak lopa tanghum teng
Mei tawh na hal tum khit ciang
Sal sung ah buh koih ding in
Vantung ah na mihing te
A sawl ding Topa Pasian.

Verse 4
Hong pai in thusiam Topa
Vantung ah mang khempeuh tawh
Vantung pan na mihing te
Hong sawl in ka Topa aw.
A siangtho mihing phate
Buhphual pai na la sak na
A sang vantung innpi ah
A vekpi kikhawm sak in.

hymns.title: Tokhom Tunga Tuuno
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tokhom tunga Tuuno
Kumpi nam kim pia zo;
Ngai un, a ngaih vantung la pi!
La dang teng meng khin hi.
Ka kha aw, tho in la
Nang aa ding hong si Pa
A lian bel Kumpi pa ci in
A phatna la sa in.

Verse 2
Ki itna Kumpi pa;
En un, Ama liam ma
A’ khut, A’ pang kimu lai hi.
Min phatna in tuam hi.
Hih thu lamdang lua hi,
Phawk zawh loh in thuk hi;
Vantung mi’n zong en zolo in
Kun hi nuai lam en in.

Verse 3
Kilemna Kumpi pa;
Gal kido na bei a
Thumna leh phat na’n suah khia in
Vannaui kilem na’ng in
Hong uk tawntung ding a
Vantung khua nuam sung ah
A liam Ama khe kiimkot ah
Paak ki dawn ding ta.

Verse 4
A tawntung a Kumpi,
Hun bawl a uk Mangpi;
Leitung pumpi Na piangsak zo
Gen theih loh Na Siangtho
Hong tan ka Topa aw,
Kei’ tang Nang hong si mawk!
Nang min phat tawp ngei lo ding hi’ng
A tawntung sa ding hi’ng.

hymns.title: Topa A Inn Siangtho Sung Om Hi
hymns.title_en: The Lord Is In His Holy Temple
hymns.lyrics:
Topa A inn siangtho sung om hi,
Topa A inn siang tho sung om hi,
Dai di de in om ta un,
Dai dide in om ta un, A mai uh,
Dai dide’n om ta un, A mai-ah.
Amen.

hymns.title: Topa aw It Huai Na Min Phat Na’ng La!
hymns.title_en: Saviour, Again to Thy Dear Name
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa aw, it huai Na min phat na’ng la
Lungsim kikhat in kong sa lai uh a,
Ko kikhen ma in kong phat khawm uh hi,
Nangma thupha kun in kong ngak uh hi.

Verse 2
Nangma thupha tawh hong ciah sak in la
Na min tawh tuni hong khin sak in la,
Kakam kamuk uh leh komau lungsim
Khial lo na ding in Nang mah’n hong cing kim.

Verse 3
Tuzan khuavak lung nop na hong guan’ in
Khuamial, ko aa ding khuavak suak sak in,
Nang aa ding sun le zan dang lo ma in,
Na tate lau na pan hong kem ta in.

Verse 4
Leitung nu’ntak lai lungnop hong pia in.
Dah hong nem in, hong kipsak tawntung in;
Ko gal do na Nong tawlngak sak tak ciang,
Hong sam in tawntung nop na Nangma kiang.

hymns.title: Topa Aw Ka Nuntakna
hymns.title_en: Take My Life, and Let It Be
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa aw, ka nun tak na
Tang in; siangtho tak zang in;
Itna tawh Nang ma sawl na
Ka khut mang sak, sem sak in,
Ka khut mang sak, sem sak in.

Verse 2
Ka pheiphung hong zang in la
Nang a ding ngal hat sak in;
Ka aw zong Nang tang in la,
Ngaih tak Na min phat sak in.
Ngaih tak Na min phat sak in.

Verse 3
Ka kam ka muk hong zang in,
Na thupha gen theih na ding;
Ka sum ka paai tang khin in,
Neu kha beek hong it kei ning.
Neu kha beek hong it kei ning.

Verse 4
Ka itna teng hong sang in,
Na khe mai ah hong sung ning;
Ka pumpi in hong tang in,
Nang aa bek hi khin den ning.
Nang aa bek hi khin den ning.

hymns.title: Topa Aw Kei Hong Mangngilh Kei In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kei hong Honpa A si luangin
Ka kumpi hong si maw?
Tang tel bang bek kei mah aa ding
A lutang hong zang maw?

Sakkik:
Nang tung kongthuman zawh na’ng in
Topa kei hong huh in;
Kumpi tokhom Na luah ciang in,
Kei hong mang ngilh kei in.

Verse 2
Kei ma git loh na te hang in
Singlamteh tung tau maw.
Lamdang hehpihna le itna,
Bang tawh teh thei ding maw.

Verse 3
Ama pian’ sak mi mawhna hang,
A piang sak Pa Khazih
Hong sih lai tak, khuamial sung ah
Ni a buk mah ding hi.

Verse 4
Kei zong singlamteh ka muh ciang
Zum in ka kiseel diam;
Lungdam na tawh lung neh no in
Ka khi ka luang sak diam.

hymns.title: Topa Aw Nangma Thupha Tawh
hymns.title_en: Lord, Dismiss Us With Thy Blessing
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa aw, Nangma thupha tawh
Dim in hong kikhen sak in;
Nangma itna bang neihna tawh
Hehpihna hong pak sak in.
Tha hong guan’ aw, tha hong guan’ aw
Hih gam mang sung zin lai in

Verse 2
Nangma lungdam thu hang in ah
Nang kong phat uh Topa aw;
Ko lung sung leh gamtat na-ah
Na hot-na gah lang leh maw.
Nang thumaan-ah Nang thumaan-ah
Hong kip tawntung le ung maw.

Verse 3
Leitung pan in Nong sap peuh ciang
Sihna kihta het lo-in
Vantung mite’n hong lenpih ciang
Hong mang ning lungdam takin
Tawntung Na kiang, tawntung Na kiang,
Nangmah tawh hong maang sak in.

hymns.title: Topa Bangzah In Lian
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa Pasian Nangma khut a na bawlsa
Leitung khempeuh ka ngaihsut ciang in ah,
Aksi te mu in, van ging te ka za hi,
Leitung khempeuh ah Na vaang kilang hi.

Sakkik:
Tua ahih ciang, la kong sa hong honpa,
Bang zah Na lian, Bang zah Na lian,
Tua ahih ciang, kong phat hi, Topa aw,
Nang Na lian hi, Nang Na lian hi.

Verse 2
Sing lak ah zong ka vak kawi kawi ciang in ah,
Singkung tung ah vasa ham ngaih ka za,
Mual sang dawn pan guam thuk sung ka et suk ciang,
Lui ging za in huih dam hong nung hiauhiau.

Verse 3
Pasian in ah A Tapa haza lo in,
Hong piak ka ngaihsut ciang um kei phial ing,
Sinlamteh tung kei van lungdam tak pua in,
Si san luang in, ka mawhna hong paih sak.

Verse 4
Kikona tawh, Khazih hong pai kik ciang in,
Hong ciahpih ding, Bang zah ka nuam ding hiam?
Tua ciang kiniam khiatna tawh ka bia ding a,
“Ka Pasian lian hi.” ci’n ka kiko ding.

hymns.title: Topa Hong Ciah Ning
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Pasian kiang pan gam la ka pial,
Tu in hong ciah ing,
Mawhna lam sawt lua ka tawn khial,
Topa hong ciah ing.

Sakkik:
Hong ciah ing, Hong ciah ing,
Vak khia nawn lo ding,
Thupha tawh Nang aa hi ning,
Topa hong ciah ing.

Verse 2
Hunpha tampi mawk bei sak ing,
Tu in hong ciah ing,
Tu’n kap in kisik taktak ing,
Topa hong ciah ing.

Verse 3
Mawhna lam pial, cim tang Topa,
Tu in hong ciah ing,
Muang ning na itna leh thupha
Topa hong ciah ing.

Verse 4
Ka kha cina, ka lung meime
Tu in hong ciah ing,
Hong dip kik in, ka lawpna tha,
Topa hong ciah ing.

hymns.title: Topa Hong Hopih In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Nungta Topa hong hopih in,
Topa aw, Na aw za nuam ing,
Nong zon’ bang in, a mang thang sa,
Cimawh tate hong mu ta in.

Verse 2
Hilh theih na’ng Topa hong hilh in,
A manpha Na gen khiat thu te,
A thuk mahmah mi lung sim sung,
A tun’ dongin hong paipih in.

Verse 3
Na thu tawh kei hong dim ta in,
A dimlet dong hong guan’ in la,
Mit ngei lo Na thu taang sak in,
Na itna leh phatna tak in.

Verse 4
Hong zangin, Topa hong zangin,
Deih hun, deihna peuh hong zangin,
Na hehpihna mai ka muh dong,
Na min than’ na hong hawm ta in.

hymns.title: Topa Hong Pai Ding
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa hong pai ding, nung ciang in;
Kithawi in hong pai ciang!
Van inn nuam pan in hong pai ding;
Kithawi in hong pai ding!
Amah thumaan i Topa hi,
A teelsa te thupha pia ding,
A Pa’ Kumpi tokhom tu ding;
Kithawi in hong pai ciang!

Sakkik:
Mopi pa hong pai ciang na kithawi diam?
Mopi pa hong pai ciang na kithawi diam?
Zingsang, sun le zan hi zong,
Na mai vakte taang pha in,
Mopi pa hong pai ciang na kithawi diam?

Verse 2
Amah leitung hong pai baih ding;
Kithawi in hong pai ding!
Gual zawhna ding hun hong tung ding,
Kithawi in hong pai ding!
Halleluijah van pan ging ding,
Zeisu’n gup khiatna hong puak ciang;
Meivak hoih te’n Topa mu ding;
Kithawi in hong pai ciang!

Verse 3
En in, nang leh kei aa ding hi;
Kithawi in hong pai ding!
A sawt lo in pengkul za ding;
Kithawi in hong pai ding!
Ei hong sam ding thu khen ni ciang,
Gam khempeuh pan mun khempeuh ah,
A kumpi tokhom mai ding diing!
Kithawi in hong pai ding!

hymns.title: Topa Hong Sapna Ngai In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa hong sapna tu in ngai in,
Buh at ding in hong sam;
Buh at ding tampi in hong ngak zo,
Hih hang a at ding tawm.

Sakkik:
Topa min in na mai lam nawt un,
Itna deih sak na tawh,
Ei hong Gup khiatna thupah let song,
Leitung thangsak un.

Verse 2
Mawhna khuamial sung om mite kiang,
Pai in va khah khia un,
Pai in mawhna kol va sut khia un,
Mawhna hencip mi kiang.

Verse 3
Lung gim mite lungdam na sung ah,
Itna tawh va zol un;
Amah nuntak tawntung na khomun,
Tua lai ei hong dawn ding.

hymns.title: Topa In A Maang Ding Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ni in a taang thei gam pi ah
Topa Zeisu a maang ding ta
Tuipi khat pan tuipi dong in
Ama gam in a zai ding hi.

Verse 2
Ni sim tawntung A ma kiang ah
Mihing te’n thu a ngen ding a
Lukhu bang in min phat na pi
A ma lu tung ah om ding hi.

Verse 3
Kam tuam a gen pawl te in ah
Min phatna la sa ding uh a
Naupang te in a neu lai tak
A ma min a thang sak ding hi.

Verse 4
Ama uk na sung lungdam ta
Thong sung aa omte suahtak na
A ngah Gimna a thuak mite
Tawlngak na ding uk a hi hi.

Verse 5
Leitung mihing khempeuh te in
Ei Kumpipa min thang sak un.
Vantung mite’n la sa ding in
Leitung ah hong kum suk kik un.

hymns.title: Topa In Ei Hong Kha Ding Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vantung Kumpipa tate
Na pai lai la sa un aw.
Hong gum Topa vaangpi tawh,
Phat in ah la sa un aw.

Sakkik:
Vantung inn ah pai ding om
Tanglai mi pai na lampi,
Tu lai mi nuamsa un aw,
A sawt lo ei te’n mu ding.

Verse 2
En un aw, khuavak mite
Zion khuapi mu dek hi.
Tua a Topa tawh nuamsa.
Topa pi mu kim un aw.

Verse 3
Lau na tam kikhen nuam un
Leitung lam tawp ah ding un
A ta Zeisu Topa hi.
Hangin ah a pai nuam hi.

Verse 4
Leitung a omte nusia
Ngai in a Khazih nuam hi.
A nung ka zuih na’ng in ah
Topa in lam hong hilh aw.

hymns.title: Topa In Hong Kem Ding Hi
hymns.title_en: God Will Take Care of You
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Gimna thuak hang lungmang kei in,
Pasian in hong kem hi.
Ama itna nuai ah om in.
Pasian in hong kem hi.

Sakkik:
Pasian in hong kem hi.
Nisim in ah, tawntung in ah
Amah in hong kem hi.
Pasian in hong kem hi.

Verse 2
Nasep nakpi na bawl lai tak,
Pasian in hong kem hi.
Na pai na lam lau na om leh
Pasian in hong kem hi

Verse 3
Ama’h na deih teng hong pia ding,
Pasian in hong kem hi.
Piak loh bang mah om kei ding hi.
Pasian in hong kem hi.

Verse 4
Ze-et gitloh na thuak hang in
Pasian in hong kem hi.
Ama ang sung na om ding hi.
Pasian in hong kem hi.

hymns.title: Topa In Hong Liah Ding Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Leitung tuitung haksa lua a
Launa huih hong nun’ ciang ah
Topa aw, Nang ma kha liim ah
Bu diang ah kongtai ding ta.

Sakkik:
Gal hong tun zawh loh na’ng in ah
Topa in kei hong kem ding ta.
Topa in a kha liim nuai ah
Tawntung kei hong kem ding hi.

Verse 2
Gim na tawntung hong ze-et hang,
Inn nuam hong tut nop man hi.
Heh het lo in hong it man in
Gim na hong thuaksak thei hi.

Verse 3
Dawi mangpa pawl i galte in
Hong bawlsia nuam semsem hi.
Ahih hang in ah Pasian in
Lungdam na’ng hong pia ding hi.

Verse 4
Leitung singlamteh puak lai in
Dahna huih bang nung thei hi.
Ka kha Topa Zeisu cing in
Ta gal tuak sak lo ding hi.

hymns.title: Topa Ka Za Na Aw
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa ka za Na aw,
Nang kiang a Nong sap na,
Kalani Na si manpha tawh
Keimah hong sawp nuam a.

Sakkik:
Kong pai hi, Topa,
Kong pai hi, tu in;
Kalani a Na si pha
Keimah hong sawp na in

Verse 2
Zawngkhal, kihhuai hang in,
Ka tha Nong khauh sak hi,
Nengkha zong kihbang nawn lo in
Mawhna Nong sawp sak hi.

Verse 3
Leitung vantung aa ding
Upna itna lawp na,
Lung nop na muan’ na a kicing
Zeisu hi, hong guan’ Pa.

Verse 4
Thang hen, mawh mai na si
Thang hen, hong tan itna,
Thang hen, Pasian’ hong piak Khazih,
Eite’ Tha le Dikna.

hymns.title: Topa Ko Ihmut Ma In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa aw, ko ihmut ma in
Nitak thupha hong pia in.
Mawhna le kisap na ko nei,
Nong hon thei, Nong damsak thei.

Verse 2
Siat na in hong kiimvel hang in
Thaltang tawh hong kap hang in.
Na vantung mite’n hong cing a,
Nong nai ciang lau nawn lo ta.

Verse 3
Zan khua a mial phat bang in
Nang hong liah lo khuamial in,
Na mihing te’ om na peuh ah
Nang, gim ngei lo a cing Pa.

hymns.title: Topa Kong Pai Ding
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa kiang kong pai ding,
Na teelsa lampi ah;
Nong sawlna bang bang mang ding in,
Kong ciam uh hi, Nang kiang.

Verse 2
Kote thupha hong pia’n,
Nang kiang kong tun’ nang un,
Ka ni bang un tha hong pia in,
Tha hat na hong guan’ in.

hymns.title: Topa Kumpipa
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ngai un bei thei lo la ngaih,
Van pan hong kisa
“Min thang , min thang hen,
Pasian,” A sang bel ah;
A taang Pasiang zumpi ah
Mi siangte le van mi’n sa hi,
Min thang min thang hen
Pasian A sang bel ah.

Verse 2
Ngai un zawh na la ngaih ging,
Leitung teng thawn khin,
Tuipi kilok ging bang in,
Nuam aw ging in
“Topa pahtawiin awng un!”
A zawh na gam cin in phat hi,
Min thang min thang hen
Pasian A sang bel ah.

Verse 3
Thum kigawm Pasian phat un,
Van mi hon te aw,
Phat un Pa leh a Tapa leh Kha Siangtho;
A beisa hun a bang in,
A tawntung in ging ging den hi,
Min thang min thang hen
Pasian A sang bel ah.

hymns.title: Topa Lam Ah Kua Pang Ding
hymns.title_en: Who Is On the Lord’s Side?
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa lam kua pang ding?
A na kua’n sem ding?
Kua in A mah huh ding?
Mi dang kua’n puak ding?
Kua’n leitung na nusia?
Kua’n a gal do ding?
Topa lam kua pang ding?
Kua kithawi pai ding?
A hehpih na’n hong sam,
Hehpih in hong sam,
Topa lam ah i pang,
Gumpa ko Nang aa.

Verse 2
Min than’ nop na hi lo,
Lukhu deih hi lo,
Na gal kap ding tum in,
Gal hang laam to ding;
Na nuntak na pia a,
Nong sih na hang hi.
Ama lam a pang te,
Zeisu’n min ciam teh,
Itna khau tawh hong khih,
Hehpih in hong sam,
Topa lam i pang hi,
Gumpa ko Nang aa.

Verse 3
Zeisu ko Nong lei zo,
Sum tawh lei hi lo,
Nangma si san Nong bua
Lukhu aa ding in.
Na hehpih na dim hi,
Nang kiang hong pai peuh,
Kote Nong lawp sak a,
Ko Nong suak ta sak,
A lian Gupkhiat na tawh,
Hehpih in hong gum,
Topa lam ah i pang,
Gumpa ko Nang aa.

hymns.title: Topa Muang In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Mawhna a nei te hong pai in
Topa in hong heh pih
Ama thupha bel up ciang in
Nuamna i ngah ding hi.

Sakkik:
Amah maung in, Amah muang la
Tu in ah muang in
Hong gum ding hi, hong gum ding hi.
Tu in hong gum ding.

Verse 2
Nuamna a hong pia ding Zeisu
A si pha bel luang sak.
Vuk sang in hong ngo zaw sak thei
A si sugn hong phum ta’n.

Verse 3
Nop na sung tu’n na ding Zeisu
Thumaan lampi a hi.
Topa na um ding khawl kei leh
Lungdam na ngah ding hi.

Verse 4
Mi siangtho kikhopna tum leh
Mi phatna mun pai ning.
Lungdam om tawntung na sung ah
Nuam na nang mah’n ngah ding.

hymns.title: Topa Na Gam Ka It Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa Na gam it ing,
Gamlapi aa Na inn,
Thupha a piak sa A Pawl pi,
Ama si tawh lei zo.

Verse 2
Na Pawlpi ka it hi,
Na ding, a kulhpi mai,
Hawm thawhna leh itna mit tawh,
En in, khut tawh hong len.

Verse 3
Pawlpi ka it man in,
Luang sak luankhi tui bang,
Kem in, cing in, A na sem ning,
Leitung bei ni mateng.

Verse 4
Ka lungdam theih zah in,
Vantung ka tun’ ciang in,
Amah tawh na khawm nuamsa in,
Hong itna ka phat ding.

Verse 5
Na thumaanna bangin,
Zion mual ah na sang ding,
Leitung minthan na te bei in,
Nuam zaw vantung thupha.

hymns.title: Topa Nangmah Ka It Ka Thei
hymns.title_en: I Know I Love Thee, Better Lord
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Leitung ah sum khempeuh sang in
Topa kong it zaw hi.
Kisia ngei lo nopsak na’ng in
Topa in hong pia hi.

Sakkik:
Hong it hong ngaih na a thupha
Kim khat beek gen nai kei.
Hong sawp siangtho na a thupha
Kim khat beek gen nai kei.

Verse 2
Leitung ka zawl khempeuh sang in
Topa nai nuam zaw ing.
Leitung ah la ngaih khempeuh sang
Thu ngaih na pha zaw hi.

Verse 3
Ka lung hong damsak zo ta hi.
Cik mah’n bei lo ding hi.
Hong it na thupha om kei leh
Lungsim kisia ding hi.

Verse 4
Hong om khawmpih kithei lopi
Hih zah lungdam na lian.
Topa mai i mu ding takpi
Bang zah a nuam ding hiam.

hymns.title: Topa Ni Nong Piak Ni Bei Khin Ta
hymns.title_en: The Day Thou Gavest, Lord, is Ended
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa ni Nong piak ni bei khin ta,
Na thu piak bang in khua hong mial;
Zing sim in phatna la hong sak ung,
Tawl nga lo in Nang hong phat nung.

Verse 2
Hih leitung khuavak hong taan’ lai in,
Na Pawlpi te ihmu ngei lo;
Gam khempeuh ah Nang bek hong ki en,
Sun le zan tawl nga ngei kei nung.

Verse 3
Leitung tuitung tuikulh mun teng ah,
A hun sialsial in khua hong vaak;
Tawl nga ngei lo in thu hong ngen ung,
Na min phatna bei ngei lo ding.

Verse 4
Hih leitung kumpi gamte bang in
Na ukna gam bel ngei kei hen.
Na bawlsa leitung na khempeuh in
Na ukna gam bei ngei lo ding.

hymns.title: Topa Pasian Na Na Sem Ding
hymns.title_en: Thy Work, O God, Needs Many Hands
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa Pasian, Na na sem ding
Mi tam kisam tawntung;
Tua te in sem kim zo lo ding
Huhna puak kei le ung.

Verse 2
Topa, Nang mah kong it man un,
Nasep na ding in ah,
Kong piak uh zang in Nang ma thu’n,
Zeisu min ding in ah.

hymns.title: Topa Sungah Thahat Un
hymns.title_en: Be Ye Strong in the Lord
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa leh A vaang liat na sung ah tha hat un!
A ma thumaan sung ah kip tak ding un;
Gal kido na sung ah A mah’n lam hong kai ding,
Topa min tawh nang na gual zo ding hi.

Sakkik
Thuman in kip tak ding
Kumpi pa thupiak na tawh zawh dong,
Topa minthan’ na ding leh
Ama Thu gual zawh na ding,
Topa thahat na sung kip tak ding.

Verse 2
Topa leh A vaang liat na sung ah tha hat un!
Gal te mai pan in kihei ngei kei un;
Thumaan gal sim laitak Amah na kiang ding ding
Ama vaang liatna sung ah mai nawt un!

Verse 3
Topa leh A vaang liat na sung ah tha hat un!
Ama thu ciam na te pel ngei lo ding;
Thumaan gal sim laitak na taklam khut len ding,
Amah muang in, na gual zo tawntung ding.

hymns.title: Topa Tawh Kibang Nuam Ing
Topa Tawh Ton Khawm In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa tawh ton khawm in, bang bang piang ta leh;
Na lampi khuamial hang Ama nung zui in;
Na gal te’n hong neh in a lau huai hang in,
Zeisu tawh ton le teh kihtak ding om kei.

Sakkik:
Ton khawm in hang tak mai nawt in,
Na tha hong khauh sak ding hi,
Ni sim in Amah tawh pai in,
Na khual zin na lam hong pi ding hi.

Verse 2
Topa tawh ton khawm in, na pai na peuh ah;
Khua mial na liim sung ah lam hong hilh ding hi.
Ama vaang in na lampi hong taang sak ding,
Keu gaw gam zong lo no na hong piang sak ding.

Verse 3
Topa tawh ton khawm in, nang thu’n tawl nga ke’n;
Hong thu piak na bang in na gam ta ding hi.
Hong sawl na bang mang in, Ama tha muang in,
Zeisu nung na zuih leh na khial ngei kei ding.

hymns.title: Topa Thu Upna
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa thu kiciam na thei a
Up khialna ka pia ding hi.
Lungkiat na thuak loh na’ng in ah
A thupha ka um ding hi.

Sakkik:
A kicing hi, a thupha pi
Keimah in ah ka um hi.
A kicing hi, a thupha pi
Keimah in ah ka um hi.

Verse 2
Kimawh sak na Zeisu in ah
A si pha tawh hong sawp hi.
Keimah hong siangtho sak zo ta.
Innpi ah hong kha ding hi.

Verse 3
Topa Zeisu hong hehpih man
Kihtak lau na om lo hi.
Ka lampi ah khua a mial hang
Khuavak hong taang sak ding hi.

Verse 4
Ka nuamna teng Zeisu ka pia
Amah bek ke’n ka deih hi.
Amah in leitung teng uk a
Deihna teng A kiang om hi.

Verse 5
Ka vekpi in Zeisu ka pia
Ka lungsim ka pum khempeuh
Ka lam etna a om khempeuh.
Tawntung Ama kiang om hi.

hymns.title: Topa Thupha Sang Nuam I Kikhawm Hi
hymns.title_en: We Gather Together to Ask the Lord’s Blessing
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa thupha sang nuam ngen in i kikhawm hi.
Ama deihna thei nading manlang hong puak
Dawi netcip thuak nate tu’n bei in lung nuam ta
A min phatna la sa: A mi mangngilh lo hi.

Verse 2
Eite lam hong lak ding, Pasian i kiang hong om
A vantung gam puah in a siangtho sak hi.
Tua a hih manin, a kipat pan gal i zo
Ko lam aa hong pang Topa, Na min thang ta hen.

Verse 3
Na min kong phat uh hi, Gal zo makai pipa
Kote hong dal hong kem ding kong ngen uh hi.
Ze-etna tawh mite hong kipelh sak in
Na min kiphat den hen! Topa hong gum in.

hymns.title: Topa Tungah Lung Dam Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lungsim a pha mihing te aw
Topa tung ah na lung dam un,
Topa a teel mihing te aw
Dahna lung man’ na pai san un.

Sakkik:
Nuam un nuam un,
Topa tung ah na lung dam un.
Nuam un nuam un.
Topa tung ah lung dam khin un.

Verse 2
Lung dam ve un Topa in ah,
Leitung vantung ah pha bel hi.
A thupha a la pha te tawh
Hong uk a ei mah hong phel hi.

Verse 3
Topa aa ding galkap na ah
Gal te hong zo dek hang a ci.
Topa galkap mangte in ah
Gal te sangin a tam zaw hi.

Verse 4
Sun lai in khua hong mial hang in
Zan lai van hong khup hang in ah
Na lungsim na mawh lo ding hi.
Um in gal bei mateng thupha.

hymns.title: Topa Zeisu Nang Hong Muang Ing
hymns.title_en: I am Trusting Thee, Lord Jesus
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa Zeisu Nang hong muang ing,
Nang bek hong muang ing!
Gupna ngah ding Nang hong muang ing,
Khawnkhong cing.

Sakkik:
Ke’n hong muang ing,
Nang bek hong muang ing!
Ke’n hong muang ing, muang ing,
Nang bek hong maung ing.

Verse 2
Mawh maina ding Nang hong muang ing,
Na khe mai kong kun;
Na hehpih na leh na thupha,
Muang ing, tu’n.

Verse 3
Tha hatna ding Nang hong muang in,
Nang tha puk ngei lo;
Nangma’n kei nong piak ding thu te’n
Zo den zo.

Verse 4
Topa Zeisu Nang hong muang ing!
Hong puk sak ngei ke’n;
Vekpi aa ding Nang hong muang ing,
Tawntung den.

Verse 5
Hong sawp siang ding ci’n ka um hi!
Sisan gunpi sung;’
Hong siang sak ding ci’n ka um hi,
Na si tawh.

hymns.title: Topa’n Ka Tuu Cingpa Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa’n ka tuu cingpa hi a,
Bangmah ka kisam kei;
Lono na ah hong lum sak in,
Tuidam kiang hong pai pih.

Verse 2
Ka nuntak na tha hong dim sak,
Ama min hang bek in,
Keimah Ama thumaan lampi,
Zui in hong pai thei sak.

Verse 3
Sihna guam sung ka kheng zong in,
Natna ka kihta kei
A molhtum leh A ciangkhut in,
Kei hong lungmuang sak ding.

Verse 4
Ka gal te a om lai tak in,
A mai’ an hong lui in,
Ka lu sathau hong nilh sak a,
Ka hai a dim let hi.

Verse 5
Hoihna leh migit nate in,
Ka khan tawntung kei hong
Zui den ding a, Pasian inn sung,
Ka ten na’ng hi den ding.

hymns.title: Topa’n Thupha Hong Pia Hen
hymns.title_en: The Lord Bless You And Keep You
hymns.lyrics:
Topa’n thupha hong pia hen,
Topa’n nang mah hong en in hong kem hen,
Lung nopna zong hong guan’ ta hen;
Topa’n A mai nang tung hong taan’ suk hen,
Hong hehpih hen, hong heh pih hen, hehpih hen,
Topa’n hong hehpih, hong hehpih ta hen.
A men, A men A men A men A men.

hymns.title: Tu In Sun Ni Tum Ta
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tu in sun ni tum ta,
Zan hong nai ta hi;
Nitak khuamui mial na,
Damdam hong tung hi.

Verse 2
Zeisu aw a gim te,
Tawldam hong pia in;
na thupha tawh kote,
Hong ihmu sak in.

Verse 3
Ko Nangma tano te,
Nang hong mu sak in;
Tuipi tung khualzinte,
Nang mah’n Na kem in.

Verse 4
Tuzan khuavak in ah,
Na vantung mite’n,
Ko tung kha zak in ah,
Ko hong cing uh hen.

hymns.title: Tu In Sunni Tum DiaiDiai
hymns.title_en: Softly Now the Light of Day
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tu-in sunni tum diaidiai,
Ka mit khua hong mui hiaihiai;
Lungsim, pumpi tawlnga in
Topa, hong om khawm nuam ing.

Verse 2
Ka sung ka pua Na mu khin;
Hong maisak in a vekpi’n
Kilang a ka khialhna leh
Simtham a ka mawhna te.

Verse 3
Kei aa ding a sawt lo in
Sun khuavak hong bei ciang in,
Mawhna dahna peng in ah.
Hong la in Nangma kiang ah.

Verse 4
Nang Na neih loh hang mawhna,
Na thei ka gitnat lohna;
Tua hi a To Zeisu aw
Hehpihna tawh hong en aw.

hymns.title: Tu Na Khangno Lai In
hymns.title_en: Now In the Days of Youth
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tu na khangno lai in,
Hun hoih zat theih lai in,
Topa ko lung sung hong om in,
Vekpi’n hong kipia ung,
Kong kipiak na bang un,
Kilawm bang hong sang in.
Nuntak sung teng sepna peuh ah,
Pa deih na bang hi hen.

Verse 2
Hong hilh in Na deih bang,
Ka gamtat theih na’ng uh,
Nang deih bangbang gamtat theih na’ng,
Ka lungdam ding uh hi.
A lian pen teel tuan lo,
A neu pen paai tuan lo,
Ko sep nate Nang sep bangin,
Hong thupi khin sak in.

Verse 3
Thu hoih thupha deih na,
Kote hong hilh hilh in.
Hun tomcik no khat sung bek zong,
Ka siat khak loh na’ng uh,
Ka tha uh tawh din’ zawh
Na’ng hong panpih ta in.
A siangtho nate bek deih ung,
A sia te deih kei ung.

Verse 4
Ka suah tung bang mah un,
Kha Siangtho hong pi in,
Itna gamtat hoih neih theih na’ng,
Lungnop hit hiat na tawh,
Kum tampi sung man’ ding,
Ka ki gin’ kholh na’ng uh.
Tawntung nuntakna hun nuampi,
Pa inn ah ka zong ding.

hymns.title: Tu Ni Zeisu Hong Sam
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tu ni Zeisu hong sam;
“Hong pai in,” ci.
“Van tung lam thei lo mi,
Kha hilh ding hi.”

Verse 2
Tu ni Zeisu hong sam,
Tu in ngai in,
Zeisu Topa mai ah
Nang mah pai in

Verse 3
Tu ni Topa hong sam,
A ma kiangah
Nang mah na tai kei leh
Si ding lau huai

Verse 4
Kha Siangtho zong hong sam,
Amah nial ke’n,
A hong hehpih nuam hi.
Pai khia sak ke’n.

hymns.title: Tu Nitak Na Ciah Ding Hiam?
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Inn nong ciah diam, vaktahp mi?
Hong gum ding in Zeisu si
Lungkham, gim na thuak mi,
Mawhna si baang na puan te
Tuuno si sung na sawp diam?
Na puante paak ding vuk bang,
Na um diam, hong ciam na thupha?
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?

Sakkik:
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?
Khuamial sung pan khua vakna sung,
Zeisu inn na ciah ding hiam?
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?
Hong it vantung i Pa kiang ah,
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?

Verse 2
Inn nong ciah diam, a mang mi?
En in, Topa’n hong ngak hi;
Pai in lunghei nawn ke’n
Ciah in na zekai kha ding!
Pai in Ama kiang beel in,
Hong itna tha muang in la,
Nong pai diam, ci’n hong samsam lai,
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?

Verse 3
Inn nong ciah diam, mawh nei mi?
Kua in na mawhna van pua?
Pua lam sawt khawl nawn ke’n,
Tu’n hong ciah in kisik in,
Topa thu ciam na muang in.
Amah’n hong gum pha sak ding
“Hong pai in,” ci’n Zeisu’n hong sam:
Tu nitak na ciah ding hiam?

hymns.title: Tua A Zaknop Tangthu Ka Ngaihsut Ciang
hymns.title_en: I Think When I Read That Sweet Story
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tua a zak nop tangthu ka sim ciang ka phawk,
Mi te lak ah Zeisu om lai,
Naupang note tuuno hon tawh a genteh lai,
Amah tawh tua bang om nuam mah sing.

Verse 2
Ka lu tung A khut hong nga leh ut mah sing,
A baan tawh hong angpom hen la,
Tua ciang Ama hong itna maitang en to in,
“Hong pai un” a cih kam za nuam ing.

Verse 3
A hi zong Ama khekhap zui in pai ning,
Ama itna ka ngah zawh na’ng,
Lungsim takpi tawh Ama nuai ah ngen to leng,
Amah mu in, tung pan hong dawn ding.

hymns.title: Tua Lai Dahna Om Nawn Lo
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vantung ka ngaih sun hi.
Topa Pasian om na,
A kham maitang ni sim mu ding
Nop kicing man ngah na.

Sakkik:
Dahna kipelh na mun
Dahna kipelh na mun
Itna kicing vantung kham gam
Dahna kipelh na mun.

Verse 2
Vantung ka ngaih sun hi.
Hong teel Topa om na
Hong itna pha phat na ding la
Kisa tawntung ding hi.

Verse 3
Vantung ka ngaih sung hi.
Vantung mihing te in
Puan pak silh in a om uh hi.
Ei zong i om ding hi.

Verse 4
Vantung ka ngaihsun hi.
A tungsa i lawmte
Mu-a ki khen nawn lo ding a
Nuam tawntung ding hi veh.

hymns.title: Tua Lai Ka Om Nuam Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A sap mi gam nuam ah om nuam ing,
A nop na kam in gen zawh hi lo
Ni sang in a tang zaw gam nuam ah,
Zeisu tawh a tawntung om nuam ing.

Sakkik:
Hih lam ah, Hih lam ah,
Zeisu tawh a tawntung om nuam ing,
Hih lam ah, Hih lam ah,
Zeisu tawh a tawntung om nuam ing

Verse 2
Lai Siangtho sung thu ka theih ciang in,
Tawntung nun tak nop na thu hi ding,
Gimna tawlna dangtak na khempeuh,
Tua gam i tun’ ciang om nawn lo ding.

Verse 3
A nuam a hoih tua gam nuam sung ah,
Sihna lungkham na om nawn lo ding,
Kahna khitui luan’ na om nawn lo,
Sihna om lo nun nop gam nuam ah.

Verse 4
Tua gam nuam sungah om thei ding in,
Pasian in mawh nei mi hong hehpih,
A thuciam bang a um khempeuh te,
A tawntung tua gam ah om ding hi.

hymns.title: Tua Tuikhuk Ah Kei Nong Mu Diam?
hymns.title_en: Will You Meet Me at the Fountain
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tua tuikhuk ah kei nong mu diam?
Min than’ na gam ka tun’ ciang,
Tua tuikhuk ah kei nong mu diam?
Lungdam in khut i beeng diam?
I lawm te’n tua lai hong dawn in,
Lawm it dang te aw za ding;
Tua tuikhuk ah la i sa ding
Nang zong tua lai nong mu diam?

Sakkik:
Hi hi, tua tuikhuk kong mu ding,
A hoih a taang tuikhuk ah,
Aw, tua tuikhuk ah kong mu ding;
Hi hi, kong mu ding, mu ding.

Verse 2
Tua tuikhuk ah kei nong mu diam?
Tua lai kong thei takpi ding,
Migi i kha kikhawl khawm in,
Ka theih na sate sangin;
A ngaih zaw la ka za ding hi,
Ka bil sung hong gin’ ciang in;
Vantung gam bang nop na ki cing,
Na kam khum aw ka thei ding.

Verse 3
Tua tuikhuk ah kei nong mu diam?
Nang tawh ki nai zaw sem ding,
Ka it Topa ka muh ciang in,
Hong dawn na kam ka zak ciang,
A mah’n tuikhuk hong mu ding hi,
A mah’n kei hong angpom in,
Tua tuikhuk min than’na om ding
Nang zong tua lai nong mu diam?

hymns.title: Tuikhuk Khat A Om Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Sihkhuk a dim in ki hong a
Sisan tui bang luang hi.
Tua si tawh kiphum mawh neite
Mawhna tawh kipelh hi.
Mawhna tawh kipelh hi.
Mawhna tawh kipelh hi.
Tua si tawh ki phum mawh neite
Mawhna tawh kipelh hi.

Verse 2
A si mi mawh pa’n tua sihkhuk
A muh ciang a nuam a
Hih mi bang ka gitloh hang in
Mawhna kiphel thei ta.
Mawhna kiphel thei ta.
Mawhna kiphel thei ta.
Hih mi bang ka gitloh hang in
Mawhna kiphel thei ta.

Verse 3
A liam ma ah hong luang sipha
Up na ka muh man in
Hongphel na ding itna la pha
Ka sih mateng sa ning.
Ka sih mateng sa ning.
Ka sih mateng sa ning.
Hongphel na ding itna la pha
Ka sih mateng sa ning.

Verse 4
Nung ciang hih a gik i pom teng
Sih han sung om lai in
Topa hong phel lungdam na teng
Vaatungah la sa ning.
Vaatungah la sa ning.
Vaatungah la sa ning.
Topa hong phel lungdam na teng
Vaatungah la sa ning.

Verse 5
It huai Tuuno Na si manpha.
Bei hun nei ngei lo ding,
Gupna ngah mi teng kikhawm ding
Mawh ngei nawn lo ding hi.
Mawh ngei nawn lo ding hi.
Mawh ngei nawn lo ding hi.
Gupna ngah mi teng kikhawm ding
Mawh ngei nawn lo ding hi.

hymns.title: Tum Dang Hong Gumpa
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu in mawhna hong phel zo.
Hong gum Topa lamdang hi.
Hong tat sa a man a pia zo.
Hong gum Topa lamdang hi.

Sakkik:
Zeisu in hong gumpa hi.
A lamdang ka sa hi.
Kei ma Topa Zeisu in
Hong gum pa ahi.

Verse 2
Pasian tawh hong kilem sak hi.
Hong gum Topa lamdang hi.
Hong sil siang si ka phat ding hi.
Hong gum Topa lamdang hi.

Verse 3
Lungsim sung mawhna a phel hi.
Hong gum Topa lamdang hi.
I lungsung ah om a uk hi.
Hong gum Topa lamdang hi.

Verse 4
Kei mah tawh lampi a pai hi.
Hong gum Topa lamdang hi.
Nisim in hong kemsak ding hi.
Hong gum Topa lamdang hi.

hymns.title: Tung Sun Ni A Tum Ta A
hymns.title_en: Day Is Dying in the West
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tung sun ni a tum ta a,
Tawl ngakna hun hong tung ta;
Zan aksi hong suak lai a
Thangvan paak bang palh lai a
Pasian bia ni.

Sakkik:
Siangtho, siangtho, siangtho,
Topa Pasian’
Leitung, vantung ah Na vaang,
Nang mah phat na hong ki lang
Saang bel Pasian!

Verse 2
Nuntak na a uk Topa,
Van nuai teng Nang ma omna;
Nang ma mai hong zong kote,
Na ang sung ah hong khawm ve,
Ki nai tak in.

Verse 3
Khua hong mial semsem hangin,
A tang aksi te kheng in;
Ko lungsim hong kha to tan
Nang ma mai mu nuam in ah,
Van nuai Itpa.

Verse 4
Aksi te le zan le sun
Mu ngei nawn lo ding a hun
Hong tun’ ciang, vantung Topa’n
Tawntung zing khun vaak sak tan’n,
Kote’ mai ah.

hymns.title: Tuni’n Khazih Topa Hing Kik
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu hing kik hi tuni, Haleluiah.
Nuamna pha hi lungdam un, Haleluiah.
Singlamteh tung si zo hi, Haleluiah .
A mite hong teel zo hi, Haleluiah.

Verse 2
Van-ah i Topa Kumpi, Halehluiah.
A min phat in la sa ni, Haleluiah.
Mawh neite a phel na’ng in, Haleluiah.
Si in han ah kivui hi, Haleluiah.

Verse 3
Gimna a na thuak manin, Halehluiah.
Ei mah hong gum khin zo hi, Haleluiah.
Van pan hong uk tawntung hi, Haleluiah.
Lasa tawntung vantung mi’n, Haleluiah.

Verse 4
Minthang Kumpi hing kik zo, Haleluiah.
Sihna na gu koi ah om? Haleluiah.
Khat vei si in hong um zo, Haleluiah.
Han khuk na zawh na koi om? Haleluiah.

hymns.title: Tuu Cingte’n Tuute A Cin’ Laitak
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Tuu cing te’n zan lai gam lak ah
Tuu vil a om lai tak,
Vantung mite hong pai suk a
A vaang lianpi hong lak.

Verse 2
Tuu cing te’n lau man vantung mi’n
Lau kei un thupha pi
Note le leitung mi aa ding
Tu in kong paipih hi.

Verse 3
Da vuih khua Betlen khuapi sung
Hong gum ding in Khazih
Da vuih suan mihing pawl sung pan
Tu ni in hong suak hi.

Verse 4
Bawngkuang sung puan tawh kitun a
Naupang in a om hi.
No tu in pai un zong un la
No na mu ding uh hi.

Verse 5
Vantung mi’n a cih lai takin
Van maangte hong pai a
Pasian vaang lian mah mah ci
Sa uh hih phatna la.

Verse 6
“Vanah Pasian min lian hen la
Leitung nuamna om hen.
Hong hehpihna leh hong itna
Mi tung om tawntung hen.”

hymns.title: Tuuno Si
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Leitung mawhna pulak ding in
A si pha min thang mah mah hi.
Pasian Tapa pha bel Zeisu
A liam man in i dam ta hi.
Tuu khum tawh i gam lat hang in
Lam khial a gim na thuak hang in
Vuk sang ka ngo zawk na ding in
Tuuno si tawh hong sawp siang in.

Sakkik:
Vuk sang ngo zaw hi.
Vuk sang ngo zaw hi. leh
Vuk sang in ka ngo zaw ding hi. (ding hi).

Verse 2
Ling tawh kigan lukhu khu a
Singlamteh gik Topa’n pua hi.
Gimna dah na te thuak zo ta.
A hih hang mawkna hi lo hi.
Leitung i mawh hong sawpsak ding
A si phual ah ei hong la in
Vuk sang ka ngo zawk na ding in
Tuuno si tawh hong sawp siang in.

Verse 3
Pa aw, ke’n lam ka khial zo hi.
Ka lungsim tam vei mawh zo hi.
Ka mawhna in si bang san a
Tui in kisawp siang zolo hi.
Kei mah in na thuciam um leng
Na si buakna mun ah pai ning.
Vuk sang ka ngo zawk na ding in
Tuuno si tawh hong sawp siang in.

hymns.title: Tuuno Si Tawh Na Kisawp Zo Hiam?
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A siangtho ngah ding Zeisu kiang na pai hiam?
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp zo hiam?
A thupha kicing ding in na um nai hiam?
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp zo hiam?

Sakkik:
Tuuno a (Tuuno a) si pha tawh ( si pha tawh)
Nang mah in na ki sawp siang zo maw?
Na puansilh vuk bang in ah na ngah zo hiam?
Tuu no si tawh na kisawp zo hiam?

Verse 2
Ni sim in Topa kiang ah lam na zui hiam?
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp zo hiam?
Kithat a thuak Topa kiang na beel ta hiam?
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp zo hiam?

Verse 3
Mopi pa hong pai ciang na puan siang ding in
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp zo hiam?
A bawl innpi nuam ah lut theih na ding in
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp ding hiam?

Verse 4
Mawhna khialhna a bang na puansilh pai in
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp ding hiam?
A siang lo na lung sung ciktui luang sak in
Tuuno si tawh na kisawp ding hiam?

hymns.title: Tuute Hong Paipih In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ngai un, gamlak khua mial sung ah
Tuu cing pa aw ki za thei hi.
Tuu khumna sung pan a pu suak
A mang tuute a sam kik hi.

Sakkik:
Hong pai pih’n, hong pai pih’n
Khialna mun pan in hong pai pih’n
Hong pai pih’n, hong pai pih’n
A mangte Zeisu kiang pai pih’n.

Verse 2
A mang tuute a zon’ na ding
Tuu cing pa kua in huh ding hiam.
Khua dam om lo tuu khumna sung
Kua in tuute hong tum sak hiam.

Verse 3
Gampa lak ah le mual tung ah
Amau kah na aw hong ngai in.
Topa in, nang ma kiang ah ci
“Kei ma tuute na zong ding hi.”

hymns.title: Um A Hong Zuante
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lungdam thu khatvei ngai dih in,
Gampa kiang pan na za hiam;
Hong sapna dawng lo ding na hiam?
Topa lam na kihei diam?

Sakkik:
A um te’n zuan, A um te’n zuan,
Zeisu zuan in hing ta un, (ta un,)
A um te’n zuan (un) , A um te’n zuan (un),
Zeisu zuan in hing ta un.

Verse 2
Khua hun tampi bei sak zo teh,
Tam veipi tuuktung thei teh,
Khua khal in phalbi vuk tui tah;
Nang lah mawh sung kawi vak teh.

Verse 3
Zeisu in nang deih bang hong ngak;
Vak vak lo khentat pak in,
Kha Siangtho hong hah zo! lai in,
Gumpa lam zong in zui in.

Verse 4
Na lungsim Pasian kiang pia in,
Khazih si um in muang in,
En to in, Zeisu vantung om,
A kamciam pelh sak lo hi.

hymns.title: Um Un
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Um na, a um te’n um un.
Gal do na a sawt hang.
Nangma zawh theih na ding in
Nang lam Topa pang hi.

Sakkik:
Um un, Um un, Um un, Um un.
Khua mial a lau huai hang.
Um un, um un, um un, um un,
Khua hong vak dek tak hi.

Verse 2
Um un, gal a tam hang in.
A lauhuai lampi ah
Ze-et na a tam hang in
Lam hong hilh ding, Topa.

Verse 3
Topa’n hong gum zo ding hi.
I zawl Pa pha bel hi.
Um un, a um te’n zo ding
I zawl Pa pha bel hi.

hymns.title: Vakhu Bangin Kha Siangtho Hong Pai In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Kha Siangtho vakhu bang in ah,
Hong pai in vang lian tawh,
Na itna mei bang hong tawh in,
A dai ko lung sungah.

Verse 2
Kote lasak ngei bang in ah,
Tho to in sa zo lo,
Hawsiana ci’n ko aw ging lo,
Kote biakna si ta.

Verse 3
Topa tua bang ko si ding lo,
Hehpih huai mahmah in,
Ka hong itna uh a neu hang,
Nang hong itna lian zaw.

Verse 4
Kha Siangtho vakhu bang in ah,
Hong pai in vang lian tawh,
Gumpa itna hong buak in la,
Tawh kuang sak in ko mei A men.

hymns.title: Van In Na Min Than’Na Pulak
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Van in Na min than’na pulak,
Aksi teng ah Napil na taang;
Na kam mal te mit tawh et ciang,
Na min a tel zaw in ki mu.

Verse 2
A ki hei Ni, ki laih khuavak,
Sun leh zan hun, Na vaang bawl sa,
Gen zawh loh Na hehpih na thu’n
Na dik na hehpih na lang sak.

Verse 3
Thu maan thutak Ni hong suak hi,
Leitung mial lak van khuavak pia’n,
Lungdam na thu’n mite pil sak,
Na thu tang in, Na thu khen maan.

Verse 4
Na lam dan’na hi pan mu ung,
Khate thak suah, mawhna maisak;
Topa, ka mawhna sil sak in la,
Vantung tun’ dong Na thu’n
Hong keem in. A men.

hymns.title: Vanglian Kumpipa Hong Sihna
hymns.title_en: When I Survey the Wondrous Cross
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vanglian Kumpi pa hong sih na
A singlamteh ke’n vel vel leng,
Kei’ hauh na kei ki phatsak na
Ke’n tu’n bangmah in sim nawn keng.

Verse 2
Khazih ka Pasian sih na lo
Ki sialh pih ding bang mah om kei;
Ka deih bel teng khat zong siit lo,
Ama’ si khek na in ka nei.

Verse 3
En ven, A’lu, A’khut, A’khe
Dah na, itna, hong luang suk khawm;
Na mu ngei maw linglukhu leh
Itna, dah na gawm kilawm khawn.

Verse 4
Leitung khempeuh pia thei hi leng,
Tam lua kaci ngei kei ding hi;
A hong itna ke’n ngaihsun leng,
Ka pum ka tak ka pia nuam hi.

hymns.title: Vanglian Kumpipa Hong Sihna
hymns.title_en: When I Survey the Wondrous Cross
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vanglian Kumpi pa hong sih na
A singlamteh ke’n vel vel leng,
Kei’ hauh na kei ki phatsak na
Ke’n tu’n bangmah in sim nawn keng.

Verse 2
Khazih ka Pasian sih na lo
Ki sialh pih ding bang mah om kei;
Ka deih bel teng khat zong siit lo,
Ama’ si khek na in ka nei.

Verse 3
En ven, A’lu, A’khut, A’khe
Dah na, itna, hong luang suk khawm;
Na mu ngei maw linglukhu leh
Itna, dah na gawm kilawm khawn.

hymns.title: Vantung Gam Pan Vantung Mite
hymns.title_en: Angels From the Realms of Glory
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vantung gam pan vantung mite
Van nuai pian cil la sate
Leitung khempeuh ah hong leeng un,
Tu’n Mesia’ suah thangsak un.
Hong pai ta un, Hong bia ta un,
Suak thak Khazih hong bia un.

Verse 2
Gampa lak ah tuu hon te tawh
Zan giak, no, tuu cingte aw,
Pasian leh mi om khawm zo hi.
En un, Khuavak ngek taang hi.
Hong pai ta un, Hong bia ta un,
Suak thak Khazih hong bia un.

Verse 3
Mi pil te aw, lung geel nawn ke’n,
A taang zaw khuavak en ven.
Mi nam kim’ Deih lian pen zong un
A aksi no mu zo tu’n
Hong pai ta un, Hong bia ta un,
Suak thak Khazih hong bia un.

Verse 4
Topa thakhat Ama inn ah
Hong kilang ding, ci in-ah
Ngak-a, lawp-a, lametna tawh
Bia-a om mi siangte aw,
Hong pai ta un, Hong bia ta un,
Suak thak Khazih hong bia un.

hymns.title: Vantung Khua I Tung Ding Hi
hymns.title_en: When We All Get to Heaven
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu’n an bang hong itna pha
Lam bang puak zai la sa ni.
Thang van inn taang sua siang nun nuam
Ko aa ding ngo bang lang hi.

Sakkik:
Thang van dong i tun’ ciang in
Deih teng leh lai lungdam na ngah ding hi.
Kum khua in la sa ni
Topa Zeisu i phat ding hi.

Verse 2
Thang vantung lam i zuih lai tak
Zai tha tawl na om ding hi.
Hi zong i pai khit ciang in ah
Zai tha tawl om lo ding hi.

Verse 3
Zang ni suah sim i um ding a
Lim bel sawl sang i leeng ding
Sau mang nun nuam kuam bang luah na’ng
Gua bang hin’ lai ngaih khua ah.

Verse 4
I mai nopna lai lungdam na
Va bang leeng tung nuam ing ci,
Thang van kankil i tun’ ciang in
Kham vaang khuapi i mu ding.

hymns.title: Vantung Khua Om Ding Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vantung vang lian hehpih na gam
Mi singtho te inn a hi.
Ama kiang ah om tawntung ni.
Leitung na khempeuh paai ni.

Sakkik:
Leitung ni a bei ciang in ah
Nung ciang in inn nuam ah
Mi siangtho te om na lam ah
Vantung khua om ding hi.

Verse 2
Tawntung inn nuam vang lian gam ah
I lawmte tua gam om ding.
Tua inn nuam sung ah om ding in
Mi nam cin a khawm ding hi.

Verse 3
Hong gupna si pha vang lianpi
Hehpih na gam teng zel sak,
Hih gal gam ah i om lai in
Hong hehpih na thugen in.

Verse 4
Khat tang hih hang pai in gen ni,
Leitung dahna kiam ding hi.
Lungsim deih teng tawntung om na
Kim takin a om ding hi.

hymns.title: Vantung Mite La
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hong luang zua zua zan kim lai tak,
Vantung la ngaih pi hong ging suk hi;
A la dawng lah, la ngaih mah mah,
A sate lah, vantung mi honpi.

Sakkik:
A sang bel ah min thang hen aw,
Lei ah mi te tung nop na om hen;
Khangsawnte’n tu bang ciiang hen aw,
Lei in pahtawi kik kik hen.

Verse 2
Tuu cing mite’n tua thupi mu,
Tua a taang mite’ thu pulak za;
Bawngkuang sung a Pa na kibia,
Huih lak khempeuh thawn in la kisa.

Verse 3
Khazih Honpa Pa’ Sathau nilh,
Leibat lauhuai loh ding hong pai zo;
Dah na mite nial sa mite.
I mawhna pua khia Pasian Tuuno.

hymns.title: Vantung Mite Lasakna Kiza
hymns.title_en: Angels We Have Heard on High
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vantung mite lasakna,
Zang leitung ah kiza hi,
Mual sangte’n zong sang sawn a,
Lungdam na la kithawn hi.

Sakkik:
Thang …. ta hen.
Pa-sian min thang ta hen,
Thang …. ta hen,
Van a, sang bel Pasian.

Verse 2
Tuu cing te no lungdam na
Nuam na late bang thu hiam?
Vantung la ngaih no sak na
Lungdam na thu bang hang hiam?

Verse 3
Betlen khua ah hong pai in
Note’n zong hong en ve vua
Khazih Kumpi din’ in
Note’n zong hong phat pih un.

hymns.title: Vantung Mite’n Hong Pua
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Sum haupa a inn pha bel kongkhak kiangah
Topa Pasian ta khat a tu hi.
Leitung ah gimna, tawlna khempeuh a ngah
A sih khit ciang a nuam bel ngah hi.

Sakkik:
A nop na sungah van tung mite’n pai pih
Van kim lai ah lasa aw dim hi,
Vantung inn nuam sungah Topa in la hi.
A it te tawh nop na a ngah hi.

Verse 2
Gim na bei in si leng, bang i piang ding maw,
Ei mah in sin sungah ngaih sun hi.
Leitung ah nuntak na van gik pua bang hi.
Dahna khitui luan’na te om hi.

Verse 3
Zeisu nungzuite in sum a tawm bang hang in
Vantung khua ah om sum lamdang hi.
Ze et bawl siat na teng i pai san ding hi.
Nung ciang kikhel ding lungdam na hi.

Verse 4
Topa Pasian omna mai lam pai ta hen.
Pilna a hun tawh Topa hilh in.
Nasep na a tawm hang za ngahna a lian.
Singlamteh pua kham lukhu khu in.

hymns.title: Vantung Mite’n La Sa, Ngai Un!
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ngai un, vantung mi’n lasa
A suak Topa min than’na
Leitung nuamna hong khang sak hi.
Mawhna khempeuh phel ding ci.
Leitung mi khempeuh te in
Lungdam na tawh tho un la
Zeisu Betlenah suak hi.
Vanpi dong ah minthang hi.
Vantung mite’n lasa hi,
“A suak Topa min thang,” ci.

Verse 2
Zeisu Topa Pasian Ta,
A om tawntung Kumpi pa,
Nungak sung pan hong suak hi.
Mi bang in ah hong piang hi.
Pasian in mi bang piang a
Pasian itna mi sungah
Ka hong khawl khawm sak nuam ci.
Emanuela Zeisu hi.
Vantung mite’n lasa hi,
“A suak Topa min thang,” ci.

Verse 3
Zeisu’n lungdam na pia hi.
Mi siangtho a min ki ci.
Natna, gimna a om lo
A Taang vantung a mial lo,
Vaang liat na a paai Maangpa
Sih kik na a pel sak Pa
Misi hing kik sak ding a
Zeisu in leitung hong suak
Vantung mite’n lasa hi,
“A suak Topa min thang,” ci.

hymns.title: Vantung Omna
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
I om na inn ngaih sun in la
A taang gun gal khat ah om a ci.
Mi siangtho te nuamna a om a
Puan pak tawh kizem a om hi.

Sakkik:
Vantung ah, vantungah,
I om na ding inn vantung ah
Vantung ah, vantungah, vantungah
I om na ding inn vantung ah.

Verse 2
Nang ma lawmte ngaih sun in la
A mai lam a maute’n a zui hi.
Lungdam na tawh a mu te’n lasa
Vantung khua dong in kiza hi.

Verse 3
Vantung hong gum Topa kiangah
Kei ma lawmte nuam sa a om hi.
Tua mun in gim na om nawn loh na
Kei ma kha in a tung nuam hi.

Verse 4
En in, i lawmte vantungah
Amau in vantung khua a lut zo.
A lung khamna teng bei khin ding a
Gimna tawntung mu lo om zo.

hymns.title: Vantung Siklong Tum In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Hih Zawdan gun ah tui kiphum ding in ah
Mawh neite khempeuh hong kikhawm ta.
Topa thupha a umte khempeuh in ah
Zawdan gunah a sam uh a pha.

Sakkik:
“Vang lian, vanglian,” vantung mi’n ci hi.
La sa uh hi min phat na la hi.
“Halaluiah vang lian minthan’na pha,” ci.
Vantung sang inn pi zel sak uh hi.

Verse 2
Hih Zawdan gun gei ah ding a om te in
Vantung la aw tawl khat ngai uh hi.
Mihing khempeuh mawhna te a phel Topa
Vantung tokhom kiangah hong mu hi.

Verse 3
Vantung pan a thu hong piak a aw in ah;
“Ka pa in nang hong mu hong pai in.
Ka pa zong nang hang in ah a lung dam hi.”
Vantung khua siklongpi tum sak in.

Verse 4
Ni tum ta zingsang in hong tum kik mateng
Tu in tate aw hong ciah meng un.
Ka pa in zong vantung mite kiangah gen.
A lamdang thupha na thei sak un.

hymns.title: Vantungah Min Hong Sap Laitak
hymns.title_en: When The Roll Is Called Up Yonder
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa Zeisu hong pai kik ciang vantung pengkul aw za a,
Zingtung khuavak tawntung nuamtak taang ding hi.
Kiphel na ngah mihingte in gun gal hong kikhop ciang in
Min hong sap lai tak keimah zong om ding hi’ng.

Sakkik:
Vantung ah min hong sap lai tak
Vantung ah min hong sap lai tak
Vantung ah min hong sap lai tak
Min hong sap lai tak keimah zong om ding hi’ng.

Verse 2
Zingtung meiikai om lo khuavak Zeisu min tawh si tho a
Topa tawh nung ta kik a nuam sung tum hi.
Sih na a ngah mihing te in vantung inn ah tum ciang in
Min hong sap lai tak keimah zong om ding hi’ng.

Verse 3
Topa a na hong sem sak a zing nitum dong mateng in
Kidop na tawh a ma itna gen sak ni.
Leitung sihna hun hong kheng ding hi na sepna tang zo in,
Min hong sap lai tak keimah zong om ding hi’ng.

hymns.title: Vuuk Mual Panin
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vuuk a paak mual dawn pan in
Khang lam lei mong dong in,
A mual a guam a zang ah
Tui tung leitung teng ah
Teeng a a om mite in
Pasian lam khial khin a
Tua khialhna kol sut ding in
Hong sam in om uh hi.

Verse 2
Khua lumna gamah huih in
Pha takpi a nung hi,
Et ding hoih a tam hang in
Mihing te’n ki huai hi
Pasian in hehpihna tawh
Na tampi hong pia hi.
Lawki te’n mittaw bang in
Suang le sing bia uh hi.

Verse 3
Vantung pan in khuavak na
I lung sungah taang hi.
Khuamial na sung a om te
Pasian meivak pia ni.
Gam lapi mite in ah
Zeisu min thei mateng
“Hong gum hi, hong gum hi,” ci’n
Lungdam na ki ko in.

hymns.title: Vuuk Sang Ngo Zaw
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa Zeisu aw, Kei ka siangtho nuam hi.
Keima lungsim sung ah hong om tawntung in.
Gal khempeuh nawt khia in, hoih lo te paai in.
Nong sawp leh ka ngo zaw ding hi, vuuk sang in.

Sakkik:
Vuuk sang ka ngo zaw tham na ding in
Topa aw Nang ma si pha tawh hong sawp in.

Verse 2
Topa Zeisu aw, a siang lo bei sak in.
Na sipha tawh Nong sawp ciang mawhna bei hi.
Mawhna khempeuh paisan siangtho ngah na ding
Nong sawp leh ka ngo zaw ding hi, vuk sang in.

Verse 3
Topa Zeisu aw, Na kiang kon thum nuam hi.
Na khut nuai pan in ka na ngakngak ding hi.
Upna tawh na si buak na ka mu zo hi.
Nong sawp leh ka ngo zaw ding hi, vuuk sang in.

Verse 4
Ngak a thuak nate Topa in na mu hi.
Lungsim thak ka sungah nong guansak zo hi.
Topa kiang hong pai khempeuh na nial kei hi.
Nong sawp leh ka ngo zaw ding hi, vuuk sang in.

hymns.title: Zan Kim Ta-A Olive Mual Tung
hymns.title_en: Tis Midnight; and On Olive’s Brow
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zan kim ta a, Olive mual tung
Aksi taang tu’n mial kik leu leu.
Zan kim ta a, en un, huan sung
Hong Honpa kia’n thu ngen ngiu ngeu.

Verse 2
Zan kim ta a hong Honpa in
Amah guak lau na tawh ki buan.
A it nungzui pa na ngawn in
Don lo hi Topa’ khitui luan’

Verse 3
Zan kim ta a, Mi Gentheipa
Mi dang’ mawhna hong sisan kap
Ahih hang Amah khuk din’ a
Pasian deihna sungah ki ap.

Verse 4
Zan kim ta a, Pa Pasian in
Mihing Tapa nusia sam lo.
Vantung mite in hehneem in
Mihing Honpa in dah na zo.

hymns.title: Zankim Gamdaih Kim Laitak In
hymns.title_en: It Came Upon the Midnight Clear
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zankim gamdaih kim lai takin
Hong ging vaanglian lapi;
Vantung mite hong kum sukin
Kham gawsem tawh sa hi;
“Vantung Kumpi pa kiang pan in
Nopna leitung dim hen,”
Ci’n hong sak laitak leitung mi’n
Dai khipkhep in ngai hi.

Verse 2
Van kong pan hong pai lailai mah
Kilemna kha zak in;
Gimna dim na hih leitung ah
Van la ngaih kiza lai;
Dahna lungkham na kuam tung ah
Hong leeng diai diai uh a
Pau nam tampi gamlum lak ah
Vantung la pha hong sa.

Verse 3
Leitung nun’tak vangik nuai ah
Van gik lel a awn te,
Nun’tak haksa lam to a kah
Pheiphung suan kha mi aw.
En un, lungdam nuamna ding hun
Man lang va bang hong leeng;
Gimna lam gei ah na khawl un,
Vantung la ngai dih un.

Verse 4
Thei un, hong tung petmah ding ta
Tang kamsang te gensa:
A kum a kha hong veei ding a
Hong tung ding Kham hun pha;
Leitung ah nopna lemna pha
A vaang hong taang ding ta;
Vantung mite hong sak la pha
Leitung mi’n dawn ding ta.

hymns.title: Zato Mangpipa
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A siam bel hong damsak thei Pa
Hong it Topa Zeisu hi.
Dahna hong nopsak na’ng in ah
A hong sapna aw ngai in.

Sakkik:
Vantung mi a lasak na
Leitung mi pha bel cih na
Sa ni a ngaih mah mah la
Zeisu pha bel min hi.

Verse 2
Na mawhna a hong phel Topa
A hong sapna aw ngai in.
Vantung lam nuam tak zui in la
Zeisu tawh kham lu khu in.

Verse 3
A hing kik Tuuno vanglian Pa
Zeisu ke’n ka hong um hi.
Hong gum Topa Na min a pha
A lian bel ka ci ding hi.

Verse 4
Zeisu maitang mu ding in ah
Vantung ka pai toh ciang in
A hong itna tokhom kiang ah
Phatna lasa tawntung ning.

hymns.title: Zawdan Gun Gei Ah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zawdan gun gei ah ka ding a
A gal lam ka en hi.
Khanan gam nuam hong ki lang a
Ka luah na ding gam hi.

Sakkik:
Tua gam nuam sungah ei i khawl ding hi.
A nop tawntung gun gal lam in ah
Nung ciang in Mawsi le Tuuno lasa ding hi.
Zeisu tawh mang tawn tung ding hi.

Verse 2
Tua gam pha bel sungah inn ah
Khuavaak tawntung om hi.
Pasian leh Zeisu vaang in ah
A taang tawntung ding hi.

Verse 3
Cik ciang tua gam ka tung ding hiam
Khuamial om loh na ah
I Pa maitang lungdam na dim,
Cik ciang ka mu ding hiam.

Verse 4
Ka sin sungah lung dam nading
Leitung sawtpi om lo
Zawdan gunpi kilok hangin
Lungdam in ka tum zo.

hymns.title: Zeisu Aading Nuntak Maan Ka Nungta
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu aa ding nun tak maan ka nung ta
Sepna ah nuam sak ding ka hanciam ta
Lungdam na tawh A deih na ka seem hi
Hih bang hih na in kei lungdam na hi.

Sakkik:
Zeisu Topa, Honpa aw
Nangtung ah kong ki pia
Nong gup khiat na ding in ah
Kei aa ding Nong ki pia
To dang kua mah ka nei lo
Ka lung sung hong teeng in
Ka nun tak na, Nang tung kong pia
Khazih, Nang aa ding in.

Verse 2
Kei tang si Zeisu aa ding ka nung ta
Kei mawh kei zum na Kalani pua ta
Hong itna in A mah hong zui nuam sak
A lam lah na zui in ka ki bup piak.

Verse 3
Omna peuh Zeisu aa ding ka nung ta
A min siangtho sung ah na ka seem ta
Gimna sup nate ke’n ka thuak nuam hi.
Hih bang te Zeisu aa ding thuak na hi.

Verse 4
Tom kha sung Zeisu aa ding ka nung ta
Amah nuih mai mah manpha pen ka sa
A mangte zong in gum ding a si hi.
A gimte A sung tawldam ding la hi.

hymns.title: Zeisu Ah Deihna Teng Cing Hi
hymns.title_en: Jesus Is All the World To Me
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu ah deih na teng cing hi,
Hin’ na, nuam na, van nuai;
Nisim in A ma tha lo in
Ka puk ding a lau hua.
Ka dah ciang Ama kiang ka pai,
Mun dang bang lo ka mai a taii;
Ka dah ciang hong nuam sak, A mah
Keima lawm.

Verse 2
Zeisu ah deih na teng cing hi,
Lungkham lai tak ka Lawm
Thupha deih in Amah zuan leng,
Aman’n hong pia nawnnawn.
Ni taang le guahtui hong pia hi,
Tuk ciang in an hong la sak hi;
Ni taang, guahtui le an hong pia
Keima lawm.

Verse 3
Zeisu ah deih na teng cing hi,
A tung ka thu maan ding;
Kei tung ah hong thumaan ka Lawm
Bang ci ka nial zo ding,
Amah zui leng ka khial ngei kei,
Sun leh zan hong cing khial ngei kei;
Sun le zan in zui ning Amah
Keima lawm.

Verse 4
Zeisu ah deih na teng cing hi,
Lawmpha zaw deih tuan keng.
Amah tu in ke’n ka muang a,
Muang lai ding sih mateng,
Hih bang Lawm tawh nuntak a nuam,
Bei ngei lo ding hin’na a nuam;
Bei ngei lo nun’tak na, nuam na
Keima Lawm.

hymns.title: Zeisu Ang Beel Ding Hi
hymns.title_en: Safe in the Arms of Jesus
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Gal om lo Zeisu’ ang sung
Kham khut tawh hong kawi ding.
Hong itna a lim beel leh,
Ka lungsim nuam sa ding.
Ngai un vantung mi aw in,
A vaang taang vantungah
Mual tung, tuipi gal pan in
La sa bang hong tung ta.

Sakkik:
Gal om lo Zeisu’ ang sung
Kham khut tawh hong kawi ding.
Hong itna a lim beel leh
Ka lungsim nuam sa ding.

Verse 2
Gal om lo Zeisu’ ang sung
Gim na tawlna a bei.
Leitung ze-et na khialh na
In ah hong zol zo kei.
Lung siat na leh dah na te
Kih tak na zong dai hi.
Leitung ah khitui luan’ na
Neu kha bek om lai hi.

Verse 3
Kei tang ding Topa Zeisu
Singlamteh na thuak hi.
A om tawntung suangpi bang
Ka belh ni loh ding hi.
Zan kim lai hong kheng mateng
Thuak in na ngak ding ci.
Zing sang a phalvaak mateng
Lam en ka om ding hi.

hymns.title: Zeisu Aw, Ka Sih Dongin
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu aw, ka sih dong in
Nang ma na seem ding in
Ki ciam na kip ka koih zo:
Nang mah ka Lawm ka To.
Hong panpih tawntung le cin,
Nang lam hong hilh le cin,
Gal do na kih ta kei ning.
Lam paam sik khial kei ning.

Verse 2
Nong nai hong phawk khial sak ke’n,
Thu dang te’n hong neh den;
Muh nop huai te’n hong leng hi,
Zak nop hong mang hi.
Ka gal te hong nai tawn tung
Ka kiim le ka lung sung.
Tua te sang hong nai zaw in,
Mawhna pan hong dal in.

Verse 3
Nangma pau hong za sak in,
A siang a tel tak in,
Lung sung huihpi nung ciang in,
Manglo phun nuam ciang in.
Ka lung muan’ theih na’ng in ah
Nong sawl na, Nong khaam na,
Hong thei sak, hong ngai sak in,
Ka lungsim hong cing in.

hymns.title: Zeisu Aw, Kong It Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu aw, kong it hi, kei aa Na hi ta,
Nangma hang mawhna nuam nam cin’ ka khia ta;
Kei mah hong Tanpa, hong Honpa Na hi ta.
Kong it ngei leh zong, tu’n kong it pha sem ta!

Verse 2
Tun’ Nang kong it hang Nangmah’n Nong it masa
Nong it ma’n singlamteh tung Nong tan zo ta.
Ling lukhu na tal tung ah ki khen zo ta
Kong it ngei leh zong, tu’n kong it pha sem ta!

Verse 3
Hong it tawntung ning hin’ na sih na sungah;
Hong phat tawntung ning, hu Nong kawm lai in ah;
Sih na daitui ka tal ah kai cinag in ah,
Kong it ngei leh zong, tu’n kong it pha sem ta!

Verse 4
Nuamsak tawntungna minthang innpi sung ah,
Na min hong phat tawntung ning a taang van ah,
Zawhna lukhute khu in sa ning hih mah;
Kong it ngei leh zong, tu’n kong it pha sem ta!

hymns.title: Zeisu Bek In Nuamna Hong Pia Thei
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Aw Topa Zeisu kei lungsim
Na thu ka um man a
Sawtpi ka zong a nop na in
Lung dam na ka ngah ta

Sakkik:
Tuni Zeisu sim loh in-ah
Deihna dang om lo pi
Itna, hing na, tawntung nop na
Topa kiang ka ngah in.

Verse 2
Lungdam na ka zon’ lai tak in
Topa ka mangngilh hi.
Hong gum Topa ka nial ciang in
Hong it a hong zol hi.

Verse 3
Leitung aa nop na te deih in
Lung kim ngah ding in ah.
Hah kat in a ka zon’ hang in
Lung kiat na teng ka ngah.

Verse 4.
Zeisu hong it thupha in ah
Kei mah ka ngah ma in
Si thei nopna lungsim neih hang
Topa ka ngaihsun ke’n.

hymns.title: Zeisu Hoihna
hymns.lyrics:
Zeisu hoihna keima sung kilang sak in,
A lamdang hong itna leh A siangtho na;
Aw, Pasian Khasiangtho,
Kei pumpi hong sawp siang
Zeisu hoihna keima sung kilang sak in

hymns.title: Zeisu Hong Pai Ding Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
La sa un, “Zeisu in hong pai ding,”ci.
A si tawh a gup mihing ta ding in
Hong kum a, hong uk ding a min thang hi.
Zeisu hong pai kik ding hi

Sakkik:
Zeisu hong pai ding, hong pai kik ding hi.
Zeisu hong pai kik ding hi.
Lungdam in, la pha sa un nuam ding hi.
Zeisu hong pai kik ding hi.

Verse 2
Zeisu hong pai ciang misi a tho ding
I it i ngaih i lawmte kimu ding
Vantung ah ei hong paipih na ding in
Zeisu hong pai kik ding hi

Verse 3
Zeisu hong pai ding a mi siangtho te
Lei tung lung damna nuam pia suk ding hi.
Bei ding hi, Lungkhamna sin khamna te
Zeisu hong pai kik ding hi

Verse 4.
Zeisu hong pai ding thuciamna om hi
A teelsa mihingte la to ding in
Ngak in, lawp in, a kisa in om in.
Zeisu hong pai kik ding hi.

hymns.title: Zeisu Hong Tun’ Mateng
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Gim na sung pan lamet gam nuam
Cik ciang ka tung ding hiam
Cik ciang gal van ka koih ding hiam
Lai lung ka muang ding hiam

Sakkik:
Zeisu hong tun’ mateng
Zeisu hong tun’ mateng
I na sep zawh ciang in
Inn nuam sung om khawm ding.

Verse 2
Sim leitung lai lungdam omlo
Lum bang sung omlo tawh
Sim leitung sau nuam a hi lo
Gam bang daih na a hi.

Verse 3
Lim bel siangtho ngah ding in ah
Lam bang na pial ke’n ci
Leeng van siang nuam ka tun’ mateng
Nuamna hong pia ding hi.

Verse 4
Lim bel nen ah khawl zo ta in
Lam dan ka pial kei ding
Amah bang a ka pham nung ciang
Leeng van siang nuam tung ning.

hymns.title: Zeisu In A Omna A Nusia Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu in van ah tokhom nu sia a
Mi aa ding leitung hong pai zo.
A hong puak ding in Betlen khuasung ah
A hong suak na ding inn om lo.

Sakkik:
Kei ma lungsim sung hong om in
Nang aa ding om na a om hi.
Kei ma lungsim sung hong om ta in
Nang aa ding om na a om hi.

Verse 2
Zeisu in a hong kum suk lai tak in
Vantung mite’n pengkul tum hi.
Hih hang gina lo bek tawh hong suak a
Leitung hong ki niam sak ta hi.

Verse 3
Ngia in zong kua nei a vasa in zong
Sing dawn ah bu a nei uh hi.
Hih hang Galile gam Zeisu om lai
A lupna leitung bek a hi.

Verse 4
Zeisu in zawhna tawh hong pai suk ciang
Penkul aw tawh hong pai ding hi.
Amah’n a aw tawh kei mah hong sam ding
“Ka kiang om in,” hong ci ding hi.

hymns.title: Zeisu In Hong Gum Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lungdamna thupha ka za
“Zeisu in hong gum hi.”
Tua thupha na gen in la;
“Zeisu in hong gum hi.”
Gam kheempeuh ah pai in la
Mual kal, gun gal kan ding a
Na gen in Topa thupha
“Zeisu in hong gum hi.”

Verse 2
Gunpi kan in kiko in
“Zeisu in hong gum hi.”
Gamla nai mi kiang gen in,
“Zeisu in hong gum hi.”
Tu lai lei ah ki ko in.
A gal khat na tawn sak in
Leitung ah lungdam na in;
“Zeisu in hong gum hi.”

Verse 3
Gal kapna sung kiko in,
“Zeisu in hong gum hi.”
Singlamteh tung sihna in;
“Zeisu in hong gum hi.”
Hehpihna i deih ciang in
Tua thu te na ngaihsun in.
Sihna zo man la sa in,
“Zeisu in hong gum hi.”

Verse 4
Leitungah na kiko in;
“Zeisu in hong gum hi.”
Mi khempeuh lungdam sak in,
“Zeisu in hong gum hi.”
Mual tung leh kuam thuk sungah
Hong phelna thu gen in la.
Hih zawhna thu la sakna;
“Zeisu in hong gum hi.

hymns.title: Zeisu In Hong Keem Hiam?
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ka lampi sau in a gim huai a,
Vangik pua in kikeem khial in;
Lungdam la sa in, lungsim a nat ciang,
Zeisu in kei a hong keem hiam?

Sakkik:
A hong keem hi, ke’n ka thei hi,
Ka dah na hong phawk pih hi,
Sun in om nuam lo in, zan a lau huai lai tak,
Hong gumpa’n hong keem.

Verse 2
Sun khuavak in a hong mial ciang in,
Kei kiangah a hong nai om hiam?
Ka lampi mial in, lau huai a tam ciang,
Zeisu in kei a hong keem hiam?

Verse 3
Haksa ze-et ka thuak lai tak in,
Zan tawntung khitui luan na tawh;
Hong hon’ ding om lo ka dah lai tak in,
Zeisu in kei a hong keem hiam?

Verse 4
I itte tawh mangpha kipia in,
Lungkham lutang nat a bei ciang;
Topa in ei bang ci in hong mu diam,
Zeisu in kei a hong keem hiam?

hymns.title: Zeisu In Hong Sam Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Gal do na tam hih leitung pan
Zeisu in a hong sam hi.
Ni sim in Ama aw ging hi;
“Kei nung hong zui in,” a ci.

Verse 2
Leitung sum leh paai bia lo ding
Zeisu in a hong sam hi.
Hong khaam milim hawlkhiata in;
“Amau sang hong it in, ” ci.

Verse 3
Dahna sung, lung dam na sung ah
Nasep lai tawlnga lai ah
“Tuate sang in kei hong it zaw’n,”
Ci in amah’n hong sam hi.

Verse 4
Topa’n hong sap ciang ka ngai ding
Topa hong hehpih ta in.
Nangma itna na seem ding in
Topa, hong huh ta in.

hymns.title: Zeisu In Hong Sam Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu in itna tawh inn ah hong sam
Tu ni’n hong sam, tu ni’n hong sam;
Ni bang taang hong itna pan in pua lam
Bang ding kidaithah na hiam?

Sakkik:
Tu ni’n hong sam, Tu ni’n hong sam,
Zeisu in hong sam, Hong it man in,
tu ni’n hong sam.

Verse 2
Zeisu’n hong pia nuam a gimte tawldam;
Tu ni’n hong sam, tu ni’n hong sam;
Na van va puak in la, ngah in lungdam,
Nang A hong nial kei ding hi.

Verse 3
Zeisu’n hong ngak hi, pai in tu laitak;
Tu ni’n hong ngak, tu ni’n hong ngak;
Na mawh na mah tawh va kuan in niamtak,
Pai in, ki ziakai sak ke’n.

Verse 4
Zeisu in hong zol hi, A’ aw ngai in;
Tu ni’n za in, tu ni’n za in;
Nuamna ngah ding hi, Amah umte in,
Tho in pai pah vingveng in.

hymns.title: Zeisu In Ka Lung Sungah Tum Hi
hymns.title_en: Since Jesus Came into My Heart
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa Zeisu ka lung sungah hong lut phet in
Ka lungsim hong ki kheel pah hi.
Topa Zeisu ka lung sungah hong tum phet in
Ka lung sung khua hong vaak pah hi.

Sakkik:
Topa Zeisu ka lung sung ah
Hong tum hong khawl khit phet in ah
Tuipi kilok bang ka lung sungah khua vaak na
Tha khatin a hong taang pah hi.

Verse 2
Topa Zeisu ka lung sungah hong lut phet in
Lam ka khial nawn kei pah ding hi.
Topa Zeisu ka lung suangah hong tum phet in
Ka mawh khempeuh hong sawp siang hi.

Verse 3
Topa Zeisu ka lung sungah hong lut phet in
Upna a kip ka ngah pah hi.
Topa zeisu ka lung sungah hong lut phet in
Up khialh na teng bei khin pah hi.

Verse 4
Topa Zeisu ka lang sungah hong lut phet in
Sihna kuam pan khuavaak pah hi.
Topa zeisu ka lung sungah hong lut phet in
Khuapi kongkhak kimu pah hi.

hymns.title: Zeisu In Nangma Dahna A Thei Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Dahna a om khempeuh Topa Zeisu’n thei
Lungsim kisikna le thunget na zong thei
Lau keei lo in um in, na lung khauhsak in
Na van Topa suan in, hong nuamsak ding hi.

Verse 2
Zeisu lungsim sung ah nang pha hong sa hi.
Na gal te khut sung ah nang hong gum ding hi.
Ama deih na bang in, lam hong hilh ding hi.
A vaang taan’na mun ah na tung thei ding hi.

Verse 3
Gal na do Zeisu’n thei, na thumna za hi.
Na lung gim lam thei, na kiko na za hi
Na kha tha khauh na’ng in na tai loh na’ng in
Lungsim nuam kong pia ding, na khitui nul ding.

hymns.title: Zeisu Ka Lungsim In Ka Deih
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu ka lungsim in ka deih,
Hong hehpihna nakpi’n ka ngen;
Hong hehpihna itna hong lang,
Amah ke’n ka it pha sem ta.

Sakkik:
Lungsim pha bel, hong guan’suk in,
Tua Kham khuapi ka muh na ding,
Ka lungsim sung hong taang sak in,
Tua khua pi nuam kei aa ding hi.

Verse 2
Lei tung itna sung a nuam pen,
Kiteh thei lo Hong itna tawh;
Kong en to lam etna pi tawh,
Na mai muh ciang lamdang ka sa.

Verse 3
Vantung gam sung nopna kidim,
Paakte hoih na mu ding tua lai;
Za nawn lo ding vantung mi aw,
Ka kha in lamdang sa ding ta.

Verse 4
Nang loin nopna om thei kei,
Ka lungsim hong dam sak thei ding.
Nang na om ciang dahna nuam sak,
Vantung nopna kei sung hong taang.

hymns.title: Zeisu Kei Aading Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa Pasian lo ngal van ah
Muan’ ding dang om lo hi,
Nun’ tak laiteng ka sak ding la,
Zeisu kei aa ding hi.
Topa’n kei tang gim na thuak hi.
A si pha tawh hong sawp zo hi.
Lungsim siangtho hong guan’ zo hi.
Zeisu kei aa ding hi.

Verse 2
Mi a haute ka eng kei hi.
Zeisu kei aa ding hi,
Leitung sum ke’n ka deih kei hi,
Zeisu kei aa ding hi.
Leitung hauh na kip lo ding hi.
Na khempeuh kisia gawp ding hi.
Kei nuamna bei thei lo ding hi.
Zeisu kei aa ding hi.

Verse 3
Zawng a gimna ka thuak hangin
Zeisu kei aa ding hi,
Ka thum nop loh Topa’n thei hi,
Zeisu kei aa ding hi.
Ka sum khempeuh ka zang zong in
Leitung sum a sia khin zong in
Ganhing teng a si khin zong in
Zeisu kei aa ding hi

Verse 4
Galte khut sung ka tung zong in
Zeisu kei aading hi.
Kisiat na in hong uum hang in
Zeisu kei aa ding hi.
Leitung gal a kido hang in
Ka kha in a kap hangin-ah
Topa min tawh ka zo ding hi.
Zeisu kei aa ding hi.

hymns.title: Zeisu Khazih I To!
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Vanpan lei ah kua hong kum?
Zeisu Khazih i To!
Hong suak naungek kiniam khiat,
Zeisu Khazih i To!

Sakkik:
Sa un, A min phatna la,
Gupkhiatna hong tung zo hi;
Tua bang itna pha om kei,
Zeisu Kha zih i To!

Verse 2
Singkhuam tungah kua ki khai?
Zeisu Khazih i To!
Nang leh kei dam na ding in,
Zeisu Khazih i To!

Verse 3
Kua’n maisak ding ci, mawhna?
Zeisu Khazih i To!
Um in, hing un, kua’n hong ci?
Zeisu khazih i To!

Verse 4
Tu’n van tokhom tung kua tu?
Zeisu Khazih i To!
Kua thu zui in, kua it ding?
Zeisu Khazih i To!

Verse 5
Van pan kua hong kum kik ding?
Zeisu Khazih i To!
A mite hong khawm ding in,
Zeisu Khazih i To!

hymns.title: Zeisu Kia’n Singlamteh Pua A
hymns.title_en: Must Jesus Bear the Cross Alone?
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu kia’n singlamteh pua a
Guak pai ding maw lei mi,
Hi lo, Mi kim puak ding om a,
Kei’ puak ding zong om hi.

Verse 2
Singlamteh ke’n ka pua ding hi.
Sih na’n hong khah mateng,
Kumpi lukhu ka ngah ding hi.
Vantung innpi tung leng.

Verse 3
A kikhen let Zeisu khe kiang,
Limlang suangphah tung ah,
Ka kham lukhu ka ngak suk ciang
Nuam in phat ning Amah.

Verse 4
Aw manpha hi, tua singlamteh;
Vanglian kumpi lukhu
Ka ngah ding hi hin’ kik ni teh;
Hong lak ding lawpna thu.

hymns.title: Zeisu Leitungah Hong Kum Kik Ding
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu leitungah hong kum kik ding,
Tuni hi kha leh maw.
Itna tawh hong uk ding hong pai ding,
Tuni hi kha leh maw.
Kikhen a om leitung teng a
A tatsa a sian’tho sak sa
Hong la ding Ama lawm teelsa,
Tuni hi kha leh maw.

Sakkik:
Nuam sing! nuam sing!
Hong lungdam sak ding hi;
Nuam sing! nuam sing!
Amah Kumpi ding hi;
Nuam sing! nuam sing!
Lampi puah mengmeng ni;
Nuam sing! nuam sing!
Zeisu hong pai ding hi.

Verse 2
Dawi mangpa’ uk be bai ta ding hi,
Tuni hi ta leh maw!
Dahna, khuisatna bei ta ding hi,
Tunihi ta leh maw?
Mi site Khazih sung tho ding
Van kim lai ah Amah dawn ding,
Cik ciang hih te ei te’n mu ding,
Tuni hi ta leh maw.

Verse 3
Lung kip thumaanin hong mu tam maw
Tuni in hong pai leh;
Lau lo kipakin hong mu taw maw
Tu ni in hong pai leh;
Hong pai ding lim tam semsem ta,
Zing khua vaak ding mual kiseem ta,
Vil guigiau un a hun nai ta,
Tuni hong hi kha leh.

hymns.title: Zeisu Min
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu’ min bangzah in gnaih hiam,
Ama’ late sasa nuam ing;
Ka lung hong kim sak mahmah hi,
Tua a manpha Zeisu!

Sakkik:
“Zeisu” Aw, bangzah a ngaih min!
“Zeisu” Ni sim in tua mah;
“Zeisu” kici tua min manpha
Phat tek ni a a tawntung.

Verse 2
Zeisu’ min na kem tawntung in,
Gal nam kim kidalna lum;
Hehnep nuamna hong pia ding in,
A’ min siangtho suangin thum.

Verse 3
Zeisu’ min a manpha mah mah,
Bangzah i lung hong damsak,
Hong saan’ ciang Ama ang sung ah,
Ama la i sak lai tak.

Verse 4
Lam tawp vantung i tun’ ciangin,
Zeisu’ khe ah i bok ding;
Kumpi khempeuh tung Kumpi, ci’n
Ama mai ah i bia ding.

hymns.title: Zeisu Min Manpha Na La In
hymns.title_en: Take the Name of Jesus With You
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu’ min manpha na la in,
Dahna’ gimna’ tate aw;
Hehnep, nuamna hong pia ding in,
Na pai na peuhah keng aw.

Sakkik:
Min manpha, ngaih mah mah!
Leitung mite’ lamet na;
Min manpha, ngaih mah mah;
Vantungah lungdam nuam na.

Verse 2
Zeisu’ min na kem tawntung in,
Gal nam kim kidalna lum;
Ze-etna’n hong kimkot ciangin,
A’ min siangtho suangin thum.

Verse 3
Zeisu’ min a manpha mah mah,
Bangzah i lung hong damsak,
Hong saan’ ciang Ama ang sung ah,
Ama la i sak lai tak.

Verse 4
Lam tawp vantung i tun’ ciangin,
Zeisu’ khe ah i bok ding;
Kumpi khempeuh tung Kumpi, ci’n
Ama mai ah i bia ding.

hymns.title: Zeisu Na Min Ngaih Ka It Hi
hymns.title_en: Jesus! I Love Thy Charming Name
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu! Na min ngaih ka it hi,
Bil in tua la ka za;
Nakpi pi-in ging khia sak in,
Vantung leitung thawn in.

Verse 2
Ka kha aa-ding Nang na manpha,
Ka lampi leh ka muan’
Nangma mai-ah suangmanphate,
Milim no zep bang hi.

Verse 3
Ka deih teng leh ka ut khempeuh,
Nang sungah kimtak om;
Kei mit in kiman lo sa keng,
Lawm tak lo bvang sa keng.

Verse 4
Na hihpihna ka lung sung teng,
A namtuina hong bua;
Liamma khempeuh a damsak thei,
Itna tawh hong kem hi.

hymns.title: Zeisu Nangma Deih Bang
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu, Nangma deih bang
Kei mah’n zong deih nuam ing;
Nang ma itna khut sung
Hong kiap khin nuam ing.
Dah na nuamna sungah
Nang mah’n hong tonpih in;
Ci zo nuam ing, Topa
“Nang deih bang hi sak in.”

Verse 2
Zeisu, Nangma deih bang
Luankhi’n liah zel zongin,
Ka upna aksi taang
Mual sak, mang sak kei in.
Nang zong hih leitung ah
Na dahna kap manin,
Nang tawh kap ding in ah
“Nang deih bang hi sak in.”

Verse 3
Zeisu, Nangma deih bang
Kei aa ding pha khin hi.
Mai lam a piang bangbang
Nang mah kong ap khin hi.
Lung patau lo keimah,
Tang tak ka zuan van inn,
Hin’ lai, sih ciang, ka la;
“Nang deih bang hi sak in.”

hymns.title: Zeisu Omna Ding Na Nei Hiam
hymns.title_en: Have You Any Room for Jesus?
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Na mawhna tang a thuak Zeisu
Om nading mun a om hiam
Kongkhak kiu in lut ding hong tu
Mawh neite’n a ngai na diam

Sakkik:
Topa Zeisu min thang Kumpi
A om na’ng mun tu’n bawl in.
Na lungsim kongkhak tan zau in
Hong in na lut sak ding hi.

Verse 2
Na lung sungah na om sak leh
Nuam na hong bawl sak ding hi.
Om na’ng na om sak loh hang in
Na mawhna tang ding si hi.

Verse 3
Topa Zeisu in a hun ciang
A thupha tawh hong sam ding.
Tu ni’n a thupha saang in la,
Zing ciang ngak kei le teh pha

Verse 4
Om na’ng thu a hun na pia in:
A nuam ding ni kheng sak ke’n
Sawt lo in a hong sam ding leh
Na lungsim khoh sak kei ve’n.

hymns.title: Zeisu Singlamteh Nuaiah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu singlamteh nuai ah
Kei mah’n ka beel nuam hi.
Ni sat phatna gam sung pan in
Suangpi liim bang a hi.
Gampa lak ah om lai tak in
Ni sa liah na a hi
Van gik mite’n van khia ding a
A gimte khawl na’ng hi.

Verse 2
Zeisu singlamteh tung ah
Kei tang gimna thuak hi.
A pumpi a siat lai takin
Kei mah’n ka mu thei hi.
Ka et lai ka khitui luang a
Dah in ah ka liing hi.
Tua itna bang dang om lo a
Gilo mihing ka ci.

Verse 3
Zeisu singlamteh liim sung
Kei ma omna a hi.
Zeisu maitang vaang sim loh in
Ni taang dang om lo hi,
Leitung ah sum bang in tua te
A met zang thei lopi.
Ka mawhna zumhuai na a hi
Singlamteh that na hi.

hymns.title: Zeisu Singlamteh Nuaiah
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu singlamteh nuai ah
Kei mah’n ka beel nuam hi.
Ni sat phatna gam sung pan in
Suangpi liim bang a hi.
Gampa lak ah om lai tak in
Ni sa liah na a hi
Van gik mite’n van khia ding a
A gimte khawl na’ng hi.

Verse 2
Zeisu singlamteh tung ah
Kei tang gimna thuak hi.
A pumpi a siat lai takin
Kei mah’n ka mu thei hi.
Ka et lai ka khitui luang a
Dah in ah ka liing hi.
Tua itna bang dang om lo a
Gilo mihing ka ci.

Verse 3
Zeisu singlamteh liim sung
Kei ma omna a hi.
Zeisu maitang vaang sim loh in
Ni taang dang om lo hi,
Leitung ah sum bang in tua te
A met zang thei lopi.
A mawhna zumhuai na a hi
Singlamteh that na hi.

hymns.title: Zeisu Tangthu Kei Hong Gen In
hymns.title_en: Tell Me the Story of Jesus
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu tangthu kei hong hilh in,
A thu ka lung sung gelh in,
A manpha tangthu hong gen in,
Zak ngei nai loh thu khum pen;
A suah lai vantung mite sak,
La ngaih te hong sak dih in,
Sang bel na ah Pasian thang hen,
Leitung kilem na om hen.

Sakkik:
Zeisu tangthu kei hong hilh in,
A thu ka lung sung gelh in,
A manpha pen Zeisu tangthu,
Kei hong ciamteh thei sak in.

Verse 2
Seh nel gam an ngawl in om a,
A hih teng hong gen gen in,
Ei mawhna hang ze-etna a thuak
Thuak hang a zawh tei tei na
A thuak kum sung hong gen dih in
Dahna gimna a puak teng,
Bawlsiat cilphih a thuak na
Sim mawh nilkhiat a thuakna.

Verse 3
Singlamteh in kilh a thuak na,
Na sa’n lunggim a om na,
Han sung guang a, a ki cin’ na
Sih na pan a hin’ kik na
Hong gen gen in a tangthu te
Ka muh ngei loh a siang zaw’n,
Khitui luang in hong kap sak hi.
Kei hong tan tua itna in.

hymns.title: Zeisu Tawh Mun Khempeuh
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu tawh mun khempeuh ka pai khawm ding hi.
Kikhen lo in hong khahna ka zui ding hi.
A khe kiang ah tu leh lau na om lo a,
Zeisu tawh mun khempeuh ka pai khawm ding hi.

Sakkik:
Pai khawm ding, mun khempeuh
lauh na om thei kei.
Zeisu tawh mun khempeuh
ka pai khawm ding hi.

Verse 2
Mun khempeuh kei guak hi kei, Zeisu tawh hi.
Lawmte’n nusia hang in Zeisu kei aa hi.
Lam haksa hang a khut tawh hong kha ding a,
Zeisu tawh mun khempeuh ka pai khawm ding hi.

Verse 3
Zeisu tawh mun khempeuh kei ka lum thei a,
Sihna a liim in hong kiimkot hang in ah,
Ka thawh ciang kawi vak nawn lo ding ka thei hi.
Zeisu tawh mun khemepuh ka pai khawm ding hi.

hymns.title: Zeisu Tawh Pai Peuh Leng
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lau na nam kim om na
mual kuam thuk sung a hi zong
Lau na om lo ni taang khua
vaak sung mah a hi zong
Khua sia ta leh, khua pha ta leh
ke’n khat thei ing
Zeisu’n hong zui peuh leh
koi ma peuh pai ning.

Sakkik:
Zeisu tawh ton peuh leng pai ning,
Koi ma peuh, Kei aa’n van tung hi,
Koi ah om ta leng, Hong om peuh leh,
A singlamteh ka pua ding
Kei ham phat na hi;
Zeisu’n hong zui peuh leh
Pai ning koi ma peuh!

Verse 2
Nuntak lung dam na thu pha
ka puak pel mawh ding hi.
Seh nel ni so kan tan in,
mawhna dim buai na ah
Kei ma mel bang pua in
tua mun ka pha ding hi,
Zeisu’n hong zui peuh leh
koi ma peuh pai ning

Verse 3
Mi dang te in amau
van gik pua in a om lai,
Ke’n ka singlamteh pua in,
inn ah ka om ding a,
Ama aa ding teci
pang in upna lak ning
Kei tawh hong om peuh leh,
koi ma peuh om ning

hymns.title: Zeisu Thu Hong Hilh Dih In
hymns.title_en: Tell Me The Stories of Jesus
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu tangthu hong gen dih in,
ke’n za nuam ing;
Hih lai ah hong om hi leh,
bang ka gen ding hiam;
Lam gei a muh teng, tuipi’ tangthu
Zeisu’ tangthu te Kei hong hilh in

Verse 2
A masa in naupang te tawh
a ki kholhna,
Tua ciang, Ama thupha piak te
kei tung om hi:
Gitna kambek dim hehpihna dim
Itna khuavak taang Zeisu mai tang.

Verse 3
Khuapi sungah ka zui ding hi,
Naupang hon tawh,
Dial lek in, nisuh hiang tawi in,
Khut tawh lam in,
Ci in, “Hosiana” Zeisu Kumpi!
Amah phatna la nakpi tak in.

hymns.title: Zeisu Thu Ngaihsut Lai Takin
hymns.title_en: Jesus, the Very Thought of Thee
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu thu ngaihsut lai tak in
Lungdam huai mah mah hi.
Hih sang a mai ka muh ciang in
Lungdam zaw lai ding hi.

Verse 2
Zeisu a kici min sang in
Min ngaih zaw om lopi
Vantung leitung a hi zong in
Kimu zo ngei lo hi.

Verse 3
Dah na a thuak te a muan’na
Lungniam khiat te nuam na
Thu ngen a zong mite aa ding
It na lian bel hi ta.

Verse 4
Na muh mite kilak thei kei
Thupha a ngah uh hi.
A kisim khin zo lo itna
Topa Zeisu thu hi.

Verse 5
Topa Zeisu nangmah sim lo
Nuamna dang om nawn lo.
Tu leh nung ciang a tawntungin
Ko mau phat ding om in.

hymns.title: Zeisu Um In
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Ni sim in Zeisu a min
Um in. Huihpi nun’ ciang in
Tha upna a tawm hang in
Zeisu bek um in muang in.

Sakkik:
Ni sim in Zeisu Topa
Um in beel in muang in la
Lai Siangtho hong hilh bang in
Zeisu bek um in muang in.

Verse 2
Kha Siangtho kei mah tungah
Hong taang hi, ka sin sungah
Lam hong hilh leh puk zo lo
Zeisu bek thu um khin zo.

Verse 3
Lam a nop leh la sa ta,
Khua hong mial leh thum in la
Gim na thuak ciang thu ngen in
Zeisu bek um in maung in.

Verse 4
Ka mun’tak lai van le lei
Bei mateng um khial nawn kei.
Tun’ mateng vantung khuapi
Zeisu bek i um ding hi.

hymns.title: Zeisu’n Hong It Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu’n hong it ka thei hi,
Lai Siangtho in hong gen hi;
A neu a hat lo mite,
Amah hat, hong huh na ve.

Sakkik:
Zeisu’n hong it hi,
Zeisu’n hong it hi,
Zeisu’n hong it hi,
Lai Siantho in gen hi.

Verse 2
Zeisu’n hong it man si a,
Vantung kong hong honsak ta;
Ka mawhna hong sawp sak ding,
Vantung ah hong lut sak ding.

Verse 3
Zeisu’n ka zawng khal hang in,
Hong it lailai veve in,
A taang vantung tokhom pan,
Ka lupna hong vil Amah’n.

hymns.title: Zeisu’n I Thumna Hong Za
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu’n i thumna hong za;
A migi i tuucing Pa’n,
Na hehpihna tawh kote
Lungsim bit-tak hong keem in.
Amen.

Verse 2
Nang sung ka tha bat nang un;
Natna khempeuh nuamsak in;
Na deih bang hong hi sak in
Lungdam hiah kimuh kik nang.
Amen.

hymns.title: Zeisu’n Taang Ding Hong Sawl
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zeisu in eite khuai meivak bang in,
Zan khua mialna sungah taang in hong sawl hi;
Hih leitung khuamial sung ei i taang ding,
Nang na om na kiim ah, Kei, kei’ kiim ah.

Verse 2
Zeisu’n hong taang sak A ma aa ding in,
I meivak a mial ciang A mah’n hong mu hi;
I meivak taang van pan A mah’n en suk,
Nang na om na kiim ah, Kei, kei’ kiim ah.

Verse 3
Zeisu’n hong taang sak miteng aa ding in,
Khua mial na tampi tawh kidim hih leitung;
Mawhna, dahna, natna sung i taang ding,
Nang na om na kiim ah, Kei, kei’ kiim ah.

hymns.title: Zing Khua Vaak Ta Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zing sang khua hong vaak ta hi.
Khua mialna bei ta hi.
Leitung mite tho khin hi.
Dah in khitui luang hi.
Gam lapi pan huih hual in,
Lungdam na thu hong puak,
Leitung mi nam khempeuh tung,
Zion gal a do ding.

Verse 2
En un lawkite zong kuan,
I it Pasian mai-ah,
Van pan lung damna thu hang,
Tul tampi lung dam hi.
Mawh neite mawhna kisik,
Lungdam na thu zui uh,
Gumpa thuha piak zong in,
Leitung tha khat in zui.

Verse 3
Gup khiat-na gun tui luang hi.
Na mai uh nawt tek un,
Gam khempeuh ah lung un la,
Hauhna tawh khawl kei un.
A zawngkhal pente dong in,
Zawhna tawh inn tun’dong,
Amah phatna la sa in,
“Topa hong pai” ci un.

hymns.title: Zing Ni Suak Sensan Ta
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zing ni suak sensan ta.
Ka lungsim khanglo to
Zeisu Khazih phat huai!
Na sem ding, thu ngen ding,
Zeisu kiang va zuan ning,
Zeisu Kazih phat huai!

Verse 2
Lung sung dah-na om hiam,
Hih-ah ka dah-na kiam,
Zeisu Khazih phat huai!
Leitung nuamna bei le,
