Hehnepna om veve
Zeisu Khazih phat huai!

Verse 3
Vantung lungdamna ah
La a ngaih pen hih mah!
Zeisu Khazih phat huai!
Khuamial vangte’n kihta
A zak uh ciang hih la
Zeisu Khazih phat huai!

Verse 4
Leitung ka hin’ lai teng
Sa ning ka sih mateng;
Zeisu Khazih phat huai!
Sih ciang vantung tung leng
Ka la hih mah hi leng;
Zeisu Khazih phat huai!

hymns.title: Zingsang Mateng Ka Om Ding Hi
hymns.title_en: I’ll Stand By Until the Morning
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A tum dek teembaw kimkot-ah
Huihpi in sem hi.
Huih in len-a kisia dek hi.
Tuipi thuk sung-ah.

Sakkik:
Hong gum Topa ko in,
Hong thu piak ngai in
Zingsang mateng kong ompih ding,
Lau ke’n hong gum ding kong pai hi.
Hi hi, zingsang mateng om pih ding,
Lau ke’n hong gum ding kong pai hi.

Verse 2
Lametna bei a tembaw mi
Lung tha neem ta hi.
Topa sapna aw za uh a
Lungdam khin uh hi.

Verse 3
Tuipi tung huih nun’ phat lai-ah
Teembaw tum dek hi.
A gum ding Zeisu va pai-a
Lungman’ dam thei hi.

Verse 4
No hong it manin hong kum a
Nang tang ding si hi.
Siatna paai in a thu um in.
Inn na tung ding hi.

hymns.title: Zion Khua I Pai Hi
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Topa it teng pai ni,
Lang sak ni i nuamna,
Kituak takin la sa khawm ni
Kituak takin la sa khawm ni
Topa’ tokhom kiim-ah,
Topa’ tokhom kiim-ah.

Sakkik:
Zion khua i pai hi,
A kilawm khua pha pi Zion
I tun’ mateng kah toto ni
Kilawm Pasian khuapi Zion.

Verse 2
Ei’ Pasian thei lo-te’n
Phat nuam ta kei le uh,
Ei vantung Kumpi pa’ ta te’n
Ei vantung Kumpi pa’ ta te’n
Thangsak un nuam na thu,
Thang sak un nuam na thu.

Verse 3
Vantung gam sung tum ma
Kham khua sung sik ma in,
Hong maleep hi siangtho nuamna
Hong maleep hi siangtho nuamna
Zion mualkah lai in,
Zion mualkah lai in.

Verse 4
Tua hi a, la sa un,
Nul un dahna khitui;
Vantung gamah a nopna mun,
Vantung gamah a nopna mun.
Tun’ nading lam i zui,
Tun’ na ding lam i zui.

hymns.title: Zion Khuapi Vaang Ci Hi
hymns.title_en: Glorious Things of Thee Are Spoken
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Zion khua kongpi suak ding in
Lai Siangtho a gen zo hi.
Ciampel ngei lo i Topa in
A omna ding hong bawl hi.
A kip tawntung suang om tung ta
A ki-liing zo kei ding hi.
Gupna ding thu tawh om khawm a
Gal-et in kilawm thei hi.

Verse 2
A hong it tawntung na pan in
A hong luang hin’na lui tui.
Khua tanu le tapate in
Dawn uh a, lungdam uh hi.
Tua bang lui tui om ngei hi leh
Kuamah thakiam lo ding hi.
Thupha hong pia Pasian bangin
Khang khat pan khang khat kip hi.

Verse 3
Tua khuapi laibu sung pan-in
Kei-ma min a kikhum leh
Lawki te’n hong ko hang in ah
Kisathei in om ning kei
Mawhna tawh nuam a omte in
Kisaktheih na mang ding hi.
A manpha bel nop sak-na in
Tua khua bek-ah om ding hi.

hymns.title: Zui Lai Ning
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
Paak tampi a om tui a pha takpi luan’ na
Mual kuam-ah hong gum Topa tawh ka pai ding a
Lam a hong hilh khempeuh Ama nung ka zui ding hi.
Amah tawh kawi pai a vantung tung ding hi.

Sakkik:
Kong zui ding hi. Zeisu kong zui ding hi.
Gamlapi gam khempeuh ah kong zui ding hi.
Kong zui ding hi. Zeisu kong zui ding hi.
A hong hilh lampi teng-ah ka zui ding hi.

Verse 2
Huihpi a nung a tuipi nakpi a luan’na
Mual kuam-ah hong gum Topa tawh ka pai ding a
Amah in ka khut hong let ciangin ka lau kei ding
Topa in hong nai laitak ka lau thei kei.

Verse 3
Mual kuam a hi a, mual sangpi tung ahi zong
Hong gum Topa tawh ki-nai in ka om ding a
Pasian mual tung-ah mihing te a kikhop na ah
Ama tot-sa lampi ah hong kha ding hi.

hymns.title: Zui Un Hong Lampina
hymns.lyrics:
Verse 1
A siangtho tui luan-na mual kuam zui dingin
Zeisu in lam hong pi leh, lungdam zui ning,
Akhut zan in, tuipi hual tung hong sawl zong,
A mangte gup-na ding A thu va puak ning.

Sakkik:
Lam hong hilh bang zui ning,
Lungdam takin zui ning,
Gumpa hong hilh bang lam zui ning,
Lungdam tak zui ning.

Verse 2
Bang-mah om lo, mual sang tung a hi zong in
A lawmte tawh kikhen a mangthang tuuno,
Huih leh guahpi a zu zong, va zong ning,
Gumpa hong lah bang mailam nawt va pai ning.

Verse 3
Ka zui ding hi, Gumpa hong lah mah bang-in
Dah ta leng, nuam ta leng, lugdam in zui ning,
Gumpa’n thei hi, tha muanhuai thu maan lampi,
A tang kham khuapi sungah hong tunpih ding.
